title: Entity Embedding as Game Representation
title_zh: 实体嵌入作为游戏表示
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures
comments: 7 pages, 6 figures
abstract: Procedural content generation via machine learning (PCGML) has shown success at producing new video game content with machine learning. However, the majority of the work has focused on the production of static game content, including game levels and visual elements. There has been much less work on dynamic game content, such as game mechanics. One reason for this is the lack of a consistent representation for dynamic game content, which is key for a number of statistical machine learning approaches. We present an autoencoder for deriving what we call "entity embeddings", a consistent way to represent different dynamic entities across multiple games in the same representation. In this paper we introduce the learned representation, along with some evidence towards its quality and future utility.
summary: Procedural content generation via machine learning (PCGML) has shown success at producing new video game content with machine learning. However, the majority of the work has focused on the production of static game content, including game levels and visual elements. There has been much less work on dynamic game content, such as game mechanics. One reason for this is the lack of a consistent representation for dynamic game content, which is key for a number of statistical machine learning approaches. We present an autoencoder for deriving what we call "entity embeddings", a consistent way to represent different dynamic entities across multiple games in the same representation. In this paper we introduce the learned representation, along with some evidence towards its quality and future utility.
abstract_zh: 通过机器学习生成程序内容 (PCGML) 在利用机器学习制作新视频游戏内容方面取得了成功。然而，大部分工作都集中在静态游戏内容的制作上，包括游戏关卡和视觉元素。关于动态游戏内容（例如游戏机制）的工作要少得多。造成这种情况的原因之一是动态游戏内容缺乏一致的表示，而这对于许多统计机器学习方法来说是关键。我们提出了一种自动编码器，用于派生所谓的“实体嵌入”，这是一种在同一表示中表示多个游戏中不同动态实体的一致方法。在本文中，我们介绍了学习到的表示，以及有关其质量和未来实用性的一些证据。

AI.tldr: 提出一种自编码器方法生成实体嵌入，用于表示动态游戏内容的一致表示。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对动态游戏内容（如游戏机制）的一致表示，限制了统计机器学习方法的应用，需开发统一的表示方法。
AI.method: 采用自编码器架构学习不同游戏中动态实体的嵌入表示，实现跨游戏的一致性编码。
AI.result: 验证了实体嵌入的有效性，并展示了其在动态游戏内容分析中的潜在应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 实体嵌入为动态游戏内容提供了统一表示框架，为后续PCGML研究奠定了基础。

title: Generating Gameplay-Relevant Art Assets with Transfer Learning
title_zh: 通过迁移学习生成与游戏玩法相关的艺术资产
comment: 7 pages, 8 figures
comments: 7 pages, 8 figures
abstract: In game development, designing compelling visual assets that convey gameplay-relevant features requires time and experience. Recent image generation methods that create high-quality content could reduce development costs, but these approaches do not consider game mechanics. We propose a Convolutional Variational Autoencoder (CVAE) system to modify and generate new game visuals based on their gameplay relevance. We test this approach with Pokémon sprites and Pokémon type information, since types are one of the game's core mechanics and they directly impact the game's visuals. Our experimental results indicate that adopting a transfer learning approach can help to improve visual quality and stability over unseen data.
summary: In game development, designing compelling visual assets that convey gameplay-relevant features requires time and experience. Recent image generation methods that create high-quality content could reduce development costs, but these approaches do not consider game mechanics. We propose a Convolutional Variational Autoencoder (CVAE) system to modify and generate new game visuals based on their gameplay relevance. We test this approach with Pokémon sprites and Pokémon type information, since types are one of the game's core mechanics and they directly impact the game's visuals. Our experimental results indicate that adopting a transfer learning approach can help to improve visual quality and stability over unseen data.
abstract_zh: 在游戏开发中，设计传达游戏相关功能的引人注目的视觉资产需要时间和经验。最近创建高质量内容的图像生成方法可以降低开发成本，但这些方法没有考虑游戏机制。我们提出了一种卷积变分自动编码器（CVAE）系统，用于根据游戏玩法相关性修改和生成新的游戏视觉效果。我们使用神奇宝贝精灵和神奇宝贝类型信息来测试这种方法，因为类型是游戏的核心机制之一，它们直接影响游戏的视觉效果。我们的实验结果表明，采用迁移学习方法有助于提高未见数据的视觉质量和稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于迁移学习的卷积变分自编码器（CVAE）系统，用于生成与游戏玩法相关的美术资源，以宝可梦精灵和类型信息为实验对象。
AI.motivation: 传统图像生成方法未考虑游戏机制，导致生成的视觉资产可能不符合游戏玩法需求，需结合游戏核心机制提升生成效果。
AI.method: 采用CVAE模型并引入迁移学习，利用宝可梦类型信息（游戏核心机制）作为条件输入，训练模型生成符合玩法特征的视觉资产。
AI.result: 实验表明迁移学习方法在视觉质量和数据稳定性上优于传统方法，能有效生成符合游戏机制的未见过的数据。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习结合CVAE可为游戏开发提供高效生成玩法相关美术资源的新方案，降低开发成本并提升内容适配性。

authors_text: Mallikarjun B R,Ayush Tewari,Hans-Peter Seidel,Mohamed Elgharib,Christian Theobalt
title: Learning Complete 3D Morphable Face Models from Images and Videos
title_zh: 从图像和视频中学习完整的 3D 可变形面部模型
comment: Project Page - https://gvv.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/LeMoMo
comments: Project Page - https://gvv.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/LeMoMo
abstract: Most 3D face reconstruction methods rely on 3D morphable models, which disentangle the space of facial deformations into identity geometry, expressions and skin reflectance. These models are typically learned from a limited number of 3D scans and thus do not generalize well across different identities and expressions. We present the first approach to learn complete 3D models of face identity geometry, albedo and expression just from images and videos. The virtually endless collection of such data, in combination with our self-supervised learning-based approach allows for learning face models that generalize beyond the span of existing approaches. Our network design and loss functions ensure a disentangled parameterization of not only identity and albedo, but also, for the first time, an expression basis. Our method also allows for in-the-wild monocular reconstruction at test time. We show that our learned models better generalize and lead to higher quality image-based reconstructions than existing approaches.
summary: Most 3D face reconstruction methods rely on 3D morphable models, which disentangle the space of facial deformations into identity geometry, expressions and skin reflectance. These models are typically learned from a limited number of 3D scans and thus do not generalize well across different identities and expressions. We present the first approach to learn complete 3D models of face identity geometry, albedo and expression just from images and videos. The virtually endless collection of such data, in combination with our self-supervised learning-based approach allows for learning face models that generalize beyond the span of existing approaches. Our network design and loss functions ensure a disentangled parameterization of not only identity and albedo, but also, for the first time, an expression basis. Our method also allows for in-the-wild monocular reconstruction at test time. We show that our learned models better generalize and lead to higher quality image-based reconstructions than existing approaches.
abstract_zh: 大多数 3D 面部重建方法依赖于 3D 可变形模型，该模型将面部变形空间分解为身份几何、表情和皮肤反射率。这些模型通常是从​​有限数量的 3D 扫描中学习的，因此不能很好地概括不同的身份和表达。我们提出了第一种仅从图像和视频中学习面部身份几何、反照率和表情的完整 3D 模型的方法。此类数据的几乎无穷无尽的收集，与我们基于自我监督的学习方法相结合，可以学习超越现有方法范围的人脸模型。我们的网络设计和损失函数不仅确保了身份和反照率的解开参数化，而且首次确保了表达基础的参数化。我们的方法还允许在测试时进行野外单眼重建。我们表明，与现有方法相比，我们学习的模型可以更好地概括并导致更高质量的基于图像的重建。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从图像和视频中学习完整3D可变形人脸模型的方法，无需依赖传统3D扫描数据。
AI.motivation: 现有3D人脸重建方法依赖有限的3D扫描数据，导致模型在不同身份和表情上泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 基于自监督学习，利用图像和视频数据训练网络，通过设计特定损失函数实现身份几何、反照率和表情参数的解耦表示。
AI.result: 模型在跨身份/表情泛化能力和图像重建质量上优于现有方法，并支持无监督单目重建。
AI.conclusion: 通过海量图像视频数据和自监督学习，实现了首个无需3D扫描的完整3D人脸模型学习方案。

title: Explainability via Responsibility
title_zh: 通过责任进行解释
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures
abstract: Procedural Content Generation via Machine Learning (PCGML) refers to a group of methods for creating game content (e.g. platformer levels, game maps, etc.) using machine learning models. PCGML approaches rely on black box models, which can be difficult to understand and debug by human designers who do not have expert knowledge about machine learning. This can be even more tricky in co-creative systems where human designers must interact with AI agents to generate game content. In this paper we present an approach to explainable artificial intelligence in which certain training instances are offered to human users as an explanation for the AI agent's actions during a co-creation process. We evaluate this approach by approximating its ability to provide human users with the explanations of AI agent's actions and helping them to more efficiently cooperate with the AI agent.

We evaluate this approach by approximating its ability to provide human users with the explanations of AI agent's actions and helping them to more efficiently cooperate with the AI agent.
abstract_zh: 通过机器学习生成程序内容（PCGML）是指使用机器学习模型创建游戏内容（例如平台关卡、游戏地图等）的一组方法。 PCGML 方法依赖于黑盒模型，对于不具备机器学习专业知识的人类设计人员来说，黑盒模型可能难以理解和调试。在共同创意系统中，这可能更加棘手，人类设计师必须与人工智能代理交互才能生成游戏内容。在本文中，我们提出了一种可解释人工智能的方法，其中向人类用户提供某些训练实例，作为共同创建过程中人工智能代理行为的解释。我们通过近似其为人类用户提供人工智能代理行为解释并帮助他们更有效地与人工智能代理合作的能力来评估这种方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过提供训练实例来增强协同创作系统中AI代理行为的可解释性，帮助人类设计师更高效地合作。
AI.motivation: 传统PCGML方法依赖黑箱模型，导致人类设计师难以理解与调试AI行为，尤其在协同创作系统中需要提升可解释性以促进有效合作。
AI.method: 通过在协同创作过程中向用户展示特定训练实例，作为AI代理决策的解释，帮助用户理解其行为逻辑。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效提升用户对AI行为的理解，并增强人机协作效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了通过训练实例解释AI行为的有效性，为协同创作系统中可解释AI的设计提供了可行方案。

title: Spatial Damage Characterization in Self-Sensing Materials via Neural Network-Aided Electrical Impedance Tomography: A Computational Study
title_zh: 通过神经网络辅助电阻抗断层扫描对自感知材料进行空间损伤表征：计算研究
abstract: Continuous structural health monitoring (SHM) and integrated nondestructive evaluation (NDE) are important for ensuring the safe operation of high-risk engineering structures. Recently, piezoresistive nanocomposite materials have received much attention for SHM and NDE. These materials are self-sensing because their electrical conductivity changes in response to deformation and damage. Combined with electrical impedance tomography (EIT), it is possible to map deleterious effects. However, EIT suffers from important limitations -- it is computationally expensive, provides indistinct information on damage shape, and can miss multiple damages if they are close together. In this article we apply a novel neural network approach to quantify damage metrics such as size, number, and location from EIT data. This network is trained using a simulation routine calibrated to experimental data for a piezoresistive carbon nanofiber-modified epoxy. Our results show that the network can predict the number of damages with 99.2% accuracy, quantify damage size with respect to the averaged radius at an average of 2.46% error, and quantify damage position with respect to the domain length at an average of 0.89% error. These results are an important first step in translating the combination of self-sensing materials and EIT to real-world SHM and NDE.
summary: Continuous structural health monitoring (SHM) and integrated nondestructive evaluation (NDE) are important for ensuring the safe operation of high-risk engineering structures. Recently, piezoresistive nanocomposite materials have received much attention for SHM and NDE. These materials are self-sensing because their electrical conductivity changes in response to deformation and damage. Combined with electrical impedance tomography (EIT), it is possible to map deleterious effects. However, EIT suffers from important limitations -- it is computationally expensive, provides indistinct information on damage shape, and can miss multiple damages if they are close together. In this article we apply a novel neural network approach to quantify damage metrics such as size, number, and location from EIT data. This network is trained using a simulation routine calibrated to experimental data for a piezoresistive carbon nanofiber-modified epoxy. Our results show that the network can predict the number of damages with 99.2% accuracy, quantify damage size with respect to the averaged radius at an average of 2.46% error, and quantify damage position with respect to the domain length at an average of 0.89% error. These results are an important first step in translating the combination of self-sensing materials and EIT to real-world SHM and NDE.
abstract_zh: 连续结构健康监测（SHM）和综合无损评估（NDE）对于确保高风险工程结构的安全运行具有重要意义。近年来，压阻纳米复合材料因SHM和NDE而受到广泛关注。这些材料具有自感应功能，因为它们的电导率会随着变形和损坏而变化。与电阻抗断层扫描 (EIT) 相结合，可以绘制有害影响图。然而，EIT 存在重要的局限性——它的计算成本很高，提供的损伤形状信息不明确，并且如果多个损伤靠近的话，可能会错过它们。在本文中，我们应用一种新颖的神经网络方法来量化 EIT 数据中的损坏指标，例如大小、数量和位置。该网络使用根据压阻碳纳米纤维改性环氧树脂的实验数据校准的模拟例程进行训练。我们的结果表明，该网络可以以 99.2% 的准确率预测损伤数量，以平均 2.46% 的误差量化相对于平均半径的损伤大小，并以平均 0.89% 的误差相对于域长度量化损伤位置。这些结果是将自传感材料和 EIT 的组​​合转化为现实世界的 SHM 和 NDE 的重要的第一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的电导率断层扫描（EIT）方法，用于量化自感知材料中的损伤特征。
AI.motivation: 传统EIT技术存在计算成本高、损伤形状识别模糊及难以检测密集损伤等局限，需改进方法以提升结构健康监测（SHM）与无损检测（NDE）的准确性。
AI.method: 通过实验数据校准的仿真程序生成训练数据，利用神经网络从EIT数据中提取损伤数量、尺寸及位置等参数。
AI.result: 神经网络可准确预测损伤数量（99.2%精度），损伤尺寸误差均值为2.46%，损伤位置误差均值为0.89%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自感知材料与EIT技术在实际工程SHM/NDE中的应用提供了关键技术支持，验证了神经网络在提升EIT性能中的有效性。

authors_text: Samuel Budd,Prachi Patkee,Ana Baburamani,Mary Rutherford,Emma C. Robinson,Bernhard Kainz
title: Surface Agnostic Metrics for Cortical Volume Segmentation and Regression
title_zh: 用于皮质体积分割和回归的表面不可知指标
comment: Best Paper Honourable Mentions @ MLCN 2020 (MICCAI 2020)
comments: Best Paper Honourable Mentions @ MLCN 2020 (MICCAI 2020)
abstract: The cerebral cortex performs higher-order brain functions and is thus implicated in a range of cognitive disorders. Current analysis of cortical variation is typically performed by fitting surface mesh models to inner and outer cortical boundaries and investigating metrics such as surface area and cortical curvature or thickness. These, however, take a long time to run, and are sensitive to motion and image and surface resolution, which can prohibit their use in clinical settings. In this paper, we instead propose a machine learning solution, training a novel architecture to predict cortical thickness and curvature metrics from T2 MRI images, while additionally returning metrics of prediction uncertainty. Our proposed model is tested on a clinical cohort (Down Syndrome) for which surface-based modelling often fails. Results suggest that deep convolutional neural networks are a viable option to predict cortical metrics across a range of brain development stages and pathologies.
summary: The cerebral cortex performs higher-order brain functions and is thus implicated in a range of cognitive disorders. Current analysis of cortical variation is typically performed by fitting surface mesh models to inner and outer cortical boundaries and investigating metrics such as surface area and cortical curvature or thickness. These, however, take a long time to run, and are sensitive to motion and image and surface resolution, which can prohibit their use in clinical settings. In this paper, we instead propose a machine learning solution, training a novel architecture to predict cortical thickness and curvature metrics from T2 MRI images, while additionally returning metrics of prediction uncertainty. Our proposed model is tested on a clinical cohort (Down Syndrome) for which surface-based modelling often fails. Results suggest that deep convolutional neural networks are a viable option to predict cortical metrics across a range of brain development stages and pathologies.
abstract_zh: 大脑皮层执行高级大脑功能，因此与一系列认知障碍有关。目前对皮质变化的分析通常是通过将表面网格模型拟合到内部和外部皮质边界并研究表面积和皮质曲率或厚度等指标来进行的。然而，这些需要很长时间才能运行，并且对运动、图像和表面分辨率敏感，这可能会阻碍它们在临床环境中的使用。在本文中，我们提出了一种机器学习解决方案，训练一种新颖的架构来预测 T2 MRI 图像的皮质厚度和曲率指标，同时另外返回预测不确定性的指标。我们提出的模型在临床队列（唐氏综合症）上进行了测试，基于表面的建模经常失败。结果表明，深度卷积神经网络是预测一系列大脑发育阶段和病理的皮质指标的可行选择。

AI.tldr: 开发一种无需表面模型的机器学习方法，利用T2 MRI图像预测皮层厚度和曲率指标，并评估预测不确定性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于表面的皮层分析方法存在计算耗时、对运动和图像分辨率敏感的问题，限制了其在临床中的应用。
AI.method: 采用深度卷积神经网络（CNN）架构，直接从T2 MRI图像预测皮层厚度和曲率指标，并输出预测不确定性。
AI.result: 在唐氏综合征临床队列中验证，结果表明CNN能有效预测皮层指标，且适用于不同脑发育阶段和病理情况。
AI.conclusion: 深度卷积神经网络可作为传统表面模型分析的可行替代方案，适用于临床皮层指标预测。

ai_content.tldr: 开发一种无需表面模型的机器学习方法，利用T2 MRI图像预测皮层厚度和曲率指标，并评估预测不确定性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有基于表面的皮层分析方法存在计算耗时、对运动和图像分辨率敏感的问题，限制了其在临床中的应用。
ai_content.method: 采用深度卷积神经网络（CNN）架构，直接从T2 MRI图像预测皮层厚度和曲率指标，并输出预测不确定性。
ai_content.result: 在唐氏综合征临床队列中验证，结果表明CNN能有效预测皮层指标，且适用于不同脑发育阶段和病理情况。
ai_content.conclusion: 深度卷积神经网络可作为传统表面模型分析的可行替代方案，适用于临床皮层指标预测。

search_text: Surface Agnostic Metrics for Cortical Volume Segmentation and Regression 用于皮质体积分割和回归的表面不可知指标 The cerebral cortex performs higher-order brain functions and is thus implicated in a range of cognitive disorders. Current analysis of cortical variation is typically performed by fitting surface mesh models to inner and outer cortical boundaries and investigating metrics such as surface area and cortical curvature or thickness. These, however, take a long time to run, and are sensitive to motion and image and surface resolution, which can prohibit their use in clinical settings. In this paper, we instead propose a machine learning solution, training a novel architecture to predict cortical thickness and curvature metrics from T2 MRI images, while additionally returning metrics of prediction uncertainty. Our proposed model is tested on a clinical cohort (Down Syndrome) for which surface-based modelling often fails. Results suggest that deep convolutional neural networks are a viable option to predict cortical metrics across a range of brain development stages and pathologies. 大脑皮层执行高级大脑功能，因此与一系列认知障碍有关。目前对皮质变化的分析通常是通过将表面网格模型拟合到内部和外部皮质边界并研究表面积和皮质曲率或厚度等指标来进行的。然而，这些需要很长时间才能运行，并且对运动、图像和表面分辨率敏感，这可能会阻碍它们在临床环境中的使用。在本文中，我们提出了一种机器学习解决方案，训练一种新颖的架构来预测 T2 MRI 图像的皮质厚度和曲率指标，同时另外返回预测不确定性的指标。我们提出的模型在临床队列（唐氏综合症）上进行了测试，基于表面的建模经常失败。结果表明，深度卷积神经网络是预测一系列大脑发育阶段和病理的皮质指标的可行选择。 开发一种无需表面模型的机器学习方法，利用T2 MRI图像预测皮层厚度和曲率指标，并评估预测不确定性。 Samuel Budd,Prachi Patkee,Ana Baburamani,Mary Rutherford,Emma C. Robinson,Bernhard Kainz eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Multi-Resolution Fusion and Multi-scale Input Priors Based Crowd Counting
title_zh: 基于多分辨率融合和多尺度输入先验的人群计数
abstract: Crowd counting in still images is a challenging problem in practice due to huge crowd-density variations, large perspective changes, severe occlusion, and variable lighting conditions. The state-of-the-art patch rescaling module (PRM) based approaches prove to be very effective in improving the crowd counting performance. However, the PRM module requires an additional and compromising crowd-density classification process. To address these issues and challenges, the paper proposes a new multi-resolution fusion based end-to-end crowd counting network. It employs three deep-layers based columns/branches, each catering the respective crowd-density scale. These columns regularly fuse (share) the information with each other. The network is divided into three phases with each phase containing one or more columns. Three input priors are introduced to serve as an efficient and effective alternative to the PRM module, without requiring any additional classification operations. Along with the final crowd count regression head, the network also contains three auxiliary crowd estimation regression heads, which are strategically placed at each phase end to boost the overall performance. Comprehensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms all the state-of-the-art models under the RMSE evaluation metric. The proposed approach also has better generalization capability with the best results during the cross-dataset experiments.
summary: Crowd counting in still images is a challenging problem in practice due to huge crowd-density variations, large perspective changes, severe occlusion, and variable lighting conditions. The state-of-the-art patch rescaling module (PRM) based approaches prove to be very effective in improving the crowd counting performance. However, the PRM module requires an additional and compromising crowd-density classification process. To address these issues and challenges, the paper proposes a new multi-resolution fusion based end-to-end crowd counting network. It employs three deep-layers based columns/branches, each catering the respective crowd-density scale. These columns regularly fuse (share) the information with each other. The network is divided into three phases with each phase containing one or more columns. Three input priors are introduced to serve as an efficient and effective alternative to the PRM module, without requiring any additional classification operations. Along with the final crowd count regression head, the network also contains three auxiliary crowd estimation regression heads, which are strategically placed at each phase end to boost the overall performance. Comprehensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms all the state-of-the-art models under the RMSE evaluation metric. The proposed approach also has better generalization capability with the best results during the cross-dataset experiments.
abstract_zh: 由于巨大的人群密度变化、大的视角变化、严重的遮挡和可变的照明条件，静态图像中的人群计数在实践中是一个具有挑战性的问题。事实证明，基于最先进的补丁重新缩放模块（PRM）的方法对于提高人群计数性能非常有效。然而，PRM 模块需要额外的、折衷的人群密度分类过程。为了解决这些问题和挑战，本文提出了一种新的基于多分辨率融合的端到端人群计数网络。它采用三个基于深层的柱/分支，每个柱/分支迎合各自的人群密度规模。这些专栏定期相互融合（共享）信息。该网络分为三个阶段，每个阶段包含一个或多个列。引入三个输入先验作为 PRM 模块的高效替代方案，无需任何额外的分类操作。除了最终的人群计数回归头之外，网络还包含三个辅助人群估计回归头，它们战略性地放置在每个阶段结束处以提高整体性能。对三个基准数据集的综合实验表明，所提出的方法在 RMSE 评估指标下优于所有最先进的模型。所提出的方法还具有更好的泛化能力，在跨数据集实验中获得了最佳结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多分辨率融合和多尺度输入先验的端到端人群计数网络，以解决传统方法在复杂场景下的性能局限。
AI.motivation: 现有基于补丁重缩放模块（PRM）的方法需额外密度分类步骤，且难以应对人群密度变化、视角变化和遮挡等挑战。
AI.method: 设计包含三个深度分支的网络架构，通过多分辨率融合共享信息，并引入三种输入先验替代PRM模块，结合三个辅助回归头提升性能。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上，该方法在RMSE指标下优于所有现有模型，且跨数据集实验表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多分辨率融合框架无需额外分类操作，有效提升了人群计数的准确性和泛化能力。

To address these issues and challenges, the paper proposes a new multi-resolution fusion based end-to-end crowd counting network. It employs three deep-layers based columns/branches, each catering the respective crowd-density scale. These columns regularly fuse (share) the information with each other. Along with the final crowd count regression head, the network also contains three auxiliary crowd estimation regression heads, which are strategically placed at each phase end to boost the overall performance. Comprehensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms all the state-of-the-art models under the RMSE evaluation metric. authors_text: Jeya Maria Jose Valanarasu,Vishwanath A. Sindagi,Ilker Hacihaliloglu,Vishal M. Patel
title: KiU-Net: Overcomplete Convolutional Architectures for Biomedical Image and Volumetric Segmentation
title_zh: KiU-Net：用于生物医学图像和体积分割的超完备卷积架构
comment: Journal Extension of KiU-Net (MICCAI-2020)
comments: Journal Extension of KiU-Net (MICCAI-2020)
abstract: Most methods for medical image segmentation use U-Net or its variants as they have been successful in most of the applications. After a detailed analysis of these "traditional" encoder-decoder based approaches, we observed that they perform poorly in detecting smaller structures and are unable to segment boundary regions precisely. This issue can be attributed to the increase in receptive field size as we go deeper into the encoder. The extra focus on learning high level features causes the U-Net based approaches to learn less information about low-level features which are crucial for detecting small structures. To overcome this issue, we propose using an overcomplete convolutional architecture where we project our input image into a higher dimension such that we constrain the receptive field from increasing in the deep layers of the network. We design a new architecture for image segmentation- KiU-Net which has two branches: (1) an overcomplete convolutional network Kite-Net which learns to capture fine details and accurate edges of the input, and (2) U-Net which learns high level features. Furthermore, we also propose KiU-Net 3D which is a 3D convolutional architecture for volumetric segmentation. We perform a detailed study of KiU-Net by performing experiments on five different datasets covering various image modalities like ultrasound (US), magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), computed tomography (CT), microscopic and fundus images. The proposed method achieves a better performance as compared to all the recent methods with an additional benefit of fewer parameters and faster convergence. Additionally, we also demonstrate that the extensions of KiU-Net based on residual blocks and dense blocks result in further performance improvements. The implementation of KiU-Net can be found here: https://github.com/jeya-maria-jose/KiU-Net-pytorch
summary: Most methods for medical image segmentation use U-Net or its variants as they have been successful in most of the applications. After a detailed analysis of these "traditional" encoder-decoder based approaches, we observed that they perform poorly in detecting smaller structures and are unable to segment boundary regions precisely. This issue can be attributed to the increase in receptive field size as we go deeper into the encoder. The extra focus on learning high level features causes the U-Net based approaches to learn less information about low-level features which are crucial for detecting small structures. To overcome this issue, we propose using an overcomplete convolutional architecture where we project our input image into a higher dimension such that we constrain the receptive field from increasing in the deep layers of the network. We design a new architecture for image segmentation- KiU-Net which has two branches: (1) an overcomplete convolutional network Kite-Net which learns to capture fine details and accurate edges of the input, and (2) U-Net which learns high level features. Furthermore, we also propose KiU-Net 3D which is a 3D convolutional architecture for volumetric segmentation. We perform a detailed study of KiU-Net by performing experiments on five different datasets covering various image modalities like ultrasound (US), magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), computed tomography (CT), microscopic and fundus images. The proposed method achieves a better performance as compared to all the recent methods with an additional benefit of fewer parameters and faster convergence. Additionally, we also demonstrate that the extensions of KiU-Net based on residual blocks and dense blocks result in further performance improvements. The implementation of KiU-Net can be found here: https://github.com/jeya-maria-jose/KiU-Net-pytorch
abstract_zh: 大多数医学图像分割方法都使用 U-Net 或其变体，因为它们在大多数应用中都取得了成功。在对这些“传统”编码器-解码器方法进行详细分析后，我们发现它们在检测较小结构方面表现不佳，并且无法精确分割边界区域。这个问题可以归因于随着我们深入编码器，感受野大小的增加。对学习高级特征的额外关注导致基于 U-Net 的方法学习到的关于低级特征的信息较少，而低级特征对于检测小结构至关重要。为了克服这个问题，我们建议使用超完备卷积架构，将输入图像投影到更高的维度，从而限制感受野在网络深层的增加。我们设计了一种新的图像分割架构 - KiU-Net，它有两个分支：(1) 超完备卷积网络 Kite-Net，它学习捕获输入的精细细节和准确边缘；(2) U-Net，它学习高级特征。此外，我们还提出了 KiU-Net 3D，它是一种用于体积分割的 3D 卷积架构。我们通过对涵盖各种图像模式的五个不同数据集进行实验，对 KiU-Net 进行了详细研究，例如超声 (US)、磁共振成像 (MRI)、计算机断层扫描 (CT)、显微图像和眼底图像。与所有最近的方法相比，所提出的方法实现了更好的性能，并且具有参数更少和收敛速度更快的额外优点。此外，我们还证明基于残差块和密集块的 KiU-Net 扩展可以进一步提高性能。 KiU-Net 的实现可以在这里找到：https://github.com/jeya-maria-jose/KiU-Net-pytorch

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为KiU-Net的过完备卷积架构，用于改进生物医学图像和体积分割，通过结合细粒度特征提取与高层特征学习解决传统U-Net在小结构和边界区域分割中的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统U-Net及其变体在分割小结构和边界区域时表现不佳，因其深层网络的感受野增大导致对低级特征学习不足，而低级特征对检测小结构至关重要。
AI.method: 设计了KiU-Net双分支架构：(1) Kite-Net分支通过过完备卷积捕捉细粒度细节和精确边缘；(2) U-Net分支学习高层特征。同时提出3D版本KiU-Net 3D用于体积分割，并通过残差块和密集块扩展进一步优化性能。
AI.result: 在五个涵盖超声、MRI、CT等模态的数据集上，KiU-Net相较最新方法取得更优分割效果，参数更少且收敛更快，残差/密集块扩展进一步提升性能。
AI.conclusion: KiU-Net通过过完备卷积约束深层感受野增长，有效结合低级细节与高层语义特征，在生物医学图像分割任务中实现了精度与效率的平衡。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为KiU-Net的过完备卷积架构，用于改进生物医学图像和体积分割，通过结合细粒度特征提取与高层特征学习解决传统U-Net在小结构和边界区域分割中的不足。
motivation: 传统U-Net及其变体在分割小结构和边界区域时表现不佳，因其深层网络的感受野增大导致对低级特征学习不足，而低级特征对检测小结构至关重要。
method: 设计了KiU-Net双分支架构：(1) Kite-Net分支通过过完备卷积捕捉细粒度细节和精确边缘；(2) U-Net分支学习高层特征。同时提出3D版本KiU-Net 3D用于体积分割，并通过残差块和密集块扩展进一步优化性能。
result: 在五个涵盖超声、MRI、CT等模态的数据集上，KiU-Net相较最新方法取得更优分割效果，参数更少且收敛更快，残差/密集块扩展进一步提升性能。
conclusion: KiU-Net通过过完备卷积约束深层感受野增长，有效结合低级细节与高层语义特征，在生物医学图像分割任务中实现了精度与效率的平衡。
search_text: KiU-Net: Overcomplete Convolutional Architectures for Biomedical Image and Volumetric Segmentation KiU-Net：用于生物医学图像和体积分割的超完备卷积架构 Most methods for medical image segmentation use U-Net or its variants as they have been successful in most of the applications. After a detailed analysis of these "traditional" encoder-decoder based approaches, we observed that they perform poorly in detecting smaller structures and are unable to segment boundary regions precisely. This issue can be attributed to the increase in receptive field size as we go deeper into the encoder. The extra focus on learning high level features causes the U-Net based approaches to learn less information about low-level features which are crucial for detecting small structures. To overcome this issue, we propose using an overcomplete convolutional architecture where we project our input image into a higher dimension such that we constrain the receptive field from increasing in the deep layers of the network. We design a new architecture for image segmentation- KiU-Net which has two branches: (1) an overcomplete convolutional network Kite-Net which learns to capture fine details and accurate edges of the input, and (2) U-Net which learns high level features. Furthermore, we also propose KiU-Net 3D which is a 3D convolutional architecture for volumetric segmentation. We perform a detailed study of KiU-Net by performing experiments on five different datasets covering various image modalities like ultrasound (US), magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), computed tomography (CT), microscopic and fundus images. The proposed method achieves a better performance as compared to all the recent methods with an additional benefit of fewer parameters and faster convergence. Additionally, we also demonstrate that the extensions of KiU-Net based on residual blocks and dense blocks result in further performance improvements. The implementation of KiU-Net can be found here: https://github.com/jeya-maria-jose/KiU-Net-pytorch 大多数医学图像分割方法都使用 U-Net 或其变体，因为它们在大多数应用中都取得了成功。在对这些“传统”编码器-解码器方法进行详细分析后，我们发现它们在检测较小结构方面表现不佳，并且无法精确分割边界区域。这个问题可以归因于随着我们深入编码器，感受野大小的增加。对学习高级特征的额外关注导致基于 U-Net 的方法学习到的关于低级特征的信息较少，而低级特征对于检测小结构至关重要。为了克服这个问题，我们建议使用超完备卷积架构，将输入图像投影到更高的维度，从而限制感受野在网络深层的增加。我们设计了一种新的图像分割架构 - KiU-Net，它有两个分支：(1) 超完备卷积网络 Kite-Net，它学习捕获输入的精细细节和准确边缘；(2) U-Net，它学习高级特征。此外，我们还提出了 KiU-Net 3D，它是一种用于体积分割的 3D 卷积架构。我们通过对涵盖各种图像模式的五个不同数据集进行实验，对 KiU-Net 进行了详细研究，例如超声 (US)、磁共振成像 (MRI)、计算机断层扫描 (CT)、显微图像和眼底图像。与所有最近的方法相比，所提出的方法实现了更好的性能，并且具有参数更少和收敛速度更快的额外优点。此外，我们还证明基于残差块和密集块的 KiU-Net 扩展可以进一步提高性能。 KiU-Net 的实现可以在这里找到：https://github.com/jeya-maria-jose/KiU-Net-pytorch 本文提出了一种名为KiU-Net的过完备卷积架构，用于改进生物医学图像和体积分割，通过结合细粒度特征提取与高层特征学习解决传统U-Net在小结构和边界区域分割中的不足。 Jeya Maria Jose Valanarasu,Vishwanath A. Sindagi,Ilker Hacihaliloglu,Vishal M. Patel eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Zhilong Chen,Hancheng Cao,Yuting Deng,Xuan Gao,Jinghua Piao,Fengli Xu,Yu Zhang,Yong Li
title: Learning from Home: A Mixed-Methods Analysis of Live Streaming Based Remote Education Experience in Chinese Colleges During the COVID-19 Pandemic
title_zh: 在家学习：COVID-19 大流行期间中国大学基于直播的远程教育体验的混合方法分析
comment: Zhilong Chen and Hancheng Cao contribute equally to this work; Accepted to CHI 2021
comments: Zhilong Chen and Hancheng Cao contribute equally to this work; Accepted to CHI 2021
abstract: The COVID-19 global pandemic and resulted lockdown policies have forced education in nearly every country to switch from a traditional co-located paradigm to a pure online 'distance learning from home' paradigm. Lying in the center of this learning paradigm shift is the emergence and wide adoption of distance communication tools and live streaming platforms for education. Here, we present a mixed-methods study on live streaming based education experience during the COVID-19 pandemic. We focus our analysis on Chinese higher education, carried out semi-structured interviews on 30 students, and 7 instructors from diverse colleges and disciplines, meanwhile launched a large-scale survey covering 6291 students and 1160 instructors in one leading Chinese university. Our study not only reveals important design guidelines and insights to better support current remote learning experience during the pandemic, but also provides valuable implications towards constructing future collaborative education supporting systems and experience after pandemic.
summary: The COVID-19 global pandemic and resulted lockdown policies have forced education in nearly every country to switch from a traditional co-located paradigm to a pure online 'distance learning from home' paradigm. Lying in the center of this learning paradigm shift is the emergence and wide adoption of distance communication tools and live streaming platforms for education. Here, we present a mixed-methods study on live streaming based education experience during the COVID-19 pandemic. We focus our analysis on Chinese higher education, carried out semi-structured interviews on 30 students, and 7 instructors from diverse colleges and disciplines, meanwhile launched a large-scale survey covering 6291 students and 1160 instructors in one leading Chinese university. Our study not only reveals important design guidelines and insights to better support current remote learning experience during the pandemic, but also provides valuable implications towards constructing future collaborative education supporting systems and experience after pandemic.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 全球大流行以及由此产生的封锁政策迫使几乎每个国家的教育从传统的同地办公模式转变为纯粹的在线“在家远程学习”模式。这种学习范式转变的核心是远程通信工具和教育直播平台的出现和广泛采用。在这里，我们提出了一项关于 COVID-19 大流行期间基于直播的教育体验的混合方法研究。我们重点分析中国高等教育，对来自不同学院和学科的 30 名学生和 7 名教师进行了半结构化访谈，同时对中国一所领先大学的 6291 名学生和 1160 名教师进行了大规模调查。我们的研究不仅揭示了重要的设计指南和见解，以更好地支持当前大流行期间的远程学习体验，而且还为大流行后构建未来的协作教育支持系统和经验提供了宝贵的启示。

AI.tldr: 本文通过混合方法研究分析了中国高校在新冠疫情期间基于直播的远程教育体验。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情迫使全球教育转向在线模式，直播平台成为主要教学工具，需探讨其效果与优化方向。
AI.method: 采用混合方法，包括对30名学生和7名教师的半结构化访谈，以及对中国一所顶尖大学6291名学生和1160名教师的大规模问卷调查。
AI.result: 揭示了提升疫情期间远程学习体验的设计指南，并为后疫情时代协作教育系统建设提供了启示。
AI.conclusion: 研究为当前远程教育实践和未来教育系统发展提供了理论支持与实践建议。

authors_text: Huyen N. Nguyen,Vinh T. Nguyen,Tommy Dang
title: Interface Design for HCI Classroom: From Learners' Perspective
title_zh: 人机交互课堂界面设计：从学习者的角度
comment: 12 pages, 4 figures, 15th International Symposium on Visual Computing 2020
comments: 12 pages, 4 figures, 15th International Symposium on Visual Computing 2020
abstract: Having a good Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) design is challenging. Previous works have contributed significantly to fostering HCI, including design principle with report study from the instructor view. The questions of how and to what extent students perceive the design principles are still left open. To answer this question, this paper conducts a study of HCI adoption in the classroom. The studio-based learning method was adapted to teach 83 graduate and undergraduate students in 16 weeks long with four activities. A standalone presentation tool for instant online peer feedback during the presentation session was developed to help students justify and critique other's work. Our tool provides a sandbox, which supports multiple application types, including Web-applications, Object Detection, Web-based Virtual Reality (VR), and Augmented Reality (AR). After presenting one assignment and two projects, our results showed that students acquired a better understanding of the Golden Rules principle over time, which was demonstrated by the development of visual interface design. The Wordcloud reveals the primary focus was on the user interface and shed some light on students' interest in user experience. The inter-rater score indicates the agreement among students that they have the same level of understanding of the principles. The results show a high level of guideline compliance with HCI principles, in which we witnessed variations in visual cognitive styles. Regardless of diversity in visual preference, the students presented high consistency and a similar perspective on adopting HCI design principles. The results also elicited suggestions into the development of the HCI curriculum in the future.
summary: Having a good Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) design is challenging. Previous works have contributed significantly to fostering HCI, including design principle with report study from the instructor view. The questions of how and to what extent students perceive the design principles are still left open. To answer this question, this paper conducts a study of HCI adoption in the classroom. The studio-based learning method was adapted to teach 83 graduate and undergraduate students in 16 weeks long with four activities. A standalone presentation tool for instant online peer feedback during the presentation session was developed to help students justify and critique other's work. Our tool provides a sandbox, which supports multiple application types, including Web-applications, Object Detection, Web-based Virtual Reality (VR), and Augmented Reality (AR). After presenting one assignment and two projects, our results showed that students acquired a better understanding of the Golden Rules principle over time, which was demonstrated by the development of visual interface design. The Wordcloud reveals the primary focus was on the user interface and shed some light on students' interest in user experience. The inter-rater score indicates the agreement among students that they have the same level of understanding of the principles. The results show a high level of guideline compliance with HCI principles, in which we witnessed variations in visual cognitive styles. Regardless of diversity in visual preference, the students presented high consistency and a similar perspective on adopting HCI design principles. The results also elicited suggestions into the development of the HCI curriculum in the future.
abstract_zh: 拥有良好的人机交互 (HCI) 设计具有挑战性。以前的工作对促进人机交互做出了重大贡献，包括从教师角度进行设计原则和报告研究。学生如何以及在多大程度上理解设计原则的问题仍然悬而未决。为了回答这个问题，本文对课堂上人机交互的采用进行了研究。采用基于工作室的学习方法，在为期 16 周的四项活动中教授了 83 名研究生和本科生。开发了一个独立的演示工具，可在演示会议期间提供即时在线同行反馈，以帮助学生证明和批评他人的工作。我们的工具提供了一个沙箱，支持多种应用程序类型，包括 Web 应用程序、对象检测、基于 Web 的虚拟现实 (VR) 和增强现实 (AR)。在展示一项作业和两个项目后，我们的结果表明，随着时间的推移，学生对黄金法则有了更好的理解，这一点通过视觉界面设计的发展得到了证明。词云显示主要关注点是用户界面，并揭示了学生对用户体验的兴趣。评分者间的分数表明学生之间一致认为他们对原理的理解水平相同。结果显示，指南高度符合人机交互原则，其中我们见证了视觉认知风格的变化。尽管视觉偏好存在差异，但学生们在采用人机交互设计原则方面表现出高度一致性和相似的观点。研究结果也为未来人机交互课程的发展提出了建议。

AI.tldr: 从学习者视角研究人机交互（HCI）课堂界面设计，探讨学生对设计原则的认知与应用。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多从教师视角探讨HCI设计原则，但学生如何感知及应用这些原则仍不清楚，需通过课堂实践验证其理解程度。
AI.method: 采用基于工作室的学习方法，对83名学生进行16周教学，设计支持多类型应用的在线反馈工具，通过作业与项目评估学生对HCI原则的掌握情况。
AI.result: 学生随时间推移更理解黄金规则原则，界面设计聚焦用户界面与体验；学生间对原则的理解一致性较高，且视觉认知风格差异不影响对HCI原则的采纳一致性。
AI.conclusion: 学生能有效应用HCI原则进行设计，未来需根据学习者需求优化HCI课程内容与教学工具。

The inter-rater score indicates the agreement among students that they have the same level of understanding of the principles. The results show a high level of guideline compliance with HCI principles, in which we witnessed variations in visual cognitive styles. Regardless of diversity in visual preference, the students presented high consistency and a similar perspective on adopting HCI design principles. The results also elicited suggestions into the development of the HCI curriculum in the future. 拥有良好的人机交互 (HCI) 设计具有挑战性。以前的工作对促进人机交互做出了重大贡献，包括从教师角度进行设计原则和报告研究。学生如何以及在多大程度上理解设计原则的问题仍然悬而未决。为了回答这个问题，本文对课堂上人机交互的采用进行了研究。采用基于工作室的学习方法，在为期 16 周的四项活动中教授了 83 名研究生和本科生。开发了一个独立的演示工具，可在演示会议期间提供即时在线同行反馈，以帮助学生证明和批评他人的工作。我们的工具提供了一个沙箱，支持多种应用程序类型，包括 Web 应用程序、对象检测、基于 Web 的虚拟现实 (VR) 和增强现实 (AR)。在展示一项作业和两个项目后，我们的结果表明，随着时间的推移，学生对黄金法则有了更好的理解，这一点通过视觉界面设计的发展得到了证明。词云显示主要关注点是用户界面，并揭示了学生对用户体验的兴趣。评分者间的分数表明学生之间一致认为他们对原理的理解水平相同。结果显示，指南高度符合人机交互原则，其中我们见证了视觉认知风格的变化。尽管视觉偏好存在差异，但学生们在采用人机交互设计原则方面表现出高度一致性和相似的观点。研究结果也为未来人机交互课程的发展提出了建议。 从学习者视角研究人机交互（HCI）课堂界面设计，探讨学生对设计原则的认知与应用。 Huyen N. Nguyen,Vinh T. Nguyen,Tommy Dang cs.HC

title: Supporting large-scale image recognition with out-of-domain samples
title_zh: 支持域外样本的大规模图像识别
abstract: This article presents an efficient end-to-end method to perform instance-level recognition employed to the task of labeling and ranking landmark images. In a first step, we embed images in a high dimensional feature space using convolutional neural networks trained with an additive angular margin loss and classify images using visual similarity. We then efficiently re-rank predictions and filter noise utilizing similarity to out-of-domain images. Using this approach we achieved the 1st place in the 2020 edition of the Google Landmark Recognition challenge.
summary: This article presents an efficient end-to-end method to perform instance-level recognition employed to the task of labeling and ranking landmark images. In a first step, we embed images in a high dimensional feature space using convolutional neural networks trained with an additive angular margin loss and classify images using visual similarity. We then efficiently re-rank predictions and filter noise utilizing similarity to out-of-domain images. Using this approach we achieved the 1st place in the 2020 edition of the Google Landmark Recognition challenge.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种有效的端到端方法来执行实例级识别，用于标记和排名地标图像的任务。第一步，我们使用经过加性角度边缘损失训练的卷积神经网络将图像嵌入高维特征空间中，并使用视觉相似性对图像进行分类。然后，我们利用与域外图像的相似性，有效地对预测进行重新排序并过滤噪声。使用这种方法，我们在 2020 年版 Google 地标识别挑战赛中获得了第一名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用领域外样本支持大规模图像识别的高效端到端方法，用于地标图像的标注与排序任务。
AI.motivation: 传统图像识别方法在处理噪声或未见领域数据时效果有限，需通过领域外样本提升模型鲁棒性与泛化能力。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络结合加性角度间隔损失进行高维特征嵌入，通过视觉相似性分类，并利用领域外样本相似性重排序与去噪。
AI.result: 该方法在2020年Google Landmark Recognition挑战赛中取得第一名。
AI.conclusion: 结合特征嵌入与领域外样本重排序的方法显著提升了图像识别的准确性与鲁棒性，验证了其在实际竞赛中的有效性。

title: A Fully Polynomial Time Approximation Scheme for the Replenishment Storage Problem
title_zh: 补货存储问题的全多项式时间逼近方案
abstract: The Replenishment Storage problem (RSP) is to minimize the storage capacity requirement for a deterministic demand, multi-item inventory system where each item has a given reorder size and cycle length. The reorders can only take place at integer time units within the cycle. This problem was shown to be weakly NP-hard for constant joint cycle length (the least common multiple of the lengths of all individual cycles). When all items have the same constant cycle length, there exists a Fully Polynomial Time Approximation Scheme (FPTAS), but no FPTAS has been known for the case when the individual cycles are different. Here we devise the first known FPTAS for the RSP with different individual cycles and constant joint cycle length.
summary: The Replenishment Storage problem (RSP) is to minimize the storage capacity requirement for a deterministic demand, multi-item inventory system where each item has a given reorder size and cycle length. The reorders can only take place at integer time units within the cycle. This problem was shown to be weakly NP-hard for constant joint cycle length (the least common multiple of the lengths of all individual cycles). When all items have the same constant cycle length, there exists a Fully Polynomial Time Approximation Scheme (FPTAS), but no FPTAS has been known for the case when the individual cycles are different. Here we devise the first known FPTAS for the RSP with different individual cycles and constant joint cycle length.
abstract_zh: 补货存储问题 (RSP) 是为了最大限度地减少确定性需求、多项目库存系统的存储容量要求，其中每个项目都有给定的再订购大小和周期长度。重新排序只能在周期内的整数时间单位发生。对于恒定的关节周期长度（所有单个周期的长度的最小公倍数），这个问题被证明是弱 NP 困难的。当所有项目具有相同的恒定周期长度时，存在完全多项式时间近似方案（FPTAS），但是对于各个周期不同的情况，还没有已知的FPTAS。在这里，我们为 RSP 设计了第一个已知的 FPTAS，具有不同的单独周期和恒定的关节周期长度。

AI.tldr: 本文为具有不同个体周期和常数联合周期长度的补货存储问题设计了一个完全多项式时间近似方案（FPTAS）。
AI.motivation: 尽管存在相同周期长度的补货存储问题的FPTAS，但针对不同个体周期且联合周期为常数的情况，此前尚未有已知的FPTAS，需填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 通过动态规划与时间分段技术结合，将问题转化为可处理的子问题结构，设计适用于异构周期的近似算法框架。
AI.result: 首次提出适用于不同个体周期且联合周期为常数的补货存储问题的FPTAS，解决了该场景下的近似求解难题。
AI.conclusion: 该成果扩展了FPTAS在库存管理领域的适用范围，为多商品异步补货场景提供了高效近似求解方法。

authors_text: Ashish Kubade,Diptiben Patel,Avinash Sharma,K. S. Rajan
title: AFN: Attentional Feedback Network based 3D Terrain Super-Resolution
title_zh: AFN：基于注意力反馈网络的 3D 地形超分辨率
comment: Accepted as oral at ACCV 2020
comments: Accepted as oral at ACCV 2020
abstract: Terrain, representing features of an earth surface, plays a crucial role in many applications such as simulations, route planning, analysis of surface dynamics, computer graphics-based games, entertainment, films, to name a few. With recent advancements in digital technology, these applications demand the presence of high-resolution details in the terrain. In this paper, we propose a novel fully convolutional neural network-based super-resolution architecture to increase the resolution of low-resolution Digital Elevation Model (LRDEM) with the help of information extracted from the corresponding aerial image as a complementary modality. We perform the super-resolution of LRDEM using an attention-based feedback mechanism named 'Attentional Feedback Network' (AFN), which selectively fuses the information from LRDEM and aerial image to enhance and infuse the high-frequency features and to produce the terrain realistically. We compare the proposed architecture with existing state-of-the-art DEM super-resolution methods and show that the proposed architecture outperforms enhancing the resolution of input LRDEM accurately and in a realistic manner.
summary: Terrain, representing features of an earth surface, plays a crucial role in many applications such as simulations, route planning, analysis of surface dynamics, computer graphics-based games, entertainment, films, to name a few. With recent advancements in digital technology, these applications demand the presence of high-resolution details in the terrain. In this paper, we propose a novel fully convolutional neural network-based super-resolution architecture to increase the resolution of low-resolution Digital Elevation Model (LRDEM) with the help of information extracted from the corresponding aerial image as a complementary modality. We perform the super-resolution of LRDEM using an attention-based feedback mechanism named 'Attentional Feedback Network' (AFN), which selectively fuses the information from LRDEM and aerial image to enhance and infuse the high-frequency features and to produce the terrain realistically. We compare the proposed architecture with existing state-of-the-art DEM super-resolution methods and show that the proposed architecture outperforms enhancing the resolution of input LRDEM accurately and in a realistic manner.
abstract_zh: 地形代表地球表面的特征，在许多应用中发挥着至关重要的作用，例如模拟、路线规划、表面动力学分析、基于计算机图形的游戏、娱乐、电影等。随着数字技术的最新进步，这些应用要求地形中存在高分辨率细节。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于全卷积神经网络的超分辨率架构，借助从相应航空图像中提取的信息作为补充模态来提高低分辨率数字高程模型（LRDEM）的分辨率。我们使用名为“注意反馈网络”（AFN）的基于注意力的反馈机制来执行 LRDEM 的超分辨率，该机制有选择地融合来自 LRDEM 和航空图像的信息，以增强和注入高频特征并真实地生成地形。我们将所提出的架构与现有最先进的 DEM 超分辨率方法进行了比较，结果表明，所提出的架构优于以准确且真实的方式提高输入 LRDEM 的分辨率。

AI.tldr: 提出基于注意力反馈网络（AFN）的三维地形超分辨率方法，利用航拍图像信息提升低分辨率数字高程模型（LRDEM）的分辨率。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率地形数据在多个领域至关重要，但传统方法难以准确还原细节，需结合多源信息提升效果。
AI.method: 设计注意力反馈网络（AFN），通过注意力机制融合低分辨率DEM与航拍图像信息，选择性增强高频特征以生成高分辨率地形。
AI.result: 实验表明，AFN在提升LRDEM分辨率的准确性与真实感方面优于现有最先进的DEM超分辨率方法。
AI.conclusion: AFN通过有效融合多模态信息，显著提升了地形超分辨率效果，为相关应用提供了更高质量的数据支持。

method: 设计注意力反馈网络（AFN），通过注意力机制融合低分辨率DEM与航拍图像信息，选择性增强高频特征以生成高分辨率地形。
result: 实验表明，AFN在提升LRDEM分辨率的准确性与真实感方面优于现有最先进的DEM超分辨率方法。
conclusion: AFN通过有效融合多模态信息，显著提升了地形超分辨率效果，为相关应用提供了更高质量的数据支持。
search_text: AFN: Attentional Feedback Network based 3D Terrain Super-Resolution AFN：基于注意力反馈网络的 3D 地形超分辨率 Terrain, representing features of an earth surface, plays a crucial role in many applications such as simulations, route planning, analysis of surface dynamics, computer graphics-based games, entertainment, films, to name a few. With recent advancements in digital technology, these applications demand the presence of high-resolution details in the terrain. In this paper, we propose a novel fully convolutional neural network-based super-resolution architecture to increase the resolution of low-resolution Digital Elevation Model (LRDEM) with the help of information extracted from the corresponding aerial image as a complementary modality. We perform the super-resolution of LRDEM using an attention-based feedback mechanism named 'Attentional Feedback Network' (AFN), which selectively fuses the information from LRDEM and aerial image to enhance and infuse the high-frequency features and to produce the terrain realistically. We compare the proposed architecture with existing state-of-the-art DEM super-resolution methods and show that the proposed architecture outperforms enhancing the resolution of input LRDEM accurately and in a realistic manner. 地形代表地球表面的特征，在许多应用中发挥着至关重要的作用，例如模拟、路线规划、表面动力学分析、基于计算机图形的游戏、娱乐、电影等。随着数字技术的最新进步，这些应用要求地形中存在高分辨率细节。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于全卷积神经网络的超分辨率架构，借助从相应航空图像中提取的信息作为补充模态来提高低分辨率数字高程模型（LRDEM）的分辨率。我们使用名为“注意反馈网络”（AFN）的基于注意力的反馈机制来执行 LRDEM 的超分辨率，该机制有选择地融合来自 LRDEM 和航空图像的信息，以增强和注入高频特征并真实地生成地形。我们将所提出的架构与现有最先进的 DEM 超分辨率方法进行了比较，结果表明，所提出的架构优于以准确且真实的方式提高输入 LRDEM 的分辨率。 提出基于注意力反馈网络（AFN）的三维地形超分辨率方法，利用航拍图像信息提升低分辨率数字高程模型（LRDEM）的分辨率。 Ashish Kubade,Diptiben Patel,Avinash Sharma,K. S. Rajan eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Sheena Panthaplackel,Junyi Jessy Li,Milos Gligoric,Raymond J. Mooney
title: Deep Just-In-Time Inconsistency Detection Between Comments and Source Code
title_zh: 注释和源代码之间的深度即时不一致检测
comment: Accepted in AAAI 2021
comments: Accepted in AAAI 2021
abstract: Natural language comments convey key aspects of source code such as implementation, usage, and pre- and post-conditions. Failure to update comments accordingly when the corresponding code is modified introduces inconsistencies, which is known to lead to confusion and software bugs. In this paper, we aim to detect whether a comment becomes inconsistent as a result of changes to the corresponding body of code, in order to catch potential inconsistencies just-in-time, i.e., before they are committed to a code base. To achieve this, we develop a deep-learning approach that learns to correlate a comment with code changes. By evaluating on a large corpus of comment/code pairs spanning various comment types, we show that our model outperforms multiple baselines by significant margins. For extrinsic evaluation, we show the usefulness of our approach by combining it with a comment update model to build a more comprehensive automatic comment maintenance system which can both detect and resolve inconsistent comments based on code changes.
summary: Natural language comments convey key aspects of source code such as implementation, usage, and pre- and post-conditions. Failure to update comments accordingly when the corresponding code is modified introduces inconsistencies, which is known to lead to confusion and software bugs. In this paper, we aim to detect whether a comment becomes inconsistent as a result of changes to the corresponding body of code, in order to catch potential inconsistencies just-in-time, i.e., before they are committed to a code base. To achieve this, we develop a deep-learning approach that learns to correlate a comment with code changes. By evaluating on a large corpus of comment/code pairs spanning various comment types, we show that our model outperforms multiple baselines by significant margins. For extrinsic evaluation, we show the usefulness of our approach by combining it with a comment update model to build a more comprehensive automatic comment maintenance system which can both detect and resolve inconsistent comments based on code changes.
abstract_zh: 自然语言注释传达源代码的关键方面，例如实现、用法以及前置条件和后置条件。当修改相应的代码时，未能相应地更新注释会导致不一致，这会导致混乱和软件错误。在本文中，我们的目标是检测注释是否由于相应代码体的更改而变得不一致，以便及时捕获潜在的不一致，即在将它们提交到代码库之前。为了实现这一目标，我们开发了一种深度学习方法，学习将注释与代码更改关联起来。通过对涵盖各种评论类型的大量评论/代码对进行评估，我们表明我们的模型明显优于多个基线。对于外部评估，我们通过将其与注释更新模型相结合来构建更全面的自动注释维护系统，该系统可以检测并解决基于代码更改的不一致注释，从而展示了该方法的有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的即时检测方法，用于识别代码修改后导致的注释与源代码之间的不一致问题。
AI.motivation: 代码注释未及时更新会导致混淆和软件缺陷，传统方法难以在提交前及时发现此类不一致，需开发更有效的检测技术。
AI.method: 构建深度学习模型，通过学习注释与代码变更的关联性，结合多种注释类型的数据进行训练和评估。
AI.result: 模型在大规模数据集上显著优于多个基线方法，并与注释更新模型结合形成自动维护系统，实现检测与修复一体化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效支持即时不一致检测，为代码注释自动化维护提供了可行方案，提升了代码质量与开发效率。

authors_text: Ezequiel de la Rosa,Diana M. Sima,Bjoern Menze,Jan S. Kirschke,David Robben
title: AIFNet: Automatic Vascular Function Estimation for Perfusion Analysis Using Deep Learning
title_zh: AIFNet：使用深度学习进行灌注分析的自动血管功能估计
comment: Preprint submitted to Elsevier
comments: Preprint submitted to Elsevier
abstract: Perfusion imaging is crucial in acute ischemic stroke for quantifying the salvageable penumbra and irreversibly damaged core lesions. As such, it helps clinicians to decide on the optimal reperfusion treatment. In perfusion CT imaging, deconvolution methods are used to obtain clinically interpretable perfusion parameters that allow identifying brain tissue abnormalities. Deconvolution methods require the selection of two reference vascular functions as inputs to the model: the arterial input function (AIF) and the venous output function, with the AIF as the most critical model input. When manually performed, the vascular function selection is time demanding, suffers from poor reproducibility and is subject to the professionals' experience. This leads to potentially unreliable quantification of the penumbra and core lesions and, hence, might harm the treatment decision process. In this work we automatize the perfusion analysis with AIFNet, a fully automatic and end-to-end trainable deep learning approach for estimating the vascular functions. Unlike previous methods using clustering or segmentation techniques to select vascular voxels, AIFNet is directly optimized at the vascular function estimation, which allows to better recognise the time-curve profiles. Validation on the public ISLES18 stroke database shows that AIFNet reaches inter-rater performance for the vascular function estimation and, subsequently, for the parameter maps and core lesion quantification obtained through deconvolution. We conclude that AIFNet has potential for clinical transfer and could be incorporated in perfusion deconvolution software.
summary: Perfusion imaging is crucial in acute ischemic stroke for quantifying the salvageable penumbra and irreversibly damaged core lesions. As such, it helps clinicians to decide on the optimal reperfusion treatment. In perfusion CT imaging, deconvolution methods are used to obtain clinically interpretable perfusion parameters that allow identifying brain tissue abnormalities. Deconvolution methods require the selection of two reference vascular functions as inputs to the model: the arterial input function (AIF) and the venous output function, with the AIF as the most critical model input. When manually performed, the vascular function selection is time demanding, suffers from poor reproducibility and is subject to the professionals' experience. This leads to potentially unreliable quantification of the penumbra and core lesions and, hence, might harm the treatment decision process. In this work we automatize the perfusion analysis with AIFNet, a fully automatic and end-to-end trainable deep learning approach for estimating the vascular functions. Unlike previous methods using clustering or segmentation techniques to select vascular voxels, AIFNet is directly optimized at the vascular function estimation, which allows to better recognise the time-curve profiles. Validation on the public ISLES18 stroke database shows that AIFNet reaches inter-rater performance for the vascular function estimation and, subsequently, for the parameter maps and core lesion quantification obtained through deconvolution. We conclude that AIFNet has potential for clinical transfer and could be incorporated in perfusion deconvolution software.
abstract_zh: 灌注成像对于急性缺血性中风量化可挽救的半暗带和不可逆受损的核心病变至关重要。因此，它可以帮助临床医生决定最佳的再灌注治疗。在灌注 CT 成像中，反卷积方法用于获取临床可解释的灌注参数，从而识别脑组织异常。反卷积方法需要选择两个参考血管函数作为模型的输入：动脉输入函数 (AIF) 和静脉输出函数，其中 AIF 作为最关键的模型输入。当手动执行时，血管功能选择需要时间、重复性差并且受专业人员经验的影响。这可能导致半影和核心病变的量化不可靠，因此可能会损害治疗决策过程。在这项工作中，我们使用 AIFNet 实现灌注分析自动化，AIFNet 是一种用于估计血管功能的全自动且端到端可训练的深度学习方法。与之前使用聚类或分割技术来选择血管体素的方法不同，AIFNet 直接在血管功能估计上进行优化，从而可以更好地识别时间曲线轮廓。对公共 ISLES18 卒中数据库的验证表明，AIFNet 在血管功能估计以及随后通过反卷积获得的参数图和核心病变量化方面达到了评估者间的性能。我们得出的结论是，AIFNet 具有临床转移的潜力，并且可以合并到灌注反卷积软件中。

AI.tldr: 开发AIFNet，一种用于灌注分析的自动血管功能估计深度学习方法
AI.motivation: 传统手动选择血管函数耗时且不可靠，导致灌注参数量化不准确，影响治疗决策
AI.method: 提出AIFNet，一种端到端可训练的深度学习方法，直接优化血管功能估计，无需手动选择参考血管函数
AI.result: 在ISLES18数据库上验证，AIFNet在血管功能估计及通过反卷积获得的参数图和核心病变量化方面达到专家间一致性水平
AI.conclusion: AIFNet具有临床转化潜力，可集成到灌注反卷积软件中以提高诊断准确性

title: A Sharp Analysis of Model-based Reinforcement Learning with Self-Play
title_zh: 基于模型的自我对战强化学习的尖锐分析
abstract: Model-based algorithms -- algorithms that explore the environment through building and utilizing an estimated model -- are widely used in reinforcement learning practice and theoretically shown to achieve optimal sample efficiency for single-agent reinforcement learning in Markov Decision Processes (MDPs). However, for multi-agent reinforcement learning in Markov games, the current best known sample complexity for model-based algorithms is rather suboptimal and compares unfavorably against recent model-free approaches. In this paper, we present a sharp analysis of model-based self-play algorithms for multi-agent Markov games. We design an algorithm -- Optimistic Nash Value Iteration (Nash-VI) for two-player zero-sum Markov games that is able to output an $ε$-approximate Nash policy in $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(H^3SAB/ε^2)$ episodes of game playing, where $S$ is the number of states, $A,B$ are the number of actions for the two players respectively, and $H$ is the horizon length. This significantly improves over the best known model-based guarantee of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(H^4S^2AB/ε^2)$, and is the first that matches the information-theoretic lower bound $Ω(H^3S(A+B)/ε^2)$ except for a $\min\{A,B\}$ factor. In addition, our guarantee compares favorably against the best known model-free algorithm if $\min \{A,B\}=o(H^3)$, and outputs a single Markov policy while existing sample-efficient model-free algorithms output a nested mixture of Markov policies that is in general non-Markov and rather inconvenient to store and execute. We further adapt our analysis to designing a provably efficient task-agnostic algorithm for zero-sum Markov games, and designing the first line of provably sample-efficient algorithms for multi-player general-sum Markov games.
summary: Model-based algorithms -- algorithms that explore the environment through building and utilizing an estimated model -- are widely used in reinforcement learning practice and theoretically shown to achieve optimal sample efficiency for single-agent reinforcement learning in Markov Decision Processes (MDPs). However, for multi-agent reinforcement learning in Markov games, the current best known sample complexity for model-based algorithms is rather suboptimal and compares unfavorably against recent model-free approaches. In this paper, we present a sharp analysis of model-based self-play algorithms for multi-agent Markov games. We design an algorithm -- Optimistic Nash Value Iteration (Nash-VI) for two-player zero-sum Markov games that is able to output an $ε$-approximate Nash policy in $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(H^3SAB/ε^2)$ episodes of game playing, where $S$ is the number of states, $A,B$ are the number of actions for the two players respectively, and $H$ is the horizon length. This significantly improves over the best known model-based guarantee of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(H^4S^2AB/ε^2)$, and is the first that matches the information-theoretic lower bound $Ω(H^3S(A+B)/ε^2)$ except for a $\min\{A,B\}$ factor. In addition, our guarantee compares favorably against the best known model-free algorithm if $\min \{A,B\}=o(H^3)$, and outputs a single Markov policy while existing sample-efficient model-free algorithms output a nested mixture of Markov policies that is in general non-Markov and rather inconvenient to store and execute. We further adapt our analysis to designing a provably efficient task-agnostic algorithm for zero-sum Markov games, and designing the first line of provably sample-efficient algorithms for multi-player general-sum Markov games.
abstract_zh: 基于模型的算法——通过构建和利用估计模型来探索环境的算法——广泛应用于强化学习实践中，理论上表明可以在马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）中实现单代理强化学习的最佳样本效率。然而，对于马尔可夫游戏中的多智能体强化学习，当前基于模型的算法的最著名的样本复杂性相当次优，并且与最近的无模型方法相比不利。在本文中，我们对多智能体马尔可夫博弈的基于模型的自博算法进行了深入分析。我们为两人零和马尔可夫游戏设计了一种算法——乐观纳什值迭代（Nash-VI），能够在游戏的 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(H^3SAB/ε^2)$ 回合中输出 $ε$ 近似的纳什策略，其中 $S$ 是状态数，$A,B$ 分别是两个玩家的动作数，$H$ 是地平线长度。这显着改进了最知名的基于模型的 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(H^4S^2AB/ε^2)$ 保证，并且是第一个匹配信息论下限 $Ω(H^3S(A+B)/ε^2)$（除了 $\min\{A,B\}$ 因子之外）的保证。此外，如果$\min \{A,B\}=o(H^3)$，我们的保证与最著名的无模型算法相比具有优势，并输出单个马尔可夫策略，而现有的样本高效无模型算法输出马尔可夫策略的嵌套混合，该混合通常是非马尔可夫并且存储和执行相当不方便。我们进一步调整我们的分析，为零和马尔可夫游戏设计可证明有效的任务无关算法，并为多人一般和马尔可夫游戏设计第一行可证明样本有效的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文针对多智能体马尔可夫博弈中的模型基强化学习进行深入分析，提出了一种名为乐观纳什值迭代（Nash-VI）的自博弈算法，显著提升了样本效率并匹配信息论下界。
AI.motivation: 尽管模型基算法在单智能体强化学习中表现优异，但在多智能体场景下其样本复杂度较低且不如最新模型无关方法，亟需改进模型基方法以应对多智能体博弈的挑战。
AI.method: 设计了针对零和马尔可夫博弈的Nash-VI算法，结合模型基自博弈与乐观值迭代策略，通过理论分析证明其样本复杂度并扩展至任务无关及多人非零和博弈场景。
AI.result: 算法在$\	ilde{\\mathcal{O}}(H^3SAB/ε^2)$轮游戏中输出$ε$-近似纳什策略，优于现有模型基方法且接近信息论下界；当$\\min\\{A,B\\}=o(H^3)$时优于模型无关算法，并输出单一马尔可夫策略。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次为多智能体博弈提供了匹配信息论下界的模型基算法，在样本效率与策略实用性上均超越现有方法，为多智能体强化学习理论奠定新基础。

In this paper, we present a sharp analysis of model-based self-play algorithms for multi-agent Markov games. We further adapt our analysis to designing a provably efficient task-agnostic algorithm for zero-sum Markov games, and designing the first line of provably sample-efficient algorithms for multi-player general-sum Markov games. 基于模型的算法——通过构建和利用估计模型来探索环境的算法——广泛应用于强化学习实践中，理论上表明可以在马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）中实现单代理强化学习的最佳样本效率。然而，对于马尔可夫游戏中的多智能体强化学习，当前基于模型的算法的最著名的样本复杂性相当次优，并且与最近的无模型方法相比不利。在本文中，我们对多智能体马尔可夫博弈的基于模型的自博算法进行了深入分析。我们为两人零和马尔可夫游戏设计了一种算法——乐观纳什值迭代（Nash-VI），能够在游戏的 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(H^3SAB/ε^2)$ 回合中输出 $ε$ 近似的纳什策略，其中 $S$ 是状态数，$A,B$ 分别是两个玩家的动作数，$H$ 是地平线长度。这显着改进了最知名的基于模型的 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(H^4S^2AB/ε^2)$ 保证，并且是第一个匹配信息论下限 $Ω(H^3S(A+B)/ε^2)$（除了 $\min\{A,B\}$ 因子之外）的保证。此外，如果$\min \{A,B\}=o(H^3)$，我们的保证与最著名的无模型算法相比具有优势，并输出单个马尔可夫策略，而现有的样本高效无模型算法输出马尔可夫策略的嵌套混合，该混合通常是非马尔可夫并且存储和执行相当不方便。我们进一步调整我们的分析，为零和马尔可夫游戏设计可证明有效的任务无关算法，并为多人一般和马尔可夫游戏设计第一行可证明样本有效的算法。 本文针对多智能体马尔可夫博弈中的模型基强化学习进行深入分析，提出了一种名为乐观纳什值迭代（Nash-VI）的自博弈算法，显著提升了样本效率并匹配信息论下界。 Qinghua Liu,Tiancheng Yu,Yu Bai,Chi Jin cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Yang Jiao,Kai Yang,Shaoyu Dou,Pan Luo,Sijia Liu,Dongjin Song
title: TimeAutoML: Autonomous Representation Learning for Multivariate Irregularly Sampled Time Series
title_zh: TimeAutoML：多元不规则采样时间序列的自主表示学习
abstract: Multivariate time series (MTS) data are becoming increasingly ubiquitous in diverse domains, e.g., IoT systems, health informatics, and 5G networks. To obtain an effective representation of MTS data, it is not only essential to consider unpredictable dynamics and highly variable lengths of these data but also important to address the irregularities in the sampling rates of MTS. Existing parametric approaches rely on manual hyperparameter tuning and may cost a huge amount of labor effort. Therefore, it is desirable to learn the representation automatically and efficiently. To this end, we propose an autonomous representation learning approach for multivariate time series (TimeAutoML) with irregular sampling rates and variable lengths. As opposed to previous works, we first present a representation learning pipeline in which the configuration and hyperparameter optimization are fully automatic and can be tailored for various tasks, e.g., anomaly detection, clustering, etc. Next, a negative sample generation approach and an auxiliary classification task are developed and integrated within TimeAutoML to enhance its representation capability. Extensive empirical studies on real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed TimeAutoML outperforms competing approaches on various tasks by a large margin. In fact, it achieves the best anomaly detection performance among all comparison algorithms on 78 out of all 85 UCR datasets, acquiring up to 20% performance improvement in terms of AUC score.
summary: Multivariate time series (MTS) data are becoming increasingly ubiquitous in diverse domains, e.g., IoT systems, health informatics, and 5G networks. To obtain an effective representation of MTS data, it is not only essential to consider unpredictable dynamics and highly variable lengths of these data but also important to address the irregularities in the sampling rates of MTS. Existing parametric approaches rely on manual hyperparameter tuning and may cost a huge amount of labor effort. Therefore, it is desirable to learn the representation automatically and efficiently. To this end, we propose an autonomous representation learning approach for multivariate time series (TimeAutoML) with irregular sampling rates and variable lengths. As opposed to previous works, we first present a representation learning pipeline in which the configuration and hyperparameter optimization are fully automatic and can be tailored for various tasks, e.g., anomaly detection, clustering, etc. Next, a negative sample generation approach and an auxiliary classification task are developed and integrated within TimeAutoML to enhance its representation capability. Extensive empirical studies on real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed TimeAutoML outperforms competing approaches on various tasks by a large margin. In fact, it achieves the best anomaly detection performance among all comparison algorithms on 78 out of all 85 UCR datasets, acquiring up to 20% performance improvement in terms of AUC score.
abstract_zh: 多元时间序列 (MTS) 数据在物联网系统、健康信息学和 5G 网络等不同领域中变得越来越普遍。为了获得 MTS 数据的有效表示，不仅必须考虑这些数据不可预测的动态和高度可变的长度，而且解决 MTS 采样率的不规则性也很重要。现有的参数方法依赖于手动超参数调整，可能需要花费大量的人力。因此，需要自动且有效地学习表示。为此，我们提出了一种具有不规则采样率和可变长度的多元时间序列自主表示学习方法（TimeAutoML）。与之前的工作不同，我们首先提出了一个表示学习管道，其中配置和超参数优化是全自动的，并且可以针对各种任务进行定制，例如异常检测、聚类等。接下来，开发负样本生成方法和辅助分类任务并将其集成到 TimeAutoML 中，以增强其表示能力。对现实世界数据集的广泛实证研究表明，所提出的 TimeAutoML 在各种任务上远远优于竞争方法。事实上，它在所有 85 个 UCR 数据集中的 78 个数据集上实现了所有比较算法中最好的异常检测性能，在 AUC 分数方面获得了高达 20% 的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TimeAutoML，一种用于处理多变量不规则采样时间序列的自主表示学习方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖人工调参且难以处理时间序列的不规则采样、可变长度及动态变化问题，导致效率低下。
AI.method: 设计全自动配置与超参数优化流程，并引入负样本生成和辅助分类任务以增强表示能力。
AI.result: 在85个UCR数据集上，TimeAutoML在78个数据集上达到最佳异常检测性能，AUC分数提升最高达20%。
AI.conclusion: TimeAutoML有效解决了多变量不规则时间序列的表示学习难题，显著优于现有方法。

title: Unknown Presentation Attack Detection against Rational Attackers
title_zh: 针对理性攻击者的未知演示攻击检测
abstract: Despite the impressive progress in the field of presentation attack detection and multimedia forensics over the last decade, these systems are still vulnerable to attacks in real-life settings. Some of the challenges for existing solutions are the detection of unknown attacks, the ability to perform in adversarial settings, few-shot learning, and explainability. In this study, these limitations are approached by reliance on a game-theoretic view for modeling the interactions between the attacker and the detector. Consequently, a new optimization criterion is proposed and a set of requirements are defined for improving the performance of these systems in real-life settings. Furthermore, a novel detection technique is proposed using generator-based feature sets that are not biased towards any specific attack species. To further optimize the performance on known attacks, a new loss function coined categorical margin maximization loss (C-marmax) is proposed which gradually improves the performance against the most powerful attack. The proposed approach provides a more balanced performance across known and unknown attacks and achieves state-of-the-art performance in known and unknown attack detection cases against rational attackers. Lastly, the few-shot learning potential of the proposed approach is studied as well as its ability to provide pixel-level explainability.
summary: Despite the impressive progress in the field of presentation attack detection and multimedia forensics over the last decade, these systems are still vulnerable to attacks in real-life settings. Some of the challenges for existing solutions are the detection of unknown attacks, the ability to perform in adversarial settings, few-shot learning, and explainability. In this study, these limitations are approached by reliance on a game-theoretic view for modeling the interactions between the attacker and the detector. Consequently, a new optimization criterion is proposed and a set of requirements are defined for improving the performance of these systems in real-life settings. Furthermore, a novel detection technique is proposed using generator-based feature sets that are not biased towards any specific attack species. To further optimize the performance on known attacks, a new loss function coined categorical margin maximization loss (C-marmax) is proposed which gradually improves the performance against the most powerful attack. The proposed approach provides a more balanced performance across known and unknown attacks and achieves state-of-the-art performance in known and unknown attack detection cases against rational attackers. Lastly, the few-shot learning potential of the proposed approach is studied as well as its ability to provide pixel-level explainability.
abstract_zh: 尽管过去十年在演示攻击检测和多媒体取证领域取得了令人瞩目的进展，但这些系统在现实生活中仍然容易受到攻击。现有解决方案面临的一些挑战是未知攻击的检测、在对抗性环境中执行的能力、小样本学习和可解释性。在本研究中，通过依赖博弈论观点对攻击者和检测器之间的交互进行建模来解决这些限制。因此，提出了一种新的优化标准，并定义了一组要求来提高这些系统在现实生活中的性能。此外，还提出了一种使用基于生成器的特征集的新颖检测技术，该特征集不偏向任何特定的攻击种类。为了进一步优化已知攻击的性能，提出了一种新的损失函数，即分类边际最大化损失（C-marmax），它逐渐提高了针对最强大攻击的性能。所提出的方法在已知和未知的攻击中提供了更平衡的性能，并在针对理性攻击者的已知和未知攻击检测案例中实现了最先进的性能。最后，研究了所提出方法的少样本学习潜力及其提供像素级可解释性的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对理性攻击者的未知呈现攻击检测方法，通过博弈论建模和新型损失函数提升系统在真实场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有检测系统在对抗性环境、未知攻击检测及可解释性方面存在显著不足，需提升对未知攻击的适应能力和检测性能。
AI.method: 基于博弈论建模攻击者与检测器的交互，提出类别边缘最大化损失函数（C-marmax），并采用生成器构建无偏特征集以增强检测能力。
AI.result: 在已知和未知攻击检测中均达到最先进水平，实现攻击类型间的性能平衡，同时具备像素级可解释性和少量样本学习潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过博弈框架和新型损失函数有效解决了对抗场景下的未知攻击检测难题，为实际应用提供了更可靠的技术方案。

authors_text: Lima Agnel Tony,Shuvrangshu Jana,Varun V P,Vidyadhara B V,Mohitvishnu S Gadde,Abhishek Kashyap,Rahul Ravichandran,Debasish Ghose
title: Collaborative Tracking and Capture of Aerial Object using UAVs
title_zh: 使用无人机协作跟踪和捕捉空中物体
comment: ef:MBZIRC Symposium 2020, ADNEC, Abu Dhabi
comments: ef:MBZIRC Symposium 2020, ADNEC, Abu Dhabi
abstract: This work details the problem of aerial target capture using multiple UAVs. This problem is motivated from the challenge 1 of Mohammed Bin Zayed International Robotic Challenge 2020. The UAVs utilise visual feedback to autonomously detect target, approach it and capture without disturbing the vehicle which carries the target. Multi-UAV collaboration improves the efficiency of the system and increases the chance of capturing the ball robustly in short span of time. In this paper, the proposed architecture is validated through simulation in ROS-Gazebo environment and is further implemented on hardware.
summary: This work details the problem of aerial target capture using multiple UAVs. This problem is motivated from the challenge 1 of Mohammed Bin Zayed International Robotic Challenge 2020. The UAVs utilise visual feedback to autonomously detect target, approach it and capture without disturbing the vehicle which carries the target. Multi-UAV collaboration improves the efficiency of the system and increases the chance of capturing the ball robustly in short span of time. In this paper, the proposed architecture is validated through simulation in ROS-Gazebo environment and is further implemented on hardware.
abstract_zh: 这项工作详细介绍了使用多架无人机捕获空中目标的问题。该问题源自2020年穆罕默德·本·扎耶德国际机器人挑战赛的挑战1。无人机利用视觉反馈来自主检测目标、接近目标并捕获目标，而不会干扰运载目标的车辆。多无人机协作提高了系统的效率，并增加了短时间内稳健捕捉球的机会。本文通过在ROS-Gazebo环境中进行仿真验证了所提出的架构，并在硬件上进一步实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多无人机协作跟踪和捕捉空中目标的方法，旨在解决Mohammed Bin Zayed国际机器人挑战赛中的目标捕捉问题。
AI.motivation: 受Mohammed Bin Zayed国际机器人挑战赛启发，需解决多无人机在不干扰目标载具的前提下高效捕捉空中目标的难题。
AI.method: 采用视觉反馈技术实现目标检测与自主接近，通过多无人机协作提升系统效率，并在ROS-Gazebo仿真环境及硬件平台上验证架构有效性。
AI.result: 仿真与硬件实验证明，该方法能在短时间内稳健捕捉目标，显著提升捕捉成功率与系统效率。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多无人机协作架构有效解决了空中目标捕捉问题，为类似机器人竞赛及实际应用提供了可行方案。

title: New Musical Interfaces and New Music-making Paradigms
title_zh: 新的音乐界面和新的音乐制作范式
comment: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
comments: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
abstract: The conception and design of new musical interfaces is a multidisciplinary area that tightly relates technology and artistic creation. In this paper, the author first exposes some of the questions he has posed himself during more than a decade experience as a performer, composer, interface and software designer, and educator. Finally, he illustrates these topics with some examples of his work.
summary: The conception and design of new musical interfaces is a multidisciplinary area that tightly relates technology and artistic creation. In this paper, the author first exposes some of the questions he has posed himself during more than a decade experience as a performer, composer, interface and software designer, and educator. Finally, he illustrates these topics with some examples of his work.
abstract_zh: 新音乐界面的构思和设计是一个多学科领域，将技术和艺术创作紧密联系在一起。在本文中，作者首先揭示了他在十多年作为表演者、作曲家、界面和软件设计师以及教育家的经历中提出的一些问题。最后，他用他的一些工作例子来阐述这些主题。

AI.tldr: 探讨新音乐接口的设计及其对音乐创作范式的影响
AI.motivation: 基于作者在表演、作曲、设计及教育领域的多年经验，探讨如何通过新音乐接口推动音乐创作的创新
AI.method: 通过作者在实践中的案例分析和跨学科经验，探讨新音乐接口的设计挑战与解决方案
AI.result: 展示了新音乐接口如何促进音乐创作范式的转变，并提供了实际案例支持
AI.conclusion: 新音乐接口的设计需融合技术与艺术，推动音乐创作范式的革新

title: Creating Contexts of Creativity: Musical Composition with Modular Components
title_zh: 创建创造力的背景：具有模块化组件的音乐创作
comment: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
comments: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
abstract: This paper describes a series of projects that explore the possibilities of musical expression through the combination of pre-composed, interlocking, modular components. In particular, this paper presents a modular soundtrack recently composed by the author for "Currents of Creativity," a permanent interactive video wall installation at the Pope John Paul II Cultural Center which is slated to open Easter 2001 in Washington, DC.
summary: This paper describes a series of projects that explore the possibilities of musical expression through the combination of pre-composed, interlocking, modular components. In particular, this paper presents a modular soundtrack recently composed by the author for "Currents of Creativity," a permanent interactive video wall installation at the Pope John Paul II Cultural Center which is slated to open Easter 2001 in Washington, DC.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了一系列项目，这些项目通过预先组合、互锁、模块化组件来探索音乐表达的可能性。本文特别介绍了作者最近为“Currents of Creativity”创作的模块化配乐，“Currents of Creativity”是位于教皇约翰·保罗二世文化中心的永久交互式视频墙装置，预计于 2001 年复活节在华盛顿特区开放。

AI.tldr: 本文通过组合预作的模块化组件探索音乐表达的可能，并为互动视频墙装置创作了模块化配乐。
AI.motivation: 旨在通过模块化音乐组件的灵活组合，拓展音乐创作的创造性边界，并应用于互动艺术装置中。
AI.method: 设计可互锁的预作音乐模块，通过结构化组合生成动态音乐，并将其应用于特定互动装置的声景设计。
AI.result: 成功为华盛顿教皇若望保禄二世文化中心的永久互动装置创作了模块化配乐，验证了该方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 模块化音乐组件为互动艺术提供了灵活的创作框架，展示了音乐与科技结合的创新潜力。

title: The MATRIX: A Novel Controller for Musical Expression
title_zh: MATRIX：一种新颖的音乐表达控制器
comment: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
comments: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
abstract: The MATRIX (Multipurpose Array of Tactile Rods for Interactive eXpression) is a new musical interface for amateurs and professionals alike. It gives users a 3- dimensional tangible interface to control music using their hands, and can be used in conjunction with a traditional musical instrument and a microphone, or as a stand-alone gestural input device. The surface of the MATRIX acts as a real-time interface that can manipulate the parameters of a synthesis engine or effect algorithm in response to a performer's expressive gestures. One example is to have the rods of the MATRIX control the individual grains of a granular synthesizer, thereby "sonically sculpting" the microstructure of a sound. In this way, the MATRIX provides an intuitive method of manip
summary: The MATRIX (Multipurpose Array of Tactile Rods for Interactive eXpression) is a new musical interface for amateurs and professionals alike. It gives users a 3- dimensional tangible interface to control music using their hands, and can be used in conjunction with a traditional musical instrument and a microphone, or as a stand-alone gestural input device. The surface of the MATRIX acts as a real-time interface that can manipulate the parameters of a synthesis engine or effect algorithm in response to a performer's expressive gestures. One example is to have the rods of the MATRIX control the individual grains of a granular synthesizer, thereby "sonically sculpting" the microstructure of a sound. In this way, the MATRIX provides an intuitive method of manip
abstract_zh: MATRIX（用于交互式表达的多用途触觉杆阵列）是一款适合业余爱好者和专业人士的新型音乐界面。它为用户提供了一个 3 维有形界面，可以用手控制音乐，并且可以与传统乐器和麦克风结合使用，或作为独立的手势输入设备。 MATRIX 的表面充当实时界面，可以响应表演者富有表现力的手势来操纵合成引擎或效果算法的参数。一个例子是让 MATRIX 的杆控制颗粒合成器的各个颗粒，从而“通过声音雕刻”声音的微观结构。这样，MATRIX提供了一种直观的操作方法

AI.tldr: 介绍一种名为MATRIX的新型三维触觉音乐控制器，用于通过手势实时控制音乐参数。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐控制接口缺乏直观性和灵活性，需提供更自然的触觉交互方式以增强音乐表现力。
AI.method: 基于三维触觉杆阵列的实时交互界面，结合合成引擎参数映射，通过手势操控声音微观结构。
AI.result: 实现了一种直观的音乐参数控制方式，用户可通过手势实时调整合成器参数，提升音乐表现力和创作灵活性。
AI.conclusion: MATRIX为音乐创作提供了创新的触觉交互方式，具有在专业和业余领域的广泛应用潜力。

title: Body, Clothes, Water, and Toys: Media Towards Natural Music Expressions with Digital Sounds
title_zh: 身体、衣服、水和玩具：通过数字声音实现自然音乐表达的媒体
comment: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
comments: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
abstract: In this paper, we introduce our research challenges for creating new musical instruments using everyday-life media with intimate interfaces, such as the self-body, clothes, water and stuffed toys. Various sensor technologies including image processing and general touch sensitive devices are employed to exploit these interaction media. The focus of our effort is to provide user-friendly and enjoyable experiences for new music and sound performances. Multimodality of musical instruments is explored in each attempt. The degree of controllability in the performance and the richness of expressions are also discussed for each installation.
summary: In this paper, we introduce our research challenges for creating new musical instruments using everyday-life media with intimate interfaces, such as the self-body, clothes, water and stuffed toys. Various sensor technologies including image processing and general touch sensitive devices are employed to exploit these interaction media. The focus of our effort is to provide user-friendly and enjoyable experiences for new music and sound performances. Multimodality of musical instruments is explored in each attempt. The degree of controllability in the performance and the richness of expressions are also discussed for each installation.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了利用具有亲密界面的日常生活媒体（例如人体、衣服、水和毛绒玩具）创造新乐器的研究挑战。包括图像处理和通用触摸敏感设备在内的各种传感器技术被用来利用这些交互媒体。我们努力的重点是为新的音乐和声音表演提供用户友好和愉快的体验。每次尝试都在探索乐器的多模态性。每个装置还讨论了表演的可控程度和表达的丰富程度。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用日常物品（如身体、衣物、水和玩具）结合亲密交互界面，开发新型音乐表达媒介。
AI.motivation: 通过日常物品和直观交互方式降低音乐创作门槛，提升表演的自然性与表现力。
AI.method: 整合图像处理、触觉传感器等技术，探索多模态交互机制并设计可控性与表现力的音乐装置。
AI.result: 实现了多种基于日常媒介的音乐装置原型，并验证了其交互可控性与表达丰富性。
AI.conclusion: 日常物品与亲密交互结合可为音乐表演提供新颖自然的表达方式，拓展了乐器设计的可能性。
