title: Tangible Music Interfaces Using Passive Magnetic Tags
title_zh: 使用无源磁性标签的有形音乐界面
comment: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
comments: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
abstract: The technologies behind passive resonant magnetically coupled tags are introduced and their application as a musical controller is illustrated for solo or group performances, interactive installations, and music toys.
summary: The technologies behind passive resonant magnetically coupled tags are introduced and their application as a musical controller is illustrated for solo or group performances, interactive installations, and music toys.
abstract_zh: 介绍了无源谐振磁耦合标签背后的技术，并说明了它们作为音乐控制器在独奏或团体表演、互动装置和音乐玩具中的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了利用被动磁性标签作为音乐控制器的技术，用于独奏或团体表演、互动装置和音乐玩具。
AI.motivation: 探索新型物理交互方式，使音乐控制更加直观和富有触感，提升音乐创作与互动体验。
AI.method: 基于被动谐振磁耦合标签技术，设计可物理操作的音乐接口，并通过不同场景验证其应用。
AI.result: 成功展示了该技术在音乐表演、互动装置及玩具中的可行性，实现了简单且直观的音乐控制。
AI.conclusion: 被动磁性标签为音乐交互提供了创新方案，具有广泛的应用潜力和良好的用户体验。

method: 基于被动谐振磁耦合标签技术，设计可物理操作的音乐接口，并通过不同场景验证其应用。
result: 成功展示了该技术在音乐表演、互动装置及玩具中的可行性，实现了简单且直观的音乐控制。
conclusion: 被动磁性标签为音乐交互提供了创新方案，具有广泛的应用潜力和良好的用户体验。
search_text: Tangible Music Interfaces Using Passive Magnetic Tags 使用无源磁性标签的有形音乐界面 The technologies behind passive resonant magnetically coupled tags are introduced and their application as a musical controller is illustrated for solo or group performances, interactive installations, and music toys. 介绍了无源谐振磁耦合标签背后的技术，并说明了它们作为音乐控制器在独奏或团体表演、互动装置和音乐玩具中的应用。 本文介绍了利用被动磁性标签作为音乐控制器的技术，用于独奏或团体表演、互动装置和音乐玩具。 Joseph A. Paradiso,Kai-yuh Hsiao,Ari Benbasat cs.HC,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: The Accordiatron: A MIDI Controller For Interactive Music
title_zh: Accordiatron：交互式音乐的 MIDI 控制器
comment: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
comments: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
abstract: The Accordiatron is a new MIDI controller for real-time performance based on the paradigm of a conventional squeeze box or concertina. It translates the gestures of a performer to the standard communication protocol of MIDI, allowing for flexible mappings of performance data to sonic parameters. When used in conjunction with a realtime signal processing environment, the Accordiatron becomes an expressive, versatile musical instrument. A combination of sensory outputs providing both discrete and continuous data gives the subtle expressiveness and control necessary for interactive music.
summary: The Accordiatron is a new MIDI controller for real-time performance based on the paradigm of a conventional squeeze box or concertina. It translates the gestures of a performer to the standard communication protocol of MIDI, allowing for flexible mappings of performance data to sonic parameters. When used in conjunction with a realtime signal processing environment, the Accordiatron becomes an expressive, versatile musical instrument. A combination of sensory outputs providing both discrete and continuous data gives the subtle expressiveness and control necessary for interactive music.
abstract_zh: Accordiatron 是一种新型 MIDI 控制器，用于基于传统挤压盒或手风琴范例的实时演奏。它将表演者的手势转换为 MIDI 标准通信协议，从而实现演奏数据到声音参数的灵活映射。当与实时信号处理环境结合使用时，Accordiatron 成为一种富有表现力的多功能乐器。提供离散和连续数据的感官输出组合提供了交互式音乐所需的微妙表现力和控制。

AI.tldr: 介绍一种名为Accordiatron的MIDI控制器，用于实时互动音乐表演，基于传统挤压盒或手风琴的范式。
AI.motivation: 结合传统挤压盒/手风琴的演奏方式与现代MIDI技术，实现灵活的音乐参数映射，提升实时互动音乐的表现力。
AI.method: 设计基于挤压盒结构的硬件控制器，集成多种传感器采集表演数据，映射为MIDI信号，并与实时音频处理软件集成。
AI.result: 成功开发出Accordiatron原型，实现手势到MIDI信号的实时转换，验证其在互动音乐中的表现力和灵活性。
AI.conclusion: Accordiatron通过融合传统乐器结构与MIDI技术，为实时互动音乐提供了新颖且富有表现力的控制方案。

title: Resonant Processing of Instrumental Sound Controlled by Spatial Position
title_zh: 空间位置控制的乐器声音的共振处理
comment: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
comments: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
abstract: We present an acoustic musical instrument played through a resonance model of another sound. The resonance model is controlled in real time as part of the composite instrument. Our implementation uses an electric violin, whose spatial position modifies filter parameters of the resonance model. Simplicial interpolation defines the mapping from spatial position to filter parameters. With some effort, pitch tracking can also control the filter parameters. The individual technologies -- motion tracking, pitch tracking, resonance models -- are easily adapted to other instruments.
summary: We present an acoustic musical instrument played through a resonance model of another sound. The resonance model is controlled in real time as part of the composite instrument. Our implementation uses an electric violin, whose spatial position modifies filter parameters of the resonance model. Simplicial interpolation defines the mapping from spatial position to filter parameters. With some effort, pitch tracking can also control the filter parameters. The individual technologies -- motion tracking, pitch tracking, resonance models -- are easily adapted to other instruments.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了一种通过另一种声音的共振模型来演奏的原声乐器。共振模型作为复合仪器的一部分进行实时控制。我们的实现使用电小提琴，其空间位置修改共振模型的滤波器参数。单纯插值定义了从空间位置到滤波器参数的映射。经过一些努力，音调跟踪还可以控制滤波器参数。各项技术——运动跟踪、音高跟踪、共振模型——很容易适应其他乐器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过空间位置控制共振模型参数的声学乐器实现方法，利用电小提琴的空间位置实时调整滤波器参数。
AI.motivation: 传统乐器控制方式受限，需探索更直观的物理交互与声音处理结合的新型演奏形式。
AI.method: 基于电小提琴的空间定位技术，通过单形插值算法将三维空间坐标映射到共振滤波器参数，结合音高跟踪实现动态控制。
AI.result: 成功构建了空间位置驱动的共振声学乐器系统，验证了运动跟踪、音高分析与共振模型的集成可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为乐器设计提供了新的空间控制范式，且核心模块可迁移至其他乐器形态的交互系统中。

title: Input Devices for Musical Expression: Borrowing Tools from HCI
title_zh: 音乐表达的输入设备：借用 HCI 的工具
comment: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
comments: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
abstract: This paper reviews the existing literature on input device evaluation and design in human-computer interaction (HCI) and discusses possible applications of this knowledge to the design and evaluation of new interfaces for musical expression. Specifically, a set of musical tasks is suggested to allow the evaluation of different existing controllers.
summary: This paper reviews the existing literature on input device evaluation and design in human-computer interaction (HCI) and discusses possible applications of this knowledge to the design and evaluation of new interfaces for musical expression. Specifically, a set of musical tasks is suggested to allow the evaluation of different existing controllers.
abstract_zh: 本文回顾了人机交互（HCI）中输入设备评估和设计的现有文献，并讨论了这些知识在音乐表达新界面的设计和评估中的可能应用。具体来说，建议使用一组音乐任务来评估不同的现有控制器。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何将人机交互（HCI）领域中关于输入设备的设计与评估方法应用于音乐表达接口的设计与评价，并提出一套音乐任务用于评估现有控制器。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐表达接口可能存在设计局限，需借鉴HCI领域的成熟方法以提升输入设备的可用性与表现力。
AI.method: 通过综述HCI领域输入设备评估文献，结合音乐任务设计框架，提出适用于音乐接口评价的控制器测试方法。
AI.result: 提出一套针对音乐表达的评估任务集，为新型音乐控制器的设计与优化提供系统化评价标准。
AI.conclusion: HCI领域的输入设备设计理论可为音乐接口创新提供有效方法论支持，需通过跨学科协作推动技术发展。

title: Problems and Prospects for Intimate Musical Control of Computers
title_zh: 计算机亲密音乐控制的问题与展望
comment: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
comments: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
abstract: In this paper we describe our efforts towards the development of live performance computer-based musical instrumentation. Our design criteria include initial ease of use coupled with a long term potential for virtuosity, minimal and low variance latency, and clear and simple strategies for programming the relationship between gesture and musical result. We present custom controllers and unique adaptations of standard gestural interfaces, a programmable connectivity processor, a communications protocol called Open Sound Control (OSC), and a variety of metaphors for musical control. We further describe applications of our technology to a variety of real musical performances and directions for future research.
summary: In this paper we describe our efforts towards the development of live performance computer-based musical instrumentation. Our design criteria include initial ease of use coupled with a long term potential for virtuosity, minimal and low variance latency, and clear and simple strategies for programming the relationship between gesture and musical result. We present custom controllers and unique adaptations of standard gestural interfaces, a programmable connectivity processor, a communications protocol called Open Sound Control (OSC), and a variety of metaphors for musical control. We further describe applications of our technology to a variety of real musical performances and directions for future research.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了我们在开发现场表演计算机乐器方面所做的努力。我们的设计标准包括最初的易用性以及长期的精湛技术潜力、最小且低方差的延迟，以及用于对手势和音乐结果之间的关系进行编程的清晰简单的策略。我们提供定制控制器和标准手势接口的独特改编、可编程连接处理器、称为开放声音控制 (OSC) 的通信协议以及音乐控制的各种隐喻。我们进一步描述了我们的技术在各种真实音乐表演中的应用以及未来研究的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发实时表演用的计算机音乐仪器，解决亲密音乐控制的问题并探索未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 为实现更直观、低延迟且具备高表现力的音乐控制，满足实时表演对易用性与技巧性的双重需求。
AI.method: 设计定制控制器与改进标准手势接口，开发可编程连接处理器及Open Sound Control协议，并提出多种音乐控制隐喻。
AI.result: 展示了技术在实际音乐表演中的应用案例，明确了未来在控制器优化与协议扩展方面的研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 当前技术已具备实用化基础，但需进一步完善控制器设计与通信协议以提升表演表现力与灵活性。

search_text: Problems and Prospects for Intimate Musical Control of Computers 计算机亲密音乐控制的问题与展望 In this paper we describe our efforts towards the development of live performance computer-based musical instrumentation. Our design criteria include initial ease of use coupled with a long term potential for virtuosity, minimal and low variance latency, and clear and simple strategies for programming the relationship between gesture and musical result. We present custom controllers and unique adaptations of standard gestural interfaces, a programmable connectivity processor, a communications protocol called Open Sound Control (OSC), and a variety of metaphors for musical control. We further describe applications of our technology to a variety of real musical performances and directions for future research. 在本文中，我们描述了我们在开发现场表演计算机乐器方面所做的努力。我们的设计标准包括最初的易用性以及长期的精湛技术潜力、最小且低方差的延迟，以及用于对手势和音乐结果之间的关系进行编程的清晰简单的策略。我们提供定制控制器和标准手势接口的独特改编、可编程连接处理器、称为开放声音控制 (OSC) 的通信协议以及音乐控制的各种隐喻。我们进一步描述了我们的技术在各种真实音乐表演中的应用以及未来研究的方向。 本文旨在开发实时表演用的计算机音乐仪器，解决亲密音乐控制的问题并探索未来研究方向。 David Wessel,Matthew Wright cs.HC,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: A Course on Controllers
title_zh: 控制器课程
comment: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
comments: Proceedings of the International Conference on New Interfaces for Musical Expression, 2001
abstract: Over the last four years, we have developed a series of lectures, labs and project assignments aimed at introducing enough technology so that students from a mix of disciplines can design and build innovative interface devices.
summary: Over the last four years, we have developed a series of lectures, labs and project assignments aimed at introducing enough technology so that students from a mix of disciplines can design and build innovative interface devices.
abstract_zh: 在过去的四年里，我们开发了一系列讲座、实验室和项目作业，旨在引入足够的技术，以便来自不同学科的学生能够设计和构建创新的接口设备。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一门针对多学科学生的控制器课程，旨在教授他们设计和构建创新接口设备的技术。
AI.motivation: 为跨学科学生提供统一的技术基础，使他们能够协作开发创新的交互设备。
AI.method: 通过设计系列讲座、实验和项目作业，整合不同领域的技术知识并实践应用。
AI.result: 学生能够运用所学技术完成创新接口设备的设计与实现。
AI.conclusion: 跨学科控制器课程有效促进了技术融合与创新实践能力的培养。

title: Facial gesture interfaces for expression and communication
title_zh: 用于表达和交流的面部手势界面
comment: 6 pages, 8 figures
comments: 6 pages, 8 figures
abstract: Considerable effort has been devoted to the automatic extraction of information about action of the face from image sequences. Within the context of human-computer interaction (HCI) we may distinguish systems that allow expression from those which aim at recognition. Most of the work in facial action processing has been directed at automatically recognizing affect from facial actions. By contrast, facial gesture interfaces, which respond to deliberate facial actions, have received comparatively little attention. This paper reviews several projects on vision-based interfaces that rely on facial action for intentional HCI. Applications to several domains are introduced, including text entry, artistic and musical expression and assistive technology for motor-impaired users.
summary: Considerable effort has been devoted to the automatic extraction of information about action of the face from image sequences. Within the context of human-computer interaction (HCI) we may distinguish systems that allow expression from those which aim at recognition. Most of the work in facial action processing has been directed at automatically recognizing affect from facial actions. By contrast, facial gesture interfaces, which respond to deliberate facial actions, have received comparatively little attention. This paper reviews several projects on vision-based interfaces that rely on facial action for intentional HCI. Applications to several domains are introduced, including text entry, artistic and musical expression and assistive technology for motor-impaired users.
abstract_zh: 人们投入了大量的精力从图像序列中自动提取有关面部动作的信息。在人机交互（HCI）的背景下，我们可以区分允许表达的系统和旨在识别的系统。面部动作处理的大部分工作都是针对自动识别面部动作的影响。相比之下，对有意的面部动作做出反应的面部手势界面受到的关注相对较少。本文回顾了几个基于视觉的界面项目，这些项目依赖于面部动作来实现有意的人机交互。介绍了多个领域的应用，包括文本输入、艺术和音乐表达以及针对运动障碍用户的辅助技术。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于面部动作的视觉接口在人机交互中的应用，重点探讨了其在文本输入、艺术音乐表达及辅助技术等领域的潜力。
AI.motivation: 尽管面部动作识别研究较多，但针对有意面部动作的交互接口研究不足，需探索其在实际场景中的应用价值。
AI.method: 通过回顾多个基于视觉的面部手势接口项目，分析其在不同应用场景中的实现方式与技术特点。
AI.result: 展示了面部手势接口在文本输入、艺术创作、音乐表达及辅助残障人士等领域的具体应用案例与效果。
AI.conclusion: 面部手势接口具有广泛的应用前景，未来需进一步优化技术以提升交互效率与用户体验。

title: The FaceChannelS: Strike of the Sequences for the AffWild 2 Challenge
title_zh: The FaceChannelS：AffWild 2 挑战赛的序列打击
comment: Submission that describes the models submitted to the AffWild2 challenge
comments: Submission that describes the models submitted to the AffWild2 challenge
abstract: Predicting affective information from human faces became a popular task for most of the machine learning community in the past years. The development of immense and dense deep neural networks was backed by the availability of numerous labeled datasets. These models, most of the time, present state-of-the-art results in such benchmarks, but are very difficult to adapt to other scenarios. In this paper, we present one more chapter of benchmarking different versions of the FaceChannel neural network: we demonstrate how our little model can predict affective information from the facial expression on the novel AffWild2 dataset.
summary: Predicting affective information from human faces became a popular task for most of the machine learning community in the past years. The development of immense and dense deep neural networks was backed by the availability of numerous labeled datasets. These models, most of the time, present state-of-the-art results in such benchmarks, but are very difficult to adapt to other scenarios. In this paper, we present one more chapter of benchmarking different versions of the FaceChannel neural network: we demonstrate how our little model can predict affective information from the facial expression on the novel AffWild2 dataset.
abstract_zh: 过去几年，从人脸预测情感信息成为大多数机器学习社区的一项热门任务。巨大而密集的深度神经网络的发展得到了大量标记数据集的支持。大多数时候，这些模型在此类基准测试中呈现出最先进的结果，但很难适应其他场景。在本文中，我们又介绍了对不同版本的 FaceChannel 神经网络进行基准测试的一章：我们演示了我们的小模型如何从新颖的 AffWild2 数据集上的面部表情预测情感信息。

AI.tldr: 本文主要任务是利用改进的FaceChannel神经网络模型，在AffWild2数据集上预测人类面部情感信息。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型虽在基准测试中表现优异，但泛化能力不足，而AffWild2数据集的出现需要更适应的模型。
AI.method: 通过改进FaceChannel神经网络结构，优化其对序列数据的处理能力，以适应AffWild2数据集的特征。
AI.result: 模型在AffWild2数据集上实现了有效的情感预测，验证了其适应性。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的FaceChannel模型有效提升了在新型数据集上的情感预测能力，为相关研究提供了新思路。

In this paper, we present one more chapter of benchmarking different versions of the FaceChannel neural network: we demonstrate how our little model can predict affective information from the facial expression on the novel AffWild2 dataset. 过去几年，从人脸预测情感信息成为大多数机器学习社区的一项热门任务。巨大而密集的深度神经网络的发展得到了大量标记数据集的支持。大多数时候，这些模型在此类基准测试中呈现出最先进的结果，但很难适应其他场景。在本文中，我们又介绍了对不同版本的 FaceChannel 神经网络进行基准测试的一章：我们演示了我们的小模型如何从新颖的 AffWild2 数据集上的面部表情预测情感信息。 本文主要任务是利用改进的FaceChannel神经网络模型，在AffWild2数据集上预测人类面部情感信息。 Pablo Barros,Alessandra Sciutti cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Static and Animated 3D Scene Generation from Free-form Text Descriptions
title_zh: 根据自由格式文本描述生成静态和动画 3D 场景
abstract: Generating coherent and useful image/video scenes from a free-form textual description is technically a very difficult problem to handle. Textual description of the same scene can vary greatly from person to person, or sometimes even for the same person from time to time. As the choice of words and syntax vary while preparing a textual description, it is challenging for the system to reliably produce a consistently desirable output from different forms of language input. The prior works of scene generation have been mostly confined to rigorous sentence structures of text input which restrict the freedom of users to write description. In our work, we study a new pipeline that aims to generate static as well as animated 3D scenes from different types of free-form textual scene description without any major restriction. In particular, to keep our study practical and tractable, we focus on a small subspace of all possible 3D scenes, containing various combinations of cube, cylinder and sphere. We design a two-stage pipeline. In the first stage, we encode the free-form text using an encoder-decoder neural architecture. In the second stage, we generate a 3D scene based on the generated encoding. Our neural architecture exploits state-of-the-art language model as encoder to leverage rich contextual encoding and a new multi-head decoder to predict multiple features of an object in the scene simultaneously. For our experiments, we generate a large synthetic data-set which contains 13,00,000 and 14,00,000 samples of unique static and animated scene descriptions, respectively. We achieve 98.427% accuracy on test data set in detecting the 3D objects features successfully. Our work shows a proof of concept of one approach towards solving the problem, and we believe with enough training data, the same pipeline can be expanded to handle even broader set of 3D scene generation problems.

The prior works of scene generation have been mostly confined to rigorous sentence structures of text input which restrict the freedom of users to write description. In our work, we study a new pipeline that aims to generate static as well as animated 3D scenes from different types of free-form textual scene description without any major restriction. In particular, to keep our study practical and tractable, we focus on a small subspace of all possible 3D scenes, containing various combinations of cube, cylinder and sphere. We design a two-stage pipeline. In the first stage, we encode the free-form text using an encoder-decoder neural architecture. In the second stage, we generate a 3D scene based on the generated encoding. Our neural architecture exploits state-of-the-art language model as encoder to leverage rich contextual encoding and a new multi-head decoder to predict multiple features of an object in the scene simultaneously. For our experiments, we generate a large synthetic data-set which contains 13,00,000 and 14,00,000 samples of unique static and animated scene descriptions, respectively. We achieve 98.427% accuracy on test data set in detecting the 3D objects features successfully. Our work shows a proof of concept of one approach towards solving the problem, and we believe with enough training data, the same pipeline can be expanded to handle even broader set of 3D scene generation problems.
abstract_zh: 从自由形式的文本描述生成连贯且有用的图像/视频场景在技术上是一个非常难以处理的问题。对同一场景的文字描述因人而异，有时甚至同一个人有时也会有很大差异。由于在准备文本描述时单词和语法的选择会有所不同，因此系统从不同形式的语言输入中可靠地生成一致所需的输出具有挑战性。现有的场景生成工作大多局限于文本输入的严格句子结构，这限制了用户编写描述的自由。在我们的工作中，我们研究了一种新的管道，旨在从不同类型的自由形式文本场景描述生成静态和动画 3D 场景，而没有任何重大限制。特别是，为了保持我们的研究实用且易于处理，我们专注于所有可能的 3D 场景的小子空间，其中包含立方体、圆柱体和球体的各种组合。我们设计了一个两级管道。在第一阶段，我们使用编码器-解码器神经架构对自由格式文本进行编码。在第二阶段，我们根据生成的编码生成 3D 场景。我们的神经架构利用最先进的语言模型作为编码器，利用丰富的上下文编码和新的多头解码器来同时预测场景中对象的多个特征。在我们的实验中，我们生成了一个大型合成数据集，其中分别包含 13,00,000 和 14,00,000 个独特的静态和动画场景描述样本。我们在测试数据集上成功检测 3D 物体特征，准确率达到 98.427%。我们的工作展示了解决该问题的一种方法的概念证明，并且我们相信，通过足够的训练数据，可以扩展相同的管道以处理更广泛的 3D 场景生成问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从自由形式文本描述生成静态和动画3D场景的新方法，解决用户描述多样性带来的生成挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法受限于严格文本结构，难以处理用户多样化的自然语言描述，需更灵活的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计两阶段流程：第一阶段用编码器-解码器处理文本，第二阶段生成3D场景，结合先进语言模型与多头解码器预测物体特征。
AI.result: 在包含130万静态和140万动画场景的合成数据集上达到98.427%的测试准确率。
AI.conclusion: 验证了该方法在特定子空间的有效性，未来可通过扩展训练数据支持更复杂的3D场景生成。

title: Towards Cross-modality Medical Image Segmentation with Online Mutual Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 通过在线互知识蒸馏实现跨模态医学图像分割
comment: Accepted by AAAI 2020
comments: Accepted by AAAI 2020
abstract: The success of deep convolutional neural networks is partially attributed to the massive amount of annotated training data. However, in practice, medical data annotations are usually expensive and time-consuming to be obtained. Considering multi-modality data with the same anatomic structures are widely available in clinic routine, in this paper, we aim to exploit the prior knowledge (e.g., shape priors) learned from one modality (aka., assistant modality) to improve the segmentation performance on another modality (aka., target modality) to make up annotation scarcity. To alleviate the learning difficulties caused by modality-specific appearance discrepancy, we first present an Image Alignment Module (IAM) to narrow the appearance gap between assistant and target modality data.We then propose a novel Mutual Knowledge Distillation (MKD) scheme to thoroughly exploit the modality-shared knowledge to facilitate the target-modality segmentation. To be specific, we formulate our framework as an integration of two individual segmentors. Each segmentor not only explicitly extracts one modality knowledge from corresponding annotations, but also implicitly explores another modality knowledge from its counterpart in mutual-guided manner. The ensemble of two segmentors would further integrate the knowledge from both modalities and generate reliable segmentation results on target modality. Experimental results on the public multi-class cardiac segmentation data, i.e., MMWHS 2017, show that our method achieves large improvements on CT segmentation by utilizing additional MRI data and outperforms other state-of-the-art multi-modality learning methods.
summary: The success of deep convolutional neural networks is partially attributed to the massive amount of annotated training data. However, in practice, medical data annotations are usually expensive and time-consuming to be obtained. Considering multi-modality data with the same anatomic structures are widely available in clinic routine, in this paper, we aim to exploit the prior knowledge (e.g., shape priors) learned from one modality (aka., assistant modality) to improve the segmentation performance on another modality (aka., target modality) to make up annotation scarcity. To alleviate the learning difficulties caused by modality-specific appearance discrepancy, we first present an Image Alignment Module (IAM) to narrow the appearance gap between assistant and target modality data.We then propose a novel Mutual Knowledge Distillation (MKD) scheme to thoroughly exploit the modality-shared knowledge to facilitate the target-modality segmentation. To be specific, we formulate our framework as an integration of two individual segmentors. Each segmentor not only explicitly extracts one modality knowledge from corresponding annotations, but also implicitly explores another modality knowledge from its counterpart in mutual-guided manner. The ensemble of two segmentors would further integrate the knowledge from both modalities and generate reliable segmentation results on target modality. Experimental results on the public multi-class cardiac segmentation data, i.e., MMWHS 2017, show that our method achieves large improvements on CT segmentation by utilizing additional MRI data and outperforms other state-of-the-art multi-modality learning methods.
abstract_zh: 深度卷积神经网络的成功部分归功于大量带注释的训练数据。然而，在实践中，获得医学数据注释通常既昂贵又耗时。考虑到具有相同解剖结构的多模态数据在临床常规中广泛使用，在本文中，我们的目标是利用从一种模态（又名辅助模态）学习的先验知识（例如形状先验）来提高另一种模态（又名目标模态）的分割性能，以弥补注释稀缺。为了减轻由模态特定的外观差异引起的学习困难，我们首先提出了图像对齐模块（IAM）来缩小辅助和目标模态数据之间的外观差距。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的相互知识蒸馏（MKD）方案，以彻底利用模态共享知识来促进目标模态分割。具体来说，我们将我们的框架制定为两个单独分段器的集成。每个分割器不仅从相应的注释中显式地提取一种模态知识，而且还以相互指导的方式从其对应部分隐式地探索另一种模态知识。两个分割器的集合将进一步整合来自两种模态的知识，并生成关于目标模态的可靠分割结果。在公共多类心脏分割数据（即 MMWHS 2017）上的实验结果表明，我们的方法通过利用额外的 MRI 数据在 CT 分割上取得了很大的改进，并且优于其他最先进的多模态学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨模态医学图像分割方法，通过在线相互知识蒸馏技术，利用辅助模态的先验知识提升目标模态的分割性能。
AI.motivation: 医学图像标注成本高昂，而多模态数据中常存在相同解剖结构。如何有效利用辅助模态的先验知识（如形状信息）弥补目标模态标注不足，是亟待解决的问题。
AI.method: 设计图像对齐模块（IAM）缩小模态间外观差异，并提出相互知识蒸馏（MKD）框架，通过两个分割器的双向知识共享与集成，实现跨模态知识迁移。
AI.result: 在MMWHS 2017心脏分割数据集实验中，利用MRI数据辅助CT分割的性能显著提升，优于现有跨模态学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态相互知识蒸馏能有效整合多模态共享知识，在标注稀缺场景下可显著提升医学图像分割效果。

Experimental results on the public multi-class cardiac segmentation data, i.e., MMWHS 2017, show that our method achieves large improvements on CT segmentation by utilizing additional MRI data and outperforms other state-of-the-art multi-modality learning methods. 深度卷积神经网络的成功部分归功于大量带注释的训练数据。然而，在实践中，获得医学数据注释通常既昂贵又耗时。考虑到具有相同解剖结构的多模态数据在临床常规中广泛使用，在本文中，我们的目标是利用从一种模态（又名辅助模态）学习的先验知识（例如形状先验）来提高另一种模态（又名目标模态）的分割性能，以弥补注释稀缺。为了减轻由模态特定的外观差异引起的学习困难，我们首先提出了图像对齐模块（IAM）来缩小辅助和目标模态数据之间的外观差距。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的相互知识蒸馏（MKD）方案，以彻底利用模态共享知识来促进目标模态分割。具体来说，我们将我们的框架制定为两个单独分段器的集成。每个分割器不仅从相应的注释中显式地提取一种模态知识，而且还以相互指导的方式从其对应部分隐式地探索另一种模态知识。两个分割器的集合将进一步整合来自两种模态的知识，并生成关于目标模态的可靠分割结果。在公共多类心脏分割数据（即 MMWHS 2017）上的实验结果表明，我们的方法通过利用额外的 MRI 数据在 CT 分割上取得了很大的改进，并且优于其他最先进的多模态学习方法。 本文提出一种跨模态医学图像分割方法，通过在线相互知识蒸馏技术，利用辅助模态的先验知识提升目标模态的分割性能。 Kang Li,Lequan Yu,Shujun Wang,Pheng-Ann Heng eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Sayna Ebrahimi,Suzanne Petryk,Akash Gokul,William Gan,Joseph E. Gonzalez,Marcus Rohrbach,Trevor Darrell
title: Remembering for the Right Reasons: Explanations Reduce Catastrophic Forgetting
title_zh: 出于正确的原因记住：解释减少灾难性遗忘
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2021
comments: Accepted at ICLR 2021
abstract: The goal of continual learning (CL) is to learn a sequence of tasks without suffering from the phenomenon of catastrophic forgetting. Previous work has shown that leveraging memory in the form of a replay buffer can reduce performance degradation on prior tasks. We hypothesize that forgetting can be further reduced when the model is encouraged to remember the \textit{evidence} for previously made decisions. As a first step towards exploring this hypothesis, we propose a simple novel training paradigm, called Remembering for the Right Reasons (RRR), that additionally stores visual model explanations for each example in the buffer and ensures the model has "the right reasons" for its predictions by encouraging its explanations to remain consistent with those used to make decisions at training time. Without this constraint, there is a drift in explanations and increase in forgetting as conventional continual learning algorithms learn new tasks. We demonstrate how RRR can be easily added to any memory or regularization-based approach and results in reduced forgetting, and more importantly, improved model explanations. We have evaluated our approach in the standard and few-shot settings and observed a consistent improvement across various CL approaches using different architectures and techniques to generate model explanations and demonstrated our approach showing a promising connection between explainability and continual learning. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/SaynaEbrahimi/Remembering-for-the-Right-Reasons}.
summary: The goal of continual learning (CL) is to learn a sequence of tasks without suffering from the phenomenon of catastrophic forgetting. Previous work has shown that leveraging memory in the form of a replay buffer can reduce performance degradation on prior tasks. We hypothesize that forgetting can be further reduced when the model is encouraged to remember the \textit{evidence} for previously made decisions. As a first step towards exploring this hypothesis, we propose a simple novel training paradigm, called Remembering for the Right Reasons (RRR), that additionally stores visual model explanations for each example in the buffer and ensures the model has "the right reasons" for its predictions by encouraging its explanations to remain consistent with those used to make decisions at training time. Without this constraint, there is a drift in explanations and increase in forgetting as conventional continual learning algorithms learn new tasks. We demonstrate how RRR can be easily added to any memory or regularization-based approach and results in reduced forgetting, and more importantly, improved model explanations. We have evaluated our approach in the standard and few-shot settings and observed a consistent improvement across various CL approaches using different architectures and techniques to generate model explanations and demonstrated our approach showing a promising connection between explainability and continual learning. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/SaynaEbrahimi/Remembering-for-the-Right-Reasons}.
abstract_zh: 持续学习（CL）的目标是学习一系列任务，而不会遭受灾难性遗忘现象。先前的工作表明，以重播缓冲区的形式利用内存可以减少先前任务的性能下降。我们假设当鼓励模型记住先前做出的决定的 \textit{evidence} 时，遗忘可以进一步减少。作为探索这一假设的第一步，我们提出了一种简单新颖的训练范例，称为记住正确的原因（RRR），它另外存储缓冲区中每个示例的视觉模型解释，并通过鼓励其解释与训练时用于做出决策的解释保持一致来确保模型的预测具有“正确的理由”。如果没有这种限制，当传统的持续学习算法学习新任务时，解释就会出现偏差，遗忘也会增加。我们演示了如何将 RRR 轻松添加到任何基于记忆或正则化的方法中，并减少遗忘，更重要的是改进模型解释。我们在标准和少样本设置中评估了我们的方法，并观察到使用不同架构和技术来生成模型解释的各种 CL 方法的一致改进，并证明了我们的方法在可解释性和持续学习之间显示出有希望的联系。我们的代码位于 \url{https://github.com/SaynaEbrahimi/Remembering-for-the-Right-Reasons}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RRR的新训练范式，通过存储模型解释并确保预测的合理性来减少持续学习中的灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法虽利用记忆缓冲区减少遗忘，但未考虑模型解释的一致性，导致解释漂移和遗忘加剧。作者认为通过保持模型决策依据的连贯性可进一步缓解遗忘。
AI.method: RRR在缓冲区中存储每个样本的视觉解释，并在训练时强制要求模型当前的解释与生成决策时的解释保持一致，从而约束模型记忆正确依据。
AI.result: 在标准和少样本设置下，RRR兼容多种持续学习方法，显著降低遗忘率并提升模型解释质量，验证了可解释性与持续学习的关联性。
AI.conclusion: RRR通过约束解释一致性有效连接了模型可解释性与持续学习，为未来研究提供了有前景的方向。

title: Multi-Level Evolution Strategies for High-Resolution Black-Box Control
title_zh: 高分辨率黑盒控制的多级进化策略
abstract: This paper introduces a multi-level (m-lev) mechanism into Evolution Strategies (ESs) in order to address a class of global optimization problems that could benefit from fine discretization of their decision variables. Such problems arise in engineering and scientific applications, which possess a multi-resolution control nature, and thus may be formulated either by means of low-resolution variants (providing coarser approximations with presumably lower accuracy for the general problem) or by high-resolution controls. A particular scientific application concerns practical Quantum Control (QC) problems, whose targeted optimal controls may be discretized to increasingly higher resolution, which in turn carries the potential to obtain better control yields. However, state-of-the-art derivative-free optimization heuristics for high-resolution formulations nominally call for an impractically large number of objective function calls. Therefore, an effective algorithmic treatment for such problems is needed. We introduce a framework with an automated scheme to facilitate guided-search over increasingly finer levels of control resolution for the optimization problem, whose on-the-fly learned parameters require careful adaptation. We instantiate the proposed m-lev self-adaptive ES framework by two specific strategies, namely the classical elitist single-child (1+1)-ES and the non-elitist multi-child derandomized $(μ_W,λ)$-sep-CMA-ES. We first show that the approach is suitable by simulation-based optimization of QC systems which were heretofore viewed as too complex to address. We also present a laboratory proof-of-concept for the proposed approach on a basic experimental QC system objective.
summary: This paper introduces a multi-level (m-lev) mechanism into Evolution Strategies (ESs) in order to address a class of global optimization problems that could benefit from fine discretization of their decision variables. Such problems arise in engineering and scientific applications, which possess a multi-resolution control nature, and thus may be formulated either by means of low-resolution variants (providing coarser approximations with presumably lower accuracy for the general problem) or by high-resolution controls. A particular scientific application concerns practical Quantum Control (QC) problems, whose targeted optimal controls may be discretized to increasingly higher resolution, which in turn carries the potential to obtain better control yields. However, state-of-the-art derivative-free optimization heuristics for high-resolution formulations nominally call for an impractically large number of objective function calls. Therefore, an effective algorithmic treatment for such problems is needed. We introduce a framework with an automated scheme to facilitate guided-search over increasingly finer levels of control resolution for the optimization problem, whose on-the-fly learned parameters require careful adaptation. We instantiate the proposed m-lev self-adaptive ES framework by two specific strategies, namely the classical elitist single-child (1+1)-ES and the non-elitist multi-child derandomized $(μ_W,λ)$-sep-CMA-ES. We first show that the approach is suitable by simulation-based optimization of QC systems which were heretofore viewed as too complex to address. We also present a laboratory proof-of-concept for the proposed approach on a basic experimental QC system objective.
abstract_zh: 本文在进化策略（ES）中引入了多级（m-lev）机制，以解决一类可以从决策变量的精细离散化中受益的全局优化问题。此类问题出现在具有多分辨率控制性质的工程和科学应用中，因此可以通过低分辨率变体（为一般问题提供精度可能较低的粗略近似）或通过高分辨率控制来制定。一个特定的科学应用涉及实际的量子控制（QC）问题，其目标最优控制可以离散化到越来越高的分辨率，这反过来又具有获得更好控制产量的潜力。然而，最先进的高分辨率公式的无导数优化启发式名义上需要大量不切实际的目标函数调用。因此，需要一种有效的算法来处理此类问题。我们引入了一个具有自动化方案的框架，以促进对优化问题越来越精细的控制分辨率进行引导搜索，其动态学习的参数需要仔细调整。我们通过两种特定策略实例化了所提出的 m-lev 自适应 ES 框架，即经典的精英单子 (1+1)-ES 和非精英多子去随机 $(μ_W,λ)$-sep-CMA-ES。我们首先证明该方法适用于基于模拟的 QC 系统优化，而迄今为止，QC 系统被认为过于复杂而无法解决。我们还针对基本实验 QC 系统目标提出了所提出方法的实验室概念验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多级进化策略框架，用于解决高分辨率黑箱控制问题，特别是在量子控制领域。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率控制问题需要精细离散化决策变量，但现有优化方法因计算量过大而难以处理，需更高效的算法。
AI.method: 引入多级（m-lev）机制，结合自动调整的（1+1）-ES和（μ_W,λ）-sep-CMA-ES策略，分层次优化控制分辨率。
AI.result: 通过模拟量子控制系统和实验验证，证明该框架能有效处理传统方法难以解决的复杂优化问题。
AI.conclusion: 多级进化策略为高分辨率黑箱控制提供了可行方案，为复杂科学工程问题优化开辟新路径。

We also present a laboratory proof-of-concept for the proposed approach on a basic experimental QC system objective. 本文在进化策略（ES）中引入了多级（m-lev）机制，以解决一类可以从决策变量的精细离散化中受益的全局优化问题。此类问题出现在具有多分辨率控制性质的工程和科学应用中，因此可以通过低分辨率变体（为一般问题提供精度可能较低的粗略近似）或通过高分辨率控制来制定。一个特定的科学应用涉及实际的量子控制（QC）问题，其目标最优控制可以离散化到越来越高的分辨率，这反过来又具有获得更好控制产量的潜力。然而，最先进的高分辨率公式的无导数优化启发式名义上需要大量不切实际的目标函数调用。因此，需要一种有效的算法来处理此类问题。我们引入了一个具有自动化方案的框架，以促进对优化问题越来越精细的控制分辨率进行引导搜索，其动态学习的参数需要仔细调整。我们通过两种特定策略实例化了所提出的 m-lev 自适应 ES 框架，即经典的精英单子 (1+1)-ES 和非精英多子去随机 $(μ_W,λ)$-sep-CMA-ES。我们首先证明该方法适用于基于模拟的 QC 系统优化，而迄今为止，QC 系统被认为过于复杂而无法解决。我们还针对基本实验 QC 系统目标提出了所提出方法的实验室概念验证。 本文提出一种多级进化策略框架，用于解决高分辨率黑箱控制问题，特别是在量子控制领域。 Ofer M. Shir,Xi Xing,Herschel Rabitz cs.NE

title: A Study for Universal Adversarial Attacks on Texture Recognition
title_zh: 纹理识别通用对抗攻击研究
abstract: Given the outstanding progress that convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have made on natural image classification and object recognition problems, it is shown that deep learning methods can achieve very good recognition performance on many texture datasets. However, while CNNs for natural image classification/object recognition tasks have been revealed to be highly vulnerable to various types of adversarial attack methods, the robustness of deep learning methods for texture recognition is yet to be examined. In our paper, we show that there exist small image-agnostic/univesal perturbations that can fool the deep learning models with more than 80\% of testing fooling rates on all tested texture datasets. The computed perturbations using various attack methods on the tested datasets are generally quasi-imperceptible, containing structured patterns with low, middle and high frequency components.
summary: Given the outstanding progress that convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have made on natural image classification and object recognition problems, it is shown that deep learning methods can achieve very good recognition performance on many texture datasets. However, while CNNs for natural image classification/object recognition tasks have been revealed to be highly vulnerable to various types of adversarial attack methods, the robustness of deep learning methods for texture recognition is yet to be examined. In our paper, we show that there exist small image-agnostic/univesal perturbations that can fool the deep learning models with more than 80\% of testing fooling rates on all tested texture datasets. The computed perturbations using various attack methods on the tested datasets are generally quasi-imperceptible, containing structured patterns with low, middle and high frequency components.
abstract_zh: 鉴于卷积神经网络（CNN）在自然图像分类和对象识别问题上取得的突出进展，表明深度学习方法可以在许多纹理数据集上实现非常好的识别性能。然而，虽然用于自然图像分类/对象识别任务的 CNN 非常容易受到各种类型的对抗性攻击方法的影响，但用于纹理识别的深度学习方法的鲁棒性仍有待检验。在我们的论文中，我们表明存在与图像无关/通用的小扰动，这些扰动可以愚弄深度学习模型，在所有测试的纹理数据集上超过 80% 的测试愚弄率。在测试数据集上使用各种攻击方法计算出的扰动通常是准不可察觉的，包含具有低频、中频和高频分量的结构化模式。

AI.tldr: 研究针对纹理识别的通用对抗攻击方法，发现小扰动可有效欺骗深度学习模型
AI.motivation: 尽管CNN在自然图像分类中易受对抗攻击，但纹理识别的鲁棒性尚未被研究，需验证其脆弱性
AI.method: 采用多种攻击方法生成图像无关的微小扰动，包含不同频率的结构化模式
AI.result: 在多个纹理数据集上，生成的扰动使模型欺骗率超过80%，且扰动难以察觉
AI.conclusion: 深度学习模型在纹理识别任务中同样存在显著的脆弱性，易受通用对抗攻击影响

title: Distributed Constructions of Dual-Failure Fault-Tolerant Distance Preservers
title_zh: 双故障容错距离保持器的分布式结构
comment: To appear in DISC'20
comments: To appear in DISC'20
abstract: Fault tolerant distance preservers (spanners) are sparse subgraphs that preserve (approximate) distances between given pairs of vertices under edge or vertex failures. So-far, these structures have been studied mainly from a centralized viewpoint. Despite the fact fault tolerant preservers are mainly motivated by the error-prone nature of distributed networks, not much is known on the distributed computational aspects of these structures. In this paper, we present distributed algorithms for constructing fault tolerant distance preservers and $+2$ additive spanners that are resilient to at most \emph{two edge} faults. Prior to our work, the only non-trivial constructions known were for the \emph{single} fault and \emph{single source} setting by [Ghaffari and Parter SPAA'16]. Our key technical contribution is a distributed algorithm for computing distance preservers w.r.t. a subset $S$ of source vertices, resilient to two edge faults. The output structure contains a BFS tree $BFS(s,G \setminus \{e_1,e_2\})$ for every $s \in S$ and every $e_1,e_2 \in G$. The distributed construction of this structure is based on a delicate balance between the edge congestion (formed by running multiple BFS trees simultaneously) and the sparsity of the output subgraph. No sublinear-round algorithms for constructing these structures have been known before.
summary: Fault tolerant distance preservers (spanners) are sparse subgraphs that preserve (approximate) distances between given pairs of vertices under edge or vertex failures. So-far, these structures have been studied mainly from a centralized viewpoint. Despite the fact fault tolerant preservers are mainly motivated by the error-prone nature of distributed networks, not much is known on the distributed computational aspects of these structures. In this paper, we present distributed algorithms for constructing fault tolerant distance preservers and $+2$ additive spanners that are resilient to at most \emph{two edge} faults. Prior to our work, the only non-trivial constructions known were for the \emph{single} fault and \emph{single source} setting by [Ghaffari and Parter SPAA'16]. Our key technical contribution is a distributed algorithm for computing distance preservers w.r.t. a subset $S$ of source vertices, resilient to two edge faults. The output structure contains a BFS tree $BFS(s,G \setminus \{e_1,e_2\})$ for every $s \in S$ and every $e_1,e_2 \in G$. The distributed construction of this structure is based on a delicate balance between the edge congestion (formed by running multiple BFS trees simultaneously) and the sparsity of the output subgraph. No sublinear-round algorithms for constructing these structures have been known before.
abstract_zh: 容错距离保持器（扳手）是稀疏子图，可在边缘或顶点故障下保持给定顶点对之间的（近似）距离。到目前为止，这些结构主要是从集中的角度进行研究的。尽管事实上容错保护器主要是由分布式网络的容易出错的性质激发的，但人们对这些结构的分布式计算方面知之甚少。在本文中，我们提出了用于构建容错距离保护器和$+2$附加扳手的分布式算法，它们最多能抵抗\emph{双边缘}故障。在我们的工作之前，唯一已知的重要结构是 [Ghaffari 和 Parter SPAA'16] 的 \emph{single} 故障和 \emph{single source} 设置。我们的关键技术贡献是一种用于计算距离保持器的分布式算法。源顶点的子集 $S$，能够抵抗两个边缘错误。输出结构包含一个 BFS 树 $BFS(s,G \setminus \{e_1,e_2\})$，对于 S$ 中的每个 $s \和 G$ 中的每个 $e_1,e_2 \。该结构的分布式构建基于边缘拥塞（通过同时运行多个 BFS 树形成）和输出子图的稀疏性之间的微妙平衡。以前不知道用于构造这些结构的次线性轮算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出分布式算法，用于构建能够容忍最多两次边故障的容错距离保持器（距离保留子图）。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多集中于集中式方法，而分布式网络中故障容忍的计算复杂性尚未被充分探索，需设计适用于多故障场景的分布式算法。
AI.method: 通过平衡多源BFS树同时运行时的边拥塞与输出子图稀疏性，设计分布式算法构造针对源集合S的双故障容错距离保持器。
AI.result: 首次实现子线性轮次的分布式算法，可为每个源节点和任意两边故障组合生成对应的BFS树，保持子图稀疏性。
AI.conclusion: 该成果填补了分布式双故障容错距离保持器的算法空白，为构建高可靠性网络提供了理论支持与技术路径。

authors_text: Silvia Liberata Ullo,Amrita Mohan,Alessandro Sebastianelli,Shaik Ejaz Ahamed,Basant Kumar,Ramji Dwivedi,G. R. Sinha
title: A New Mask R-CNN Based Method for Improved Landslide Detection
title_zh: 一种基于 Mask R-CNN 的改进山体滑坡检测的新方法
comment: 9 pages, 8 figures, 6 tables, submitted to JSTARS special issue on Cultural Heritage
comments: 9 pages, 8 figures, 6 tables, submitted to JSTARS special issue on Cultural Heritage
abstract: This paper presents a novel method of landslide detection by exploiting the Mask R-CNN capability of identifying an object layout by using a pixel-based segmentation, along with transfer learning used to train the proposed model. A data set of 160 elements is created containing landslide and non-landslide images. The proposed method consists of three steps: (i) augmenting training image samples to increase the volume of the training data, (ii) fine tuning with limited image samples, and (iii) performance evaluation of the algorithm in terms of precision, recall and F1 measure, on the considered landslide images, by adopting ResNet-50 and 101 as backbone models. The experimental results are quite encouraging as the proposed method achieves Precision equals to 1.00, Recall 0.93 and F1 measure 0.97, when ResNet-101 is used as backbone model, and with a low number of landslide photographs used as training samples. The proposed algorithm can be potentially useful for land use planners and policy makers of hilly areas where intermittent slope deformations necessitate landslide detection as prerequisite before planning.
summary: This paper presents a novel method of landslide detection by exploiting the Mask R-CNN capability of identifying an object layout by using a pixel-based segmentation, along with transfer learning used to train the proposed model. A data set of 160 elements is created containing landslide and non-landslide images. The proposed method consists of three steps: (i) augmenting training image samples to increase the volume of the training data, (ii) fine tuning with limited image samples, and (iii) performance evaluation of the algorithm in terms of precision, recall and F1 measure, on the considered landslide images, by adopting ResNet-50 and 101 as backbone models. The experimental results are quite encouraging as the proposed method achieves Precision equals to 1.00, Recall 0.93 and F1 measure 0.97, when ResNet-101 is used as backbone model, and with a low number of landslide photographs used as training samples. The proposed algorithm can be potentially useful for land use planners and policy makers of hilly areas where intermittent slope deformations necessitate landslide detection as prerequisite before planning.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种滑坡检测的新方法，该方法利用 Mask R-CNN 的功能，通过使用基于像素的分割来识别对象布局，并使用迁移学习来训练所​​提出的模型。创建包含 160 个元素的数据集，其中包含滑坡和非滑坡图像。该方法包括三个步骤：（i）增加训练图像样本以增加训练数据量，（ii）用有限的图像样本进行微调，以及（iii）采用ResNet-50和101作为骨干模型，在所考虑的滑坡图像上对算法在精度、召回率和F1测量方面的性能进行评估。实验结果非常令人鼓舞，当使用 ResNet-101 作为骨干模型，并使用少量滑坡照片作为训练样本时，该方法的精度达到 1.00，召回率 0.93，F1 测量 0.97。所提出的算法对于丘陵地区的土地利用规划者和政策制定者可能有用，在丘陵地区，间歇性的斜坡变形需要将滑坡检测作为规划前的先决条件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于改进Mask R-CNN和迁移学习的滑坡检测方法，通过数据增强和ResNet主干网络实现高精度检测。
AI.motivation: 传统滑坡检测方法存在精度不足和数据样本有限的问题，需开发能在少量样本下高效检测的算法以支持山区规划决策。
AI.method: 构建160样本数据集，采用三步法：训练数据增强、基于ResNet-50/101的迁移学习微调、通过精度/召回率/F1指标评估模型性能。
AI.result: 使用ResNet-101时达到Precision 1.00、Recall 0.93、F1 0.97的优异指标，且仅需少量滑坡训练样本。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在有限样本下实现高精度滑坡检测，可为山区土地规划提供有效技术支撑。

search_text: A New Mask R-CNN Based Method for Improved Landslide Detection 一种基于 Mask R-CNN 的改进山体滑坡检测的新方法 This paper presents a novel method of landslide detection by exploiting the Mask R-CNN capability of identifying an object layout by using a pixel-based segmentation, along with transfer learning used to train the proposed model. A data set of 160 elements is created containing landslide and non-landslide images. The proposed method consists of three steps: (i) augmenting training image samples to increase the volume of the training data, (ii) fine tuning with limited image samples, and (iii) performance evaluation of the algorithm in terms of precision, recall and F1 measure, on the considered landslide images, by adopting ResNet-50 and 101 as backbone models. The experimental results are quite encouraging as the proposed method achieves Precision equals to 1.00, Recall 0.93 and F1 measure 0.97, when ResNet-101 is used as backbone model, and with a low number of landslide photographs used as training samples. The proposed algorithm can be potentially useful for land use planners and policy makers of hilly areas where intermittent slope deformations necessitate landslide detection as prerequisite before planning. 本文提出了一种滑坡检测的新方法，该方法利用 Mask R-CNN 的功能，通过使用基于像素的分割来识别对象布局，并使用迁移学习来训练所​​提出的模型。创建包含 160 个元素的数据集，其中包含滑坡和非滑坡图像。该方法包括三个步骤：（i）增加训练图像样本以增加训练数据量，（ii）用有限的图像样本进行微调，以及（iii）采用ResNet-50和101作为骨干模型，在所考虑的滑坡图像上对算法在精度、召回率和F1测量方面的性能进行评估。实验结果非常令人鼓舞，当使用 ResNet-101 作为骨干模型，并使用少量滑坡照片作为训练样本时，该方法的精度达到 1.00，召回率 0.93，F1 测量 0.97。所提出的算法对于丘陵地区的土地利用规划者和政策制定者可能有用，在丘陵地区，间歇性的斜坡变形需要将滑坡检测作为规划前的先决条件。 本文提出一种基于改进Mask R-CNN和迁移学习的滑坡检测方法，通过数据增强和ResNet主干网络实现高精度检测。 Silvia Liberata Ullo,Amrita Mohan,Alessandro Sebastianelli,Shaik Ejaz Ahamed,Basant Kumar,Ramji Dwivedi,G. R. Sinha cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Explaining Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 解释深度神经网络
comment: PhD Thesis, University of Oxford
comments: PhD Thesis, University of Oxford
abstract: Deep neural networks are becoming more and more popular due to their revolutionary success in diverse areas, such as computer vision, natural language processing, and speech recognition. However, the decision-making processes of these models are generally not interpretable to users. In various domains, such as healthcare, finance, or law, it is critical to know the reasons behind a decision made by an artificial intelligence system. Therefore, several directions for explaining neural models have recently been explored. In this thesis, I investigate two major directions for explaining deep neural networks. The first direction consists of feature-based post-hoc explanatory methods, that is, methods that aim to explain an already trained and fixed model (post-hoc), and that provide explanations in terms of input features, such as tokens for text and superpixels for images (feature-based). The second direction consists of self-explanatory neural models that generate natural language explanations, that is, models that have a built-in module that generates explanations for the predictions of the model.
summary: Deep neural networks are becoming more and more popular due to their revolutionary success in diverse areas, such as computer vision, natural language processing, and speech recognition. However, the decision-making processes of these models are generally not interpretable to users. In various domains, such as healthcare, finance, or law, it is critical to know the reasons behind a decision made by an artificial intelligence system. Therefore, several directions for explaining neural models have recently been explored. In this thesis, I investigate two major directions for explaining deep neural networks. The first direction consists of feature-based post-hoc explanatory methods, that is, methods that aim to explain an already trained and fixed model (post-hoc), and that provide explanations in terms of input features, such as tokens for text and superpixels for images (feature-based). The second direction consists of self-explanatory neural models that generate natural language explanations, that is, models that have a built-in module that generates explanations for the predictions of the model.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络因其在计算机视觉、自然语言处理和语音识别等多个领域的革命性成功而变得越来越受欢迎。然而，这些模型的决策过程通常无法被用户解释。在医疗保健、金融或法律等各个领域，了解人工智能系统做出决策背后的原因至关重要。因此，最近探索了解释神经模型的几个方向。在这篇论文中，我研究了解释深度神经网络的两个主要方向。第一个方向由基于特征的事后解释方法组成，即旨在解释已经训练好的固定模型（事后）的方法，并根据输入特征提供解释，例如文本的标记和图像的超像素（基于特征）。第二个方向由生成自然语言解释的自解释神经模型组成，即具有内置模块的模型，可以为模型的预测生成解释。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了两种解释深度神经网络的主要方法：基于特征的后置解释方法和生成自然语言解释的自解释模型。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在多个领域取得成功，但其决策过程缺乏可解释性，这对医疗、金融等需要透明决策的领域至关重要。
AI.method: 研究分为两个方向：1) 基于输入特征（如文本标记、图像超像素）的后置解释方法；2) 内置自然语言解释生成模块的自解释模型。
AI.result: 系统分析了两种解释方法的原理、实现及适用场景，为模型可解释性研究提供了理论框架和实践方向。
AI.conclusion: 结合后置解释与自解释模型的优势，可提升深度学习系统的透明度，推动其在关键领域的可信应用。

authors_text: Yifan Gao,Piji Li,Wei Bi,Xiaojiang Liu,Michael R. Lyu,Irwin King
title: Dialogue Generation on Infrequent Sentence Functions via Structured Meta-Learning
title_zh: 通过结构化元学习生成不常见句子功能的对话
comment: EMNLP 2020, Findings, 10 pages, 4 figures
comments: EMNLP 2020, Findings, 10 pages, 4 figures
abstract: Sentence function is an important linguistic feature indicating the communicative purpose in uttering a sentence. Incorporating sentence functions into conversations has shown improvements in the quality of generated responses. However, the number of utterances for different types of fine-grained sentence functions is extremely imbalanced. Besides a small number of high-resource sentence functions, a large portion of sentence functions is infrequent. Consequently, dialogue generation conditioned on these infrequent sentence functions suffers from data deficiency. In this paper, we investigate a structured meta-learning (SML) approach for dialogue generation on infrequent sentence functions. We treat dialogue generation conditioned on different sentence functions as separate tasks, and apply model-agnostic meta-learning to high-resource sentence functions data. Furthermore, SML enhances meta-learning effectiveness by promoting knowledge customization among different sentence functions but simultaneously preserving knowledge generalization for similar sentence functions. Experimental results demonstrate that SML not only improves the informativeness and relevance of generated responses, but also can generate responses consistent with the target sentence functions.
summary: Sentence function is an important linguistic feature indicating the communicative purpose in uttering a sentence. Incorporating sentence functions into conversations has shown improvements in the quality of generated responses. However, the number of utterances for different types of fine-grained sentence functions is extremely imbalanced. Besides a small number of high-resource sentence functions, a large portion of sentence functions is infrequent. Consequently, dialogue generation conditioned on these infrequent sentence functions suffers from data deficiency. In this paper, we investigate a structured meta-learning (SML) approach for dialogue generation on infrequent sentence functions. We treat dialogue generation conditioned on different sentence functions as separate tasks, and apply model-agnostic meta-learning to high-resource sentence functions data. Furthermore, SML enhances meta-learning effectiveness by promoting knowledge customization among different sentence functions but simultaneously preserving knowledge generalization for similar sentence functions. Experimental results demonstrate that SML not only improves the informativeness and relevance of generated responses, but also can generate responses consistent with the target sentence functions.
abstract_zh: 句子功能是表示句子的交际目的的重要语言特征。将句子功能纳入对话中已表明生成响应的质量有所提高。然而，不同类型的细粒度句子函数的话语数量极不平衡。除了少数高资源句函数外，很大一部分句函数是稀有的。因此，以这些不常见的句子功能为条件的对话生成会遭受数据不足的困扰。在本文中，我们研究了一种用于罕见句子函数对话生成的结构化元学习（SML）方法。我们将基于不同句子函数的对话生成视为单独的任务，并将与模型无关的元学习应用于高资源句子函数数据。此外，SML 通过促进不同句子函数之间的知识定制来增强元学习的有效性，同时保留相似句子函数的知识泛化。实验结果表明，SML不仅提高了生成响应的信息量和相关性，而且可以生成与目标句子功能一致的响应。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结构化元学习方法（SML），用于解决对话生成中稀有句法功能的数据不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对话生成模型在处理稀有句法功能时因数据稀缺导致生成质量下降，而高资源句法功能的数据过剩未被有效利用。
AI.method: 将不同句法功能的对话生成视为独立任务，通过模型无关元学习（MAML）在高资源数据上预训练，再利用结构化知识共享机制增强稀有功能的生成能力。
AI.result: 实验表明SML方法显著提升了生成回复的信息量、相关性及与目标句法功能的一致性，优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 结构化元学习通过跨任务知识定制与泛化平衡，有效解决了稀有句法功能对话生成中的数据不足问题。

We treat dialogue generation conditioned on different sentence functions as separate tasks, and apply model-agnostic meta-learning to high-resource sentence functions data. Furthermore, SML enhances meta-learning effectiveness by promoting knowledge customization among different sentence functions but simultaneously preserving knowledge generalization for similar sentence functions. Experimental results demonstrate that SML not only improves the informativeness and relevance of generated responses, but also can generate responses consistent with the target sentence functions. 句子功能是表示句子的交际目的的重要语言特征。将句子功能纳入对话中已表明生成响应的质量有所提高。然而，不同类型的细粒度句子函数的话语数量极不平衡。除了少数高资源句函数外，很大一部分句函数是稀有的。因此，以这些不常见的句子功能为条件的对话生成会遭受数据不足的困扰。在本文中，我们研究了一种用于罕见句子函数对话生成的结构化元学习（SML）方法。我们将基于不同句子函数的对话生成视为单独的任务，并将与模型无关的元学习应用于高资源句子函数数据。此外，SML 通过促进不同句子函数之间的知识定制来增强元学习的有效性，同时保留相似句子函数的知识泛化。实验结果表明，SML不仅提高了生成响应的信息量和相关性，而且可以生成与目标句子功能一致的响应。 本文提出一种结构化元学习方法（SML），用于解决对话生成中稀有句法功能的数据不足问题。 Yifan Gao,Piji Li,Wei Bi,Xiaojiang Liu,Michael R. Lyu,Irwin King cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Anusua Trivedi,Sreya Muppalla,Shreyaan Pathak,Azadeh Mobasher,Pawel Janowski,Rahul Dodhia,Juan M. Lavista Ferres
title: Improving Lesion Detection by exploring bias on Skin Lesion dataset
title_zh: 通过探索皮肤病变数据集的偏差来改进病变检测
abstract: All datasets contain some biases, often unintentional, due to how they were acquired and annotated. These biases distort machine-learning models' performance, creating spurious correlations that the models can unfairly exploit, or, contrarily destroying clear correlations that the models could learn. With the popularity of deep learning models, automated skin lesion analysis is starting to play an essential role in the early detection of Melanoma. The ISIC Archive is one of the most used skin lesion sources to benchmark deep learning-based tools. Bissoto et al. experimented with different bounding-box based masks and showed that deep learning models could classify skin lesion images without clinically meaningful information in the input data. Their findings seem confounding since the ablated regions (random rectangular boxes) are not significant. The shape of the lesion is a crucial factor in the clinical characterization of a skin lesion. In that context, we performed a set of experiments that generate shape-preserving masks instead of rectangular bounding-box based masks. A deep learning model trained on these shape-preserving masked images does not outperform models trained on images without clinically meaningful information. That strongly suggests spurious correlations guiding the models. We propose use of general adversarial network (GAN) to mitigate the underlying bias.
summary: All datasets contain some biases, often unintentional, due to how they were acquired and annotated. These biases distort machine-learning models' performance, creating spurious correlations that the models can unfairly exploit, or, contrarily destroying clear correlations that the models could learn. With the popularity of deep learning models, automated skin lesion analysis is starting to play an essential role in the early detection of Melanoma. The ISIC Archive is one of the most used skin lesion sources to benchmark deep learning-based tools. Bissoto et al. experimented with different bounding-box based masks and showed that deep learning models could classify skin lesion images without clinically meaningful information in the input data. Their findings seem confounding since the ablated regions (random rectangular boxes) are not significant. The shape of the lesion is a crucial factor in the clinical characterization of a skin lesion. In that context, we performed a set of experiments that generate shape-preserving masks instead of rectangular bounding-box based masks. A deep learning model trained on these shape-preserving masked images does not outperform models trained on images without clinically meaningful information. That strongly suggests spurious correlations guiding the models. We propose use of general adversarial network (GAN) to mitigate the underlying bias.
abstract_zh: 所有数据集都包含一些偏差，这些偏差通常是无意的，因为它们是如何获取和注释的。这些偏差扭曲了机器学习模型的性能，产生了模型可以不公平地利用的虚假相关性，或者相反破坏了模型可以学习的明确相关性。随着深度学习模型的流行，自动化皮肤病变分析开始在黑色素瘤的早期检测中发挥重要作用。 ISIC 档案是最常用的皮肤病变来源之一，用于对基于深度学习的工具进行基准测试。比索托等人。试验了不同的基于边界框的掩模，结果表明深度学习模型可以对皮肤病变图像进行分类，而无需输入数据中具有临床意义的信息。他们的发现似乎令人困惑，因为消融区域（随机矩形框）并不重要。病变的形状是皮肤病变临床特征的关键因素。在这种情况下，我们进行了一组实验，生成保形掩模而不是基于矩形边界框的掩模。在这些保形蒙版图像上训练的深度学习模型并不优于在没有临床意义信息的图像上训练的模型。这强烈表明指导模型的虚假相关性。我们建议使用通用对抗网络（GAN）来减轻潜在的偏见。

AI.tldr: 本文研究皮肤病变数据集中的偏差对深度学习模型性能的影响，并提出使用生成对抗网络（GAN）来缓解此类偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有皮肤病变检测模型可能因数据集中的非临床相关信息（如随机矩形框掩码）产生虚假相关性，导致模型性能不稳定或误导性提升。
AI.method: 通过生成形状保持的掩码替代传统矩形框掩码，训练深度学习模型并验证其性能；进一步提出利用GAN消除数据偏差。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用形状保持掩码的模型未显著优于无临床信息的模型，证实了虚假相关性的存在。
AI.conclusion: 数据集偏差会误导模型学习，采用GAN等方法可有效缓解偏差，提升皮肤病变检测的可靠性。

authors_text: Junyi Li,Siqing Li,Wayne Xin Zhao,Gaole He,Zhicheng Wei,Nicholas Jing Yuan,Ji-Rong Wen
title: Knowledge-Enhanced Personalized Review Generation with Capsule Graph Neural Network
title_zh: 使用胶囊图神经网络生成知识增强的个性化评论
comment: Accepted by CIKM 2020 (Long Paper)
comments: Accepted by CIKM 2020 (Long Paper)
abstract: Personalized review generation (PRG) aims to automatically produce review text reflecting user preference, which is a challenging natural language generation task. Most of previous studies do not explicitly model factual description of products, tending to generate uninformative content. Moreover, they mainly focus on word-level generation, but cannot accurately reflect more abstractive user preference in multiple aspects. To address the above issues, we propose a novel knowledge-enhanced PRG model based on capsule graph neural network~(Caps-GNN). We first construct a heterogeneous knowledge graph (HKG) for utilizing rich item attributes. We adopt Caps-GNN to learn graph capsules for encoding underlying characteristics from the HKG. Our generation process contains two major steps, namely aspect sequence generation and sentence generation. First, based on graph capsules, we adaptively learn aspect capsules for inferring the aspect sequence. Then, conditioned on the inferred aspect label, we design a graph-based copy mechanism to generate sentences by incorporating related entities or words from HKG. To our knowledge, we are the first to utilize knowledge graph for the PRG task. The incorporated KG information is able to enhance user preference at both aspect and word levels. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets have demonstrated the effectiveness of our model on the PRG task.
summary: Personalized review generation (PRG) aims to automatically produce review text reflecting user preference, which is a challenging natural language generation task. Most of previous studies do not explicitly model factual description of products, tending to generate uninformative content. Moreover, they mainly focus on word-level generation, but cannot accurately reflect more abstractive user preference in multiple aspects. To address the above issues, we propose a novel knowledge-enhanced PRG model based on capsule graph neural network~(Caps-GNN). We first construct a heterogeneous knowledge graph (HKG) for utilizing rich item attributes. We adopt Caps-GNN to learn graph capsules for encoding underlying characteristics from the HKG. Our generation process contains two major steps, namely aspect sequence generation and sentence generation. First, based on graph capsules, we adaptively learn aspect capsules for inferring the aspect sequence. Then, conditioned on the inferred aspect label, we design a graph-based copy mechanism to generate sentences by incorporating related entities or words from HKG. To our knowledge, we are the first to utilize knowledge graph for the PRG task. The incorporated KG information is able to enhance user preference at both aspect and word levels. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets have demonstrated the effectiveness of our model on the PRG task.
abstract_zh: 个性化评论生成（PRG）旨在自动生成反映用户偏好的评论文本，这是一项具有挑战性的自然语言生成任务。以前的大多数研究都没有明确地模拟产品的事实描述，往往会产生无信息的内容。而且，它们主要关注词级生成，但无法在多个方面准确反映更抽象的用户偏好。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种基于胶囊图神经网络的新型知识增强PRG模型~（Caps-GNN）。我们首先构建一个异构知识图（HKG）来利用丰富的项目属性。我们采用 Caps-GNN 来学习图胶囊，以编码 HKG 的底层特征。我们的生成过程包含两个主要步骤，即方面序列生成和句子生成。首先，基于图胶囊，我们自适应地学习方面胶囊以推断方面序列。然后，根据推断的方面标签，我们设计了一种基于图的复制机制，通过合并 HKG 中的相关实体或单词来生成句子。据我们所知，我们是第一个将知识图谱用于 PRG 任务的人。合并的 KG 信息能够在方面和单词层面增强用户偏好。对三个真实世界数据集的广泛实验证明了我们的模型在 PRG 任务上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于胶囊图神经网络的知识增强型个性化评论生成模型，通过构建异构知识图谱提升生成评论的信息量和用户偏好表达。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未有效建模产品属性信息，生成内容缺乏信息量且难以准确反映多维度用户偏好。
AI.method: 构建异构知识图谱（HKG），采用胶囊图神经网络（Caps-GNN）学习图胶囊特征，分两阶段生成评论：先生成方面序列，再通过图基复制机制整合知识图实体/词生成句子。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上的实验验证了模型在个性化评论生成任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文是首个将知识图谱应用于PRG任务的工作，通过知识增强在方面级和词级同时提升用户偏好表达效果。

authors_text: Shruthi Chari,Oshani Seneviratne,Daniel M. Gruen,Morgan A. Foreman,Amar K. Das,Deborah L. McGuinness
title: Explanation Ontology: A Model of Explanations for User-Centered AI
title_zh: 解释本体：以用户为中心的人工智能的解释模型
comment: 16 pages (but 1 reference over on arxiv), 5 tables, 3 code listings, 1 figure
comments: 16 pages (but 1 reference over on arxiv), 5 tables, 3 code listings, 1 figure
abstract: Explainability has been a goal for Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems since their conception, with the need for explainability growing as more complex AI models are increasingly used in critical, high-stakes settings such as healthcare. Explanations have often added to an AI system in a non-principled, post-hoc manner. With greater adoption of these systems and emphasis on user-centric explainability, there is a need for a structured representation that treats explainability as a primary consideration, mapping end user needs to specific explanation types and the system's AI capabilities. We design an explanation ontology to model both the role of explanations, accounting for the system and user attributes in the process, and the range of different literature-derived explanation types. We indicate how the ontology can support user requirements for explanations in the domain of healthcare. We evaluate our ontology with a set of competency questions geared towards a system designer who might use our ontology to decide which explanation types to include, given a combination of users' needs and a system's capabilities, both in system design settings and in real-time operations. Through the use of this ontology, system designers will be able to make informed choices on which explanations AI systems can and should provide.

Explanations have often added to an AI system in a non-principled, post-hoc manner. With greater adoption of these systems and emphasis on user-centric explainability, there is a need for a structured representation that treats explainability as a primary consideration, mapping end user needs to specific explanation types and the system's AI capabilities. We design an explanation ontology to model both the role of explanations, accounting for the system and user attributes in the process, and the range of different literature-derived explanation types. We indicate how the ontology can support user requirements for explanations in the domain of healthcare. We evaluate our ontology with a set of competency questions geared towards a system designer who might use our ontology to decide which explanation types to include, given a combination of users' needs and a system's capabilities, both in system design settings and in real-time operations. Through the use of this ontology, system designers will be able to make informed choices on which explanations AI systems can and should provide.
abstract_zh: 自人工智能 (AI) 概念诞生以来，可解释性一直是其目标，随着更复杂的人工智能模型越来越多地用于医疗保健等关键、高风险环境，对可解释性的需求也不断增长。解释常常以无原则、事后的方式添加到人工智能系统中。随着这些系统的广泛采用以及对以用户为中心的可解释性的重视，需要一种将可解释性作为首要考虑因素的结构化表示，将最终用户的需求映射到特定的解释类型和系统的人工智能功能。我们设计了一个解释本体来对解释的角色、过程中的系统和用户属性以及不同文献衍生的解释类型的范围进行建模。我们指出本体如何支持用户对医疗保健领域解释的需求。我们通过一系列面向系统设计者的能力问题来评估我们的本体，系统设计者可能会使用我们的本体来决定要包括哪些解释类型，考虑到用户需求和系统功能的组合，无论是在系统设计设置还是在实时操作中。通过使用这个本体，系统设计者将能够就人工智能系统可以并且应该提供哪些解释做出明智的选择。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个解释本体模型，用于结构化映射用户需求与AI系统能力，生成符合医疗领域需求的解释类型。
AI.motivation: 随着AI在医疗等高风险场景的应用增加，现有解释方法缺乏系统性，无法有效匹配用户需求与系统能力，需构建结构化框架提升可解释性。
AI.method: 设计包含系统属性、用户特征及文献衍生解释类型的本体模型，通过能力问题评估其在医疗场景中辅助系统设计的效果。
AI.result: 评估表明该本体可帮助设计者根据用户需求和系统能力组合，选择合适的解释类型，提升医疗AI系统的可解释性决策效率。
AI.conclusion: 该本体为用户为中心的AI系统提供了结构化解释框架，支持系统设计者在医疗等场景中实现更精准的解释需求匹配。

authors_text: Shruthi Chari,Oshani Seneviratne,Daniel M. Gruen,Morgan A. Foreman,Amar K. Das,Deborah L. McGuinness
title: Explanation Ontology in Action: A Clinical Use-Case
title_zh: 解释本体论的实际应用：临床用例
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures, 1 protocol
comments: 5 pages, 2 figures, 1 protocol
abstract: We addressed the problem of a lack of semantic representation for user-centric explanations and different explanation types in our Explanation Ontology (https://purl.org/heals/eo). Such a representation is increasingly necessary as explainability has become an important problem in Artificial Intelligence with the emergence of complex methods and an uptake in high-precision and user-facing settings. In this submission, we provide step-by-step guidance for system designers to utilize our ontology, introduced in our resource track paper, to plan and model for explanations during the design of their Artificial Intelligence systems. We also provide a detailed example with our utilization of this guidance in a clinical setting.
summary: We addressed the problem of a lack of semantic representation for user-centric explanations and different explanation types in our Explanation Ontology (https://purl.org/heals/eo). Such a representation is increasingly necessary as explainability has become an important problem in Artificial Intelligence with the emergence of complex methods and an uptake in high-precision and user-facing settings. In this submission, we provide step-by-step guidance for system designers to utilize our ontology, introduced in our resource track paper, to plan and model for explanations during the design of their Artificial Intelligence systems. We also provide a detailed example with our utilization of this guidance in a clinical setting.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了解释本体（https://purl.org/heals/eo）中缺乏以用户为中心的解释和不同解释类型的语义表示的问题。随着复杂方法的出现以及高精度和面向用户的设置的采用，可解释性已成为人工智能中的一个重要问题，因此这种表示越来越必要。在本次提交中，我们为系统设计者提供了逐步指导，以利用我们的资源跟踪论文中介绍的本体论，在人工智能系统的设计过程中进行规划和建模以进行解释。我们还提供了在临床环境中使用本指南的详细示例。

AI.tldr: 提出并应用一个解释本体论，以解决AI系统中用户中心解释的语义表示问题，并提供临床案例
AI.motivation: 随着AI方法复杂化和高精度应用场景的增加，需要解决用户中心解释的语义表示问题
AI.method: 通过构建Explanation Ontology，并提供分步指南和临床应用实例来展示其使用方法
AI.result: 成功开发了可应用于临床场景的Explanation Ontology，并验证了其在实际中的可行性
AI.conclusion: 该本体论为AI系统的解释设计提供了结构化框架，有助于提升临床环境中的可解释性

authors_text: Zhi-Gang Jia,Zi-Jin Qiu,Qian-Yu Wang,Mei-Xiang Zhao,Dan-Dan Zhu
title: Generalized Two-Dimensional Quaternion Principal Component Analysis with Weighting for Color Image Recognition
title_zh: 彩色图像识别中加权的广义二维四元数主成分分析
comment: 17 pages, 13 figures
comments: 17 pages, 13 figures
abstract: One of the most powerful methods of color image recognition is the two-dimensional principle component analysis (2DQPCA) approach, which is based on quaternion representation and preserves color information very well. However, the current versions of 2DQPCA are still not feasible to extract different geometric properties of color images according to practical data analysis requirements and they are vulnerable to strong noise. In this paper, a generalized 2DQPCA approach with weighting is presented with imposing $L_{p}$ norms on both constraint and objective functions. As a unit 2DQPCA framework, this new version makes it possible to choose adaptive regularizations and constraints according to actual applications and can extract both geometric properties and color information of color images. The projection vectors generated by the deflating scheme are required to be orthogonal to each other. A weighting matrix is defined to magnify the effect of main features. This overcomes the shortcomings of traditional 2DQPCA that the recognition rate decreases as the number of principal components increases. The numerical results based on the real face databases validate that the newly proposed method is robust to noise and performs better than the state-of-the-art 2DQPCA-based algorithms and four prominent deep learning methods.
summary: One of the most powerful methods of color image recognition is the two-dimensional principle component analysis (2DQPCA) approach, which is based on quaternion representation and preserves color information very well. However, the current versions of 2DQPCA are still not feasible to extract different geometric properties of color images according to practical data analysis requirements and they are vulnerable to strong noise. In this paper, a generalized 2DQPCA approach with weighting is presented with imposing $L_{p}$ norms on both constraint and objective functions. As a unit 2DQPCA framework, this new version makes it possible to choose adaptive regularizations and constraints according to actual applications and can extract both geometric properties and color information of color images. The projection vectors generated by the deflating scheme are required to be orthogonal to each other. A weighting matrix is defined to magnify the effect of main features. This overcomes the shortcomings of traditional 2DQPCA that the recognition rate decreases as the number of principal components increases. The numerical results based on the real face databases validate that the newly proposed method is robust to noise and performs better than the state-of-the-art 2DQPCA-based algorithms and four prominent deep learning methods.
abstract_zh: 彩色图像识别最强大的方法之一是二维主成分分析（2DQPCA）方法，它基于四元数表示并且很好地保留了颜色信息。然而，当前版本的2DQPCA仍然无法根据实际数据分析需求提取彩色图像的不同几何属性，并且容易受到强噪声的影响。在本文中，提出了一种带权重的广义 2DQPCA 方法，对约束函数和目标函数施加 $L_{p}$ 范数。作为一个单元2DQPCA框架，这个新版本使得可以根据实际应用选择自适应正则化和约束，并且可以提取彩色图像的几何属性和颜色信息。紧缩方案生成的投影向量需要彼此正交。定义权重矩阵来放大主要特征的影响。这克服了传统2DQPCA随着主成分数量增加识别率下降的缺点。基于真实人脸数据库的数值结果验证了新提出的方法对噪声具有鲁棒性，并且比最先进的基于 2DQPCA 的算法和四种著名的深度学习方法表现得更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的二维四元数主成分分析方法，通过引入加权和Lp范数优化，提升彩色图像识别的鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统2DQPCA方法在提取彩色图像几何特征时存在局限性，且对噪声敏感，同时主成分数量增加时识别率下降。
AI.method: 在约束和目标函数中引入Lp范数，构建自适应正则化框架；定义加权矩阵增强主特征影响，并通过正交投影方案生成投影向量。
AI.result: 在真实人脸数据库上的实验表明，新方法在噪声环境下优于现有2DQPCA算法及四种深度学习方法，且识别率随主成分增加保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自适应正则化和加权机制有效解决了传统2DQPCA的不足，在彩色图像识别任务中表现出更高的鲁棒性和性能优势。

method: 在约束和目标函数中引入Lp范数，构建自适应正则化框架；定义加权矩阵增强主特征影响，并通过正交投影方案生成投影向量。
result: 在真实人脸数据库上的实验表明，新方法在噪声环境下优于现有2DQPCA算法及四种深度学习方法，且识别率随主成分增加保持稳定。
conclusion: 该方法通过自适应正则化和加权机制有效解决了传统2DQPCA的不足，在彩色图像识别任务中表现出更高的鲁棒性和性能优势。
search_text: Generalized Two-Dimensional Quaternion Principal Component Analysis with Weighting for Color Image Recognition 彩色图像识别中加权的广义二维四元数主成分分析 One of the most powerful methods of color image recognition is the two-dimensional principle component analysis (2DQPCA) approach, which is based on quaternion representation and preserves color information very well. However, the current versions of 2DQPCA are still not feasible to extract different geometric properties of color images according to practical data analysis requirements and they are vulnerable to strong noise. In this paper, a generalized 2DQPCA approach with weighting is presented with imposing $L_{p}$ norms on both constraint and objective functions. As a unit 2DQPCA framework, this new version makes it possible to choose adaptive regularizations and constraints according to actual applications and can extract both geometric properties and color information of color images. The projection vectors generated by the deflating scheme are required to be orthogonal to each other. A weighting matrix is defined to magnify the effect of main features. This overcomes the shortcomings of traditional 2DQPCA that the recognition rate decreases as the number of principal components increases. The numerical results based on the real face databases validate that the newly proposed method is robust to noise and performs better than the state-of-the-art 2DQPCA-based algorithms and four prominent deep learning methods. 彩色图像识别最强大的方法之一是二维主成分分析（2DQPCA）方法，它基于四元数表示并且很好地保留了颜色信息。然而，当前版本的2DQPCA仍然无法根据实际数据分析需求提取彩色图像的不同几何属性，并且容易受到强噪声的影响。在本文中，提出了一种带权重的广义 2DQPCA 方法，对约束函数和目标函数施加 $L_{p}$ 范数。作为一个单元2DQPCA框架，这个新版本使得可以根据实际应用选择自适应正则化和约束，并且可以提取彩色图像的几何属性和颜色信息。紧缩方案生成的投影向量需要彼此正交。定义权重矩阵来放大主要特征的影响。这克服了传统2DQPCA随着主成分数量增加识别率下降的缺点。基于真实人脸数据库的数值结果验证了新提出的方法对噪声具有鲁棒性，并且比最先进的基于 2DQPCA 的算法和四种著名的深度学习方法表现得更好。 本文提出一种改进的二维四元数主成分分析方法，通过引入加权和Lp范数优化，提升彩色图像识别的鲁棒性和准确性。 Zhi-Gang Jia,Zi-Jin Qiu,Qian-Yu Wang,Mei-Xiang Zhao,Dan-Dan Zhu cs.CV

title: Spatial Frequency Bias in Convolutional Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 卷积生成对抗网络中的空间频率偏差
abstract: As the success of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) on natural images quickly propels them into various real-life applications across different domains, it becomes more and more important to clearly understand their limitations. Specifically, understanding GANs' capability across the full spectrum of spatial frequencies, i.e. beyond the low-frequency dominant spectrum of natural images, is critical for assessing the reliability of GAN generated data in any detail-sensitive application (e.g. denoising, filling and super-resolution in medical and satellite images). In this paper, we show that the ability of convolutional GANs to learn a distribution is significantly affected by the spatial frequency of the underlying carrier signal, that is, GANs have a bias against learning high spatial frequencies. Crucially, we show that this bias is not merely a result of the scarcity of high frequencies in natural images, rather, it is a systemic bias hindering the learning of high frequencies regardless of their prominence in a dataset. Furthermore, we explain why large-scale GANs' ability to generate fine details on natural images does not exclude them from the adverse effects of this bias. Finally, we propose a method for manipulating this bias with minimal computational overhead. This method can be used to explicitly direct computational resources towards any specific spatial frequency of interest in a dataset, extending the flexibility of GANs.
summary: As the success of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) on natural images quickly propels them into various real-life applications across different domains, it becomes more and more important to clearly understand their limitations. Specifically, understanding GANs' capability across the full spectrum of spatial frequencies, i.e. beyond the low-frequency dominant spectrum of natural images, is critical for assessing the reliability of GAN generated data in any detail-sensitive application (e.g. denoising, filling and super-resolution in medical and satellite images). In this paper, we show that the ability of convolutional GANs to learn a distribution is significantly affected by the spatial frequency of the underlying carrier signal, that is, GANs have a bias against learning high spatial frequencies. Crucially, we show that this bias is not merely a result of the scarcity of high frequencies in natural images, rather, it is a systemic bias hindering the learning of high frequencies regardless of their prominence in a dataset. Furthermore, we explain why large-scale GANs' ability to generate fine details on natural images does not exclude them from the adverse effects of this bias. Finally, we propose a method for manipulating this bias with minimal computational overhead. This method can be used to explicitly direct computational resources towards any specific spatial frequency of interest in a dataset, extending the flexibility of GANs.
abstract_zh: 随着生成对抗网络（GAN）在自然图像上的成功迅速推动它们进入不同领域的各种现实应用中，清楚地了解它们的局限性变得越来越重要。具体来说，了解 GAN 在整个空间频率范围内的能力，即超越自然图像的低频主频谱，对于评估 GAN 生成的数据在任何细节敏感应用（例如医学和卫星图像中的去噪、填充和超分辨率）中的可靠性至关重要。在本文中，我们证明了卷积 GAN 学习分布的能力受到底层载波信号的空间频率的显着影响，也就是说，GAN 存在学习高空间频率的偏差。至关重要的是，我们表明这种偏差不仅仅是自然图像中高频稀缺的结果，而是一种阻碍高频学习的系统性偏差，无论它们在数据集中的重要性如何。此外，我们解释了为什么大规模 GAN 在自然图像上生成精细细节的能力并不排除它们受到这种偏差的不利影响。最后，我们提出了一种以最小的计算开销来操纵这种偏差的方法。该方法可用于明确地将计算资源引导至数据集中任何感兴趣的特定空间频率，从而扩展了 GAN 的灵活性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究卷积生成对抗网络（GANs）在学习不同空间频率信号时的系统性偏差，并提出一种调节该偏差的方法。
AI.motivation: 自然图像以低频为主，但细节敏感应用（如医学影像超分辨率）需要高频信息。现有GAN在高频生成能力存在系统性缺陷，需明确其限制以提升可靠性。
AI.method: 通过分析GAN在不同频率信号上的生成能力，提出一种计算开销极小的频率偏差调节方法，可定向增强特定频率的学习资源分配。
AI.result: 实验证明GAN对高频存在系统性学习偏差，且该偏差独立于数据集中频率分布。所提方法能有效调节偏差，提升高频细节生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 高频生成偏差是卷积GAN的固有缺陷，通过频率资源定向分配可缓解该问题，为细节敏感应用提供更灵活的生成能力。
