title: Correcting Experience Replay for Multi-Agent Communication
title_zh: 纠正多代理通信的经验重播
abstract: We consider the problem of learning to communicate using multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL). A common approach is to learn off-policy, using data sampled from a replay buffer. However, messages received in the past may not accurately reflect the current communication policy of each agent, and this complicates learning. We therefore introduce a 'communication correction' which accounts for the non-stationarity of observed communication induced by multi-agent learning. It works by relabelling the received message to make it likely under the communicator's current policy, and thus be a better reflection of the receiver's current environment. To account for cases in which agents are both senders and receivers, we introduce an ordered relabelling scheme. Our correction is computationally efficient and can be integrated with a range of off-policy algorithms. We find in our experiments that it substantially improves the ability of communicating MARL systems to learn across a variety of cooperative and competitive tasks.
summary: We consider the problem of learning to communicate using multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL). A common approach is to learn off-policy, using data sampled from a replay buffer. However, messages received in the past may not accurately reflect the current communication policy of each agent, and this complicates learning. We therefore introduce a 'communication correction' which accounts for the non-stationarity of observed communication induced by multi-agent learning. It works by relabelling the received message to make it likely under the communicator's current policy, and thus be a better reflection of the receiver's current environment. To account for cases in which agents are both senders and receivers, we introduce an ordered relabelling scheme. Our correction is computationally efficient and can be integrated with a range of off-policy algorithms. We find in our experiments that it substantially improves the ability of communicating MARL systems to learn across a variety of cooperative and competitive tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑使用多智能体强化学习（MARL）来学习交流的问题。一种常见的方法是使用从重放缓冲区采样的数据来学习离策略。然而，过去收到的消息可能无法准确反映每个代理当前的通信策略，这使学习变得复杂。因此，我们引入了“通信校正”，它解释了多智能体学习引起的观察到的通信的非平稳性。它的工作原理是重新标记接收到的消息，使其符合通信者当前的策略，从而更好地反映接收者当前的环境。为了考虑代理既是发送者又是接收者的情况，我们引入了有序重新标记方案。我们的校正计算效率高，并且可以与一系列离策略算法集成。我们在实验中发现，它极大地提高了 MARL 系统在各种合作和竞争任务中学习的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通信校正方法，解决多智能体强化学习中经验回放导致的通信非平稳性问题，提升多智能体系统的通信学习效果。
AI.motivation: 传统经验回放方法在多智能体通信中存在缺陷，历史通信数据可能无法反映当前策略，导致学习效率下降，尤其在非平稳环境中问题更显著。
AI.method: 引入通信校正机制，通过重新标记历史消息使其符合当前通信策略，并设计有序重新标记方案处理双向通信场景，兼容多种离线策略算法。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多种合作与竞争任务中显著提升通信MARL系统的训练效果，验证了校正机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通信校正方法有效缓解多智能体学习中的非平稳性问题，为多智能体通信提供高效且通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Vincent Cartillier,Zhile Ren,Neha Jain,Stefan Lee,Irfan Essa,Dhruv Batra
title: Semantic MapNet: Building Allocentric Semantic Maps and Representations from Egocentric Views
title_zh: Semantic MapNet：从自我中心视图构建异中心语义图和表示
abstract: We study the task of semantic mapping - specifically, an embodied agent (a robot or an egocentric AI assistant) is given a tour of a new environment and asked to build an allocentric top-down semantic map ("what is where?") from egocentric observations of an RGB-D camera with known pose (via localization sensors). Towards this goal, we present SemanticMapNet (SMNet), which consists of: (1) an Egocentric Visual Encoder that encodes each egocentric RGB-D frame, (2) a Feature Projector that projects egocentric features to appropriate locations on a floor-plan, (3) a Spatial Memory Tensor of size floor-plan length x width x feature-dims that learns to accumulate projected egocentric features, and (4) a Map Decoder that uses the memory tensor to produce semantic top-down maps. SMNet combines the strengths of (known) projective camera geometry and neural representation learning. On the task of semantic mapping in the Matterport3D dataset, SMNet significantly outperforms competitive baselines by 4.01-16.81% (absolute) on mean-IoU and 3.81-19.69% (absolute) on Boundary-F1 metrics. Moreover, we show how to use the neural episodic memories and spatio-semantic allocentric representations build by SMNet for subsequent tasks in the same space - navigating to objects seen during the tour("Find chair") or answering questions about the space ("How many chairs did you see in the house?"). Project page: https://vincentcartillier.github.io/smnet.html.

Moreover, we show how to use the neural episodic memories and spatio-semantic allocentric representations build by SMNet for subsequent tasks in the same space - navigating to objects seen during the tour("Find chair") or answering questions about the space ("How many chairs did you see in the house?"). Project page: https://vincentcartillier.github.io/smnet.html.
abstract_zh: 我们研究语义映射的任务 - 具体来说，让一个实体代理（机器人或以自我为中心的人工智能助手）参观一个新环境，并要求根据对具有已知姿势（通过定位传感器）的 RGB-D 相机的自我中心观察来构建一个非中心的自上而下的语义图（“什么在哪里？”）。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了 SemanticMapNet (SMNet)，它由以下部分组成：(1) 一个以自我为中心的视觉编码器，对每个以自我为中心的 RGB-D 帧进行编码；(2) 一个将自我中心特征投影到平面图上适当位置的特征投影器；(3) 一个尺寸为平面图长度 x 宽度 x 特征尺寸的空间记忆张量，用于学习累积投影的自我中心特征；(4) 一个使用记忆张量生成语义的地图解码器自上而下的地图。 SMNet 结合了（已知）投影相机几何和神经表示学习的优势。在 Matterport3D 数据集中的语义映射任务中，SMNet 在平均 IoU 上显着优于竞争基线 4.01-16.81%（绝对），在边界 F1 指标上显着优于竞争基线 3.81-19.69%（绝对）。此外，我们还展示了如何使用 SMNet 构建的神经情景记忆和空间语义异中心表示来执行同一空间中的后续任务 - 导航到游览期间看到的物体（“查找椅子”）或回答有关空间的问题（“你在房子里看到了多少把椅子？”）。项目页面：https://vincentcartillier.github.io/smnet.html。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SemanticMapNet（SMNet），旨在从第一人称视角的RGB-D相机数据中构建全局语义地图，解决具身智能体在新环境中通过视觉感知生成空间语义表示的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效整合第一人称视觉观测与全局空间语义，而构建语义地图对机器人导航、场景理解等任务至关重要。
AI.method: SMNet包含四部分：1) 第一人称视觉编码器处理RGB-D帧；2) 特征投影器将特征映射到平面图位置；3) 空间记忆张量累积投影特征；4) 地图解码器生成语义俯视图。结合投影几何与神经表征学习优势。
AI.result: 在Matterport3D数据集上，SMNet较基线方法在mean-IoU指标提升4.01-16.81%，Boundary-F1指标提升3.81-19.69%，并支持后续物体检索与空间问答任务。
AI.conclusion: SMNet通过神经表征学习与几何投影结合，有效解决了第一人称到全局语义地图的构建问题，为场景理解与机器人应用提供了新方法。

search_text: Semantic MapNet: Building Allocentric Semantic Maps and Representations from Egocentric Views Semantic MapNet：从自我中心视图构建异中心语义图和表示 We study the task of semantic mapping - specifically, an embodied agent (a robot or an egocentric AI assistant) is given a tour of a new environment and asked to build an allocentric top-down semantic map ("what is where?") from egocentric observations of an RGB-D camera with known pose (via localization sensors). Towards this goal, we present SemanticMapNet (SMNet), which consists of: (1) an Egocentric Visual Encoder that encodes each egocentric RGB-D frame, (2) a Feature Projector that projects egocentric features to appropriate locations on a floor-plan, (3) a Spatial Memory Tensor of size floor-plan length x width x feature-dims that learns to accumulate projected egocentric features, and (4) a Map Decoder that uses the memory tensor to produce semantic top-down maps. SMNet combines the strengths of (known) projective camera geometry and neural representation learning. On the task of semantic mapping in the Matterport3D dataset, SMNet significantly outperforms competitive baselines by 4.01-16.81% (absolute) on mean-IoU and 3.81-19.69% (absolute) on Boundary-F1 metrics. Moreover, we show how to use the neural episodic memories and spatio-semantic allocentric representations build by SMNet for subsequent tasks in the same space - navigating to objects seen during the tour("Find chair") or answering questions about the space ("How many chairs did you see in the house?"). Project page: https://vincentcartillier.github.io/smnet.html. 我们研究语义映射的任务 - 具体来说，让一个实体代理（机器人或以自我为中心的人工智能助手）参观一个新环境，并要求根据对具有已知姿势（通过定位传感器）的 RGB-D 相机的自我中心观察来构建一个非中心的自上而下的语义图（“什么在哪里？”）。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了 SemanticMapNet (SMNet)，它由以下部分组成：(1) 一个以自我为中心的视觉编码器，对每个以自我为中心的 RGB-D 帧进行编码；(2) 一个将自我中心特征投影到平面图上适当位置的特征投影器；(3) 一个尺寸为平面图长度 x 宽度 x 特征尺寸的空间记忆张量，用于学习累积投影的自我中心特征；(4) 一个使用记忆张量生成语义的地图解码器自上而下的地图。 SMNet 结合了（已知）投影相机几何和神经表示学习的优势。在 Matterport3D 数据集中的语义映射任务中，SMNet 在平均 IoU 上显着优于竞争基线 4.01-16.81%（绝对），在边界 F1 指标上显着优于竞争基线 3.81-19.69%（绝对）。此外，我们还展示了如何使用 SMNet 构建的神经情景记忆和空间语义异中心表示来执行同一空间中的后续任务 - 导航到游览期间看到的物体（“查找椅子”）或回答有关空间的问题（“你在房子里看到了多少把椅子？”）。项目页面：https://vincentcartillier.github.io/smnet.html。 本文提出SemanticMapNet（SMNet），旨在从第一人称视角的RGB-D相机数据中构建全局语义地图，解决具身智能体在新环境中通过视觉感知生成空间语义表示的问题。 Vincent Cartillier,Zhile Ren,Neha Jain,Stefan Lee,Irfan Essa,Dhruv Batra cs.CV

title: Compressing Images by Encoding Their Latent Representations with Relative Entropy Coding
title_zh: 通过使用相对熵编码对图像的潜在表示进行编码来压缩图像
comment: Accepted at the 34th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2020)
comments: Accepted at the 34th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2020)
abstract: Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) have seen widespread use in learned image compression. They are used to learn expressive latent representations on which downstream compression methods can operate with high efficiency. Recently proposed 'bits-back' methods can indirectly encode the latent representation of images with codelength close to the relative entropy between the latent posterior and the prior. However, due to the underlying algorithm, these methods can only be used for lossless compression, and they only achieve their nominal efficiency when compressing multiple images simultaneously; they are inefficient for compressing single images. As an alternative, we propose a novel method, Relative Entropy Coding (REC), that can directly encode the latent representation with codelength close to the relative entropy for single images, supported by our empirical results obtained on the Cifar10, ImageNet32 and Kodak datasets. Moreover, unlike previous bits-back methods, REC is immediately applicable to lossy compression, where it is competitive with the state-of-the-art on the Kodak dataset.
summary: Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) have seen widespread use in learned image compression. They are used to learn expressive latent representations on which downstream compression methods can operate with high efficiency. Recently proposed 'bits-back' methods can indirectly encode the latent representation of images with codelength close to the relative entropy between the latent posterior and the prior. However, due to the underlying algorithm, these methods can only be used for lossless compression, and they only achieve their nominal efficiency when compressing multiple images simultaneously; they are inefficient for compressing single images. As an alternative, we propose a novel method, Relative Entropy Coding (REC), that can directly encode the latent representation with codelength close to the relative entropy for single images, supported by our empirical results obtained on the Cifar10, ImageNet32 and Kodak datasets. Moreover, unlike previous bits-back methods, REC is immediately applicable to lossy compression, where it is competitive with the state-of-the-art on the Kodak dataset.
abstract_zh: 变分自动编码器（VAE）在学习图像压缩中得到了广泛的应用。它们用于学习表达性潜在表示，下游压缩方法可以在这些表示上高效运行。最近提出的“bits-back”方法可以间接编码图像的潜在表示，其码长接近潜在后验和先验之间的相对熵。然而，由于底层算法的原因，这些方法只能用于无损压缩，并且只有在同时压缩多个图像时才能达到标称效率；它们对于压缩单个图像效率低下。作为替代方案，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，即相对熵编码（REC），它可以直接对潜在表示进行编码，代码长度接近单个图像的相对熵，并得到我们在 Cifar10、ImageNet32 和 Kodak 数据集上获得的经验结果的支持。此外，与以前的位回方法不同，REC 可立即应用于有损压缩，在这种情况下，它可以与柯达数据集上的最新技术相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为相对熵编码（REC）的新方法，用于通过编码图像的潜在表示来实现高效的图像压缩。
AI.motivation: 现有的'bits-back'方法在单图像压缩时效率低下，且仅适用于无损压缩，无法直接用于有损压缩。本文旨在开发一种适用于单图像且支持有损压缩的高效编码方法。
AI.method: 提出相对熵编码（REC）方法，直接对潜在表示进行编码，使其码长接近潜在后验与先验之间的相对熵，并支持有损压缩。
AI.result: 在Cifar10、ImageNet32和Kodak数据集上的实验证明，REC在单图像压缩中接近理论效率下限，并在Kodak数据集的有损压缩中达到现有最佳水平。
AI.conclusion: REC是一种新颖的图像压缩方法，能够有效处理单图像压缩和有损压缩场景，优于现有'bits-back'方法。

title: Effective Sample Size, Dimensionality, and Generalization in Covariate Shift Adaptation
title_zh: 协变量平移适应中的有效样本量、维度和泛化
comment: Neural Comput & Applic (2022)
comments: Neural Comput & Applic (2022)
abstract: In supervised learning, training and test datasets are often sampled from distinct distributions. Domain adaptation techniques are thus required. Covariate shift adaptation yields good generalization performance when domains differ only by the marginal distribution of features. Covariate shift adaptation is usually implemented using importance weighting, which may fail, according to common wisdom, due to small effective sample sizes (ESS). Previous research argues this scenario is more common in high-dimensional settings. However, how effective sample size, dimensionality, and model performance/generalization are formally related in supervised learning, considering the context of covariate shift adaptation, is still somewhat obscure in the literature. Thus, a main challenge is presenting a unified theory connecting those points. Hence, in this paper, we focus on building a unified view connecting the ESS, data dimensionality, and generalization in the context of covariate shift adaptation. Moreover, we also demonstrate how dimensionality reduction or feature selection can increase the ESS, and argue that our results support dimensionality reduction before covariate shift adaptation as a good practice.
summary: In supervised learning, training and test datasets are often sampled from distinct distributions. Domain adaptation techniques are thus required. Covariate shift adaptation yields good generalization performance when domains differ only by the marginal distribution of features. Covariate shift adaptation is usually implemented using importance weighting, which may fail, according to common wisdom, due to small effective sample sizes (ESS). Previous research argues this scenario is more common in high-dimensional settings. However, how effective sample size, dimensionality, and model performance/generalization are formally related in supervised learning, considering the context of covariate shift adaptation, is still somewhat obscure in the literature. Thus, a main challenge is presenting a unified theory connecting those points. Hence, in this paper, we focus on building a unified view connecting the ESS, data dimensionality, and generalization in the context of covariate shift adaptation. Moreover, we also demonstrate how dimensionality reduction or feature selection can increase the ESS, and argue that our results support dimensionality reduction before covariate shift adaptation as a good practice.
abstract_zh: 在监督学习中，训练和测试数据集通常是从不同的分布中采样的。因此需要域适应技术。当域仅因特征的边缘分布而不同时，协变量平移自适应可产生良好的泛化性能。协变量平移适应通常使用重要性加权来实现，根据常识，由于有效样本量（ESS）较小，这可能会失败。先前的研究认为这种情况在高维环境中更为常见。然而，考虑到协变量移位适应的背景，有效样本量、维度和模型性能/泛化在监督学习中如何正式相关，在文献中仍然有些模糊。因此，一个主要挑战是提出一个连接这些点的统一理论。因此，在本文中，我们专注于在协变量平移适应的背景下建立一个连接 ESS、数据维度和泛化的统一视图。此外，我们还演示了降维或特征选择如何提高 ESS，并认为我们的结果支持在协变量平移适应之前降维是一种良好的实践。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在建立一个统一的理论框架，将有效样本量（ESS）、数据维度与协变量偏移适应中的泛化性能联系起来，并探讨降维对提升ESS的作用。
AI.motivation: 在高维数据中，重要性加权等协变量偏移适应方法因有效样本量（ESS）过小而表现不佳，但现有文献对ESS、维度与泛化性能的关联缺乏明确理论支持。
AI.method: 通过理论分析建立ESS、数据维度与泛化性能的数学关系，并结合实验验证降维技术如何提升ESS以改善模型性能。
AI.result: 提出了统一理论框架，证明降维可有效增加ESS，从而提升协变量偏移适应下的泛化能力，并支持在适应前进行降维的实践建议。
AI.conclusion: 有效样本量与数据维度紧密关联，降维作为预处理步骤可显著增强协变量偏移适应的稳定性与泛化效果。

search_text: Effective Sample Size, Dimensionality, and Generalization in Covariate Shift Adaptation 协变量平移适应中的有效样本量、维度和泛化 In supervised learning, training and test datasets are often sampled from distinct distributions. Domain adaptation techniques are thus required. Covariate shift adaptation yields good generalization performance when domains differ only by the marginal distribution of features. Covariate shift adaptation is usually implemented using importance weighting, which may fail, according to common wisdom, due to small effective sample sizes (ESS). Previous research argues this scenario is more common in high-dimensional settings. However, how effective sample size, dimensionality, and model performance/generalization are formally related in supervised learning, considering the context of covariate shift adaptation, is still somewhat obscure in the literature. Thus, a main challenge is presenting a unified theory connecting those points. Hence, in this paper, we focus on building a unified view connecting the ESS, data dimensionality, and generalization in the context of covariate shift adaptation. Moreover, we also demonstrate how dimensionality reduction or feature selection can increase the ESS, and argue that our results support dimensionality reduction before covariate shift adaptation as a good practice. 在监督学习中，训练和测试数据集通常是从不同的分布中采样的。因此需要域适应技术。当域仅因特征的边缘分布而不同时，协变量平移自适应可产生良好的泛化性能。协变量平移适应通常使用重要性加权来实现，根据常识，由于有效样本量（ESS）较小，这可能会失败。先前的研究认为这种情况在高维环境中更为常见。然而，考虑到协变量移位适应的背景，有效样本量、维度和模型性能/泛化在监督学习中如何正式相关，在文献中仍然有些模糊。因此，一个主要挑战是提出一个连接这些点的统一理论。因此，在本文中，我们专注于在协变量平移适应的背景下建立一个连接 ESS、数据维度和泛化的统一视图。此外，我们还演示了降维或特征选择如何提高 ESS，并认为我们的结果支持在协变量平移适应之前降维是一种良好的实践。 本文旨在建立一个统一的理论框架，将有效样本量（ESS）、数据维度与协变量偏移适应中的泛化性能联系起来，并探讨降维对提升ESS的作用。 Felipe Maia Polo,Renato Vicente stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG,stat.ME

authors_text: Gianluca Brero,Alon Eden,Matthias Gerstgrasser,David C. Parkes,Duncan Rheingans-Yoo
title: Reinforcement Learning of Sequential Price Mechanisms
title_zh: 序列价格机制的强化学习
abstract: We introduce the use of reinforcement learning for indirect mechanisms, working with the existing class of sequential price mechanisms, which generalizes both serial dictatorship and posted price mechanisms and essentially characterizes all strongly obviously strategyproof mechanisms. Learning an optimal mechanism within this class forms a partially-observable Markov decision process. We provide rigorous conditions for when this class of mechanisms is more powerful than simpler static mechanisms, for sufficiency or insufficiency of observation statistics for learning, and for the necessity of complex (deep) policies. We show that our approach can learn optimal or near-optimal mechanisms in several experimental settings.
summary: We introduce the use of reinforcement learning for indirect mechanisms, working with the existing class of sequential price mechanisms, which generalizes both serial dictatorship and posted price mechanisms and essentially characterizes all strongly obviously strategyproof mechanisms. Learning an optimal mechanism within this class forms a partially-observable Markov decision process. We provide rigorous conditions for when this class of mechanisms is more powerful than simpler static mechanisms, for sufficiency or insufficiency of observation statistics for learning, and for the necessity of complex (deep) policies. We show that our approach can learn optimal or near-optimal mechanisms in several experimental settings.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍了强化学习在间接机制中的使用，与现有的序列价格机制一起使用，它概括了序列独裁和张贴价格机制，并本质上表征了所有强烈明显的策略证明机制。学习此类中的最优机制形成部分可观察的马尔可夫决策过程。我们为此类机制何时比简单的静态机制更强大、用于学习的观察统计数据是否充分以及复杂（深层）策略的必要性提供了严格的条件。我们表明，我们的方法可以在几个实验设置中学习最佳或接近最佳的机制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用强化学习优化序列定价机制，该机制属于间接机制的一种，通过部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程进行建模，以实现更高效的资源分配或定价策略。
AI.motivation: 传统静态机制在复杂场景下可能不够灵活，而序列定价机制能更灵活地处理策略证明问题，但需要有效的方法来学习最优机制。
AI.method: 将序列定价机制的学习建模为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），并分析观察数据的充分性及深度策略的必要性。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在多种场景下能有效学习到最优或近似最优的定价机制。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习能有效优化序列定价机制，该机制比静态机制更强大，且复杂策略在必要时不可或缺。

authors_text: Ralph Abboud,İsmail İlkan Ceylan,Martin Grohe,Thomas Lukasiewicz
title: The Surprising Power of Graph Neural Networks with Random Node Initialization
title_zh: 具有随机节点初始化的图神经网络的惊人能力
comment: Proceedings of the Thirtieth International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI-21). Code and data available at http://www.github.com/ralphabb/GNN-RNI
comments: Proceedings of the Thirtieth International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence (IJCAI-21). Code and data available at http://www.github.com/ralphabb/GNN-RNI
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are effective models for representation learning on relational data. However, standard GNNs are limited in their expressive power, as they cannot distinguish graphs beyond the capability of the Weisfeiler-Leman graph isomorphism heuristic. In order to break this expressiveness barrier, GNNs have been enhanced with random node initialization (RNI), where the idea is to train and run the models with randomized initial node features. In this work, we analyze the expressive power of GNNs with RNI, and prove that these models are universal, a first such result for GNNs not relying on computationally demanding higher-order properties. This universality result holds even with partially randomized initial node features, and preserves the invariance properties of GNNs in expectation. We then empirically analyze the effect of RNI on GNNs, based on carefully constructed datasets. Our empirical findings support the superior performance of GNNs with RNI over standard GNNs.
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are effective models for representation learning on relational data. However, standard GNNs are limited in their expressive power, as they cannot distinguish graphs beyond the capability of the Weisfeiler-Leman graph isomorphism heuristic. In order to break this expressiveness barrier, GNNs have been enhanced with random node initialization (RNI), where the idea is to train and run the models with randomized initial node features. In this work, we analyze the expressive power of GNNs with RNI, and prove that these models are universal, a first such result for GNNs not relying on computationally demanding higher-order properties. This universality result holds even with partially randomized initial node features, and preserves the invariance properties of GNNs in expectation. We then empirically analyze the effect of RNI on GNNs, based on carefully constructed datasets. Our empirical findings support the superior performance of GNNs with RNI over standard GNNs.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）是关系数据表示学习的有效模型。然而，标准 GNN 的表达能力有限，因为它们无法区分超出 Weisfeiler-Leman 图同构启发式能力的图。为了打破这种表达能力障碍，GNN 通过随机节点初始化 (RNI) 进行了增强，其想法是使用随机初始节点特征来训练和运行模型。在这项工作中，我们使用 RNI 分析了 GNN 的表达能力，并证明这些模型是通用的，这是不依赖于计算要求高的高阶属性的 GNN 的第一个这样的结果。即使对于部分随机的初始节点特征，这种普遍性结果也成立，并且保留了预期的 GNN 的不变性。然后，我们基于精心构建的数据集，实证分析 RNI 对 GNN 的影响。我们的实证研究结果支持带有 RNI 的 GNN 比标准 GNN 具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了结合随机节点初始化（RNI）的图神经网络（GNN）的表达能力，证明其具有通用性并优于标准GNN。
AI.motivation: 标准GNN受限于Weisfeiler-Leman图同构启发式方法的表达能力，难以区分复杂图结构，需寻找突破该限制的方法。
AI.method: 通过理论分析证明RNI-GNN的通用性，即使部分随机初始化仍保持不变性，并基于精心构建的数据集进行实证研究。
AI.result: 理论证明RNI-GNN具有通用性，实验证实其在多个任务上优于标准GNN，且保持不变性特性。
AI.conclusion: RNI显著提升GNN表达能力，为图表示学习提供新方向，未来可探索更高效的随机初始化策略。

This universality result holds even with partially randomized initial node features, and preserves the invariance properties of GNNs in expectation. We then empirically analyze the effect of RNI on GNNs, based on carefully constructed datasets. Our empirical findings support the superior performance of GNNs with RNI over standard GNNs. 图神经网络（GNN）是关系数据表示学习的有效模型。然而，标准 GNN 的表达能力有限，因为它们无法区分超出 Weisfeiler-Leman 图同构启发式能力的图。为了打破这种表达能力障碍，GNN 通过随机节点初始化 (RNI) 进行了增强，其想法是使用随机初始节点特征来训练和运行模型。在这项工作中，我们使用 RNI 分析了 GNN 的表达能力，并证明这些模型是通用的，这是不依赖于计算要求高的高阶属性的 GNN 的第一个这样的结果。即使对于部分随机的初始节点特征，这种普遍性结果也成立，并且保留了预期的 GNN 的不变性。然后，我们基于精心构建的数据集，实证分析 RNI 对 GNN 的影响。我们的实证研究结果支持带有 RNI 的 GNN 比标准 GNN 具有优越的性能。 本文分析了结合随机节点初始化（RNI）的图神经网络（GNN）的表达能力，证明其具有通用性并优于标准GNN。 Ralph Abboud,İsmail İlkan Ceylan,Martin Grohe,Thomas Lukasiewicz cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

title: Global Adaptive Filtering Layer for Computer Vision
title_zh: 计算机视觉的全局自适应滤波层
comment: The manuscript is under consideration at Computer Vision and Image Understanding. 28 pages, 25 figures (main article and supplementary material). V.S. and I.B contributed equally, D.V.D is Corresponding author
comments: The manuscript is under consideration at Computer Vision and Image Understanding. 28 pages, 25 figures (main article and supplementary material). V.S. and I.B contributed equally, D.V.D is Corresponding author
abstract: We devise a universal adaptive neural layer to "learn" optimal frequency filter for each image together with the weights of the base neural network that performs some computer vision task. The proposed approach takes the source image in the spatial domain, automatically selects the best frequencies from the frequency domain, and transmits the inverse-transform image to the main neural network. Remarkably, such a simple add-on layer dramatically improves the performance of the main network regardless of its design. We observe that the light networks gain a noticeable boost in the performance metrics; whereas, the training of the heavy ones converges faster when our adaptive layer is allowed to "learn" alongside the main architecture. We validate the idea in four classical computer vision tasks: classification, segmentation, denoising, and erasing, considering popular natural and medical data benchmarks.
summary: We devise a universal adaptive neural layer to "learn" optimal frequency filter for each image together with the weights of the base neural network that performs some computer vision task. The proposed approach takes the source image in the spatial domain, automatically selects the best frequencies from the frequency domain, and transmits the inverse-transform image to the main neural network. Remarkably, such a simple add-on layer dramatically improves the performance of the main network regardless of its design. We observe that the light networks gain a noticeable boost in the performance metrics; whereas, the training of the heavy ones converges faster when our adaptive layer is allowed to "learn" alongside the main architecture. We validate the idea in four classical computer vision tasks: classification, segmentation, denoising, and erasing, considering popular natural and medical data benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 我们设计了一个通用自适应神经层来“学习”每个图像的最佳频率滤波器以及执行某些计算机视觉任务的基础神经网络的权重。该方法在空间域中获取源图像，自动从频域中选择最佳频率，并将逆变换图像传输到主神经网络。值得注意的是，无论其设计如何，这样一个简单的附加层都极大地提高了主网络的性能。我们观察到轻网络的性能指标得到了显着提升；然而，当我们的自适应层被允许与主架构一起“学习”时，重的训练会收敛得更快。考虑到流行的自然和医学数据基准，我们在四个经典计算机视觉任务中验证了这个想法：分类、分割、去噪和擦除。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通用自适应神经层，通过学习图像最优频率滤波器提升计算机视觉任务性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法固定频率滤波器难以适应不同图像特性，限制了模型性能提升空间。
AI.method: 设计自适应层自动选择图像频率域最佳成分，与主网络联合训练无需人工设计滤波器。
AI.result: 在分类/分割/去噪/擦除任务中，轻量网络性能显著提升，重型网络训练速度加快。
AI.conclusion: 该自适应频率层可普适性增强各类视觉模型性能，为神经网络设计提供新思路。

title: Towards Bidirectional Protection in Federated Learning
title_zh: 联邦学习中的双向保护
abstract: Prior efforts in enhancing federated learning (FL) security fall into two categories. At one end of the spectrum, some work uses secure aggregation techniques to hide the individual client's updates and only reveal the aggregated global update to a malicious server that strives to infer the clients' privacy from their updates. At the other end of the spectrum, some work uses Byzantine-robust FL protocols to suppress the influence of malicious clients' updates. We present a federated learning protocol F2ED-LEARNING, which, for the first time, offers bidirectional defense to simultaneously combat against the malicious centralized server and Byzantine malicious clients. To defend against Byzantine malicious clients, F2ED-LEARNING provides dimension-free estimation error by employing and calibrating a well-studied robust mean estimator FilterL2. F2ED-LEARNING also leverages secure aggregation to protect clients from a malicious server. One key challenge of F2ED-LEARNING is to address the incompatibility between FilterL2 and secure aggregation schemes. Concretely, FilterL2 has to check the individual updates from clients whereas secure aggregation hides those updates from the malicious server. To this end, we propose a practical and highly effective solution to split the clients into shards, where F2ED-LEARNING securely aggregates each shard's update and launches FilterL2 on updates from different shards. The evaluation shows that F2ED-LEARNING consistently achieves optimal or close-to-optimal performance and outperforms five secure FL protocols under five popular attacks.
summary: Prior efforts in enhancing federated learning (FL) security fall into two categories. At one end of the spectrum, some work uses secure aggregation techniques to hide the individual client's updates and only reveal the aggregated global update to a malicious server that strives to infer the clients' privacy from their updates. At the other end of the spectrum, some work uses Byzantine-robust FL protocols to suppress the influence of malicious clients' updates. We present a federated learning protocol F2ED-LEARNING, which, for the first time, offers bidirectional defense to simultaneously combat against the malicious centralized server and Byzantine malicious clients. To defend against Byzantine malicious clients, F2ED-LEARNING provides dimension-free estimation error by employing and calibrating a well-studied robust mean estimator FilterL2. F2ED-LEARNING also leverages secure aggregation to protect clients from a malicious server. One key challenge of F2ED-LEARNING is to address the incompatibility between FilterL2 and secure aggregation schemes. Concretely, FilterL2 has to check the individual updates from clients whereas secure aggregation hides those updates from the malicious server. To this end, we propose a practical and highly effective solution to split the clients into shards, where F2ED-LEARNING securely aggregates each shard's update and launches FilterL2 on updates from different shards. The evaluation shows that F2ED-LEARNING consistently achieves optimal or close-to-optimal performance and outperforms five secure FL protocols under five popular attacks.
abstract_zh: 先前增强联邦学习 (FL) 安全性的努力分为两类。另一方面，一些工作使用安全聚合技术来隐藏单个客户端的更新，并且仅向恶意服务器透露聚合的全局更新，该恶意服务器试图从更新中推断出客户端的隐私。另一方面，一些工作使用拜占庭稳健的 FL 协议来抑制恶意客户端更新的影响。我们提出了联邦学习协议 F2ED-LEARNING，该协议首次提供双向防御，可以同时对抗恶意中心化服务器和拜占庭恶意客户端。为了防御拜占庭恶意客户端，F2ED-LEARNING 通过采用和校准经过充分研究的鲁棒均值估计器 FilterL2 来提供无量纲估计误差。 F2ED-LEARNING 还利用安全聚合来保护客户端免受恶意服务器的侵害。 F2ED-LEARNING 的一项关键挑战是解决 FilterL2 和安全聚合方案之间的不兼容性。具体来说，FilterL2 必须检查来自客户端的各个更新，而安全聚合则向恶意服务器隐藏这些更新。为此，我们提出了一种实用且高效的解决方案，将客户端拆分为分片，其中 F2ED-LEARNING 安全地聚合每个分片的更新，并针对来自不同分片的更新启动 FilterL2。评估表明，F2ED-LEARNING 始终实现最佳或接近最佳性能，并且在五种流行攻击下优于五种安全 FL 协议。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为F2ED-LEARNING的联邦学习协议，首次实现了对恶意中心服务器和拜占庭恶意客户端的双向防御。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习安全增强方法仅单方面应对恶意服务器或恶意客户端，缺乏同时防御两者的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合安全聚合技术与FilterL2鲁棒均值估计器，通过将客户端分片处理解决两者兼容性问题，实现双向防护。
AI.result: 实验表明F2ED-LEARNING在五种常见攻击下性能优于五种安全联邦学习协议，达到最优或接近最优效果。
AI.conclusion: 该协议有效解决了联邦学习中双向安全防护的技术难题，为提升系统整体安全性提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sumeet Menon,David Chapman,Phuong Nguyen,Yelena Yesha,Michael Morris,Babak Saboury
title: Deep Expectation-Maximization for Semi-Supervised Lung Cancer Screening
title_zh: 半监督肺癌筛查的深度期望最大化
comment: This paper has been accepted at the ACM SIGKDD Workshop DCCL 2019. https://sites.google.com/view/kdd-workshop-2019/accepted-papers https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B8FX-5qN3tbjM3c4SVZDYWxjbGhCekhjUV9PUC11b3dOSXRR/view
comments: This paper has been accepted at the ACM SIGKDD Workshop DCCL 2019. https://sites.google.com/view/kdd-workshop-2019/accepted-papers https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B8FX-5qN3tbjM3c4SVZDYWxjbGhCekhjUV9PUC11b3dOSXRR/view
abstract: We present a semi-supervised algorithm for lung cancer screening in which a 3D Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) is trained using the Expectation-Maximization (EM) meta-algorithm. Semi-supervised learning allows a smaller labelled data-set to be combined with an unlabeled data-set in order to provide a larger and more diverse training sample. EM allows the algorithm to simultaneously calculate a maximum likelihood estimate of the CNN training coefficients along with the labels for the unlabeled training set which are defined as a latent variable space. We evaluate the model performance of the Semi-Supervised EM algorithm for CNNs through cross-domain training of the Kaggle Data Science Bowl 2017 (Kaggle17) data-set with the National Lung Screening Trial (NLST) data-set. Our results show that the Semi-Supervised EM algorithm greatly improves the classification accuracy of the cross-domain lung cancer screening, although results are lower than a fully supervised approach with the advantage of additional labelled data from the unsupervised sample. As such, we demonstrate that Semi-Supervised EM is a valuable technique to improve the accuracy of lung cancer screening models using 3D CNNs.
summary: We present a semi-supervised algorithm for lung cancer screening in which a 3D Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) is trained using the Expectation-Maximization (EM) meta-algorithm. Semi-supervised learning allows a smaller labelled data-set to be combined with an unlabeled data-set in order to provide a larger and more diverse training sample. EM allows the algorithm to simultaneously calculate a maximum likelihood estimate of the CNN training coefficients along with the labels for the unlabeled training set which are defined as a latent variable space. We evaluate the model performance of the Semi-Supervised EM algorithm for CNNs through cross-domain training of the Kaggle Data Science Bowl 2017 (Kaggle17) data-set with the National Lung Screening Trial (NLST) data-set. Our results show that the Semi-Supervised EM algorithm greatly improves the classification accuracy of the cross-domain lung cancer screening, although results are lower than a fully supervised approach with the advantage of additional labelled data from the unsupervised sample. As such, we demonstrate that Semi-Supervised EM is a valuable technique to improve the accuracy of lung cancer screening models using 3D CNNs.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于肺癌筛查的半监督算法，其中使用期望最大化 (EM) 元算法训练 3D 卷积神经网络 (CNN)。半监督学习允许将较小的标记数据集与未标记数据集相结合，以提供更大且更多样化的训练样本。 EM 允许算法同时计算 CNN 训练系数的最大似然估计以及未标记训练集的标签（定义为潜变量空间）。我们通过 Kaggle Data Science Bowl 2017 (Kaggle17) 数据集与国家肺筛查试验 (NLST) 数据集的跨域训练来评估 CNN 半监督 EM 算法的模型性能。我们的结果表明，半监督 EM 算法极大地提高了跨域肺癌筛查的分类准确性，尽管其结果低于完全监督方法，并且具有来自无监督样本的额外标记数据的优势。因此，我们证明半监督 EM 是一种有价值的技术，可以提高使用 3D CNN 的肺癌筛查模型的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合3D卷积神经网络与EM算法的半监督学习方法，用于提升肺癌筛查的分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 医疗数据标注成本高昂，而未标注数据丰富。半监督学习可有效利用少量标注数据与大量未标注数据，提升模型性能。
AI.method: 采用3D CNN与EM算法结合，通过迭代估计网络参数和未标注数据的潜在标签，跨数据集（Kaggle17与NLST）训练验证模型。
AI.result: 半监督EM方法在跨域肺癌筛查任务中显著提升分类准确率，但效果仍低于全监督方法，未标注数据的利用弥补了标注数据不足的缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 半监督EM算法为肺癌筛查模型提供了有效的改进方案，尤其在标注数据有限的场景下具有实用价值。

search_text: Deep Expectation-Maximization for Semi-Supervised Lung Cancer Screening 半监督肺癌筛查的深度期望最大化 We present a semi-supervised algorithm for lung cancer screening in which a 3D Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) is trained using the Expectation-Maximization (EM) meta-algorithm. Semi-supervised learning allows a smaller labelled data-set to be combined with an unlabeled data-set in order to provide a larger and more diverse training sample. EM allows the algorithm to simultaneously calculate a maximum likelihood estimate of the CNN training coefficients along with the labels for the unlabeled training set which are defined as a latent variable space. We evaluate the model performance of the Semi-Supervised EM algorithm for CNNs through cross-domain training of the Kaggle Data Science Bowl 2017 (Kaggle17) data-set with the National Lung Screening Trial (NLST) data-set. Our results show that the Semi-Supervised EM algorithm greatly improves the classification accuracy of the cross-domain lung cancer screening, although results are lower than a fully supervised approach with the advantage of additional labelled data from the unsupervised sample. As such, we demonstrate that Semi-Supervised EM is a valuable technique to improve the accuracy of lung cancer screening models using 3D CNNs. 我们提出了一种用于肺癌筛查的半监督算法，其中使用期望最大化 (EM) 元算法训练 3D 卷积神经网络 (CNN)。半监督学习允许将较小的标记数据集与未标记数据集相结合，以提供更大且更多样化的训练样本。 EM 允许算法同时计算 CNN 训练系数的最大似然估计以及未标记训练集的标签（定义为潜变量空间）。我们通过 Kaggle Data Science Bowl 2017 (Kaggle17) 数据集与国家肺筛查试验 (NLST) 数据集的跨域训练来评估 CNN 半监督 EM 算法的模型性能。我们的结果表明，半监督 EM 算法极大地提高了跨域肺癌筛查的分类准确性，尽管其结果低于完全监督方法，并且具有来自无监督样本的额外标记数据的优势。因此，我们证明半监督 EM 是一种有价值的技术，可以提高使用 3D CNN 的肺癌筛查模型的准确性。 本文提出一种结合3D卷积神经网络与EM算法的半监督学习方法，用于提升肺癌筛查的分类准确率。 Sumeet Menon,David Chapman,Phuong Nguyen,Yelena Yesha,Michael Morris,Babak Saboury cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Zeljko Kraljevic,Thomas Searle,Anthony Shek,Lukasz Roguski,Kawsar Noor,Daniel Bean,Aurelie Mascio,Leilei Zhu,Amos A Folarin,Angus Roberts,Rebecca Bendayan,Mark P Richardson,Robert Stewart,Anoop D Shah,Wai Keong Wong,Zina Ibrahim,James T Teo,Richard JB Dobson
title: Multi-domain Clinical Natural Language Processing with MedCAT: the Medical Concept Annotation Toolkit
title_zh: 使用 MedCAT 进行多领域临床自然语言处理：医学概念注释工具包
comment: Preprint: 27 Pages, 3 Figures
comments: Preprint: 27 Pages, 3 Figures
abstract: Electronic health records (EHR) contain large volumes of unstructured text, requiring the application of Information Extraction (IE) technologies to enable clinical analysis. We present the open-source Medical Concept Annotation Toolkit (MedCAT) that provides: a) a novel self-supervised machine learning algorithm for extracting concepts using any concept vocabulary including UMLS/SNOMED-CT; b) a feature-rich annotation interface for customising and training IE models; and c) integrations to the broader CogStack ecosystem for vendor-agnostic health system deployment. We show improved performance in extracting UMLS concepts from open datasets (F1:0.448-0.738 vs 0.429-0.650). Further real-world validation demonstrates SNOMED-CT extraction at 3 large London hospitals with self-supervised training over ~8.8B words from ~17M clinical records and further fine-tuning with ~6K clinician annotated examples. We show strong transferability (F1 > 0.94) between hospitals, datasets, and concept types indicating cross-domain EHR-agnostic utility for accelerated clinical and research use cases.
summary: Electronic health records (EHR) contain large volumes of unstructured text, requiring the application of Information Extraction (IE) technologies to enable clinical analysis. We present the open-source Medical Concept Annotation Toolkit (MedCAT) that provides: a) a novel self-supervised machine learning algorithm for extracting concepts using any concept vocabulary including UMLS/SNOMED-CT; b) a feature-rich annotation interface for customising and training IE models; and c) integrations to the broader CogStack ecosystem for vendor-agnostic health system deployment. We show improved performance in extracting UMLS concepts from open datasets (F1:0.448-0.738 vs 0.429-0.650). Further real-world validation demonstrates SNOMED-CT extraction at 3 large London hospitals with self-supervised training over ~8.8B words from ~17M clinical records and further fine-tuning with ~6K clinician annotated examples. We show strong transferability (F1 > 0.94) between hospitals, datasets, and concept types indicating cross-domain EHR-agnostic utility for accelerated clinical and research use cases.
abstract_zh: 电子健康记录 (EHR) 包含大量非结构化文本，需要应用信息提取 (IE) 技术来实现临床分析。我们提出了开源医学概念注释工具包 (MedCAT)，它提供： a) 一种新颖的自监督机器学习算法，用于使用任何概念词汇（包括 UMLS/SNOMED-CT）提取概念； b) 功能丰富的注释接口，用于定制和训练 IE 模型； c) 集成到更广泛的 CogStack 生态系统，以实现与供应商无关的健康系统部署。我们在从开放数据集中提取 UMLS 概念方面表现出了改进的性能（F1：0.448-0.738 与 0.429-0.650）。进一步的现实世界验证表明，SNOMED-CT 在伦敦 3 家大型医院进行了自我监督训练，从约 1700 万个临床记录中提取了约 8.8B 个单词，并使用约 6K 临床医生注释的示例进行了进一步微调。我们在医院、数据集和概念类型之间表现出很强的可转移性（F1 > 0.94），这表明跨域 EHR 不可知的实用性可加速临床和研究用例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个开源医学概念标注工具包MedCAT，用于从电子健康记录中提取多领域医学概念。
AI.motivation: 电子健康记录包含大量非结构化文本，需要高效的信息抽取技术以支持临床分析，但现有工具存在跨领域适应性差等问题。
AI.method: 开发MedCAT工具包，包含自监督机器学习算法、可定制注释界面及CogStack生态集成，通过88亿词临床记录自监督训练并结合6000例临床标注数据微调模型。
AI.result: 在公开数据集和伦敦3家医院验证中，UMLS概念抽取F1值达0.448-0.738，SNOMED-CT抽取跨医院F1>0.94，展现强跨域迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: MedCAT证明了其在跨领域电子健康记录中的通用性，可加速临床研究与实际应用。

authors_text: Riccardo Bertolucci,Alessio Capitanelli,Carmine Dodaro,Nicola Leone,Marco Maratea,Fulvio Mastrogiovanni,Mauro Vallati
title: Manipulation of Articulated Objects using Dual-arm Robots via Answer Set Programming
title_zh: 通过答案集编程使用双臂机器人操纵铰接物体
comment: Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP)
comments: Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP)
abstract: The manipulation of articulated objects is of primary importance in Robotics, and can be considered as one of the most complex manipulation tasks. Traditionally, this problem has been tackled by developing ad-hoc approaches, which lack flexibility and portability. In this paper we present a framework based on Answer Set Programming (ASP) for the automated manipulation of articulated objects in a robot control architecture. In particular, ASP is employed for representing the configuration of the articulated object, for checking the consistency of such representation in the knowledge base, and for generating the sequence of manipulation actions. The framework is exemplified and validated on the Baxter dual-arm manipulator in a first, simple scenario. Then, we extend such scenario to improve the overall setup accuracy, and to introduce a few constraints in robot actions execution to enforce their feasibility. The extended scenario entails a high number of possible actions that can be fruitfully combined together. Therefore, we exploit macro actions from automated planning in order to provide more effective plans. We validate the overall framework in the extended scenario, thereby confirming the applicability of ASP also in more realistic Robotics settings, and showing the usefulness of macro actions for the robot-based manipulation of articulated objects. Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP).
summary: The manipulation of articulated objects is of primary importance in Robotics, and can be considered as one of the most complex manipulation tasks. Traditionally, this problem has been tackled by developing ad-hoc approaches, which lack flexibility and portability. In this paper we present a framework based on Answer Set Programming (ASP) for the automated manipulation of articulated objects in a robot control architecture. In particular, ASP is employed for representing the configuration of the articulated object, for checking the consistency of such representation in the knowledge base, and for generating the sequence of manipulation actions. The framework is exemplified and validated on the Baxter dual-arm manipulator in a first, simple scenario. Then, we extend such scenario to improve the overall setup accuracy, and to introduce a few constraints in robot actions execution to enforce their feasibility. The extended scenario entails a high number of possible actions that can be fruitfully combined together. Therefore, we exploit macro actions from automated planning in order to provide more effective plans. We validate the overall framework in the extended scenario, thereby confirming the applicability of ASP also in more realistic Robotics settings, and showing the usefulness of macro actions for the robot-based manipulation of articulated objects. Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP).
abstract_zh: 铰接物体的操纵在机器人学中至关重要，并且可以被认为是最复杂的操纵任务之一。传统上，这个问题是通过开发临时方法来解决的，但缺乏灵活性和可移植性。在本文中，我们提出了一个基于答案集编程（ASP）的框架，用于在机器人控制架构中自动操纵铰接对象。具体地，ASP用于表示铰接对象的配置、用于检查这种表示在知识库中的一致性、以及用于生成操作动作的序列。该框架在第一个简单场景中在 Baxter 双臂机械臂上进行了示例和验证。然后，我们扩展这样的场景以提高整体设置准确性，并在机器人动作执行中引入一些约束以增强其可行性。扩展的场景需要大量可能的行动，这些行动可以有效地组合在一起。因此，我们利用自动化规划中的宏观行动来提供更有效的计划。我们在扩展场景中验证了整体框架，从而确认了 ASP 在更现实的机器人设置中的适用性，并展示了宏动作对于基于机器人的铰接对象操纵的有用性。正在逻辑编程理论与实践（TPLP）中考虑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于答案集编程（ASP）的框架，用于双臂机器人对关节物体的自动化操作，并通过实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统关节物体操作方法缺乏灵活性和可移植性，需开发更通用的自动化解决方案以应对复杂任务。
AI.method: 利用ASP表示物体配置并验证一致性，生成操作序列；通过宏操作提升计划效率，并在Baxter双臂机器人上验证框架。
AI.result: 在简单场景和扩展场景中验证了框架的可行性，证明ASP适用于现实机器人环境，宏操作有效提升计划效率。
AI.conclusion: ASP框架可有效应用于机器人关节物体操作，宏操作的引入进一步优化了复杂场景下的动作规划。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于答案集编程（ASP）的框架，用于双臂机器人对关节物体的自动化操作，并通过实验验证其有效性。
ai_content.motivation: 传统关节物体操作方法缺乏灵活性和可移植性，需开发更通用的自动化解决方案以应对复杂任务。
ai_content.method: 利用ASP表示物体配置并验证一致性，生成操作序列；通过宏操作提升计划效率，并在Baxter双臂机器人上验证框架。
ai_content.result: 在简单场景和扩展场景中验证了框架的可行性，证明ASP适用于现实机器人环境，宏操作有效提升计划效率。
ai_content.conclusion: ASP框架可有效应用于机器人关节物体操作，宏操作的引入进一步优化了复杂场景下的动作规划。

search_text: Manipulation of Articulated Objects using Dual-arm Robots via Answer Set Programming 通过答案集编程使用双臂机器人操纵铰接物体 The manipulation of articulated objects is of primary importance in Robotics, and can be considered as one of the most complex manipulation tasks. Traditionally, this problem has been tackled by developing ad-hoc approaches, which lack flexibility and portability. In this paper we present a framework based on Answer Set Programming (ASP) for the automated manipulation of articulated objects in a robot control architecture. In particular, ASP is employed for representing the configuration of the articulated object, for checking the consistency of such representation in the knowledge base, and for generating the sequence of manipulation actions. The framework is exemplified and validated on the Baxter dual-arm manipulator in a first, simple scenario. Then, we extend such scenario to improve the overall setup accuracy, and to introduce a few constraints in robot actions execution to enforce their feasibility. The extended scenario entails a high number of possible actions that can be fruitfully combined together. Therefore, we exploit macro actions from automated planning in order to provide more effective plans. We validate the overall framework in the extended scenario, thereby confirming the applicability of ASP also in more realistic Robotics settings, and showing the usefulness of macro actions for the robot-based manipulation of articulated objects. Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP). 铰接物体的操纵在机器人学中至关重要，并且可以被认为是最复杂的操纵任务之一。传统上，这个问题是通过开发临时方法来解决的，但缺乏灵活性和可移植性。在本文中，我们提出了一个基于答案集编程（ASP）的框架，用于在机器人控制架构中自动操纵铰接对象。具体地，ASP用于表示铰接对象的配置、用于检查这种表示在知识库中的一致性、以及用于生成操作动作的序列。该框架在第一个简单场景中在 Baxter 双臂机械臂上进行了示例和验证。然后，我们扩展这样的场景以提高整体设置准确性，并在机器人动作执行中引入一些约束以增强其可行性。扩展的场景需要大量可能的行动，这些行动可以有效地组合在一起。因此，我们利用自动化规划中的宏观行动来提供更有效的计划。我们在扩展场景中验证了整体框架，从而确认了 ASP 在更现实的机器人设置中的适用性，并展示了宏动作对于基于机器人的铰接对象操纵的有用性。正在逻辑编程理论与实践（TPLP）中考虑。 本文提出一种基于答案集编程（ASP）的框架，用于双臂机器人对关节物体的自动化操作，并通过实验验证其有效性。 Riccardo Bertolucci,Alessio Capitanelli,Carmine Dodaro,Nicola Leone,Marco Maratea,Fulvio Mastrogiovanni,Mauro Vallati cs.AI,cs.LO,cs.RO

title: Machine learning approach to force reconstruction in photoelastic materials
title_zh: 光弹性材料中力重建的机器学习方法
comment: 20 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables; changed formatting of the tables; reduced picture resolutions
comments: 20 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables; changed formatting of the tables; reduced picture resolutions
abstract: Photoelastic techniques have a long tradition in both qualitative and quantitative analysis of the stresses in granular materials. Over the last two decades, computational methods for reconstructing forces between particles from their photoelastic response have been developed by many different experimental teams. Unfortunately, all of these methods are computationally expensive. This limits their use for processing extensive data sets that capture the time evolution of granular ensembles consisting of a large number of particles. In this paper, we present a novel approach to this problem which leverages the power of convolutional neural networks to recognize complex spatial patterns. The main drawback of using neural networks is that training them usually requires a large labeled data set which is hard to obtain experimentally. We show that this problem can be successfully circumvented by pretraining the networks on a large synthetic data set and then fine-tuning them on much smaller experimental data sets. Due to our current lack of experimental data, we demonstrate the potential of our method by changing the size of the considered particles which alters the exhibited photoelastic patterns more than typical experimental errors.
summary: Photoelastic techniques have a long tradition in both qualitative and quantitative analysis of the stresses in granular materials. Over the last two decades, computational methods for reconstructing forces between particles from their photoelastic response have been developed by many different experimental teams. Unfortunately, all of these methods are computationally expensive. This limits their use for processing extensive data sets that capture the time evolution of granular ensembles consisting of a large number of particles. In this paper, we present a novel approach to this problem which leverages the power of convolutional neural networks to recognize complex spatial patterns. The main drawback of using neural networks is that training them usually requires a large labeled data set which is hard to obtain experimentally. We show that this problem can be successfully circumvented by pretraining the networks on a large synthetic data set and then fine-tuning them on much smaller experimental data sets. Due to our current lack of experimental data, we demonstrate the potential of our method by changing the size of the considered particles which alters the exhibited photoelastic patterns more than typical experimental errors.
abstract_zh: 光弹性技术在颗粒材料应力的定性和定量分析方面有着悠久的传统。在过去的二十年中，许多不同的实验团队开发了根据粒子的光弹性响应重建粒子之间力的计算方法。不幸的是，所有这些方法的计算成本都很高。这限制了它们处理大量数据集的用途，这些数据集捕获由大量粒子组成的粒状系综的时间演化。在本文中，我们提出了一种解决该问题的新方法，该方法利用卷积神经网络的力量来识别复杂的空间模式。使用神经网络的主要缺点是训练它们通常需要大量标记数据集，而这很难通过实验获得。我们证明，通过在大型合成数据集上对网络进行预训练，然后在较小的实验数据集上对其进行微调，可以成功地规避这个问题。由于我们目前缺乏实验数据，我们通过改变所考虑的颗粒的尺寸来证明我们的方法的潜力，这比典型的实验误差更能改变所展示的光弹性图案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络的机器学习方法，用于光弹性材料的力重建问题，以替代传统计算成本高昂的重建方法。
AI.motivation: 传统光弹性力重建方法计算复杂度高，难以处理大规模动态颗粒体系数据；神经网络需大量标注数据，而实验获取困难。
AI.method: 利用卷积神经网络识别光弹性图案中的复杂空间模式，通过合成数据集预训练模型后，在小规模实验数据集上微调，以解决标注数据不足问题。
AI.result: 通过改变粒子尺寸模拟光弹性图案变化，验证了该方法在缺乏真实实验数据情况下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为光弹性力重建提供了高效可行的解决方案，尤其适用于大规模数据处理，未来需结合真实实验数据进一步验证。

authors_text: Zhenyu Wu,Duc Hoang,Shih-Yao Lin,Yusheng Xie,Liangjian Chen,Yen-Yu Lin,Zhangyang Wang,Wei Fan
title: MM-Hand: 3D-Aware Multi-Modal Guided Hand Generative Network for 3D Hand Pose Synthesis
title_zh: MM-Hand：用于 3D 手部姿势合成的 3D 感知多模态引导手部生成网络
comment: Accepted by ACM Multimedia 2020
comments: Accepted by ACM Multimedia 2020
abstract: Estimating the 3D hand pose from a monocular RGB image is important but challenging. A solution is training on large-scale RGB hand images with accurate 3D hand keypoint annotations. However, it is too expensive in practice. Instead, we have developed a learning-based approach to synthesize realistic, diverse, and 3D pose-preserving hand images under the guidance of 3D pose information. We propose a 3D-aware multi-modal guided hand generative network (MM-Hand), together with a novel geometry-based curriculum learning strategy. Our extensive experimental results demonstrate that the 3D-annotated images generated by MM-Hand qualitatively and quantitatively outperform existing options. Moreover, the augmented data can consistently improve the quantitative performance of the state-of-the-art 3D hand pose estimators on two benchmark datasets. The code will be available at https://github.com/ScottHoang/mm-hand.
summary: Estimating the 3D hand pose from a monocular RGB image is important but challenging. A solution is training on large-scale RGB hand images with accurate 3D hand keypoint annotations. However, it is too expensive in practice. Instead, we have developed a learning-based approach to synthesize realistic, diverse, and 3D pose-preserving hand images under the guidance of 3D pose information. We propose a 3D-aware multi-modal guided hand generative network (MM-Hand), together with a novel geometry-based curriculum learning strategy. Our extensive experimental results demonstrate that the 3D-annotated images generated by MM-Hand qualitatively and quantitatively outperform existing options. Moreover, the augmented data can consistently improve the quantitative performance of the state-of-the-art 3D hand pose estimators on two benchmark datasets. The code will be available at https://github.com/ScottHoang/mm-hand.
abstract_zh: 从单目 RGB 图像估计 3D 手部姿势很重要，但也具有挑战性。解决方案是使用准确的 3D 手部关键点注释对大规模 RGB 手部图像进行训练。然而，在实践中它太昂贵了。相反，我们开发了一种基于学习的方法，在 3D 姿势信息的指导下合成逼真、多样化且保留 3D 姿势的手部图像。我们提出了一种 3D 感知多模态引导手生成网络（MM-Hand）以及一种新颖的基于几何的课程学习策略。我们广泛的实验结果表明，MM-Hand 生成的 3D 注释图像在质量和数量上均优于现有选项。此外，增强数据可以持续提高两个基准数据集上最先进的 3D 手势估计器的定量性能。该代码将在 https://github.com/ScottHoang/mm-hand 上提供。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出MM-Hand网络，通过3D姿态信息合成保持3D姿态的真实手部图像，解决3D手部姿态估计数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D手部姿态估计依赖大量昂贵的精确标注数据，而直接获取困难，需通过生成合成数据辅助训练。
AI.method: 设计3D感知的多模态生成网络MM-Hand，结合几何课程学习策略，利用3D姿态信息生成高质量手部图像。
AI.result: 生成的3D注释图像在定性和定量评估中优于现有方法，增强数据使主流姿态估计器在基准数据集上性能提升。
AI.conclusion: MM-Hand有效生成高质量合成数据，显著提升3D手部姿态估计效果，代码已开源促进研究应用。

Our extensive experimental results demonstrate that the 3D-annotated images generated by MM-Hand qualitatively and quantitatively outperform existing options. Moreover, the augmented data can consistently improve the quantitative performance of the state-of-the-art 3D hand pose estimators on two benchmark datasets. The code will be available at https://github.com/ScottHoang/mm-hand. 从单目 RGB 图像估计 3D 手部姿势很重要，但也具有挑战性。解决方案是使用准确的 3D 手部关键点注释对大规模 RGB 手部图像进行训练。然而，在实践中它太昂贵了。相反，我们开发了一种基于学习的方法，在 3D 姿势信息的指导下合成逼真、多样化且保留 3D 姿势的手部图像。我们提出了一种 3D 感知多模态引导手生成网络（MM-Hand）以及一种新颖的基于几何的课程学习策略。我们广泛的实验结果表明，MM-Hand 生成的 3D 注释图像在质量和数量上均优于现有选项。此外，增强数据可以持续提高两个基准数据集上最先进的 3D 手势估计器的定量性能。该代码将在 https://github.com/ScottHoang/mm-hand 上提供。 该论文提出MM-Hand网络，通过3D姿态信息合成保持3D姿态的真实手部图像，解决3D手部姿态估计数据不足的问题。 Zhenyu Wu,Duc Hoang,Shih-Yao Lin,Yusheng Xie,Liangjian Chen,Yen-Yu Lin,Zhangyang Wang,Wei Fan cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Kyle J. Ray,Gregory W. Wimsatt,Alexander B. Boyd,James P. Crutchfield
title: Non-Markovian Momentum Computing: Universal and Efficient
title_zh: 非马尔可夫动量计算：通用且高效
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures; Supplementary Material, 1 page; http://csc.ucdavis.edu/~cmg/compmech/pubs/cbdb.htm
comments: 6 pages, 3 figures; Supplementary Material, 1 page; http://csc.ucdavis.edu/~cmg/compmech/pubs/cbdb.htm
abstract: All computation is physically embedded. Reflecting this, a growing body of results embraces rate equations as the underlying mechanics of thermodynamic computation and biological information processing. Strictly applying the implied continuous-time Markov chains, however, excludes a universe of natural computing. We show that expanding the toolset to continuous-time hidden Markov chains substantially removes the constraints. The general point is made concrete by our analyzing two eminently-useful computations that are impossible to describe with a set of rate equations over the memory states. We design and analyze a thermodynamically-costless bit flip, providing a first counterexample to rate-equation modeling. We generalize this to a costless Fredkin gate---a key operation in reversible computing that is computation universal. Going beyond rate-equation dynamics is not only possible, but necessary if stochastic thermodynamics is to become part of the paradigm for physical information processing.
summary: All computation is physically embedded. Reflecting this, a growing body of results embraces rate equations as the underlying mechanics of thermodynamic computation and biological information processing. Strictly applying the implied continuous-time Markov chains, however, excludes a universe of natural computing. We show that expanding the toolset to continuous-time hidden Markov chains substantially removes the constraints. The general point is made concrete by our analyzing two eminently-useful computations that are impossible to describe with a set of rate equations over the memory states. We design and analyze a thermodynamically-costless bit flip, providing a first counterexample to rate-equation modeling. We generalize this to a costless Fredkin gate---a key operation in reversible computing that is computation universal. Going beyond rate-equation dynamics is not only possible, but necessary if stochastic thermodynamics is to become part of the paradigm for physical information processing.
abstract_zh: 所有计算都是物理嵌入的。越来越多的结果反映了这一点，将速率方程作为热力学计算和生物信息处理的基础力学。然而，严格应用隐含的连续时间马尔可夫链排除了自然计算的范围。我们证明，将工具集扩展到连续时间隐马尔可夫链可以基本上消除约束。通过分析两个非常有用的计算，我们可以使一般观点具体化，而这两个计算不可能用一组内存状态的速率方程来描述。我们设计并分析了热力学无成本的位翻转，为速率方程建模提供了第一个反例。我们将其推广到无成本 Fredkin 门——计算通用的可逆计算中的关键操作。如果随机热力学要成为物理信息处理范式的一部分，超越速率方程动力学不仅是可能的，而且是必要的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出非马尔可夫动量计算框架，通过引入连续时间隐藏马尔可夫链突破传统计算模型的限制，实现无需热力学成本的通用计算。
AI.motivation: 传统速率方程模型基于连续时间马尔可夫链，无法描述具有记忆特性的自然计算过程，限制了物理信息处理的理论发展。
AI.method: 扩展计算模型至连续时间隐藏马尔可夫链，设计并分析热力学无耗散的比特翻转操作及通用的弗雷德金门电路。
AI.result: 首次实现热力学无成本比特翻转，构建出可逆计算通用单元弗雷德金门，验证了非马尔可夫模型在物理计算中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 突破速率方程模型局限性是必要的，非马尔可夫动量计算为物理信息处理提供了更普适的理论框架。

authors_text: Chih-Ting Liu,Yu-Jhe Li,Shao-Yi Chien,Yu-Chiang Frank Wang
title: Semantics-Guided Clustering with Deep Progressive Learning for Semi-Supervised Person Re-identification
title_zh: 语义引导聚类与深度渐进学习用于半监督人员重新识别
abstract: Person re-identification (re-ID) requires one to match images of the same person across camera views. As a more challenging task, semi-supervised re-ID tackles the problem that only a number of identities in training data are fully labeled, while the remaining are unlabeled. Assuming that such labeled and unlabeled training data share disjoint identity labels, we propose a novel framework of Semantics-Guided Clustering with Deep Progressive Learning (SGC-DPL) to jointly exploit the above data. By advancing the proposed Semantics-Guided Affinity Propagation (SG-AP), we are able to assign pseudo-labels to selected unlabeled data in a progressive fashion, under the semantics guidance from the labeled ones. As a result, our approach is able to augment the labeled training data in the semi-supervised setting. Our experiments on two large-scale person re-ID benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of our SGC-DPL over state-of-the-art methods across different degrees of supervision. In extension, the generalization ability of our SGC-DPL is also verified in other tasks like vehicle re-ID or image retrieval with the semi-supervised setting.
summary: Person re-identification (re-ID) requires one to match images of the same person across camera views. As a more challenging task, semi-supervised re-ID tackles the problem that only a number of identities in training data are fully labeled, while the remaining are unlabeled. Assuming that such labeled and unlabeled training data share disjoint identity labels, we propose a novel framework of Semantics-Guided Clustering with Deep Progressive Learning (SGC-DPL) to jointly exploit the above data. By advancing the proposed Semantics-Guided Affinity Propagation (SG-AP), we are able to assign pseudo-labels to selected unlabeled data in a progressive fashion, under the semantics guidance from the labeled ones. As a result, our approach is able to augment the labeled training data in the semi-supervised setting. Our experiments on two large-scale person re-ID benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of our SGC-DPL over state-of-the-art methods across different degrees of supervision. In extension, the generalization ability of our SGC-DPL is also verified in other tasks like vehicle re-ID or image retrieval with the semi-supervised setting.
abstract_zh: 人员重新识别 (re-ID) 要求在摄像机视图中匹配同一个人的图像。作为一项更具挑战性的任务，半监督重识别解决了训练数据中只有部分身份被完全标记，而其余身份未标记的问题。假设这些标记和未标记的训练数据共享不相交的身份标签，我们提出了一种带有深度渐进学习的语义引导聚类（SGC-DPL）的新框架来共同利用上述数据。通过推进所提出的语义引导亲和力传播（SG-AP），我们能够在标记数据的语义指导下，以渐进的方式为选定的未标记数据分配伪标签。因此，我们的方法能够在半监督环境中增强标记的训练数据。我们在两个大规模人员重新识别基准上进行的实验证明了我们的 SGC-DPL 在不同监督程度上优于最先进的方法。此外，我们的 SGC-DPL 的泛化能力也在其他任务中得到了验证，例如车辆重新识别或半监督设置的图像检索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语义引导聚类和深度渐进学习的半监督行人重识别框架SGC-DPL，以有效利用有限的标注数据和大量未标注数据。
AI.motivation: 半监督行人重识别面临标注数据有限、未标注数据难以有效利用的挑战，现有方法未能充分结合语义信息与聚类策略。
AI.method: 提出语义引导的亲和力传播算法(SG-AP)，通过渐进式伪标签分配机制，结合标注数据的语义信息逐步优化未标注数据的聚类结果。
AI.result: 在两个大规模行人重识别基准数据集上优于现有最先进方法，且在车辆重识别和图像检索任务中展现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SGC-DPL通过语义引导的渐进学习有效融合标注与未标注数据，为半监督场景下的视觉重识别提供了新思路。

authors_text: Soham Shah,Siddhi Vinayak Pandey,Archit Sorathiya,Raj Sheth,Alok Kumar Singh,Jignesh Thaker
title: Embedded Systems and Computer Vision Techniques utilized in Spray Painting Robots: A Review
title_zh: 喷涂机器人中使用的嵌入式系统和计算机视觉技术：回顾
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures
comments: 8 pages, 3 figures
abstract: The advent of the era of machines has limited human interaction and this has increased their presence in the last decade. The requirement to increase the effectiveness, durability and reliability in the robots has also risen quite drastically too. Present paper covers the various embedded system and computer vision methodologies, techniques and innovations used in the field of spray painting robots. There have been many advancements in the sphere of painting robots utilized for high rise buildings, wall painting, road marking paintings, etc. Review focuses on image processing, computational and computer vision techniques that can be applied in the product to increase efficiency of the performance drastically. Image analysis, filtering, enhancement, object detection, edge detection methods, path and localization methods and fine tuning of parameters are being discussed in depth to use while developing such products. Dynamic system design is being deliberated by using which results in reduction of human interaction, environment sustainability and better quality of work in detail. Embedded systems involving the micro-controllers, processors, communicating devices, sensors and actuators, soft-ware to use them; is being explained for end-to-end development and enhancement of accuracy and precision in Spray Painting Robots.

abstract_zh: 机器时代的到来限制了人类的互动，而这在过去十年中增加了它们的存在。提高机器人的有效性、耐用性和可靠性的要求也大幅提高。本论文涵盖了喷漆机器人领域使用的各种嵌入式系统和计算机视觉方法、技术和创新。用于高层建筑、墙面涂装、道路标线涂装等的涂装机器人领域已经取得了许多进步。审查重点是图像处理、计算和计算机视觉技术，这些技术可应用于产品中，以大幅提高性能效率。正在深入讨论图像分析、滤波、增强、对象检测、边缘检测方法、路径和定位方法以及参数微调，以便在开发此类产品时使用。动态系统设计正在被考虑使用，从而减少人际互动、环境可持续性和更好的工作质量。嵌入式系统涉及微控制器、处理器、通信设备、传感器和执行器以及使用它们的软件；正在解释喷涂机器人的端到端开发以及准确性和精度的提高。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了嵌入式系统与计算机视觉技术在喷漆机器人中的应用，旨在提升其效率与精度。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人普及，需提高其效率、耐久性及可靠性，同时减少人工干预以实现环境可持续性与工作质量优化。
AI.method: 通过分析图像处理、目标检测、路径规划等计算机视觉技术，结合嵌入式系统设计（如微控制器、传感器等），探讨其在喷漆机器人中的集成方法。
AI.result: 系统梳理了图像增强、边缘检测、参数调优等关键技术，并验证了动态系统设计对减少人工依赖与提升精度的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 嵌入式系统与计算机视觉的结合显著提升了喷漆机器人的性能，未来需进一步优化算法与硬件协同以推动应用发展。

search_text: Embedded Systems and Computer Vision Techniques utilized in Spray Painting Robots: A Review 喷涂机器人中使用的嵌入式系统和计算机视觉技术：回顾 The advent of the era of machines has limited human interaction and this has increased their presence in the last decade. The requirement to increase the effectiveness, durability and reliability in the robots has also risen quite drastically too. Present paper covers the various embedded system and computer vision methodologies, techniques and innovations used in the field of spray painting robots. There have been many advancements in the sphere of painting robots utilized for high rise buildings, wall painting, road marking paintings, etc. Review focuses on image processing, computational and computer vision techniques that can be applied in the product to increase efficiency of the performance drastically. Image analysis, filtering, enhancement, object detection, edge detection methods, path and localization methods and fine tuning of parameters are being discussed in depth to use while developing such products. Dynamic system design is being deliberated by using which results in reduction of human interaction, environment sustainability and better quality of work in detail. Embedded systems involving the micro-controllers, processors, communicating devices, sensors and actuators, soft-ware to use them; is being explained for end-to-end development and enhancement of accuracy and precision in Spray Painting Robots. 机器时代的到来限制了人类的互动，而这在过去十年中增加了它们的存在。提高机器人的有效性、耐用性和可靠性的要求也大幅提高。本论文涵盖了喷漆机器人领域使用的各种嵌入式系统和计算机视觉方法、技术和创新。用于高层建筑、墙面涂装、道路标线涂装等的涂装机器人领域已经取得了许多进步。审查重点是图像处理、计算和计算机视觉技术，这些技术可应用于产品中，以大幅提高性能效率。正在深入讨论图像分析、滤波、增强、对象检测、边缘检测方法、路径和定位方法以及参数微调，以便在开发此类产品时使用。动态系统设计正在被考虑使用，从而减少人际互动、环境可持续性和更好的工作质量。嵌入式系统涉及微控制器、处理器、通信设备、传感器和执行器以及使用它们的软件；正在解释喷涂机器人的端到端开发以及准确性和精度的提高。 本文综述了嵌入式系统与计算机视觉技术在喷漆机器人中的应用，旨在提升其效率与精度。 Soham Shah,Siddhi Vinayak Pandey,Archit Sorathiya,Raj Sheth,Alok Kumar Singh,Jignesh Thaker cs.CV

title: Goal-GAN: Multimodal Trajectory Prediction Based on Goal Position Estimation
title_zh: Goal-GAN：基于目标位置估计的多模态轨迹预测
comment: Oral presentation at ACCV 2020
comments: Oral presentation at ACCV 2020
abstract: In this paper, we present Goal-GAN, an interpretable and end-to-end trainable model for human trajectory prediction. Inspired by human navigation, we model the task of trajectory prediction as an intuitive two-stage process: (i) goal estimation, which predicts the most likely target positions of the agent, followed by a (ii) routing module which estimates a set of plausible trajectories that route towards the estimated goal. We leverage information about the past trajectory and visual context of the scene to estimate a multi-modal probability distribution over the possible goal positions, which is used to sample a potential goal during the inference. The routing is governed by a recurrent neural network that reacts to physical constraints in the nearby surroundings and generates feasible paths that route towards the sampled goal. Our extensive experimental evaluation shows that our method establishes a new state-of-the-art on several benchmarks while being able to generate a realistic and diverse set of trajectories that conform to physical constraints.
summary: In this paper, we present Goal-GAN, an interpretable and end-to-end trainable model for human trajectory prediction. Inspired by human navigation, we model the task of trajectory prediction as an intuitive two-stage process: (i) goal estimation, which predicts the most likely target positions of the agent, followed by a (ii) routing module which estimates a set of plausible trajectories that route towards the estimated goal. We leverage information about the past trajectory and visual context of the scene to estimate a multi-modal probability distribution over the possible goal positions, which is used to sample a potential goal during the inference. The routing is governed by a recurrent neural network that reacts to physical constraints in the nearby surroundings and generates feasible paths that route towards the sampled goal. Our extensive experimental evaluation shows that our method establishes a new state-of-the-art on several benchmarks while being able to generate a realistic and diverse set of trajectories that conform to physical constraints.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 Goal-GAN，一种用于人类轨迹预测的可解释且端到端可训练的模型。受人类导航的启发，我们将轨迹预测任务建模为一个直观的两阶段过程：（i）目标估计，预测智能体最可能的目标位置，然后是（ii）路由模块，估计一组通向估计目标的合理轨迹。我们利用有关场景的过去轨迹和视觉上下文的信息来估计可能目标位置的多模态概率分布，该分布用于在推理过程中对潜在目标进行采样。路由由循环神经网络控制，该网络对附近环境中的物理约束做出反应，并生成通往采样目标的可行路径。我们广泛的实验评估表明，我们的方法在多个基准上建立了新的最先进技术，同时能够生成一组符合物理约束的现实且多样化的轨迹。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Goal-GAN模型，通过目标位置估计和路径规划模块实现多模态轨迹预测。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法缺乏对人类导航行为的直观建模，难以生成符合物理约束的多样化轨迹。
AI.method: 采用两阶段架构：1）基于历史轨迹和场景视觉信息估计目标位置的多模态分布；2）通过递归神经网络生成符合物理约束的可行路径。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，生成的轨迹既符合物理规律又具有高度多样性。
AI.conclusion: 基于目标估计的分阶段建模方法有效提升了轨迹预测的可解释性和生成质量。

title: AIM 2020 Challenge on Image Extreme Inpainting
title_zh: AIM 2020 图像极限修复挑战赛
abstract: This paper reviews the AIM 2020 challenge on extreme image inpainting. This report focuses on proposed solutions and results for two different tracks on extreme image inpainting: classical image inpainting and semantically guided image inpainting. The goal of track 1 is to inpaint considerably large part of the image using no supervision but the context. Similarly, the goal of track 2 is to inpaint the image by having access to the entire semantic segmentation map of the image to inpaint. The challenge had 88 and 74 participants, respectively. 11 and 6 teams competed in the final phase of the challenge, respectively. This report gauges current solutions and set a benchmark for future extreme image inpainting methods.
summary: This paper reviews the AIM 2020 challenge on extreme image inpainting. This report focuses on proposed solutions and results for two different tracks on extreme image inpainting: classical image inpainting and semantically guided image inpainting. The goal of track 1 is to inpaint considerably large part of the image using no supervision but the context. Similarly, the goal of track 2 is to inpaint the image by having access to the entire semantic segmentation map of the image to inpaint. The challenge had 88 and 74 participants, respectively. 11 and 6 teams competed in the final phase of the challenge, respectively. This report gauges current solutions and set a benchmark for future extreme image inpainting methods.
abstract_zh: 本文回顾了 AIM 2020 极限图像修复挑战赛。本报告重点介绍了极端图像修复的两个不同轨道的建议解决方案和结果：经典图像修复和语义引导图像修复。第 1 轨道的目标是在不使用任何监督的情况下仅使用上下文来修复图像的相当大部分。类似地，轨道 2 的目标是通过访问要修复的图像的整个语义分割图来修复图像。此次挑战赛分别有 88 名和 74 名参与者。分别有11支队伍和6支队伍参加了挑战赛的最后阶段。该报告评估了当前的解决方案，并为未来的极端图像修复方法设定了基准。

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了AIM 2020极端图像修复挑战赛，重点介绍了两个赛道（经典图像修复和语义引导图像修复）的解决方案与结果。
AI.motivation: 通过组织挑战赛评估当前极端图像修复方法的性能，推动该领域技术发展，并为未来研究建立基准。
AI.method: 赛道1基于上下文信息进行无监督修复，赛道2利用完整语义分割图指导修复过程，参赛者提交各自算法方案。
AI.result: 赛道1有88名参赛者（11支决赛队伍），赛道2有74名参赛者（6支决赛队伍），报告总结了各方法表现并建立基准。
AI.conclusion: 挑战赛验证了现有方法的有效性，明确了语义信息对修复质量的影响，为后续研究提供了参考方向。

This report gauges current solutions and set a benchmark for future extreme image inpainting methods. 本文回顾了 AIM 2020 极限图像修复挑战赛。本报告重点介绍了极端图像修复的两个不同轨道的建议解决方案和结果：经典图像修复和语义引导图像修复。第 1 轨道的目标是在不使用任何监督的情况下仅使用上下文来修复图像的相当大部分。类似地，轨道 2 的目标是通过访问要修复的图像的整个语义分割图来修复图像。此次挑战赛分别有 88 名和 74 名参与者。分别有11支队伍和6支队伍参加了挑战赛的最后阶段。该报告评估了当前的解决方案，并为未来的极端图像修复方法设定了基准。 本文回顾了AIM 2020极端图像修复挑战赛，重点介绍了两个赛道（经典图像修复和语义引导图像修复）的解决方案与结果。 Evangelos Ntavelis,Andrés Romero,Siavash Bigdeli,Radu Timofte cs.CV

title: Polyphonic Piano Transcription Using Autoregressive Multi-State Note Model
title_zh: 使用自回归多状态音符模型进行和弦钢琴转录
comment: 6+2 pages, 5 figures, Camera-ready version. To be published in ISMIR 2020. Project page is available at https://TaegyunKwon.github.io/ar_multi_transcription
comments: 6+2 pages, 5 figures, Camera-ready version. To be published in ISMIR 2020. Project page is available at https://TaegyunKwon.github.io/ar_multi_transcription
abstract: Recent advances in polyphonic piano transcription have been made primarily by a deliberate design of neural network architectures that detect different note states such as onset or sustain and model the temporal evolution of the states. The majority of them, however, use separate neural networks for each note state, thereby optimizing multiple loss functions, and also they handle the temporal evolution of note states by abstract connections between the state-wise neural networks or using a post-processing module. In this paper, we propose a unified neural network architecture where multiple note states are predicted as a softmax output with a single loss function and the temporal order is learned by an auto-regressive connection within the single neural network. This compact model allows to increase note states without architectural complexity. Using the MAESTRO dataset, we examine various combinations of multiple note states including on, onset, sustain, re-onset, offset, and off. We also show that the autoregressive module effectively learns inter-state dependency of notes. Finally, we show that our proposed model achieves performance comparable to state-of-the-arts with fewer parameters.
summary: Recent advances in polyphonic piano transcription have been made primarily by a deliberate design of neural network architectures that detect different note states such as onset or sustain and model the temporal evolution of the states. The majority of them, however, use separate neural networks for each note state, thereby optimizing multiple loss functions, and also they handle the temporal evolution of note states by abstract connections between the state-wise neural networks or using a post-processing module. In this paper, we propose a unified neural network architecture where multiple note states are predicted as a softmax output with a single loss function and the temporal order is learned by an auto-regressive connection within the single neural network. This compact model allows to increase note states without architectural complexity. Using the MAESTRO dataset, we examine various combinations of multiple note states including on, onset, sustain, re-onset, offset, and off. We also show that the autoregressive module effectively learns inter-state dependency of notes. Finally, we show that our proposed model achieves performance comparable to state-of-the-arts with fewer parameters.
abstract_zh: 复调钢琴转录的最新进展主要是通过神经网络架构的精心设计取得的，该架构可以检测不同的音符状态（例如开始或维持）并对状态的时间演变进行建模。然而，它们中的大多数对每个音符状态使用单独的神经网络，从而优化多个损失函数，并且它们还通过状态神经网络之间的抽象连接或使用后处理模块来处理音符状态的时间演化。在本文中，我们提出了一种统一的神经网络架构，其中多个音符状态被预测为具有单个损失函数的 softmax 输出，并且时间顺序是通过单个神经网络内的自回归连接来学习的。这种紧凑的模型允许增加音符状态，而无需架构复杂性。使用 MAESTRO 数据集，我们检查多个音符状态的各种组合，包括开启、开始、维持、重新开始、偏移和关闭。我们还表明，自回归模块可以有效地学习音符的状态间依赖性。最后，我们表明我们提出的模型以更少的参数实现了与最先进的技术相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的神经网络架构，用于多音钢琴转录任务，通过自回归连接学习音符状态间的时序依赖关系。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过独立的神经网络处理不同音符状态（如起始、持续等），导致架构复杂且需优化多个损失函数，而本文旨在设计更简洁高效的统一模型。
AI.method: 采用单个神经网络预测多音符状态的softmax输出，通过自回归连接内部学习时序关系，无需额外模块或抽象连接。
AI.result: 在MAESTRO数据集上验证了多种音符状态组合的有效性，模型参数更少但性能与最先进方法相当，并有效学习了状态间依赖关系。
AI.conclusion: 统一架构与自回归机制结合，实现了高效多音钢琴转录，在减少参数量的同时保持竞争力，为未来模型设计提供新思路。

We also show that the autoregressive module effectively learns inter-state dependency of notes. Finally, we show that our proposed model achieves performance comparable to state-of-the-arts with fewer parameters. 复调钢琴转录的最新进展主要是通过神经网络架构的精心设计取得的，该架构可以检测不同的音符状态（例如开始或维持）并对状态的时间演变进行建模。然而，它们中的大多数对每个音符状态使用单独的神经网络，从而优化多个损失函数，并且它们还通过状态神经网络之间的抽象连接或使用后处理模块来处理音符状态的时间演化。在本文中，我们提出了一种统一的神经网络架构，其中多个音符状态被预测为具有单个损失函数的 softmax 输出，并且时间顺序是通过单个神经网络内的自回归连接来学习的。这种紧凑的模型允许增加音符状态，而无需架构复杂性。使用 MAESTRO 数据集，我们检查多个音符状态的各种组合，包括开启、开始、维持、重新开始、偏移和关闭。我们还表明，自回归模块可以有效地学习音符的状态间依赖性。最后，我们表明我们提出的模型以更少的参数实现了与最先进的技术相当的性能。 本文提出了一种统一的神经网络架构，用于多音钢琴转录任务，通过自回归连接学习音符状态间的时序依赖关系。 Taegyun Kwon,Dasaem Jeong,Juhan Nam eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

title: A Weight-scaling Algorithm for $f$-factors of Multigraphs
title_zh: 多重图 $f$ 因子的权重缩放算法
abstract: We discuss combinatorial algorithms for finding a maximum weight $f$-factor on an arbitrary multigraph, for given integral weights of magnitude at most $W$. For simple bipartite graphs the best-known time bound is $O(n^{2/3}\, m\, \log nW)$ (\cite{GT89}; $n$ and $m$ are respectively the number of vertices and edges). A recent algorithm of Duan and He et al. \cite{DHZ} for $f$-factors of simple graphs comes within logarithmic factors of this bound, $\widetilde{O} (n^{2/3}\, m\, \log W)$. The best-known bound for bipartite multigraphs is $O(\sqrt Φ\, m\, \log ΦW)$ ($Φ\le m$ is the size of the $f$-factor, $Φ=\sum_{v\in V}f(v)/2$). This bound is more general than the restriction to simple graphs, and is even superior on "small" simple graphs, i.e., $Φ=o(n^{4/3})$. We present an algorithm that comes within a $\sqrt {\log Φ}$ factor of this bound, i.e., $O(\sqrt {Φ\log Φ}\,m \,\log ΦW)$. The algorithm is a direct generalization of the algorithm of Gabow and Tarjan \cite{GT} for the special case of ordinary matching ($f\equiv 1$). We present our algorithm first for ordinary matching, as the analysis is a simplified version of \cite{GT}. Furthermore the algorithm and analysis both get incorporated without modification into the multigraph algorithm. To extend these ideas to $f$-factors, the first step is "expanding" edges (i.e., replacing an edge by a length 3 alternating path). \cite{DHZ} uses a one-time expansion of the entire graph. Our algorithm keeps the graph small by only expanding selected edges, and "compressing" them back to their original source when no longer needed. Several other ideas are needed, including a relaxation of the notion of "blossom" to e-blossom ("expanded blossom").
summary: We discuss combinatorial algorithms for finding a maximum weight $f$-factor on an arbitrary multigraph, for given integral weights of magnitude at most $W$. For simple bipartite graphs the best-known time bound is $O(n^{2/3}\, m\, \log nW)$ (\cite{GT89}; $n$ and $m$ are respectively the number of vertices and edges). A recent algorithm of Duan and He et al. \cite{DHZ} for $f$-factors of simple graphs comes within logarithmic factors of this bound, $\widetilde{O} (n^{2/3}\, m\, \log W)$. The best-known bound for bipartite multigraphs is $O(\sqrt Φ\, m\, \log ΦW)$ ($Φ\le m$ is the size of the $f$-factor, $Φ=\sum_{v\in V}f(v)/2$). This bound is more general than the restriction to simple graphs, and is even superior on "small" simple graphs, i.e., $Φ=o(n^{4/3})$. We present an algorithm that comes within a $\sqrt {\log Φ}$ factor of this bound, i.e., $O(\sqrt {Φ\log Φ}\,m \,\log ΦW)$. The algorithm is a direct generalization of the algorithm of Gabow and Tarjan \cite{GT} for the special case of ordinary matching ($f\equiv 1$). We present our algorithm first for ordinary matching, as the analysis is a simplified version of \cite{GT}. Furthermore the algorithm and analysis both get incorporated without modification into the multigraph algorithm. To extend these ideas to $f$-factors, the first step is "expanding" edges (i.e., replacing an edge by a length 3 alternating path). \cite{DHZ} uses a one-time expansion of the entire graph. Our algorithm keeps the graph small by only expanding selected edges, and "compressing" them back to their original source when no longer needed. Several other ideas are needed, including a relaxation of the notion of "blossom" to e-blossom ("expanded blossom").
abstract_zh: 我们讨论组合算法，用于在任意多重图上找到最大权重 $f$ 因子，对于给定的整数权重幅度至多为 $W$。对于简单的二分图，最著名的时间界限是 $O(n^{2/3}\, m\, \log nW)$ （\cite{GT89}；$n$ 和 $m$ 分别是顶点和边的数量）。 Duan 和 He 等人的最新算法。 \cite{DHZ} 表示简单图的 $f$ 因子位于此界限的对数因子 $\widetilde{O} (n^{2/3}\, m\, \log W)$ 内。二部多重图最著名的界限是 $O(\sqrt Φ\, m\, \log ΦW)$ （$Φ\le m$ 是 $f$ 因子的大小，$Φ=\sum_{v\in V}f(v)/2$）。这个界限比对简单图的限制更普遍，甚至在“小”简单图上更优越，即 $Φ=o(n^{4/3})$。我们提出了一种算法，该算法处于该边界的 $\sqrt {\log Φ}$ 因子内，即 $O(\sqrt {Φ\log Φ}\,m \,\log ΦW)$。该算法是 Gabow 和 Tarjan \cite{GT} 算法的直接推广，用于普通匹配的特殊情况（$f\equiv 1$）。我们首先介绍我们的算法用于普通匹配，因为分析是 \cite{GT} 的简化版本。此外，算法和分析都无需修改就合并到多图算法中。为了将这些想法扩展到 $f$ 因子，第一步是“扩展”边缘（即用长度为 3 的交替路径替换边缘）。 \cite{DHZ} 使用整个图的一次性扩展。我们的算法通过仅扩展选定的边并在不再需要时将它们“压缩”回原始源来保持图较小。还需要其他一些想法，包括将“开花”的概念放宽为电子开花（“扩展的开花”）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于多重图的带权f-因子的权重缩放算法，旨在改进现有算法的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在处理多重图的f-因子问题时效率不足，尤其在小规模简单图中表现不佳，需设计更高效的算法。
AI.method: 基于Gabow和Tarjan的匹配算法，通过边扩展与压缩技术及e-花（扩展花）概念，直接推广至多重图的f-因子问题。
AI.result: 算法时间复杂度为$O(\\sqrt{Φ\\log Φ}\,m\,\\log ΦW)$，优于现有多重图f-因子算法，尤其在$Φ=o(n^{4/3})$时表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 该算法通过边扩展与压缩技术有效处理多重图，改进了f-因子问题的求解效率，为相关领域提供新思路。
