To extend these ideas to $f$-factors, the first step is "expanding" edges (i.e., replacing an edge by a length 3 alternating path). \cite{DHZ} uses a one-time expansion of the entire graph. Our algorithm keeps the graph small by only expanding selected edges, and "compressing" them back to their original source when no longer needed. Several other ideas are needed, including a relaxation of the notion of "blossom" to e-blossom ("expanded blossom"). 我们讨论组合算法，用于在任意多重图上找到最大权重 $f$ 因子，对于给定的整数权重幅度至多为 $W$。对于简单的二分图，最著名的时间界限是 $O(n^{2/3}\, m\, \log nW)$ （\cite{GT89}；$n$ 和 $m$ 分别是顶点和边的数量）。 Duan 和 He 等人的最新算法。 \cite{DHZ} 表示简单图的 $f$ 因子位于此界限的对数因子 $\widetilde{O} (n^{2/3}\, m\, \log W)$ 内。二部多重图最著名的界限是 $O(\sqrt Φ\, m\, \log ΦW)$ （$Φ\le m$ 是 $f$ 因子的大小，$Φ=\sum_{v\in V}f(v)/2$）。这个界限比对简单图的限制更普遍，甚至在“小”简单图上更优越，即 $Φ=o(n^{4/3})$。我们提出了一种算法，该算法处于该边界的 $\sqrt {\log Φ}$ 因子内，即 $O(\sqrt {Φ\log Φ}\,m \,\log ΦW)$。该算法是 Gabow 和 Tarjan \cite{GT} 算法的直接推广，用于普通匹配的特殊情况（$f\equiv 1$）。我们首先介绍我们的算法用于普通匹配，因为分析是 \cite{GT} 的简化版本。此外，算法和分析都无需修改就合并到多图算法中。为了将这些想法扩展到 $f$ 因子，第一步是“扩展”边缘（即用长度为 3 的交替路径替换边缘）。 \cite{DHZ} 使用整个图的一次性扩展。我们的算法通过仅扩展选定的边并在不再需要时将它们“压缩”回原始源来保持图较小。还需要其他一些想法，包括将“开花”的概念放宽为电子开花（“扩展的开花”）。 本文提出了一种用于多重图的带权f-因子的权重缩放算法，旨在改进现有算法的效率。 Harold Gabow cs.DS

authors_text: Kun Yuan,Quanquan Li,Dapeng Chen,Aojun Zhou,Junjie Yan
title: Dynamic Graph: Learning Instance-aware Connectivity for Neural Networks
title_zh: 动态图：学习神经网络的实例感知连接
comment: 13 pages, 3 figures, 6 tables
comments: 13 pages, 3 figures, 6 tables
abstract: One practice of employing deep neural networks is to apply the same architecture to all the input instances. However, a fixed architecture may not be representative enough for data with high diversity. To promote the model capacity, existing approaches usually employ larger convolutional kernels or deeper network structure, which may increase the computational cost. In this paper, we address this issue by raising the Dynamic Graph Network (DG-Net). The network learns the instance-aware connectivity, which creates different forward paths for different instances. Specifically, the network is initialized as a complete directed acyclic graph, where the nodes represent convolutional blocks and the edges represent the connection paths. We generate edge weights by a learnable module \textit{router} and select the edges whose weights are larger than a threshold, to adjust the connectivity of the neural network structure. Instead of using the same path of the network, DG-Net aggregates features dynamically in each node, which allows the network to have more representation ability. To facilitate the training, we represent the network connectivity of each sample in an adjacency matrix. The matrix is updated to aggregate features in the forward pass, cached in the memory, and used for gradient computing in the backward pass. We verify the effectiveness of our method with several static architectures, including MobileNetV2, ResNet, ResNeXt, and RegNet. Extensive experiments are performed on ImageNet classification and COCO object detection, which shows the effectiveness and generalization ability of our approach.
summary: One practice of employing deep neural networks is to apply the same architecture to all the input instances. However, a fixed architecture may not be representative enough for data with high diversity. To promote the model capacity, existing approaches usually employ larger convolutional kernels or deeper network structure, which may increase the computational cost. In this paper, we address this issue by raising the Dynamic Graph Network (DG-Net). The network learns the instance-aware connectivity, which creates different forward paths for different instances. Specifically, the network is initialized as a complete directed acyclic graph, where the nodes represent convolutional blocks and the edges represent the connection paths. We generate edge weights by a learnable module \textit{router} and select the edges whose weights are larger than a threshold, to adjust the connectivity of the neural network structure. Instead of using the same path of the network, DG-Net aggregates features dynamically in each node, which allows the network to have more representation ability. To facilitate the training, we represent the network connectivity of each sample in an adjacency matrix. The matrix is updated to aggregate features in the forward pass, cached in the memory, and used for gradient computing in the backward pass. We verify the effectiveness of our method with several static architectures, including MobileNetV2, ResNet, ResNeXt, and RegNet. Extensive experiments are performed on ImageNet classification and COCO object detection, which shows the effectiveness and generalization ability of our approach.
abstract_zh: 采用深度神经网络的一种做法是将相同的架构应用于所有输入实例。然而，对于具有高多样性的数据，固定的架构可能不够具有代表性。为了提高模型容量，现有方法通常采用更大的卷积核或更深的网络结构，这可能会增加计算成本。在本文中，我们通过提出动态图网络（DG-Net）来解决这个问题。网络学习实例感知连接，这为不同实例创建不同的转发路径。具体来说，网络被初始化为完整的有向无环图，其中节点表示卷积块，边表示连接路径。我们通过可学习模块 \textit{router} 生成边权重，并选择权重大于阈值的边，以调整神经网络结构的连通性。 DG-Net没有使用网络的相同路径，而是在每个节点中动态聚合特征，这使得网络具有更多的表示能力。为了便于训练，我们用邻接矩阵表示每个样本的网络连接。矩阵被更新以聚合前向传递中的特征，缓存在内存中，并用于后向传递中的梯度计算。我们使用几种静态架构验证了我们方法的有效性，包括 MobileNetV2、ResNet、ResNeXt 和 RegNet。在 ImageNet 分类和 COCO 目标检测上进行了大量的实验，这表明了我们方法的有效性和泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态图网络（DG-Net），通过学习实例感知的连接性，为不同输入实例创建不同的前向路径，以提升神经网络的表示能力。
AI.motivation: 传统深度神经网络对所有输入实例使用固定架构，难以适应高多样性数据，且增大卷积核或加深网络结构会增加计算成本。
AI.method: 初始化为完全有向无环图，节点代表卷积块，边代表连接路径。通过可学习的路由模块生成边权重，筛选高于阈值的边调整连接性，并动态聚合节点特征。使用邻接矩阵表示样本连接结构，前向传播时更新矩阵并缓存用于反向传播。
AI.result: 在ImageNet分类和COCO目标检测任务中，使用MobileNetV2、ResNet等静态架构验证了方法有效性，展示了良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: DG-Net通过实例感知的动态连接性学习，在不增加计算成本的前提下提升了模型容量和泛化能力。

title: Efficient Colon Cancer Grading with Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 利用图神经网络进行有效的结肠癌分级
comment: 10 pages, draft version
comments: 10 pages, draft version
abstract: Dealing with the application of grading colorectal cancer images, this work proposes a 3 step pipeline for prediction of cancer levels from a histopathology image. The overall model performs better compared to other state of the art methods on the colorectal cancer grading data set and shows excellent performance for the extended colorectal cancer grading set. The performance improvements can be attributed to two main factors: The feature selection and graph augmentation method described here are spatially aware, but overall pixel position independent. Further, the graph size in terms of nodes becomes stable with respect to the model's prediction and accuracy for sufficiently large models. The graph neural network itself consists of three convolutional blocks and linear layers, which is a rather simple design compared to other networks for this application.
summary: Dealing with the application of grading colorectal cancer images, this work proposes a 3 step pipeline for prediction of cancer levels from a histopathology image. The overall model performs better compared to other state of the art methods on the colorectal cancer grading data set and shows excellent performance for the extended colorectal cancer grading set. The performance improvements can be attributed to two main factors: The feature selection and graph augmentation method described here are spatially aware, but overall pixel position independent. Further, the graph size in terms of nodes becomes stable with respect to the model's prediction and accuracy for sufficiently large models. The graph neural network itself consists of three convolutional blocks and linear layers, which is a rather simple design compared to other networks for this application.
abstract_zh: 针对结直肠癌图像分级的应用，这项工作提出了一个三步流程，用于根据组织病理学图像预测癌症水平。与其他最先进的方法相比，整体模型在结直肠癌分级数据集上表现更好，并且在扩展结直肠癌分级集上表现出优异的性能。性能改进可归因于两个主要因素：这里描述的特征选择和图形增强方法是空间感知的，但与整体像素位置无关。此外，对于足够大的模型，就模型的预测和准确性而言，以节点表示的图大小变得稳定。图神经网络本身由三个卷积块和线性层组成，与此应用的其他网络相比，这是一个相当简单的设计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图神经网络的三步流程，用于高效预测结直肠癌组织病理学图像的癌症分级。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理癌症图像分级时存在空间特征提取效率低、模型复杂度高的问题，需开发更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计包含三个卷积块和线性层的图神经网络，结合空间感知的特征选择与图增强方法，通过稳定图节点数量提升预测性能。
AI.result: 在结直肠癌分级数据集及扩展数据集上均优于现有方法，模型复杂度较低但准确率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 图神经网络通过空间感知的特征处理和稳定图结构设计，实现了结直肠癌分级任务的高效准确预测。

authors_text: Hanchen Wang,Qi Liu,Xiangyu Yue,Joan Lasenby,Matthew J. Kusner
title: Unsupervised Point Cloud Pre-Training via Occlusion Completion
title_zh: 通过遮挡完成进行无监督点云预训练
comment: sync with ICCV camera ready
comments: sync with ICCV camera ready
abstract: We describe a simple pre-training approach for point clouds. It works in three steps: 1. Mask all points occluded in a camera view; 2. Learn an encoder-decoder model to reconstruct the occluded points; 3. Use the encoder weights as initialisation for downstream point cloud tasks. We find that even when we construct a single pre-training dataset (from ModelNet40), this pre-training method improves accuracy across different datasets and encoders, on a wide range of downstream tasks. Specifically, we show that our method outperforms previous pre-training methods in object classification, and both part-based and semantic segmentation tasks. We study the pre-trained features and find that they lead to wide downstream minima, have high transformation invariance, and have activations that are highly correlated with part labels. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/hansen7/OcCo
summary: We describe a simple pre-training approach for point clouds. It works in three steps: 1. Mask all points occluded in a camera view; 2. Learn an encoder-decoder model to reconstruct the occluded points; 3. Use the encoder weights as initialisation for downstream point cloud tasks. We find that even when we construct a single pre-training dataset (from ModelNet40), this pre-training method improves accuracy across different datasets and encoders, on a wide range of downstream tasks. Specifically, we show that our method outperforms previous pre-training methods in object classification, and both part-based and semantic segmentation tasks. We study the pre-trained features and find that they lead to wide downstream minima, have high transformation invariance, and have activations that are highly correlated with part labels. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/hansen7/OcCo
abstract_zh: 我们描述了一种简单的点云预训练方法。它分三个步骤进行： 1. 遮盖摄像机视图中所有被遮挡的点； 2. 学习编码器-解码器模型来重建被遮挡的点； 3. 使用编码器权重作为下游点云任务的初始化。我们发现，即使我们构建单个预训练数据集（来自 ModelNet40），这种预训练方法也可以提高不同数据集和编码器在各种下游任务上的准确性。具体来说，我们表明我们的方法在对象分类以及基于部分和语义分割任务方面优于以前的预训练方法。我们研究了预训练的特征，发现它们导致广泛的下游最小值，具有高变换不变性，并且具有与部分标签高度相关的激活。代码和数据可访问：https://github.com/hansen7/OcCo

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督点云预训练方法，通过遮挡补全任务提升下游点云任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有点云预训练方法依赖标注数据且泛化能力有限，需探索更有效的无监督预训练策略以提升模型在不同任务中的表现。
AI.method: 通过三步实现预训练：1）遮挡视角下掩码点云；2）训练编码器-解码器重建被遮挡点；3）将编码器权重用于下游任务初始化。
AI.result: 在ModelNet40构建的预训练数据集上，方法在分类、部件分割和语义分割任务中均优于现有方法，且预训练特征具有高变换不变性和与部件标签强关联的激活特性。
AI.conclusion: 该预训练方法能有效提升点云任务性能，生成的特征具有广泛适用性和鲁棒性，代码与数据已开源。

search_text: Unsupervised Point Cloud Pre-Training via Occlusion Completion 通过遮挡完成进行无监督点云预训练 We describe a simple pre-training approach for point clouds. It works in three steps: 1. Mask all points occluded in a camera view; 2. Learn an encoder-decoder model to reconstruct the occluded points; 3. Use the encoder weights as initialisation for downstream point cloud tasks. We find that even when we construct a single pre-training dataset (from ModelNet40), this pre-training method improves accuracy across different datasets and encoders, on a wide range of downstream tasks. Specifically, we show that our method outperforms previous pre-training methods in object classification, and both part-based and semantic segmentation tasks. We study the pre-trained features and find that they lead to wide downstream minima, have high transformation invariance, and have activations that are highly correlated with part labels. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/hansen7/OcCo 我们描述了一种简单的点云预训练方法。它分三个步骤进行： 1. 遮盖摄像机视图中所有被遮挡的点； 2. 学习编码器-解码器模型来重建被遮挡的点； 3. 使用编码器权重作为下游点云任务的初始化。我们发现，即使我们构建单个预训练数据集（来自 ModelNet40），这种预训练方法也可以提高不同数据集和编码器在各种下游任务上的准确性。具体来说，我们表明我们的方法在对象分类以及基于部分和语义分割任务方面优于以前的预训练方法。我们研究了预训练的特征，发现它们导致广泛的下游最小值，具有高变换不变性，并且具有与部分标签高度相关的激活。代码和数据可访问：https://github.com/hansen7/OcCo 本文提出一种无监督点云预训练方法，通过遮挡补全任务提升下游点云任务的性能。 Hanchen Wang,Qi Liu,Xiangyu Yue,Joan Lasenby,Matthew J. Kusner cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Giuseppe Cota,Riccardo Zese,Elena Bellodi,Evelina Lamma,Fabrizio Riguzzi
title: A Framework for Reasoning on Probabilistic Description Logics
title_zh: 概率描述逻辑推理框架
abstract: While there exist several reasoners for Description Logics, very few of them can cope with uncertainty. BUNDLE is an inference framework that can exploit several OWL (non-probabilistic) reasoners to perform inference over Probabilistic Description Logics. In this chapter, we report the latest advances implemented in BUNDLE. In particular, BUNDLE can now interface with the reasoners of the TRILL system, thus providing a uniform method to execute probabilistic queries using different settings. BUNDLE can be easily extended and can be used either as a standalone desktop application or as a library in OWL API-based applications that need to reason over Probabilistic Description Logics. The reasoning performance heavily depends on the reasoner and method used to compute the probability. We provide a comparison of the different reasoning settings on several datasets.
summary: While there exist several reasoners for Description Logics, very few of them can cope with uncertainty. BUNDLE is an inference framework that can exploit several OWL (non-probabilistic) reasoners to perform inference over Probabilistic Description Logics. In this chapter, we report the latest advances implemented in BUNDLE. In particular, BUNDLE can now interface with the reasoners of the TRILL system, thus providing a uniform method to execute probabilistic queries using different settings. BUNDLE can be easily extended and can be used either as a standalone desktop application or as a library in OWL API-based applications that need to reason over Probabilistic Description Logics. The reasoning performance heavily depends on the reasoner and method used to compute the probability. We provide a comparison of the different reasoning settings on several datasets.
abstract_zh: 虽然描述逻辑存在多种推理器，但很少有推理器能够应对不确定性。 BUNDLE 是一个推理框架，可以利用多个 OWL（非概率）推理器对概率描述逻辑进行推理。在本章中，我们报告了 BUNDLE 中实现的最新进展。特别是，BUNDLE 现在可以与 TRILL 系统的推理器交互，从而提供使用不同设置执行概率查询的统一方法。 BUNDLE 可以轻松扩展，可以用作独立的桌面应用程序，也可以用作需要通过概率描述逻辑进行推理的基于 OWL API 的应用程序中的库。推理性能在很大程度上取决于用于计算概率的推理器和方法。我们提供了几个数据集上不同推理设置的比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BUNDLE框架，通过整合多个OWL推理器实现概率描述逻辑的推理，并支持TRILL系统以统一处理概率查询。
AI.motivation: 现有描述逻辑推理器难以处理不确定性，需开发支持概率推理的框架以应对实际应用中的不确定性问题。
AI.method: BUNDLE框架利用现有OWL推理器（如TRILL）进行概率计算，支持作为独立应用或库使用，并通过不同设置比较推理性能。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上验证了BUNDLE的可行性，展示了不同推理方法在概率查询处理中的性能差异。
AI.conclusion: BUNDLE为概率描述逻辑推理提供了统一框架，可通过扩展支持更多推理器，但性能依赖于具体推理方法的选择。

authors_text: Marius Leordeanu,Mihai Pirvu,Dragos Costea,Alina Marcu,Emil Slusanschi,Rahul Sukthankar
title: Semi-Supervised Learning for Multi-Task Scene Understanding by Neural Graph Consensus
title_zh: 通过神经图共识进行多任务场景理解的半监督学习
comment: Accepted at the 35th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI 2021)
comments: Accepted at the 35th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI 2021)
abstract: We address the challenging problem of semi-supervised learning in the context of multiple visual interpretations of the world by finding consensus in a graph of neural networks. Each graph node is a scene interpretation layer, while each edge is a deep net that transforms one layer at one node into another from a different node. During the supervised phase edge networks are trained independently. During the next unsupervised stage edge nets are trained on the pseudo-ground truth provided by consensus among multiple paths that reach the nets' start and end nodes. These paths act as ensemble teachers for any given edge and strong consensus is used for high-confidence supervisory signal. The unsupervised learning process is repeated over several generations, in which each edge becomes a "student" and also part of different ensemble "teachers" for training other students. By optimizing such consensus between different paths, the graph reaches consistency and robustness over multiple interpretations and generations, in the face of unknown labels. We give theoretical justifications of the proposed idea and validate it on a large dataset. We show how prediction of different representations such as depth, semantic segmentation, surface normals and pose from RGB input could be effectively learned through self-supervised consensus in our graph. We also compare to state-of-the-art methods for multi-task and semi-supervised learning and show superior performance.
summary: We address the challenging problem of semi-supervised learning in the context of multiple visual interpretations of the world by finding consensus in a graph of neural networks. Each graph node is a scene interpretation layer, while each edge is a deep net that transforms one layer at one node into another from a different node. During the supervised phase edge networks are trained independently. During the next unsupervised stage edge nets are trained on the pseudo-ground truth provided by consensus among multiple paths that reach the nets' start and end nodes. These paths act as ensemble teachers for any given edge and strong consensus is used for high-confidence supervisory signal. The unsupervised learning process is repeated over several generations, in which each edge becomes a "student" and also part of different ensemble "teachers" for training other students. By optimizing such consensus between different paths, the graph reaches consistency and robustness over multiple interpretations and generations, in the face of unknown labels. We give theoretical justifications of the proposed idea and validate it on a large dataset. We show how prediction of different representations such as depth, semantic segmentation, surface normals and pose from RGB input could be effectively learned through self-supervised consensus in our graph. We also compare to state-of-the-art methods for multi-task and semi-supervised learning and show superior performance.
abstract_zh: 我们通过在神经网络图中找到共识来解决在世界的多种视觉解释的背景下半监督学习的挑战性问题。每个图节点都是一个场景解释层，而每条边都是一个深层网络，将一个节点的一层转换为另一节点的另一层。在监督阶段，边缘网络是独立训练的。在下一个无监督阶段，边缘网络根据到达网络起始节点和结束节点的多条路径之间的共识提供的伪地面事实进行训练。这些路径充当任何给定边缘的整体教师，并且强烈的共识用于高置信度的监督信号。无监督学习过程会重复几代，其中每个边缘都成为“学生”，同时也是不同集合“教师”的一部分，用于培训其他学生。通过优化不同路径之间的这种共识，面对未知的标签，图可以在多种解释和生成中达到一致性和鲁棒性。我们给出了所提出想法的理论依据，并在大型数据集上进行了验证。我们展示了如何通过图中的自监督共识来有效地学习不同表示的预测，例如深度、语义分割、表面法线和来自 RGB 输入的姿势。我们还与多任务和半监督学习的最先进方法进行比较，并显示出卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经图共识的半监督学习方法，用于多任务场景理解，通过图中不同路径的共识减少对标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 多任务场景理解需要大量标注数据，但获取困难。现有方法难以有效利用任务间关联性，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 构建神经网络图，节点为不同任务的场景解释层，边为跨节点的转换网络。监督阶段独立训练边网络，非监督阶段通过多路径共识生成伪标签迭代优化，使各边网络互为师生进行联合训练。
AI.result: 在大型数据集上验证了方法有效性，能够同时学习深度、语义分割等多任务表征，性能优于现有最先进的多任务和半监督学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 神经图共识机制通过跨任务路径的自监督协同，显著提升了半监督场景理解的鲁棒性和一致性，为多任务学习提供了新思路。

method: 构建神经网络图，节点为不同任务的场景解释层，边为跨节点的转换网络。监督阶段独立训练边网络，非监督阶段通过多路径共识生成伪标签迭代优化，使各边网络互为师生进行联合训练。
result: 在大型数据集上验证了方法有效性，能够同时学习深度、语义分割等多任务表征，性能优于现有最先进的多任务和半监督学习方法。
conclusion: 神经图共识机制通过跨任务路径的自监督协同，显著提升了半监督场景理解的鲁棒性和一致性，为多任务学习提供了新思路。
search_text: Semi-Supervised Learning for Multi-Task Scene Understanding by Neural Graph Consensus 通过神经图共识进行多任务场景理解的半监督学习 We address the challenging problem of semi-supervised learning in the context of multiple visual interpretations of the world by finding consensus in a graph of neural networks. Each graph node is a scene interpretation layer, while each edge is a deep net that transforms one layer at one node into another from a different node. During the supervised phase edge networks are trained independently. During the next unsupervised stage edge nets are trained on the pseudo-ground truth provided by consensus among multiple paths that reach the nets' start and end nodes. These paths act as ensemble teachers for any given edge and strong consensus is used for high-confidence supervisory signal. The unsupervised learning process is repeated over several generations, in which each edge becomes a "student" and also part of different ensemble "teachers" for training other students. By optimizing such consensus between different paths, the graph reaches consistency and robustness over multiple interpretations and generations, in the face of unknown labels. We give theoretical justifications of the proposed idea and validate it on a large dataset. We show how prediction of different representations such as depth, semantic segmentation, surface normals and pose from RGB input could be effectively learned through self-supervised consensus in our graph. We also compare to state-of-the-art methods for multi-task and semi-supervised learning and show superior performance. 我们通过在神经网络图中找到共识来解决在世界的多种视觉解释的背景下半监督学习的挑战性问题。每个图节点都是一个场景解释层，而每条边都是一个深层网络，将一个节点的一层转换为另一节点的另一层。在监督阶段，边缘网络是独立训练的。在下一个无监督阶段，边缘网络根据到达网络起始节点和结束节点的多条路径之间的共识提供的伪地面事实进行训练。这些路径充当任何给定边缘的整体教师，并且强烈的共识用于高置信度的监督信号。无监督学习过程会重复几代，其中每个边缘都成为“学生”，同时也是不同集合“教师”的一部分，用于培训其他学生。通过优化不同路径之间的这种共识，面对未知的标签，图可以在多种解释和生成中达到一致性和鲁棒性。我们给出了所提出想法的理论依据，并在大型数据集上进行了验证。我们展示了如何通过图中的自监督共识来有效地学习不同表示的预测，例如深度、语义分割、表面法线和来自 RGB 输入的姿势。我们还与多任务和半监督学习的最先进方法进行比较，并显示出卓越的性能。 本文提出一种基于神经图共识的半监督学习方法，用于多任务场景理解，通过图中不同路径的共识减少对标注数据的依赖。 Marius Leordeanu,Mihai Pirvu,Dragos Costea,Alina Marcu,Emil Slusanschi,Rahul Sukthankar cs.CV

authors_text: Caelan Reed Garrett,Rohan Chitnis,Rachel Holladay,Beomjoon Kim,Tom Silver,Leslie Pack Kaelbling,Tomás Lozano-Pérez
title: Integrated Task and Motion Planning
title_zh: 集成任务和运动规划
comment: Accepted to the Annual Review of Control, Robotics, and Autonomous Systems. Vol. 4 (Volume publication date May 2021)
comments: Accepted to the Annual Review of Control, Robotics, and Autonomous Systems. Vol. 4 (Volume publication date May 2021)
abstract: The problem of planning for a robot that operates in environments containing a large number of objects, taking actions to move itself through the world as well as to change the state of the objects, is known as task and motion planning (TAMP). TAMP problems contain elements of discrete task planning, discrete-continuous mathematical programming, and continuous motion planning, and thus cannot be effectively addressed by any of these fields directly. In this paper, we define a class of TAMP problems and survey algorithms for solving them, characterizing the solution methods in terms of their strategies for solving the continuous-space subproblems and their techniques for integrating the discrete and continuous components of the search.
summary: The problem of planning for a robot that operates in environments containing a large number of objects, taking actions to move itself through the world as well as to change the state of the objects, is known as task and motion planning (TAMP). TAMP problems contain elements of discrete task planning, discrete-continuous mathematical programming, and continuous motion planning, and thus cannot be effectively addressed by any of these fields directly. In this paper, we define a class of TAMP problems and survey algorithms for solving them, characterizing the solution methods in terms of their strategies for solving the continuous-space subproblems and their techniques for integrating the discrete and continuous components of the search.
abstract_zh: 机器人在包含大量物体的环境中运行，采取行动在世界中移动并改变物体的状态，其规划问题被称为任务和运动规划（TAMP）。 TAMP 问题包含离散任务规划、离散连续数学规划和连续运动规划的元素，因此不能直接通过这些领域中的任何一个来有效解决。在本文中，我们定义了一类 TAMP 问题和解决它们的调查算法，根据解决连续空间子问题的策略以及集成搜索的离散和连续组件的技术来描述解决方法。

AI.tldr: 本文主要定义了一类任务与运动规划（TAMP）问题，并综述了解决该问题的算法，重点分析了解决连续空间子问题的策略及离散与连续成分的集成技术。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效解决同时包含离散任务规划和连续运动规划的复杂机器人操作问题，需整合多种技术进行处理。
AI.method: 通过定义TAMP问题类别，综述现有算法，并按解决连续空间子问题的策略及离散-连续集成技术进行分类分析。
AI.result: 系统梳理了TAMP问题的解决算法，明确了不同方法在处理连续空间和离散-连续集成方面的策略差异。
AI.conclusion: 现有方法在处理复杂环境和大规模对象时仍面临挑战，未来需进一步提升算法效率和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Kurt Shuster,Eric Michael Smith,Da Ju,Jason Weston
title: Multi-Modal Open-Domain Dialogue
title_zh: 多模态开放域对话
abstract: Recent work in open-domain conversational agents has demonstrated that significant improvements in model engagingness and humanness metrics can be achieved via massive scaling in both pre-training data and model size (Adiwardana et al., 2020; Roller et al., 2020). However, if we want to build agents with human-like abilities, we must expand beyond handling just text. A particularly important topic is the ability to see images and communicate about what is perceived. With the goal of engaging humans in multi-modal dialogue, we investigate combining components from state-of-the-art open-domain dialogue agents with those from state-of-the-art vision models. We study incorporating different image fusion schemes and domain-adaptive pre-training and fine-tuning strategies, and show that our best resulting model outperforms strong existing models in multi-modal dialogue while simultaneously performing as well as its predecessor (text-only) BlenderBot (Roller et al., 2020) in text-based conversation. We additionally investigate and incorporate safety components in our final model, and show that such efforts do not diminish model performance with respect to engagingness metrics.
summary: Recent work in open-domain conversational agents has demonstrated that significant improvements in model engagingness and humanness metrics can be achieved via massive scaling in both pre-training data and model size (Adiwardana et al., 2020; Roller et al., 2020). However, if we want to build agents with human-like abilities, we must expand beyond handling just text. A particularly important topic is the ability to see images and communicate about what is perceived. With the goal of engaging humans in multi-modal dialogue, we investigate combining components from state-of-the-art open-domain dialogue agents with those from state-of-the-art vision models. We study incorporating different image fusion schemes and domain-adaptive pre-training and fine-tuning strategies, and show that our best resulting model outperforms strong existing models in multi-modal dialogue while simultaneously performing as well as its predecessor (text-only) BlenderBot (Roller et al., 2020) in text-based conversation. We additionally investigate and incorporate safety components in our final model, and show that such efforts do not diminish model performance with respect to engagingness metrics.
abstract_zh: 开放域对话代理的最新工作表明，可以通过预训练数据和模型大小的大规模扩展来实现模型参与度和人性化指标的显着改进（Adiwardana 等人，2020；Roller 等人，2020）。然而，如果我们想构建具有类人能力的智能体，我们必须扩展到处理文本之外的领域。一个特别重要的主题是查看图像并交流所感知内容的能力。为了让人类参与多模式对话，我们研究将最先进的开放域对话代理的组件与最先进的视觉模型的组件相结合。我们研究结合不同的图像融合方案和领域自适应预训练和微调策略，并表明我们的最佳模型在多模态对话中优于现有的强大模型，同时在基于文本的对话中表现与其前身（纯文本）BlenderBot (Roller et al., 2020) 一样。我们还研究了安全组件并将其纳入最终模型中，并表明这些努力不会降低模型在参与度指标方面的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发能够处理多模态对话（文本和图像）的开放域对话代理，通过结合最先进的对话模型和视觉模型实现更自然的人机交互。
AI.motivation: 尽管大规模预训练数据和模型尺寸提升了对话代理的拟人性，但仅处理文本仍无法满足人类-like能力的需求。为实现更真实的交互，需扩展至图像感知与多模态对话能力。
AI.method: 整合开放域对话代理与视觉模型组件，研究不同图像融合方案及领域自适应预训练与微调策略，并在最终模型中纳入安全机制。
AI.result: 最佳模型在多模态对话中超越现有模型，同时保持与原始文本-only模型（BlenderBot）相当的文本对话表现；安全组件未影响对话参与度指标。
AI.conclusion: 多模态对话代理可通过融合视觉与文本模态实现性能提升，且安全机制可与高对话质量共存，为未来人机交互提供可行方向。

authors_text: Hengyuan Zhao,Xiangtao Kong,Jingwen He,Yu Qiao,Chao Dong
title: Efficient Image Super-Resolution Using Pixel Attention
title_zh: 使用像素注意力的高效图像超分辨率
comment: 17 pages, 5 figures, conference, accpeted by ECCVW (AIM2020 ESR Challenge)
comments: 17 pages, 5 figures, conference, accpeted by ECCVW (AIM2020 ESR Challenge)
abstract: This work aims at designing a lightweight convolutional neural network for image super resolution (SR). With simplicity bare in mind, we construct a pretty concise and effective network with a newly proposed pixel attention scheme. Pixel attention (PA) is similar as channel attention and spatial attention in formulation. The difference is that PA produces 3D attention maps instead of a 1D attention vector or a 2D map. This attention scheme introduces fewer additional parameters but generates better SR results. On the basis of PA, we propose two building blocks for the main branch and the reconstruction branch, respectively. The first one - SC-PA block has the same structure as the Self-Calibrated convolution but with our PA layer. This block is much more efficient than conventional residual/dense blocks, for its twobranch architecture and attention scheme. While the second one - UPA block combines the nearest-neighbor upsampling, convolution and PA layers. It improves the final reconstruction quality with little parameter cost. Our final model- PAN could achieve similar performance as the lightweight networks - SRResNet and CARN, but with only 272K parameters (17.92% of SRResNet and 17.09% of CARN). The effectiveness of each proposed component is also validated by ablation study. The code is available at https://github.com/zhaohengyuan1/PAN.
summary: This work aims at designing a lightweight convolutional neural network for image super resolution (SR). With simplicity bare in mind, we construct a pretty concise and effective network with a newly proposed pixel attention scheme. Pixel attention (PA) is similar as channel attention and spatial attention in formulation. The difference is that PA produces 3D attention maps instead of a 1D attention vector or a 2D map. This attention scheme introduces fewer additional parameters but generates better SR results. On the basis of PA, we propose two building blocks for the main branch and the reconstruction branch, respectively. The first one - SC-PA block has the same structure as the Self-Calibrated convolution but with our PA layer. This block is much more efficient than conventional residual/dense blocks, for its twobranch architecture and attention scheme. While the second one - UPA block combines the nearest-neighbor upsampling, convolution and PA layers. It improves the final reconstruction quality with little parameter cost. Our final model- PAN could achieve similar performance as the lightweight networks - SRResNet and CARN, but with only 272K parameters (17.92% of SRResNet and 17.09% of CARN). The effectiveness of each proposed component is also validated by ablation study. The code is available at https://github.com/zhaohengyuan1/PAN.
abstract_zh: 这项工作旨在设计一种用于图像超分辨率（SR）的轻量级卷积神经网络。考虑到简单性，我们使用新提出的像素注意方案构建了一个非常简洁有效的网络。像素注意力（PA）在表述上与通道注意力和空间注意力类似。不同之处在于 PA 生成 3D 注意力图，而不是 1D 注意力向量或 2D 地图。这种注意力机制引入了更少的额外参数，但产生了更好的 SR 结果。在PA的基础上，我们分别提出了主分支和重建分支的两个构建块。第一个 - SC-PA 块具有与自校准卷积相同的结构，但具有我们的 PA 层。由于其双分支架构和注意力机制，该块比传统的残差/密集块更有效。第二个 - UPA 块结合了最近邻上采样、卷积和 PA 层。它以很少的参数成本提高了最终的重建质量。我们的最终模型 - PAN 可以实现与轻量级网络 - SRResNet 和 CARN 类似的性能，但只有 272K 个参数（SRResNet 的 17.92% 和 CARN 的 17.09%）。每个提议组件的有效性也通过消融研究得到验证。代码可在 https://github.com/zhaohengyuan1/PAN 获取。

AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率模型参数量大且复杂度高，需设计更简洁有效的轻量级网络以提升计算效率。
AI.method: 提出像素注意力（PA）方案生成3D注意力图，并设计SC-PA块（结合自校准卷积）和UPA块（融合上采样与PA层）作为网络核心模块。
AI.result: 最终模型PAN参数量仅272K（为SRResNet的17.92%、CARN的17.09%），性能与主流轻量级模型相当，消融实验验证了各组件有效性。
AI.conclusion: 像素注意力机制与双分支结构设计有效平衡了模型复杂度与重建质量，为轻量级超分辨率提供新思路。

search_text: Efficient Image Super-Resolution Using Pixel Attention 使用像素注意力的高效图像超分辨率 This work aims at designing a lightweight convolutional neural network for image super resolution (SR). With simplicity bare in mind, we construct a pretty concise and effective network with a newly proposed pixel attention scheme. Pixel attention (PA) is similar as channel attention and spatial attention in formulation. The difference is that PA produces 3D attention maps instead of a 1D attention vector or a 2D map. This attention scheme introduces fewer additional parameters but generates better SR results. On the basis of PA, we propose two building blocks for the main branch and the reconstruction branch, respectively. The first one - SC-PA block has the same structure as the Self-Calibrated convolution but with our PA layer. This block is much more efficient than conventional residual/dense blocks, for its twobranch architecture and attention scheme. While the second one - UPA block combines the nearest-neighbor upsampling, convolution and PA layers. It improves the final reconstruction quality with little parameter cost. Our final model- PAN could achieve similar performance as the lightweight networks - SRResNet and CARN, but with only 272K parameters (17.92% of SRResNet and 17.09% of CARN). The effectiveness of each proposed component is also validated by ablation study. The code is available at https://github.com/zhaohengyuan1/PAN. 这项工作旨在设计一种用于图像超分辨率（SR）的轻量级卷积神经网络。考虑到简单性，我们使用新提出的像素注意方案构建了一个非常简洁有效的网络。像素注意力（PA）在表述上与通道注意力和空间注意力类似。不同之处在于 PA 生成 3D 注意力图，而不是 1D 注意力向量或 2D 地图。这种注意力机制引入了更少的额外参数，但产生了更好的 SR 结果。在PA的基础上，我们分别提出了主分支和重建分支的两个构建块。第一个 - SC-PA 块具有与自校准卷积相同的结构，但具有我们的 PA 层。由于其双分支架构和注意力机制，该块比传统的残差/密集块更有效。第二个 - UPA 块结合了最近邻上采样、卷积和 PA 层。它以很少的参数成本提高了最终的重建质量。我们的最终模型 - PAN 可以实现与轻量级网络 - SRResNet 和 CARN 类似的性能，但只有 272K 个参数（SRResNet 的 17.92% 和 CARN 的 17.09%）。每个提议组件的有效性也通过消融研究得到验证。代码可在 https://github.com/zhaohengyuan1/PAN 获取。 本文提出一种轻量级卷积神经网络，通过像素注意力机制实现高效图像超分辨率。 Hengyuan Zhao,Xiangtao Kong,Jingwen He,Yu Qiao,Chao Dong eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Shangtong Zhang,Romain Laroche,Harm van Seijen,Shimon Whiteson,Remi Tachet des Combes
title: A Deeper Look at Discounting Mismatch in Actor-Critic Algorithms
title_zh: 深入研究 Actor-Critic 算法中的贴现不匹配
comment: AAMAS 2022
comments: AAMAS 2022
abstract: We investigate the discounting mismatch in actor-critic algorithm implementations from a representation learning perspective. Theoretically, actor-critic algorithms usually have discounting for both actor and critic, i.e., there is a $γ^t$ term in the actor update for the transition observed at time $t$ in a trajectory and the critic is a discounted value function. Practitioners, however, usually ignore the discounting ($γ^t$) for the actor while using a discounted critic. We investigate this mismatch in two scenarios. In the first scenario, we consider optimizing an undiscounted objective $(γ= 1)$ where $γ^t$ disappears naturally $(1^t = 1)$. We then propose to interpret the discounting in critic in terms of a bias-variance-representation trade-off and provide supporting empirical results. In the second scenario, we consider optimizing a discounted objective ($γ< 1$) and propose to interpret the omission of the discounting in the actor update from an auxiliary task perspective and provide supporting empirical results.
summary: We investigate the discounting mismatch in actor-critic algorithm implementations from a representation learning perspective. Theoretically, actor-critic algorithms usually have discounting for both actor and critic, i.e., there is a $γ^t$ term in the actor update for the transition observed at time $t$ in a trajectory and the critic is a discounted value function. Practitioners, however, usually ignore the discounting ($γ^t$) for the actor while using a discounted critic. We investigate this mismatch in two scenarios. In the first scenario, we consider optimizing an undiscounted objective $(γ= 1)$ where $γ^t$ disappears naturally $(1^t = 1)$. We then propose to interpret the discounting in critic in terms of a bias-variance-representation trade-off and provide supporting empirical results. In the second scenario, we consider optimizing a discounted objective ($γ< 1$) and propose to interpret the omission of the discounting in the actor update from an auxiliary task perspective and provide supporting empirical results.
abstract_zh: 我们从表示学习的角度研究了演员批评家算法实现中的折扣不匹配。理论上，actor-critic算法通常对actor和critic都有折扣，即，对于在轨迹中$t$时刻观察到的转变，actor更新中有一个$γ^t$项，而critic是一个折扣值函数。然而，从业者在使用折扣批评家时通常会忽略演员的折扣（$γ^t$）。我们在两种情况下调查这种不匹配。在第一种情况下，我们考虑优化未贴现的目标 $(γ= 1)$，其中 $γ^t$ 自然消失 $(1^t = 1)$。然后，我们建议根据偏差-方差-表示权衡来解释批评家的贴现，并提供支持性的实证结果。在第二种情况下，我们考虑优化折扣目标（$γ< 1$），并建议从辅助任务的角度解释参与者更新中折扣的遗漏，并提供支持性的实证结果。

AI.tldr: 本文从表征学习角度分析了Actor-Critic算法中折扣因子不匹配现象，探讨其理论影响并提出两种场景下的解释框架。
AI.motivation: 实践中常忽略Actor的折扣因子而仅对Critic使用折扣，导致算法表现差异，但现有理论未充分解释这一现象的内在机制。
AI.method: 通过两个场景分析：1) 在γ=1时自然消除折扣因子，从偏差-方差-表征权衡角度解释Critic折扣；2) 在γ<1时从辅助任务视角解释Actor忽略折扣的现象，并辅以实验验证。
AI.result: 实验结果支持了两种解释框架的有效性，表明折扣因子处理方式直接影响算法收敛性和表征质量。
AI.conclusion: 折扣因子不匹配本质是表征学习中的权衡问题，合理处理折扣因子可提升Actor-Critic算法性能，为算法改进提供理论指导。

authors_text: Luisa Zintgraf,Leo Feng,Cong Lu,Maximilian Igl,Kristian Hartikainen,Katja Hofmann,Shimon Whiteson
title: Exploration in Approximate Hyper-State Space for Meta Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 元强化学习的近似超状态空间探索
comment: Published at the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2021
comments: Published at the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2021
abstract: To rapidly learn a new task, it is often essential for agents to explore efficiently -- especially when performance matters from the first timestep. One way to learn such behaviour is via meta-learning. Many existing methods however rely on dense rewards for meta-training, and can fail catastrophically if the rewards are sparse. Without a suitable reward signal, the need for exploration during meta-training is exacerbated. To address this, we propose HyperX, which uses novel reward bonuses for meta-training to explore in approximate hyper-state space (where hyper-states represent the environment state and the agent's task belief). We show empirically that HyperX meta-learns better task-exploration and adapts more successfully to new tasks than existing methods.
summary: To rapidly learn a new task, it is often essential for agents to explore efficiently -- especially when performance matters from the first timestep. One way to learn such behaviour is via meta-learning. Many existing methods however rely on dense rewards for meta-training, and can fail catastrophically if the rewards are sparse. Without a suitable reward signal, the need for exploration during meta-training is exacerbated. To address this, we propose HyperX, which uses novel reward bonuses for meta-training to explore in approximate hyper-state space (where hyper-states represent the environment state and the agent's task belief). We show empirically that HyperX meta-learns better task-exploration and adapts more successfully to new tasks than existing methods.
abstract_zh: 为了快速学习一项新任务，智能体通常必须有效地探索——尤其是当性能从第一个步骤开始就很重要时。学习这种行为的一种方法是通过元学习。然而，许多现有方法依赖于密集的奖励进行元训练，如果奖励稀疏，可能会发生灾难性的失败。如果没有合适的奖励信号，元训练期间的探索需求就会加剧。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 HyperX，它使用新颖的奖励奖金进行元训练，以在近似超状态空间中进行探索（其中超状态代表环境状态和代理的任务信念）。我们凭经验证明，与现有方法相比，HyperX 元学习可以更好地进行任务探索，并且可以更成功地适应新任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyperX方法，通过在近似超状态空间中引入新型奖励机制，解决元强化学习在稀疏奖励环境下的探索效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有元学习方法依赖密集奖励信号进行训练，当面对稀疏奖励时探索效率低下，导致任务适应能力不足。
AI.method: 设计HyperX算法，在超状态空间（包含环境状态与任务信念）中注入基于任务不确定性的奖励奖金，引导智能体进行高效探索。
AI.result: 实验验证HyperX在多个基准任务中展现出优于现有方法的元学习能力，尤其在稀疏奖励场景下表现出更强的任务适应性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模任务信念与环境状态的联合空间，HyperX为元强化学习提供了更有效的稀疏奖励探索框架。

ai_content_json.result: 实验验证HyperX在多个基准任务中展现出优于现有方法的元学习能力，尤其在稀疏奖励场景下表现出更强的任务适应性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过显式建模任务信念与环境状态的联合空间，HyperX为元强化学习提供了更有效的稀疏奖励探索框架。

tldr: 本文提出HyperX方法，通过在近似超状态空间中引入新型奖励机制，解决元强化学习在稀疏奖励环境下的探索效率问题。
motivation: 现有元学习方法依赖密集奖励信号进行训练，当面对稀疏奖励时探索效率低下，导致任务适应能力不足。
method: 设计HyperX算法，在超状态空间（包含环境状态与任务信念）中注入基于任务不确定性的奖励奖金，引导智能体进行高效探索。
result: 实验验证HyperX在多个基准任务中展现出优于现有方法的元学习能力，尤其在稀疏奖励场景下表现出更强的任务适应性。
conclusion: 通过显式建模任务信念与环境状态的联合空间，HyperX为元强化学习提供了更有效的稀疏奖励探索框架。
search_text: Exploration in Approximate Hyper-State Space for Meta Reinforcement Learning 元强化学习的近似超状态空间探索 To rapidly learn a new task, it is often essential for agents to explore efficiently -- especially when performance matters from the first timestep. One way to learn such behaviour is via meta-learning. Many existing methods however rely on dense rewards for meta-training, and can fail catastrophically if the rewards are sparse. Without a suitable reward signal, the need for exploration during meta-training is exacerbated. To address this, we propose HyperX, which uses novel reward bonuses for meta-training to explore in approximate hyper-state space (where hyper-states represent the environment state and the agent's task belief). We show empirically that HyperX meta-learns better task-exploration and adapts more successfully to new tasks than existing methods. 为了快速学习一项新任务，智能体通常必须有效地探索——尤其是当性能从第一个步骤开始就很重要时。学习这种行为的一种方法是通过元学习。然而，许多现有方法依赖于密集的奖励进行元训练，如果奖励稀疏，可能会发生灾难性的失败。如果没有合适的奖励信号，元训练期间的探索需求就会加剧。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 HyperX，它使用新颖的奖励奖金进行元训练，以在近似超状态空间中进行探索（其中超状态代表环境状态和代理的任务信念）。我们凭经验证明，与现有方法相比，HyperX 元学习可以更好地进行任务探索，并且可以更成功地适应新任务。 本文提出HyperX方法，通过在近似超状态空间中引入新型奖励机制，解决元强化学习在稀疏奖励环境下的探索效率问题。 Luisa Zintgraf,Leo Feng,Cong Lu,Maximilian Igl,Kristian Hartikainen,Katja Hofmann,Shimon Whiteson cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

title: Joint data imputation and mechanistic modelling for simulating heart-brain interactions in incomplete datasets
title_zh: 用于模拟不完整数据集中心脑相互作用的联合数据插补和机制建模
abstract: The use of mechanistic models in clinical studies is limited by the lack of multi-modal patients data representing different anatomical and physiological processes. For example, neuroimaging datasets do not provide a sufficient representation of heart features for the modeling of cardiovascular factors in brain disorders. To tackle this problem we introduce a probabilistic framework for joint cardiac data imputation and personalisation of cardiovascular mechanistic models, with application to brain studies with incomplete heart data. Our approach is based on a variational framework for the joint inference of an imputation model of cardiac information from the available features, along with a Gaussian Process emulator that can faithfully reproduce personalised cardiovascular dynamics. Experimental results on UK Biobank show that our model allows accurate imputation of missing cardiac features in datasets containing minimal heart information, e.g. systolic and diastolic blood pressures only, while jointly estimating the emulated parameters of the lumped model. This allows a novel exploration of the heart-brain joint relationship through simulation of realistic cardiac dynamics corresponding to different conditions of brain anatomy.
summary: The use of mechanistic models in clinical studies is limited by the lack of multi-modal patients data representing different anatomical and physiological processes. For example, neuroimaging datasets do not provide a sufficient representation of heart features for the modeling of cardiovascular factors in brain disorders. To tackle this problem we introduce a probabilistic framework for joint cardiac data imputation and personalisation of cardiovascular mechanistic models, with application to brain studies with incomplete heart data. Our approach is based on a variational framework for the joint inference of an imputation model of cardiac information from the available features, along with a Gaussian Process emulator that can faithfully reproduce personalised cardiovascular dynamics. Experimental results on UK Biobank show that our model allows accurate imputation of missing cardiac features in datasets containing minimal heart information, e.g. systolic and diastolic blood pressures only, while jointly estimating the emulated parameters of the lumped model. This allows a novel exploration of the heart-brain joint relationship through simulation of realistic cardiac dynamics corresponding to different conditions of brain anatomy.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏代表不同解剖和生理过程的多模式患者数据，机械模型在临床研究中的使用受到限制。例如，神经影像数据集无法充分代表心脏特征，无法对脑部疾病中的心血管因素进行建模。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了用于联合心脏数据插补和心血管机制模型个性化的概率框架，并将其应用于不完整心脏数据的大脑研究。我们的方法基于一个变分框架，用于根据可用特征联合推断心脏信息插补模型，以及可以忠实再现个性化心血管动力学的高斯过程模拟器。英国生物银行的实验结果表明，我们的模型可以准确估算包含最少心脏信息的数据集中缺失的心脏特征，例如心脏信息。仅收缩压和舒张压，同时联合估计集总模型的模拟参数。这使得通过模拟与不同的大脑解剖条件相对应的真实心脏动力学，可以对心脑关节关系进行新颖的探索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联合心脏数据填补与心血管机制模型个性化的概率框架，用于在心脑交互研究中处理不完整数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有机制模型因缺乏多模态患者数据（尤其是心脏特征）而难以准确模拟脑部疾病中的心血管因素。
AI.method: 基于变分框架联合推断心脏数据填补模型与高斯过程模拟器，同步实现数据填补和个性化心血管动力学建模。
AI.result: 在UK Biobank数据集验证中，模型能准确填补仅有血压数据的缺失心脏特征，并有效估计简化模型参数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为心脑交互研究提供了处理不完整数据的新范式，可推动基于真实生理动态的跨器官机制探索。

authors_text: Alper Kamil Bozkurt,Yu Wang,Michael Zavlanos,Miroslav Pajic
title: Model-Free Reinforcement Learning for Stochastic Games with Linear Temporal Logic Objectives
title_zh: 具有线性时态逻辑目标的随机博弈的无模型强化学习
comment: ef:2021 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), Xi'an, China, 2021, pp. 10649-10655
comments: ef:2021 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), Xi'an, China, 2021, pp. 10649-10655
abstract: We study the problem of synthesizing control strategies for Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) objectives in unknown environments. We model this problem as a turn-based zero-sum stochastic game between the controller and the environment, where the transition probabilities and the model topology are fully unknown. The winning condition for the controller in this game is the satisfaction of the given LTL specification, which can be captured by the acceptance condition of a deterministic Rabin automaton (DRA) directly derived from the LTL specification. We introduce a model-free reinforcement learning (RL) methodology to find a strategy that maximizes the probability of satisfying a given LTL specification when the Rabin condition of the derived DRA has a single accepting pair. We then generalize this approach to LTL formulas for which the Rabin condition has a larger number of accepting pairs, providing a lower bound on the satisfaction probability. Finally, we illustrate applicability of our RL method on two motion planning case studies.
summary: We study the problem of synthesizing control strategies for Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) objectives in unknown environments. We model this problem as a turn-based zero-sum stochastic game between the controller and the environment, where the transition probabilities and the model topology are fully unknown. The winning condition for the controller in this game is the satisfaction of the given LTL specification, which can be captured by the acceptance condition of a deterministic Rabin automaton (DRA) directly derived from the LTL specification. We introduce a model-free reinforcement learning (RL) methodology to find a strategy that maximizes the probability of satisfying a given LTL specification when the Rabin condition of the derived DRA has a single accepting pair. We then generalize this approach to LTL formulas for which the Rabin condition has a larger number of accepting pairs, providing a lower bound on the satisfaction probability. Finally, we illustrate applicability of our RL method on two motion planning case studies.
abstract_zh: 我们研究未知环境中线性时序逻辑（LTL）目标的综合控制策略的问题。我们将此问题建模为控制器和环境之间的回合制零和随机博弈，其中转移概率和模型拓扑完全未知。该游戏中控制器的获胜条件是满足给定的 LTL 规范，这可以通过直接从 LTL 规范导出的确定性拉宾自动机 (DRA) 的接受条件来捕获。我们引入了一种无模型强化学习 (RL) 方法，以找到一种策略，当派生的 DRA 的 Rabin 条件具有单个接受对时，该策略可以最大化满足给定 LTL 规范的概率。然后，我们将这种方法推广到 LTL 公式，其中 Rabin 条件具有大量接受对，从而提供满足概率的下限。最后，我们说明了 RL 方法在两个运动规划案例研究中的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在未知环境中合成满足线性时序逻辑（LTL）目标的控制策略问题，提出一种无模型强化学习方法解决随机博弈中的LTL规范满足问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖环境模型或简化假设，但实际环境常未知且复杂。LTL规范能精确描述时序任务，但如何在无模型情况下通过强化学习实现此类目标仍具挑战性。
AI.method: 将问题建模为控制器与环境的零和随机博弈，利用确定性Rabin自动机（DRA）转化LTL目标，设计无模型强化学习算法，针对单/多接受对的Rabin条件分别提供策略与概率下界。
AI.result: 在两个运动规划案例中验证了方法的有效性，证明该算法能在未知环境中实现LTL规范的满足，并给出满足概率的理论下界保证。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法突破了传统模型依赖限制，为复杂时序逻辑任务的强化学习提供了新框架，拓展了RL在未知动态环境中的应用边界。

authors_text: Beren Millidge,Alexander Tschantz,Anil Seth,Christopher L Buckley
title: Relaxing the Constraints on Predictive Coding Models
title_zh: 放宽预测编码模型的约束
comment: 02/10/20 initial upload; 10/10/20 minor fixes
comments: 02/10/20 initial upload; 10/10/20 minor fixes
abstract: Predictive coding is an influential theory of cortical function which posits that the principal computation the brain performs, which underlies both perception and learning, is the minimization of prediction errors. While motivated by high-level notions of variational inference, detailed neurophysiological models of cortical microcircuits which can implements its computations have been developed. Moreover, under certain conditions, predictive coding has been shown to approximate the backpropagation of error algorithm, and thus provides a relatively biologically plausible credit-assignment mechanism for training deep networks. However, standard implementations of the algorithm still involve potentially neurally implausible features such as identical forward and backward weights, backward nonlinear derivatives, and 1-1 error unit connectivity. In this paper, we show that these features are not integral to the algorithm and can be removed either directly or through learning additional sets of parameters with Hebbian update rules without noticeable harm to learning performance. Our work thus relaxes current constraints on potential microcircuit designs and hopefully opens up new regions of the design-space for neuromorphic implementations of predictive coding.
summary: Predictive coding is an influential theory of cortical function which posits that the principal computation the brain performs, which underlies both perception and learning, is the minimization of prediction errors. While motivated by high-level notions of variational inference, detailed neurophysiological models of cortical microcircuits which can implements its computations have been developed. Moreover, under certain conditions, predictive coding has been shown to approximate the backpropagation of error algorithm, and thus provides a relatively biologically plausible credit-assignment mechanism for training deep networks. However, standard implementations of the algorithm still involve potentially neurally implausible features such as identical forward and backward weights, backward nonlinear derivatives, and 1-1 error unit connectivity. In this paper, we show that these features are not integral to the algorithm and can be removed either directly or through learning additional sets of parameters with Hebbian update rules without noticeable harm to learning performance. Our work thus relaxes current constraints on potential microcircuit designs and hopefully opens up new regions of the design-space for neuromorphic implementations of predictive coding.
abstract_zh: 预测编码是一种有影响力的皮质功能理论，它认为大脑执行的主要计算是感知和学习的基础，是预测误差的最小化。在变分推理的高级概念的推动下，可以实现其计算的皮质微电路的详细神经生理学模型已经被开发出来。此外，在某些条件下，预测编码已被证明可以近似误差算法的反向传播，从而为训练深度网络提供了一种在生物学上相对合理的信用分配机制。然而，该算法的标准实现仍然涉及潜在的神经上不可信的特征，例如相同的前向和后向权重、后向非线性导数和 1-1 误差单元连通性。在本文中，我们表明这些特征不是算法的组成部分，可以直接删除，也可以通过使用赫布更新规则学习附加参数集来删除，而不会对学习性能造成明显损害。因此，我们的工作放松了当前对潜在微电路设计的限制，并希望为预测编码的神经形态实现开辟设计空间的新领域。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过移除预测编码模型中潜在的神经生物学不可行特征，放宽其约束条件。
AI.motivation: 标准预测编码实现包含如前后权重相同、反向非线性导数等可能不符合神经生物学特性的设计，限制了其在类脑计算中的应用。
AI.method: 通过引入额外参数集并采用赫布学习规则进行训练，直接或间接消除这些非生物合理性特征。
AI.result: 实验表明移除这些特征后，模型的学习性能未受到明显影响。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为类脑预测编码模型的微电路设计提供了更宽松的约束条件，拓展了神经形态实现的设计空间。

search_text: Relaxing the Constraints on Predictive Coding Models 放宽预测编码模型的约束 Predictive coding is an influential theory of cortical function which posits that the principal computation the brain performs, which underlies both perception and learning, is the minimization of prediction errors. While motivated by high-level notions of variational inference, detailed neurophysiological models of cortical microcircuits which can implements its computations have been developed. Moreover, under certain conditions, predictive coding has been shown to approximate the backpropagation of error algorithm, and thus provides a relatively biologically plausible credit-assignment mechanism for training deep networks. However, standard implementations of the algorithm still involve potentially neurally implausible features such as identical forward and backward weights, backward nonlinear derivatives, and 1-1 error unit connectivity. In this paper, we show that these features are not integral to the algorithm and can be removed either directly or through learning additional sets of parameters with Hebbian update rules without noticeable harm to learning performance. Our work thus relaxes current constraints on potential microcircuit designs and hopefully opens up new regions of the design-space for neuromorphic implementations of predictive coding. 预测编码是一种有影响力的皮质功能理论，它认为大脑执行的主要计算是感知和学习的基础，是预测误差的最小化。在变分推理的高级概念的推动下，可以实现其计算的皮质微电路的详细神经生理学模型已经被开发出来。此外，在某些条件下，预测编码已被证明可以近似误差算法的反向传播，从而为训练深度网络提供了一种在生物学上相对合理的信用分配机制。然而，该算法的标准实现仍然涉及潜在的神经上不可信的特征，例如相同的前向和后向权重、后向非线性导数和 1-1 误差单元连通性。在本文中，我们表明这些特征不是算法的组成部分，可以直接删除，也可以通过使用赫布更新规则学习附加参数集来删除，而不会对学习性能造成明显损害。因此，我们的工作放松了当前对潜在微电路设计的限制，并希望为预测编码的神经形态实现开辟设计空间的新领域。 本文旨在通过移除预测编码模型中潜在的神经生物学不可行特征，放宽其约束条件。 Beren Millidge,Alexander Tschantz,Anil Seth,Christopher L Buckley q-bio.NC,cs.AI,stat.ML

title: Homography Estimation with Convolutional Neural Networks Under Conditions of Variance
title_zh: 方差条件下卷积神经网络的单应性估计
comment: 9 pages, 16 figures, submitted to 2020 Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Conference
comments: 9 pages, 16 figures, submitted to 2020 Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Conference
abstract: Planar homography estimation is foundational to many computer vision problems, such as Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) and Augmented Reality (AR). However, conditions of high variance confound even the state-of-the-art algorithms. In this report, we analyze the performance of two recently published methods using Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) that are meant to replace the more traditional feature-matching based approaches to the estimation of homography. Our evaluation of the CNN based methods focuses particularly on measuring the performance under conditions of significant noise, illumination shift, and occlusion. We also measure the benefits of training CNNs to varying degrees of noise. Additionally, we compare the effect of using color images instead of grayscale images for inputs to CNNs. Finally, we compare the results against baseline feature-matching based homography estimation methods using SIFT, SURF, and ORB. We find that CNNs can be trained to be more robust against noise, but at a small cost to accuracy in the noiseless case. Additionally, CNNs perform significantly better in conditions of extreme variance than their feature-matching based counterparts. With regard to color inputs, we conclude that with no change in the CNN architecture to take advantage of the additional information in the color planes, the difference in performance using color inputs or grayscale inputs is negligible. About the CNNs trained with noise-corrupted inputs, we show that training a CNN to a specific magnitude of noise leads to a "Goldilocks Zone" with regard to the noise levels where that CNN performs best.
summary: Planar homography estimation is foundational to many computer vision problems, such as Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) and Augmented Reality (AR). However, conditions of high variance confound even the state-of-the-art algorithms. In this report, we analyze the performance of two recently published methods using Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) that are meant to replace the more traditional feature-matching based approaches to the estimation of homography. Our evaluation of the CNN based methods focuses particularly on measuring the performance under conditions of significant noise, illumination shift, and occlusion. We also measure the benefits of training CNNs to varying degrees of noise. Additionally, we compare the effect of using color images instead of grayscale images for inputs to CNNs. Finally, we compare the results against baseline feature-matching based homography estimation methods using SIFT, SURF, and ORB. We find that CNNs can be trained to be more robust against noise, but at a small cost to accuracy in the noiseless case. Additionally, CNNs perform significantly better in conditions of extreme variance than their feature-matching based counterparts. With regard to color inputs, we conclude that with no change in the CNN architecture to take advantage of the additional information in the color planes, the difference in performance using color inputs or grayscale inputs is negligible. About the CNNs trained with noise-corrupted inputs, we show that training a CNN to a specific magnitude of noise leads to a "Goldilocks Zone" with regard to the noise levels where that CNN performs best.
abstract_zh: 平面单应性估计是许多计算机视觉问题的基础，例如同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 和增强现实 (AR)。然而，高方差的条件甚至会令最先进的算法感到困惑。在本报告中，我们分析了最近发布的两种使用卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的方法的性能，这些方法旨在取代更传统的基于特征匹配的单应性估计方法。我们对基于 CNN 的方法的评估特别侧重于测量显着噪声、照明偏移和遮挡条件下的性能。我们还衡量了在不同程度的噪声下训练 CNN 的好处。此外，我们还比较了使用彩色图像而不是灰度图像作为 CNN 输入的效果。最后，我们将结果与使用 SIFT、SURF 和 ORB 的基于基线特征匹配的单应性估计方法进行比较。我们发现 CNN 可以经过训练，使其对噪声具有更强的鲁棒性，但在无噪声情况下的准确性会受到很小的影响。此外，CNN 在极端方差条件下的表现明显优于基于特征匹配的对应模型。关于颜色输入，我们得出的结论是，如果 CNN 架构没有改变以利用颜色平面中的附加信息，那么使用颜色输入或灰度输入的性能差异可以忽略不计。关于使用噪声损坏的输入训练的 CNN，我们表明，将 CNN 训练到特定的噪声量级会导致 CNN 表现最佳的噪声水平的“金发姑娘区”。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了两种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的单应性估计方法在高方差条件下的性能，并与传统特征匹配方法进行对比。
AI.motivation: 传统特征匹配方法（如SIFT、SURF、ORB）在噪声、光照变化和遮挡等高方差条件下表现不佳，需探索CNN能否提供更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 在噪声、光照变化和遮挡条件下测试两种CNN方法，比较彩色与灰度图像输入效果，并与SIFT/SURF/ORB基线方法对比。
AI.result: CNN在极端方差条件下显著优于传统方法，但无噪声时精度略有下降；彩色输入未带来性能提升；针对特定噪声水平训练的CNN存在最佳性能区间。
AI.conclusion: CNN在高方差场景下更优，但需优化噪声训练策略，且当前架构下彩色输入优势不明显。

title: Attention-Based Clustering: Learning a Kernel from Context
title_zh: 基于注意力的聚类：从上下文中学习内核
abstract: In machine learning, no data point stands alone. We believe that context is an underappreciated concept in many machine learning methods. We propose Attention-Based Clustering (ABC), a neural architecture based on the attention mechanism, which is designed to learn latent representations that adapt to context within an input set, and which is inherently agnostic to input sizes and number of clusters. By learning a similarity kernel, our method directly combines with any out-of-the-box kernel-based clustering approach. We present competitive results for clustering Omniglot characters and include analytical evidence of the effectiveness of an attention-based approach for clustering.
summary: In machine learning, no data point stands alone. We believe that context is an underappreciated concept in many machine learning methods. We propose Attention-Based Clustering (ABC), a neural architecture based on the attention mechanism, which is designed to learn latent representations that adapt to context within an input set, and which is inherently agnostic to input sizes and number of clusters. By learning a similarity kernel, our method directly combines with any out-of-the-box kernel-based clustering approach. We present competitive results for clustering Omniglot characters and include analytical evidence of the effectiveness of an attention-based approach for clustering.
abstract_zh: 在机器学习中，没有任何数据点是独立的。我们认为，在许多机器学习方法中，上下文是一个未被充分认识的概念。我们提出了基于注意力的聚类（ABC），这是一种基于注意力机制的神经架构，旨在学习适应输入集中上下文的潜在表示，并且本质上与输入大小和聚类数量无关。通过学习相似核，我们的方法直接与任何开箱即用的基于核的聚类方法相结合。我们展示了 Omniglot 字符聚类的竞争结果，并包括基于注意力的聚类方法有效性的分析证据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于注意力机制的聚类方法ABC，通过学习上下文相关的相似性核来提升聚类效果。
AI.motivation: 传统聚类方法未充分重视上下文信息，而上下文对数据点的表征具有重要影响，需设计适应不同输入规模和聚类数量的模型。
AI.method: 构建基于注意力机制的神经网络架构，学习输入数据的上下文相关潜在表示，并生成相似性核以兼容现有核聚类方法。
AI.result: 在Omniglot字符数据集上取得竞争性聚类结果，并通过分析验证了注意力机制在聚类任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ABC方法通过注意力机制有效捕捉上下文信息，生成的相似性核可适配不同规模数据，为聚类任务提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出基于注意力机制的聚类方法ABC，通过学习上下文相关的相似性核来提升聚类效果。
ai_content.motivation: 传统聚类方法未充分重视上下文信息，而上下文对数据点的表征具有重要影响，需设计适应不同输入规模和聚类数量的模型。
ai_content.method: 构建基于注意力机制的神经网络架构，学习输入数据的上下文相关潜在表示，并生成相似性核以兼容现有核聚类方法。
ai_content.result: 在Omniglot字符数据集上取得竞争性聚类结果，并通过分析验证了注意力机制在聚类任务中的有效性。

search_text: Attention-Based Clustering: Learning a Kernel from Context 基于注意力的聚类：从上下文中学习内核 In machine learning, no data point stands alone. We believe that context is an underappreciated concept in many machine learning methods. We propose Attention-Based Clustering (ABC), a neural architecture based on the attention mechanism, which is designed to learn latent representations that adapt to context within an input set, and which is inherently agnostic to input sizes and number of clusters. By learning a similarity kernel, our method directly combines with any out-of-the-box kernel-based clustering approach. We present competitive results for clustering Omniglot characters and include analytical evidence of the effectiveness of an attention-based approach for clustering. 在机器学习中，没有任何数据点是独立的。我们认为，在许多机器学习方法中，上下文是一个未被充分认识的概念。我们提出了基于注意力的聚类（ABC），这是一种基于注意力机制的神经架构，旨在学习适应输入集中上下文的潜在表示，并且本质上与输入大小和聚类数量无关。通过学习相似核，我们的方法直接与任何开箱即用的基于核的聚类方法相结合。我们展示了 Omniglot 字符聚类的竞争结果，并包括基于注意力的聚类方法有效性的分析证据。 本文提出基于注意力机制的聚类方法ABC，通过学习上下文相关的相似性核来提升聚类效果。 Samuel Coward,Erik Visse-Martindale,Chithrupa Ramesh cs.LG,cs.CV,stat.ML

title: Query complexity of adversarial attacks
title_zh: 对抗性攻击的查询复杂度
comment: 32 pages, 2 figures Generalized the results. Adversarial examples no longer need to be in the support of the data distribution
comments: 32 pages, 2 figures Generalized the results. Adversarial examples no longer need to be in the support of the data distribution
abstract: There are two main attack models considered in the adversarial robustness literature: black-box and white-box. We consider these threat models as two ends of a fine-grained spectrum, indexed by the number of queries the adversary can ask. Using this point of view we investigate how many queries the adversary needs to make to design an attack that is comparable to the best possible attack in the white-box model. We give a lower bound on that number of queries in terms of entropy of decision boundaries of the classifier. Using this result we analyze two classical learning algorithms on two synthetic tasks for which we prove meaningful security guarantees. The obtained bounds suggest that some learning algorithms are inherently more robust against query-bounded adversaries than others.
summary: There are two main attack models considered in the adversarial robustness literature: black-box and white-box. We consider these threat models as two ends of a fine-grained spectrum, indexed by the number of queries the adversary can ask. Using this point of view we investigate how many queries the adversary needs to make to design an attack that is comparable to the best possible attack in the white-box model. We give a lower bound on that number of queries in terms of entropy of decision boundaries of the classifier. Using this result we analyze two classical learning algorithms on two synthetic tasks for which we prove meaningful security guarantees. The obtained bounds suggest that some learning algorithms are inherently more robust against query-bounded adversaries than others.
abstract_zh: 对抗性鲁棒性文献中考虑了两种主要的攻击模型：黑盒和白盒。我们将这些威胁模型视为细粒度范围的两端，按对手可以提出的查询数量进行索引。使用这个观点，我们研究对手需要进行多少次查询才能设计出与白盒模型中最佳攻击相当的攻击。我们根据分类器决策边界的熵给出查询数量的下限。使用这个结果，我们分析了两个综合任务的两种经典学习算法，我们证明了有意义的安全保证。获得的界限表明，某些学习算法本质上比其他算法更能抵抗查询受限的对手。

AI.tldr: 本文研究对抗攻击中查询复杂度的下界，通过分析决策边界熵来评估不同学习算法在查询受限下的安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击模型（黑盒/白盒）未明确量化查询次数的影响，需建立细粒度分析框架以理解攻击成本与算法鲁棒性的关系。
AI.method: 提出基于分类器决策边界熵的查询次数下界理论，通过合成任务验证两个经典学习算法的安全性保证。
AI.result: 证明查询次数下界与熵相关，发现部分算法在查询受限场景下具有更强的内在鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 学习算法的对抗鲁棒性与查询复杂度紧密相关，某些算法设计可天然抵御有限查询攻击。

title: Encoded Prior Sliced Wasserstein AutoEncoder for learning latent manifold representations
title_zh: 用于学习潜在流形表示的编码先验切片 Wasserstein AutoEncoder
comment: 23 pages
comments: 23 pages
abstract: While variational autoencoders have been successful in several tasks, the use of conventional priors are limited in their ability to encode the underlying structure of input data. We introduce an Encoded Prior Sliced Wasserstein AutoEncoder wherein an additional prior-encoder network learns an embedding of the data manifold which preserves topological and geometric properties of the data, thus improving the structure of latent space. The autoencoder and prior-encoder networks are iteratively trained using the Sliced Wasserstein distance. The effectiveness of the learned manifold encoding is explored by traversing latent space through interpolations along geodesics which generate samples that lie on the data manifold and hence are more realistic compared to Euclidean interpolation. To this end, we introduce a graph-based algorithm for exploring the data manifold and interpolating along network-geodesics in latent space by maximizing the density of samples along the path while minimizing total energy. We use the 3D-spiral data to show that the prior encodes the geometry underlying the data unlike conventional autoencoders, and to demonstrate the exploration of the embedded data manifold through the network algorithm. We apply our framework to benchmarked image datasets to demonstrate the advantages of learning data representations in outlier generation, latent structure, and geodesic interpolation.
summary: While variational autoencoders have been successful in several tasks, the use of conventional priors are limited in their ability to encode the underlying structure of input data. We introduce an Encoded Prior Sliced Wasserstein AutoEncoder wherein an additional prior-encoder network learns an embedding of the data manifold which preserves topological and geometric properties of the data, thus improving the structure of latent space. The autoencoder and prior-encoder networks are iteratively trained using the Sliced Wasserstein distance. The effectiveness of the learned manifold encoding is explored by traversing latent space through interpolations along geodesics which generate samples that lie on the data manifold and hence are more realistic compared to Euclidean interpolation. To this end, we introduce a graph-based algorithm for exploring the data manifold and interpolating along network-geodesics in latent space by maximizing the density of samples along the path while minimizing total energy. We use the 3D-spiral data to show that the prior encodes the geometry underlying the data unlike conventional autoencoders, and to demonstrate the exploration of the embedded data manifold through the network algorithm. We apply our framework to benchmarked image datasets to demonstrate the advantages of learning data representations in outlier generation, latent structure, and geodesic interpolation.
abstract_zh: 虽然变分自动编码器在多项任务中取得了成功，但传统先验的使用在编码输入数据的底层结构方面受到限制。我们引入了一种编码先验切片 Wasserstein 自动编码器，其中附加的先验编码器网络学习数据流形的嵌入，从而保留数据的拓扑和几何属性，从而改善潜在空间的结构。自动编码器和先验编码器网络使用切片 Wasserstein 距离进行迭代训练。通过沿测地线插值遍历潜在空间来探索学习流形编码的有效性，这些插值生成位于数据流形上的样本，因此与欧几里得插值相比更真实。为此，我们引入了一种基于图的算法，用于探索数据流形并通过最大化沿路径的样本密度同时最小化总能量来沿潜在空间中的网络测地线进行插值。我们使用 3D 螺旋数据来表明，与传统自动编码器不同，先验对数据底层的几何进行编码，并演示通过网络算法对嵌入数据流形的探索。我们将我们的框架应用于基准图像数据集，以展示学习数据表示在离群值生成、潜在结构和测地线插值方面的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Encoded Prior Sliced Wasserstein AutoEncoder的模型，用于学习数据的潜在流形表示。
AI.motivation: 传统变分自编码器在编码输入数据潜在结构方面存在局限性，因此需要一种能够更好保留数据拓扑和几何性质的方法。
AI.method: 引入了一个额外的先验编码器网络，用于学习数据流形的嵌入表示，并通过Sliced Wasserstein距离迭代训练自编码器和先验编码器网络。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在3D螺旋数据和基准图像数据集上能够更好地编码数据的几何结构，并在生成异常值、潜在结构和流形插值方面表现出优势。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法有效提升了潜在空间的结构表示，为流形数据的生成和插值提供了更合理的解决方案。

title: Reviewing and Benchmarking Parameter Control Methods in Differential Evolution
title_zh: 差分进化中参数控制方法的回顾和基准测试
comment: This is an accepted version of a paper published in the IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics
comments: This is an accepted version of a paper published in the IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics
abstract: Many Differential Evolution (DE) algorithms with various parameter control methods (PCMs) have been proposed. However, previous studies usually considered PCMs to be an integral component of a complex DE algorithm. Thus the characteristics and performance of each method are poorly understood. We present an in-depth review of 24 PCMs for the scale factor and crossover rate in DE and a large scale benchmarking study. We carefully extract the 24 PCMs from their original, complex algorithms and describe them according to a systematic manner. Our review facilitates the understanding of similarities and differences between existing, representative PCMs. The performance of DEs with the 24 PCMs and 16 variation operators is investigated on 24 black-box benchmark functions. Our benchmarking results reveal which methods exhibit high performance when embedded in a standardized framework under 16 different conditions, independent from their original, complex algorithms. We also investigate how much room there is for further improvement of PCMs by comparing the 24 methods with an oracle-based model, which can be considered to be a conservative lower bound on the performance of an optimal method.
summary: Many Differential Evolution (DE) algorithms with various parameter control methods (PCMs) have been proposed. However, previous studies usually considered PCMs to be an integral component of a complex DE algorithm. Thus the characteristics and performance of each method are poorly understood. We present an in-depth review of 24 PCMs for the scale factor and crossover rate in DE and a large scale benchmarking study. We carefully extract the 24 PCMs from their original, complex algorithms and describe them according to a systematic manner. Our review facilitates the understanding of similarities and differences between existing, representative PCMs. The performance of DEs with the 24 PCMs and 16 variation operators is investigated on 24 black-box benchmark functions. Our benchmarking results reveal which methods exhibit high performance when embedded in a standardized framework under 16 different conditions, independent from their original, complex algorithms. We also investigate how much room there is for further improvement of PCMs by comparing the 24 methods with an oracle-based model, which can be considered to be a conservative lower bound on the performance of an optimal method.
abstract_zh: 人们已经提出了许多具有各种参数控制方法（PCM）的差分进化（DE）算法。然而，之前的研究通常认为 PCM 是复杂 DE 算法的一个组成部分。因此，人们对每种方法的特征和性能知之甚少。我们对 DE 中的比例因子和交叉率的 24 个 PCM 进行了深入审查，并进行了大规模基准测试研究。我们仔细地从原始、复杂的算法中提取出 24 个 PCM，并按照系统的方式描述它们。我们的审查有助于理解现有代表性 PCM 之间的异同。在 24 个黑盒基准函数上研究了具有 24 个 PCM 和 16 个变分算子的 DE 的性能。我们的基准测试结果揭示了哪些方法在 16 种不同条件下嵌入标准化框架时表现出高性能，独立于其原始的复杂算法。我们还通过将 24 种方法与基于预言机的模型进行比较，研究了 PCM 的进一步改进空间有多大，该模型可以被认为是最佳方法性能的保守下限。

AI.tldr: 对差分进化算法中的24种参数控制方法进行系统回顾与大规模基准测试，评估其在标准化框架下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将参数控制方法（PCMs）视为复杂DE算法的组成部分，导致其特性与性能难以独立评估，需系统分析以明确其效果。
AI.method: 系统提取并分类24种PCMs，基于标准化DE框架与16种变异算子，在24个基准函数上进行大规模实验，对比其性能与预言机模型。
AI.result: 基准测试显示部分PCMs在标准化框架下表现优异，且与原算法无关；与预言机模型比较表明PCMs仍有优化潜力。
AI.conclusion: 系统分析揭示了PCMs的性能差异，标准化评估框架有助于独立比较，未来可借鉴高效方法并进一步优化。

search_text: Reviewing and Benchmarking Parameter Control Methods in Differential Evolution 差分进化中参数控制方法的回顾和基准测试 Many Differential Evolution (DE) algorithms with various parameter control methods (PCMs) have been proposed. However, previous studies usually considered PCMs to be an integral component of a complex DE algorithm. Thus the characteristics and performance of each method are poorly understood. We present an in-depth review of 24 PCMs for the scale factor and crossover rate in DE and a large scale benchmarking study. We carefully extract the 24 PCMs from their original, complex algorithms and describe them according to a systematic manner. Our review facilitates the understanding of similarities and differences between existing, representative PCMs. The performance of DEs with the 24 PCMs and 16 variation operators is investigated on 24 black-box benchmark functions. Our benchmarking results reveal which methods exhibit high performance when embedded in a standardized framework under 16 different conditions, independent from their original, complex algorithms. We also investigate how much room there is for further improvement of PCMs by comparing the 24 methods with an oracle-based model, which can be considered to be a conservative lower bound on the performance of an optimal method. 人们已经提出了许多具有各种参数控制方法（PCM）的差分进化（DE）算法。然而，之前的研究通常认为 PCM 是复杂 DE 算法的一个组成部分。因此，人们对每种方法的特征和性能知之甚少。我们对 DE 中的比例因子和交叉率的 24 个 PCM 进行了深入审查，并进行了大规模基准测试研究。我们仔细地从原始、复杂的算法中提取出 24 个 PCM，并按照系统的方式描述它们。我们的审查有助于理解现有代表性 PCM 之间的异同。在 24 个黑盒基准函数上研究了具有 24 个 PCM 和 16 个变分算子的 DE 的性能。我们的基准测试结果揭示了哪些方法在 16 种不同条件下嵌入标准化框架时表现出高性能，独立于其原始的复杂算法。我们还通过将 24 种方法与基于预言机的模型进行比较，研究了 PCM 的进一步改进空间有多大，该模型可以被认为是最佳方法性能的保守下限。 对差分进化算法中的24种参数控制方法进行系统回顾与大规模基准测试，评估其在标准化框架下的性能。 Ryoji Tanabe,Alex Fukunaga cs.NE

title: Numerical Methods to Compute the Coriolis Matrix and Christoffel Symbols for Rigid-Body Systems
title_zh: 计算刚体系统科里奥利矩阵和 Christoffel 符号的数值方法
comment: Author version of paper in the ASME Journal of Computational and Nonlinear Dynamics. Includes two footnotes added post-publication
comments: Author version of paper in the ASME Journal of Computational and Nonlinear Dynamics. Includes two footnotes added post-publication
abstract: This article presents methods to efficiently compute the Coriolis matrix and underlying Christoffel symbols (of the first kind) for tree-structure rigid-body systems. The algorithms can be executed purely numerically, without requiring partial derivatives as in unscalable symbolic techniques. The computations share a recursive structure in common with classical methods such as the Composite-Rigid-Body Algorithm and are of the lowest possible order: $O(Nd)$ for the Coriolis matrix and $O(Nd^2)$ for the Christoffel symbols, where $N$ is the number of bodies and $d$ is the depth of the kinematic tree. Implementation in C/C++ shows computation times on the order of 10-20 $μ$s for the Coriolis matrix and 40-120 $μ$s for the Christoffel symbols on systems with 20 degrees of freedom. The results demonstrate feasibility for the adoption of these algorithms within high-rate ($>$1kHz) loops for model-based control applications.
summary: This article presents methods to efficiently compute the Coriolis matrix and underlying Christoffel symbols (of the first kind) for tree-structure rigid-body systems. The algorithms can be executed purely numerically, without requiring partial derivatives as in unscalable symbolic techniques. The computations share a recursive structure in common with classical methods such as the Composite-Rigid-Body Algorithm and are of the lowest possible order: $O(Nd)$ for the Coriolis matrix and $O(Nd^2)$ for the Christoffel symbols, where $N$ is the number of bodies and $d$ is the depth of the kinematic tree. Implementation in C/C++ shows computation times on the order of 10-20 $μ$s for the Coriolis matrix and 40-120 $μ$s for the Christoffel symbols on systems with 20 degrees of freedom. The results demonstrate feasibility for the adoption of these algorithms within high-rate ($>$1kHz) loops for model-based control applications.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了有效计算树结构刚体系统的科里奥利矩阵和底层 Christoffel 符号（第一类）的方法。这些算法可以纯粹以数字方式执行，而不需要像不可扩展的符号技术那样的偏导数。这些计算共享与复合刚体算法等经典方法相同的递归结构，并且具有尽可能低的阶数：科里奥利矩阵为 $O(Nd)$，Christoffel 符号为 $O(Nd^2)$，其中 $N$ 是物体的数量，$d$ 是运动树的深度。在 C/C++ 中的实现显示，在具有 20 个自由度的系统上，科里奥利矩阵的计算时间约为 10-20 $μ$s，Christoffel 符号的计算时间约为 40-120 $μ$s。结果证明了在基于模型的控制应用的高速（$>$1kHz）循环中采用这些算法的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于计算树状刚体系统科里奥利矩阵和克里斯托费尔符号的数值方法，无需符号计算。
AI.motivation: 传统符号方法因需要计算偏导数而难以扩展，本文旨在提供一种高效、可扩展的数值算法以满足高实时性控制需求。
AI.method: 基于递归结构设计数值算法，时间复杂度为O(Nd)（科里奥利矩阵）和O(Nd²)（克里斯托费尔符号），并在C/C++中实现。
AI.result: 在20自由度系统中，科里奥利矩阵计算耗时10-20微秒，克里斯托费尔符号计算耗时40-120微秒，验证了算法在kHz级控制环中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法通过纯数值计算实现了高效动态建模，适用于高实时性模型预测控制场景。

title: How Far Are We From an Optimal, Adaptive DE?
title_zh: 我们距离最佳的自适应 DE 还有多远？
comment: This is an accepted version of a paper published in the proceedings of PPSN 2016
comments: This is an accepted version of a paper published in the proceedings of PPSN 2016
abstract: We consider how an (almost) optimal parameter adaptation process for an adaptive DE might behave, and compare the behavior and performance of this approximately optimal process to that of existing, adaptive mechanisms for DE. An optimal parameter adaptation process is an useful notion for analyzing the parameter adaptation methods in adaptive DE as well as other adaptive evolutionary algorithms, but it cannot be known generally. Thus, we propose a Greedy Approximate Oracle method (GAO) which approximates an optimal parameter adaptation process. We compare the behavior of GAODE, a DE algorithm with GAO, to typical adaptive DEs on six benchmark functions and the BBOB benchmarks, and show that GAO can be used to (1) explore how much room for improvement there is in the performance of the adaptive DEs, and (2) obtain hints for developing future, effective parameter adaptation methods for adaptive DEs.
summary: We consider how an (almost) optimal parameter adaptation process for an adaptive DE might behave, and compare the behavior and performance of this approximately optimal process to that of existing, adaptive mechanisms for DE. An optimal parameter adaptation process is an useful notion for analyzing the parameter adaptation methods in adaptive DE as well as other adaptive evolutionary algorithms, but it cannot be known generally. Thus, we propose a Greedy Approximate Oracle method (GAO) which approximates an optimal parameter adaptation process. We compare the behavior of GAODE, a DE algorithm with GAO, to typical adaptive DEs on six benchmark functions and the BBOB benchmarks, and show that GAO can be used to (1) explore how much room for improvement there is in the performance of the adaptive DEs, and (2) obtain hints for developing future, effective parameter adaptation methods for adaptive DEs.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑自适应 DE 的（几乎）最优参数自适应过程可能如何表现，并将这种近似最优过程的行为和性能与 DE 的现有自适应机制的行为和性能进行比较。最优参数自适应过程是分析自适应差分进化以及其他自适应进化算法中的参数自适应方法的有用概念，但它不能被普遍知晓。因此，我们提出了一种贪婪近似预言机方法（GAO），它近似最佳参数适应过程。我们将 GAODE（一种带有 GAO 的 DE 算法）与典型自适应 DE 在六个基准函数和 BBOB 基准上的行为进行了比较，并表明 GAO 可用于（1）探索自适应 DE 的性能有多大的改进空间，以及（2）获得为自适应 DE 开发未来有效的参数自适应方法的提示。

AI.tldr: 提出一种近似最优参数自适应方法（GAO），并评估现有自适应差分进化算法（DE）的改进空间。
AI.motivation: 分析自适应DE的参数自适应方法，但最优过程无法直接确定，需近似方法评估现有方法的改进潜力。
AI.method: 提出贪婪近似预言机方法（GAO）近似最优参数自适应过程，并在基准函数及BBOB基准上比较GAODE与典型自适应DE的表现。
AI.result: 实验表明，GAO能有效评估现有自适应DE的改进潜力，并为未来参数自适应方法提供优化方向。
AI.conclusion: GAO作为近似最优自适应方法，有助于理解当前自适应DE的优化潜力，指导未来参数自适应方法的开发。
