An optimal parameter adaptation process is an useful notion for analyzing the parameter adaptation methods in adaptive DE as well as other adaptive evolutionary algorithms, but it cannot be known generally. Thus, we propose a Greedy Approximate Oracle method (GAO) which approximates an optimal parameter adaptation process. We compare the behavior of GAODE, a DE algorithm with GAO, to typical adaptive DEs on six benchmark functions and the BBOB benchmarks, and show that GAO can be used to (1) explore how much room for improvement there is in the performance of the adaptive DEs, and (2) obtain hints for developing future, effective parameter adaptation methods for adaptive DEs. 我们考虑自适应 DE 的（几乎）最优参数自适应过程可能如何表现，并将这种近似最优过程的行为和性能与 DE 的现有自适应机制的行为和性能进行比较。最优参数自适应过程是分析自适应差分进化以及其他自适应进化算法中的参数自适应方法的有用概念，但它不能被普遍知晓。因此，我们提出了一种贪婪近似预言机方法（GAO），它近似最佳参数适应过程。我们将 GAODE（一种带有 GAO 的 DE 算法）与典型自适应 DE 在六个基准函数和 BBOB 基准上的行为进行了比较，并表明 GAO 可用于（1）探索自适应 DE 的性能有多大的改进空间，以及（2）获得为自适应 DE 开发未来有效的参数自适应方法的提示。 提出一种近似最优参数自适应方法（GAO），并评估现有自适应差分进化算法（DE）的改进空间。 Ryoji Tanabe,Alex Fukunaga cs.NE

authors_text: Chengjin Xu,Mojtaba Nayyeri,Fouad Alkhoury,Hamed Shariat Yazdi,Jens Lehmann
title: TeRo: A Time-aware Knowledge Graph Embedding via Temporal Rotation
title_zh: TeRo：通过时间旋转嵌入时间感知知识图
comment: This paper is accepted by COLING2020
comments: This paper is accepted by COLING2020
abstract: In the last few years, there has been a surge of interest in learning representations of entitiesand relations in knowledge graph (KG). However, the recent availability of temporal knowledgegraphs (TKGs) that contain time information for each fact created the need for reasoning overtime in such TKGs. In this regard, we present a new approach of TKG embedding, TeRo, which defines the temporal evolution of entity embedding as a rotation from the initial time to the currenttime in the complex vector space. Specially, for facts involving time intervals, each relation isrepresented as a pair of dual complex embeddings to handle the beginning and the end of therelation, respectively. We show our proposed model overcomes the limitations of the existing KG embedding models and TKG embedding models and has the ability of learning and inferringvarious relation patterns over time. Experimental results on four different TKGs show that TeRo significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art models for link prediction. In addition, we analyze the effect of time granularity on link prediction over TKGs, which as far as we know hasnot been investigated in previous literature.

We show our proposed model overcomes the limitations of the existing KG embedding models and TKG embedding models and has the ability of learning and inferringvarious relation patterns over time. Experimental results on four different TKGs show that TeRo significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art models for link prediction. In addition, we analyze the effect of time granularity on link prediction over TKGs, which as far as we know hasnot been investigated in previous literature.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，人们对学习知识图谱（KG）中实体和关系的表示的兴趣激增。然而，最近出现的包含每个事实的时间信息的时间知识图谱 (TKG) 产生了在此类 TKG 中进行超时推理的需要。在这方面，我们提出了一种新的 TKG 嵌入方法 TeRo，它将实体嵌入的时间演化定义为复杂向量空间中从初始时间到当前时间的旋转。特别是，对于涉及时间间隔的事实，每个关系都表示为一对对偶复杂嵌入，分别处理关系的开始和结束。我们证明我们提出的模型克服了现有 KG 嵌入模型和 TKG 嵌入模型的局限性，并且具有随着时间的推移学习和推断各种关系模式的能力。四种不同 TKG 的实验结果表明，TeRo 显着优于现有最先进的链路预测模型。此外，我们还分析了时间粒度对 TKG 链路预测的影响，据我们所知，之前的文献尚未对此进行过研究。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于时间感知的知识图谱嵌入方法TeRo，用于处理包含时间信息的时序知识图谱。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入模型难以有效处理时间维度信息，需开发能捕捉时间演化规律的时序知识图谱（TKG）嵌入方法。
AI.method: 在复数向量空间中通过旋转操作建模实体嵌入的时间演变，对涉及时间区间的关系采用双复数嵌入分别表示起始和结束部分。
AI.result: 在四个TKG数据集上显著优于现有最先进模型，且首次系统分析了时间粒度对链接预测的影响。
AI.conclusion: TeRo通过时间旋转机制有效建模动态关系模式，为时序知识图谱推理提供了新方法，并揭示了时间粒度的重要性。

authors_text: Yannis Kalantidis,Mert Bulent Sariyildiz,Noe Pion,Philippe Weinzaepfel,Diane Larlus
title: Hard Negative Mixing for Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 用于对比学习的硬负混合
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS 2020. Project page with pretrained models: https://europe.naverlabs.com/mochi
comments: Accepted at NeurIPS 2020. Project page with pretrained models: https://europe.naverlabs.com/mochi
abstract: Contrastive learning has become a key component of self-supervised learning approaches for computer vision. By learning to embed two augmented versions of the same image close to each other and to push the embeddings of different images apart, one can train highly transferable visual representations. As revealed by recent studies, heavy data augmentation and large sets of negatives are both crucial in learning such representations. At the same time, data mixing strategies either at the image or the feature level improve both supervised and semi-supervised learning by synthesizing novel examples, forcing networks to learn more robust features. In this paper, we argue that an important aspect of contrastive learning, i.e., the effect of hard negatives, has so far been neglected. To get more meaningful negative samples, current top contrastive self-supervised learning approaches either substantially increase the batch sizes, or keep very large memory banks; increasing the memory size, however, leads to diminishing returns in terms of performance. We therefore start by delving deeper into a top-performing framework and show evidence that harder negatives are needed to facilitate better and faster learning. Based on these observations, and motivated by the success of data mixing, we propose hard negative mixing strategies at the feature level, that can be computed on-the-fly with a minimal computational overhead. We exhaustively ablate our approach on linear classification, object detection and instance segmentation and show that employing our hard negative mixing procedure improves the quality of visual representations learned by a state-of-the-art self-supervised learning method.

By learning to embed two augmented versions of the same image close to each other and to push the embeddings of different images apart, one can train highly transferable visual representations. As revealed by recent studies, heavy data augmentation and large sets of negatives are both crucial in learning such representations. At the same time, data mixing strategies either at the image or the feature level improve both supervised and semi-supervised learning by synthesizing novel examples, forcing networks to learn more robust features. In this paper, we argue that an important aspect of contrastive learning, i.e., the effect of hard negatives, has so far been neglected. To get more meaningful negative samples, current top contrastive self-supervised learning approaches either substantially increase the batch sizes, or keep very large memory banks; increasing the memory size, however, leads to diminishing returns in terms of performance. We therefore start by delving deeper into a top-performing framework and show evidence that harder negatives are needed to facilitate better and faster learning. Based on these observations, and motivated by the success of data mixing, we propose hard negative mixing strategies at the feature level, that can be computed on-the-fly with a minimal computational overhead. abstract_zh: 对比学习已成为计算机视觉自监督学习方法的关键组成部分。通过学习将同一图像的两个增强版本彼此靠近地嵌入并将不同图像的嵌入分开，人们可以训练高度可转移的视觉表示。最近的研究表明，大量的数据增强和大量的负样本对于学习此类表示都至关重要。同时，图像或特征级别的数据混合策略通过合成新颖的示例来改进监督和半监督学习，迫使网络学习更强大的特征。在本文中，我们认为迄今为止，对比学习的一个重要方面，即硬否定的影响，一直被忽视。为了获得更有意义的负样本，当前顶级的对比自监督学习方法要么大幅增加批量大小，要么保留非常大的记忆库；然而，增加内存大小会导致性能回报递减。因此，我们首先深入研究表现最好的框架，并证明需要更难的负数来促进更好更快的学习。基于这些观察结果，并受到数据混合成功的推动，我们提出了特征级别的硬负混合策略，该策略可以以最小的计算开销即时计算。我们详尽地消除了我们在线性分类、对象检测和实例分割方面的方法，并表明采用我们的硬负混合程序可以提高通过最先进的自监督学习方法学习到的视觉表示的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'硬负样本混合'的方法，通过在特征层级融合更具挑战性的负样本，提升对比学习中视觉表示的质量。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法依赖大规模批量或记忆库获取负样本，但效果逐渐减弱。作者指出硬负样本对学习至关重要，但未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 在特征层级设计在线计算的硬负样本混合策略，通过动态融合更具区分性的负样本，以最小计算开销增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在图像分类、目标检测和实例分割任务中，该方法显著提升了自监督学习模型的表示质量，优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 硬负样本混合能有效提升对比学习效果，为自监督视觉表征学习提供了高效且实用的新思路。

authors_text: Wolfgang Merkt,Vladimir Ivan,Traiko Dinev,Ioannis Havoutis,Sethu Vijayakumar
title: Memory Clustering using Persistent Homology for Multimodality- and Discontinuity-Sensitive Learning of Optimal Control Warm-starts
title_zh: 使用持久同源性的内存聚类进行最优控制热启动的多模态和不连续性敏感学习
comment: 12 pages, 10 figures, accepted as a regular paper in IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO). Supplementary video: https://youtu.be/lUULTWCFxY8 Code: https://github.com/wxmerkt/topological_memory_clustering The first two authors contributed equally
comments: 12 pages, 10 figures, accepted as a regular paper in IEEE Transactions on Robotics (T-RO). Supplementary video: https://youtu.be/lUULTWCFxY8 Code: https://github.com/wxmerkt/topological_memory_clustering The first two authors contributed equally
abstract: Shooting methods are an efficient approach to solving nonlinear optimal control problems. As they use local optimization, they exhibit favorable convergence when initialized with a good warm-start but may not converge at all if provided with a poor initial guess. Recent work has focused on providing an initial guess from a learned model trained on samples generated during an offline exploration of the problem space. However, in practice the solutions contain discontinuities introduced by system dynamics or the environment. Additionally, in many cases multiple equally suitable, i.e., multi-modal, solutions exist to solve a problem. Classic learning approaches smooth across the boundary of these discontinuities and thus generalize poorly. In this work, we apply tools from algebraic topology to extract information on the underlying structure of the solution space. In particular, we introduce a method based on persistent homology to automatically cluster the dataset of precomputed solutions to obtain different candidate initial guesses. We then train a Mixture-of-Experts within each cluster to predict state and control trajectories to warm-start the optimal control solver and provide a comparison with modality-agnostic learning. We demonstrate our method on a cart-pole toy problem and a quadrotor avoiding obstacles, and show that clustering samples based on inherent structure improves the warm-start quality.
summary: Shooting methods are an efficient approach to solving nonlinear optimal control problems. As they use local optimization, they exhibit favorable convergence when initialized with a good warm-start but may not converge at all if provided with a poor initial guess. Recent work has focused on providing an initial guess from a learned model trained on samples generated during an offline exploration of the problem space. However, in practice the solutions contain discontinuities introduced by system dynamics or the environment. Additionally, in many cases multiple equally suitable, i.e., multi-modal, solutions exist to solve a problem. Classic learning approaches smooth across the boundary of these discontinuities and thus generalize poorly. In this work, we apply tools from algebraic topology to extract information on the underlying structure of the solution space. In particular, we introduce a method based on persistent homology to automatically cluster the dataset of precomputed solutions to obtain different candidate initial guesses. We then train a Mixture-of-Experts within each cluster to predict state and control trajectories to warm-start the optimal control solver and provide a comparison with modality-agnostic learning. We demonstrate our method on a cart-pole toy problem and a quadrotor avoiding obstacles, and show that clustering samples based on inherent structure improves the warm-start quality.
abstract_zh: 射击方法是解决非线性最优控制问题的有效方法。由于它们使用局部优化，因此在通过良好的热启动进行初始化时表现出良好的收敛性，但如果提供较差的初始猜测，则可能根本不会收敛。最近的工作重点是从对问题空间的离线探索期间生成的样本进行训练的学习模型中提供初步猜测。然而，在实践中，解决方案包含由系统动力学或环境引入的不连续性。另外，在许多情况下，存在多个同样合适的（即多模式的）解决方案来解决问题。经典的学习方法平滑地跨越了这些不连续性的边界，因此泛化能力很差。在这项工作中，我们应用代数拓扑中的工具来提取有关解空间底层结构的信息。特别是，我们引入了一种基于持久同源性的方法来自动对预先计算的解决方案的数据集进行聚类，以获得不同的候选初始猜测。然后，我们在每个集群内训练专家混合来预测状态和控制轨迹，以热启动最优控制求解器并提供与模态无关学习的比较。我们在车杆玩具问题和四旋翼飞行器避障问题上展示了我们的方法，并表明基于固有结构的样本聚类提高了热启动质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用持续同调理论对预计算解进行聚类，以改进最优控制问题中暖启动的多模态和不连续性敏感学习。
AI.motivation: 传统学习方法在处理系统动态或环境引入的解空间不连续性及多模态解时表现不佳，导致暖启动质量低下。
AI.method: 基于代数拓扑工具，利用持续同调自动聚类解集，再在每个聚类内训练专家混合模型预测状态与控制轨迹。
AI.result: 在倒立摆和避障四旋翼实验中验证，基于内在结构的聚类显著提升了暖启动质量。
AI.conclusion: 通过拓扑结构化数据处理，可有效提升多模态及不连续场景下的最优控制暖启动性能。

title: Real-time Collaboration Between Mixed Reality Users in Geo-referenced Virtual Environment
title_zh: 地理参考虚拟环境中混合现实用户之间的实时协作
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures, International Symposium of Mixed and Augmented Reality Conference, IEEE
comments: 7 pages, 6 figures, International Symposium of Mixed and Augmented Reality Conference, IEEE
abstract: Collaboration using mixed reality technology is an active area of research, where significant research is done to virtually bridge physical distances. There exist a diverse set of platforms and devices that can be used for a mixed-reality collaboration, and is largely focused for indoor scenarios, where, a stable tracking can be assumed. We focus on supporting collaboration between VR and AR users, where AR user is mobile outdoors, and VR user is immersed in true-sized digital twin. This cross-platform solution requires new user experiences for interaction, accurate modelling of the real-world, and working with noisy outdoor tracking sensor such as GPS. In this paper, we present our results and observations of real-time collaboration between cross-platform users, in the context of a geo-referenced virtual environment. We propose a solution for using GPS measurement in VSLAM to localize the AR user in an outdoor environment. The client applications enable VR and AR user to collaborate across the heterogeneous platforms seamlessly. The user can place or load dynamic contents tagged to a geolocation and share their experience with remote users in real-time.
summary: Collaboration using mixed reality technology is an active area of research, where significant research is done to virtually bridge physical distances. There exist a diverse set of platforms and devices that can be used for a mixed-reality collaboration, and is largely focused for indoor scenarios, where, a stable tracking can be assumed. This cross-platform solution requires new user experiences for interaction, accurate modelling of the real-world, and working with noisy outdoor tracking sensor such as GPS. In this paper, we present our results and observations of real-time collaboration between cross-platform users, in the context of a geo-referenced virtual environment. We propose a solution for using GPS measurement in VSLAM to localize the AR user in an outdoor environment. The client applications enable VR and AR user to collaborate across the heterogeneous platforms seamlessly. The user can place or load dynamic contents tagged to a geolocation and share their experience with remote users in real-time.
abstract_zh: 使用混合现实技术进行协作是一个活跃的研究领域，该领域进行了大量研究以虚拟地弥合物理距离。存在多种可用于混合现实协作的平台和设备，并且主要集中于可以假设稳定跟踪的室内场景。我们专注于支持 VR 和 AR 用户之间的协作，其中 AR 用户在户外移动，而 VR 用户沉浸在真实大小的数字孪生中。这种跨平台解决方案需要新的用户交互体验、对现实世界的精确建模以及与嘈杂的户外跟踪传感器（例如 GPS）配合使用。在本文中，我们展示了在地理参考虚拟环境中跨平台用户之间实时协作的结果和观察。我们提出了一种在 VSLAM 中使用 GPS 测量来定位室外环境中的 AR 用户的解决方案。客户端应用程序使 VR 和 AR 用户能够跨异构平台无缝协作。用户可以放置或加载标记到地理位置的动态内容，并与远程用户实时分享他们的体验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨平台实时协作解决方案，支持VR与AR用户在地理参考虚拟环境中的协作，解决户外AR用户GPS定位噪声及异构设备交互问题。
AI.motivation: 现有混合现实协作研究多聚焦于室内稳定环境，而户外AR用户受GPS噪声影响且缺乏跨平台协作框架，需探索新方法实现真实地理空间中的实时交互。
AI.method: 结合GPS测量与VSLAM技术定位户外AR用户，开发支持异构设备的客户端应用，实现地理标记动态内容的放置与实时共享。
AI.result: 验证了跨平台用户可在地理参考虚拟环境中实时协作，GPS-VSLAM方案有效提升户外定位精度，异构设备交互流畅性得到保障。
AI.conclusion: 本文构建了支持户外AR与室内VR协作的跨平台框架，为真实地理空间中的混合现实应用提供了技术基础与实践验证。

authors_text: Yichen Xie,Hao-Shu Fang,Dian Shao,Yong-Lu Li,Cewu Lu
title: DecAug: Augmenting HOI Detection via Decomposition
title_zh: DecAug：通过分解增强 HOI 检测
abstract: Human-object interaction (HOI) detection requires a large amount of annotated data. Current algorithms suffer from insufficient training samples and category imbalance within datasets. To increase data efficiency, in this paper, we propose an efficient and effective data augmentation method called DecAug for HOI detection. Based on our proposed object state similarity metric, object patterns across different HOIs are shared to augment local object appearance features without changing their state. Further, we shift spatial correlation between humans and objects to other feasible configurations with the aid of a pose-guided Gaussian Mixture Model while preserving their interactions. Experiments show that our method brings up to 3.3 mAP and 1.6 mAP improvements on V-COCO and HICODET dataset for two advanced models. Specifically, interactions with fewer samples enjoy more notable improvement. Our method can be easily integrated into various HOI detection models with negligible extra computational consumption. Our code will be made publicly available.
summary: Human-object interaction (HOI) detection requires a large amount of annotated data. Current algorithms suffer from insufficient training samples and category imbalance within datasets. To increase data efficiency, in this paper, we propose an efficient and effective data augmentation method called DecAug for HOI detection. Based on our proposed object state similarity metric, object patterns across different HOIs are shared to augment local object appearance features without changing their state. Further, we shift spatial correlation between humans and objects to other feasible configurations with the aid of a pose-guided Gaussian Mixture Model while preserving their interactions. Experiments show that our method brings up to 3.3 mAP and 1.6 mAP improvements on V-COCO and HICODET dataset for two advanced models. Specifically, interactions with fewer samples enjoy more notable improvement. Our method can be easily integrated into various HOI detection models with negligible extra computational consumption. Our code will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 人机交互（HOI）检测需要大量带注释的数据。当前的算法存在训练样本不足和数据集中类别不平衡的问题。为了提高数据效率，在本文中，我们提出了一种高效且有效的数据增强方法，称为 DecAug，用于 HOI 检测。基于我们提出的对象状态相似性度量，不同 HOI 之间的对象模式被共享，以增强局部对象外观特征而不改变其状态。此外，我们借助姿势引导的高斯混合模型将人类和物体之间的空间相关性转移到其他可行的配置，同时保留它们的相互作用。实验表明，我们的方法在 V-COCO 和 HICODET 数据集上为两个高级模型带来了 3.3 mAP 和 1.6 mAP 改进。具体来说，与较少样本的交互具有更显着的改进。我们的方法可以轻松集成到各种 HOI 检测模型中，额外的计算消耗可以忽略不计。我们的代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DecAug的高效数据增强方法，通过分解人类-物体交互（HOI）模式来提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: HOI检测面临标注数据不足和类别不平衡问题，现有算法在有限样本下表现不佳，需提升数据效率。
AI.method: 基于物体状态相似性度量共享跨HOI的物体特征模式，并利用姿态引导的高斯混合模型调整人-物空间关系，同时保持交互语义。
AI.result: 在V-COCO和HICODET数据集上，DecAug使两种先进模型的mAP分别提升3.3和1.6，对样本较少的交互类别效果更显著。
AI.conclusion: DecAug是一种计算开销低且可泛化的HOI检测增强方法，能有效缓解数据不足问题，代码将公开共享。

ai_content.motivation: HOI检测面临标注数据不足和类别不平衡问题，现有算法在有限样本下表现不佳，需提升数据效率。

search_text: DecAug: Augmenting HOI Detection via Decomposition DecAug：通过分解增强 HOI 检测 Human-object interaction (HOI) detection requires a large amount of annotated data. Current algorithms suffer from insufficient training samples and category imbalance within datasets. To increase data efficiency, in this paper, we propose an efficient and effective data augmentation method called DecAug for HOI detection. Based on our proposed object state similarity metric, object patterns across different HOIs are shared to augment local object appearance features without changing their state. Further, we shift spatial correlation between humans and objects to other feasible configurations with the aid of a pose-guided Gaussian Mixture Model while preserving their interactions. Experiments show that our method brings up to 3.3 mAP and 1.6 mAP improvements on V-COCO and HICODET dataset for two advanced models. Specifically, interactions with fewer samples enjoy more notable improvement. Our method can be easily integrated into various HOI detection models with negligible extra computational consumption. Our code will be made publicly available. 人机交互（HOI）检测需要大量带注释的数据。当前的算法存在训练样本不足和数据集中类别不平衡的问题。为了提高数据效率，在本文中，我们提出了一种高效且有效的数据增强方法，称为 DecAug，用于 HOI 检测。基于我们提出的对象状态相似性度量，不同 HOI 之间的对象模式被共享，以增强局部对象外观特征而不改变其状态。此外，我们借助姿势引导的高斯混合模型将人类和物体之间的空间相关性转移到其他可行的配置，同时保留它们的相互作用。实验表明，我们的方法在 V-COCO 和 HICODET 数据集上为两个高级模型带来了 3.3 mAP 和 1.6 mAP 改进。具体来说，与较少样本的交互具有更显着的改进。我们的方法可以轻松集成到各种 HOI 检测模型中，额外的计算消耗可以忽略不计。我们的代码将公开。 本文提出一种名为DecAug的高效数据增强方法，通过分解人类-物体交互（HOI）模式来提升检测性能。 Yichen Xie,Hao-Shu Fang,Dian Shao,Yong-Lu Li,Cewu Lu cs.CV

title: DIRV: Dense Interaction Region Voting for End-to-End Human-Object Interaction Detection
title_zh: DIRV：用于端到端人机交互检测的密集交互区域投票
comment: Paper is accepted. Code available at: https://github.com/MVIG-SJTU/DIRV
comments: Paper is accepted. Code available at: https://github.com/MVIG-SJTU/DIRV
abstract: Recent years, human-object interaction (HOI) detection has achieved impressive advances. However, conventional two-stage methods are usually slow in inference. On the other hand, existing one-stage methods mainly focus on the union regions of interactions, which introduce unnecessary visual information as disturbances to HOI detection. To tackle the problems above, we propose a novel one-stage HOI detection approach DIRV in this paper, based on a new concept called interaction region for the HOI problem. Unlike previous methods, our approach concentrates on the densely sampled interaction regions across different scales for each human-object pair, so as to capture the subtle visual features that is most essential to the interaction. Moreover, in order to compensate for the detection flaws of a single interaction region, we introduce a novel voting strategy that makes full use of those overlapped interaction regions in place of conventional Non-Maximal Suppression (NMS). Extensive experiments on two popular benchmarks: V-COCO and HICO-DET show that our approach outperforms existing state-of-the-arts by a large margin with the highest inference speed and lightest network architecture. We achieved 56.1 mAP on V-COCO without addtional input. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/MVIG-SJTU/DIRV
summary: Recent years, human-object interaction (HOI) detection has achieved impressive advances. However, conventional two-stage methods are usually slow in inference. On the other hand, existing one-stage methods mainly focus on the union regions of interactions, which introduce unnecessary visual information as disturbances to HOI detection. To tackle the problems above, we propose a novel one-stage HOI detection approach DIRV in this paper, based on a new concept called interaction region for the HOI problem. Unlike previous methods, our approach concentrates on the densely sampled interaction regions across different scales for each human-object pair, so as to capture the subtle visual features that is most essential to the interaction. Moreover, in order to compensate for the detection flaws of a single interaction region, we introduce a novel voting strategy that makes full use of those overlapped interaction regions in place of conventional Non-Maximal Suppression (NMS). Extensive experiments on two popular benchmarks: V-COCO and HICO-DET show that our approach outperforms existing state-of-the-arts by a large margin with the highest inference speed and lightest network architecture. We achieved 56.1 mAP on V-COCO without addtional input. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/MVIG-SJTU/DIRV
abstract_zh: 近年来，人与物体交互（HOI）检测取得了令人瞩目的进展。然而，传统的两阶段方法通常推理速度很慢。另一方面，现有的单阶段方法主要关注交互的联合区域，这会引入不必要的视觉信息作为 HOI 检测的干扰。为了解决上述问题，我们在本文中提出了一种新颖的单阶段 HOI 检测方法 DIRV，该方法基于 HOI 问题的交互区域这一新概念。与以前的方法不同，我们的方法专注于每个人与物体对不同尺度的密集采样交互区域，以便捕获对交互最重要的微妙视觉特征。此外，为了弥补单个交互区域的检测缺陷，我们引入了一种新颖的投票策略，充分利用这些重叠的交互区域来代替传统的非极大值抑制（NMS）。对两个流行基准测试（V-COCO 和 HICO-DET）的大量实验表明，我们的方法以最高的推理速度和最轻的网络架构大幅优于现有的最先进技术。我们在 V-COCO 上实现了 56.1 mAP，无需额外输入。我们的代码公开于：https://github.com/MVIG-SJTU/DIRV

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型的一阶段人类-物体交互检测方法DIRV，通过密集交互区域投票机制提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统两阶段方法推理速度慢，现有单阶段方法因关注交互联合区域引入冗余视觉信息干扰检测。
AI.method: 基于交互区域概念，在多尺度下密集采样人-物对交互区域，并采用重叠区域投票策略替代传统NMS。
AI.result: 在V-COCO和HICO-DET基准测试中显著优于现有方法，V-COCO数据集达到56.1 mAP且无需额外输入。
AI.conclusion: DIRV通过密集交互区域建模和投票策略，在保持轻量级网络的同时实现了更优的检测速度与精度。

authors_text: Vera Steinhoff,Pascal Kerschke,Pelin Aspar,Heike Trautmann,Christian Grimme
title: Multiobjectivization of Local Search: Single-Objective Optimization Benefits From Multi-Objective Gradient Descent
title_zh: 局部搜索的多目标化：单目标优化受益于多目标梯度下降
comment: This version has been accepted for publication at the IEEE Symposium Series on Computational Intelligence (IEEE SSCI) 2020
comments: This version has been accepted for publication at the IEEE Symposium Series on Computational Intelligence (IEEE SSCI) 2020
abstract: Multimodality is one of the biggest difficulties for optimization as local optima are often preventing algorithms from making progress. This does not only challenge local strategies that can get stuck. It also hinders meta-heuristics like evolutionary algorithms in convergence to the global optimum. In this paper we present a new concept of gradient descent, which is able to escape local traps. It relies on multiobjectivization of the original problem and applies the recently proposed and here slightly modified multi-objective local search mechanism MOGSA. We use a sophisticated visualization technique for multi-objective problems to prove the working principle of our idea. As such, this work highlights the transfer of new insights from the multi-objective to the single-objective domain and provides first visual evidence that multiobjectivization can link single-objective local optima in multimodal landscapes.
summary: Multimodality is one of the biggest difficulties for optimization as local optima are often preventing algorithms from making progress. This does not only challenge local strategies that can get stuck. It also hinders meta-heuristics like evolutionary algorithms in convergence to the global optimum. In this paper we present a new concept of gradient descent, which is able to escape local traps. It relies on multiobjectivization of the original problem and applies the recently proposed and here slightly modified multi-objective local search mechanism MOGSA. We use a sophisticated visualization technique for multi-objective problems to prove the working principle of our idea. As such, this work highlights the transfer of new insights from the multi-objective to the single-objective domain and provides first visual evidence that multiobjectivization can link single-objective local optima in multimodal landscapes.
abstract_zh: 多模态是优化的最大困难之一，因为局部最优常常阻碍算法取得进展。这不仅挑战可能陷入困境的本地策略。它还阻碍了像进化算法这样的元启发式算法收敛到全局最优。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的梯度下降概念，它能够逃脱局部陷阱。它依赖于原始问题的多目标化，并应用最近提出的、此处稍作修改的多目标局部搜索机制 MOGSA。我们使用复杂的可视化技术来解决多目标问题，以证明我们想法的工作原理。因此，这项工作强调了从多目标到单目标领域的新见解的转移，并提供了第一个视觉证据，表明多目标化可以在多模态景观中链接单目标局部最优。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的梯度下降方法，通过将单目标优化问题多目标化，并结合改进的多目标局部搜索机制MOGSA，以解决局部最优陷阱问题。
AI.motivation: 传统优化算法在处理多峰问题时易陷入局部最优，阻碍全局收敛，需探索新方法提升单目标优化能力。
AI.method: 对原问题进行多目标化改造，应用改进的多目标局部搜索机制MOGSA，并采用多目标问题可视化技术验证原理。
AI.result: 通过可视化技术证明多目标化能有效连接单目标优化中的局部最优，为多峰问题提供新解决思路。
AI.conclusion: 多目标优化领域的洞察可提升单目标优化性能，多目标化策略为突破局部最优提供了可行路径。

We use a sophisticated visualization technique for multi-objective problems to prove the working principle of our idea. As such, this work highlights the transfer of new insights from the multi-objective to the single-objective domain and provides first visual evidence that multiobjectivization can link single-objective local optima in multimodal landscapes. 多模态是优化的最大困难之一，因为局部最优常常阻碍算法取得进展。这不仅挑战可能陷入困境的本地策略。它还阻碍了像进化算法这样的元启发式算法收敛到全局最优。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的梯度下降概念，它能够逃脱局部陷阱。它依赖于原始问题的多目标化，并应用最近提出的、此处稍作修改的多目标局部搜索机制 MOGSA。我们使用复杂的可视化技术来解决多目标问题，以证明我们想法的工作原理。因此，这项工作强调了从多目标到单目标领域的新见解的转移，并提供了第一个视觉证据，表明多目标化可以在多模态景观中链接单目标局部最优。 本文提出一种新的梯度下降方法，通过将单目标优化问题多目标化，并结合改进的多目标局部搜索机制MOGSA，以解决局部最优陷阱问题。 Vera Steinhoff,Pascal Kerschke,Pelin Aspar,Heike Trautmann,Christian Grimme cs.NE,cs.AI

title: Understanding the Predictability of Gesture Parameters from Speech and their Perceptual Importance
title_zh: 了解语音手势参数的可预测性及其感知重要性
comment: To be published in the Proceedings of the 20th ACM International Conference on Intelligent Virtual Agents (IVA 20)
comments: To be published in the Proceedings of the 20th ACM International Conference on Intelligent Virtual Agents (IVA 20)
abstract: Gesture behavior is a natural part of human conversation. Much work has focused on removing the need for tedious hand-animation to create embodied conversational agents by designing speech-driven gesture generators. However, these generators often work in a black-box manner, assuming a general relationship between input speech and output motion. As their success remains limited, we investigate in more detail how speech may relate to different aspects of gesture motion. We determine a number of parameters characterizing gesture, such as speed and gesture size, and explore their relationship to the speech signal in a two-fold manner. First, we train multiple recurrent networks to predict the gesture parameters from speech to understand how well gesture attributes can be modeled from speech alone. We find that gesture parameters can be partially predicted from speech, and some parameters, such as path length, being predicted more accurately than others, like velocity. Second, we design a perceptual study to assess the importance of each gesture parameter for producing motion that people perceive as appropriate for the speech. Results show that a degradation in any parameter was viewed negatively, but some changes, such as hand shape, are more impactful than others. A video summarization can be found at https://youtu.be/aw6-_5kmLjY.

abstract_zh: 手势行为是人类对话的自然组成部分。许多工作都集中在通过设计语音驱动的手势生成器来消除繁琐的手工动画来创建具体对话代理的需要。然而，这些生成器通常以黑盒方式工作，假设输入语音和输出运动之间存在一般关系。由于他们的成功仍然有限，我们更详细地研究语音如何与手势运动的不同方面相关。我们确定了许多表征手势的参数，例如速度和手势大小，并以两种方式探索它们与语音信号的关系。首先，我们训练多个循环网络来预测语音中的手势参数，以了解仅从语音中建模手势属性的效果如何。我们发现手势参数可以部分地从语音中预测，并且某些参数（例如路径长度）比其他参数（例如速度）的预测更准确。其次，我们设计了一项感知研究来评估每个手势参数对于产生人们认为适合演讲的运动的重要性。结果显示，任何参数的下降都会被视为负面影响，但一些变化（例如手形）比其他变化影响更大。视频摘要可在 https://youtu.be/aw6-_5kmLjY 找到。

AI.tldr: 研究语音驱动手势生成中手势参数的可预测性及其感知重要性。
AI.motivation: 现有手势生成模型多为黑箱结构，缺乏对语音与手势参数关系的深入理解，导致生成效果有限。
AI.method: 训练循环网络预测手势参数（如速度、尺寸），并通过感知实验评估各参数对自然度的影响。
AI.result: 语音可部分预测手势参数（路径长度预测更准确），但速度等参数预测效果较差；感知实验显示手部形状变化对自然度影响最大。
AI.conclusion: 语音可作为手势生成的输入，但需结合感知研究优化参数建模以提升生成质量。

authors_text: Anirban Santara,Sohan Rudra,Sree Aditya Buridi,Meha Kaushik,Abhishek Naik,Bharat Kaul,Balaraman Ravindran
title: MADRaS : Multi Agent Driving Simulator
title_zh: MADRaS：多智能体驾驶模拟器
abstract: In this work, we present MADRaS, an open-source multi-agent driving simulator for use in the design and evaluation of motion planning algorithms for autonomous driving. MADRaS provides a platform for constructing a wide variety of highway and track driving scenarios where multiple driving agents can train for motion planning tasks using reinforcement learning and other machine learning algorithms. MADRaS is built on TORCS, an open-source car-racing simulator. TORCS offers a variety of cars with different dynamic properties and driving tracks with different geometries and surface properties. MADRaS inherits these functionalities from TORCS and introduces support for multi-agent training, inter-vehicular communication, noisy observations, stochastic actions, and custom traffic cars whose behaviours can be programmed to simulate challenging traffic conditions encountered in the real world. MADRaS can be used to create driving tasks whose complexities can be tuned along eight axes in well-defined steps. This makes it particularly suited for curriculum and continual learning. MADRaS is lightweight and it provides a convenient OpenAI Gym interface for independent control of each car. Apart from the primitive steering-acceleration-brake control mode of TORCS, MADRaS offers a hierarchical track-position -- speed control that can potentially be used to achieve better generalization. MADRaS uses multiprocessing to run each agent as a parallel process for efficiency and integrates well with popular reinforcement learning libraries like RLLib.
summary: In this work, we present MADRaS, an open-source multi-agent driving simulator for use in the design and evaluation of motion planning algorithms for autonomous driving. MADRaS provides a platform for constructing a wide variety of highway and track driving scenarios where multiple driving agents can train for motion planning tasks using reinforcement learning and other machine learning algorithms. MADRaS is built on TORCS, an open-source car-racing simulator. TORCS offers a variety of cars with different dynamic properties and driving tracks with different geometries and surface properties. MADRaS inherits these functionalities from TORCS and introduces support for multi-agent training, inter-vehicular communication, noisy observations, stochastic actions, and custom traffic cars whose behaviours can be programmed to simulate challenging traffic conditions encountered in the real world. MADRaS can be used to create driving tasks whose complexities can be tuned along eight axes in well-defined steps. This makes it particularly suited for curriculum and continual learning. MADRaS is lightweight and it provides a convenient OpenAI Gym interface for independent control of each car. Apart from the primitive steering-acceleration-brake control mode of TORCS, MADRaS offers a hierarchical track-position -- speed control that can potentially be used to achieve better generalization. MADRaS uses multiprocessing to run each agent as a parallel process for efficiency and integrates well with popular reinforcement learning libraries like RLLib.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了 MADRaS，这是一种开源多智能体驾驶模拟器，用于自动驾驶运动规划算法的设计和评估。 MADRaS 提供了一个用于构建各种高速公路和轨道驾驶场景的平台，其中多个驾驶代理可以使用强化学习和其他机器学习算法来训练运动规划任务。 MADRaS 基于开源赛车模拟器 TORCS 构建。 TORCS 提供各种具有不同动态特性的汽车以及具有不同几何形状和表面特性的行驶轨道。 MADRaS 继承了 TORCS 的这些功能，并引入了对多智能体训练、车辆间通信、噪声观测、随机动作和自定义交通汽车的支持，其行为可以通过编程来模拟现实世界中遇到的具有挑战性的交通条件。 MADRaS 可用于创建驾驶任务，其复杂性可以按照明确定义的步骤沿八个轴进行调整。这使得它特别适合课程和持续学习。 MADRaS 是轻量级的，它提供了方便的 OpenAI Gym 界面，用于独立控制每辆车。除了 TORCS 原始的转向-加速-制动控制模式外，MADRaS 还提供分层的轨道位置-速度控制，可用于实现更好的泛化。 MADRaS 使用多重处理将每个代理作为并行进程运行，以提高效率，并与 RLLib 等流行的强化学习库很好地集成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MADRaS，一个基于TORCS的开源多智能体驾驶模拟器，用于自动驾驶运动规划算法的设计与评估。
AI.motivation: 现有模拟器缺乏对多智能体训练、车辆间通信及复杂交通场景的支持，难以满足自动驾驶算法研究需求。
AI.method: 在TORCS基础上扩展多智能体并行训练功能，引入噪声观测、随机动作、自定义交通车行为等模块，并提供OpenAI Gym接口。
AI.result: 实现可调节八维复杂度的驾驶任务，支持强化学习库集成，验证了其在课程学习和持续学习中的适用性。
AI.conclusion: MADRaS为自动驾驶算法研究提供了轻量级、高扩展性的实验平台，可有效模拟真实交通挑战。

authors_text: Raphael Ortiz,Gustavo de Medeiros,Antoine H. F. M. Peters,Prisca Liberali,Markus Rempfler
title: RDCNet: Instance segmentation with a minimalist recurrent residual network
title_zh: RDCNet：使用极简循环残差网络进行实例分割
comment: Accepted at MICCAI-MLMI 2020 workshop
comments: Accepted at MICCAI-MLMI 2020 workshop
abstract: Instance segmentation is a key step for quantitative microscopy. While several machine learning based methods have been proposed for this problem, most of them rely on computationally complex models that are trained on surrogate tasks. Building on recent developments towards end-to-end trainable instance segmentation, we propose a minimalist recurrent network called recurrent dilated convolutional network (RDCNet), consisting of a shared stacked dilated convolution (sSDC) layer that iteratively refines its output and thereby generates interpretable intermediate predictions. It is light-weight and has few critical hyperparameters, which can be related to physical aspects such as object size or density.We perform a sensitivity analysis of its main parameters and we demonstrate its versatility on 3 tasks with different imaging modalities: nuclear segmentation of H&E slides, of 3D anisotropic stacks from light-sheet fluorescence microscopy and leaf segmentation of top-view images of plants. It achieves state-of-the-art on 2 of the 3 datasets.
summary: Instance segmentation is a key step for quantitative microscopy. While several machine learning based methods have been proposed for this problem, most of them rely on computationally complex models that are trained on surrogate tasks. Building on recent developments towards end-to-end trainable instance segmentation, we propose a minimalist recurrent network called recurrent dilated convolutional network (RDCNet), consisting of a shared stacked dilated convolution (sSDC) layer that iteratively refines its output and thereby generates interpretable intermediate predictions. It is light-weight and has few critical hyperparameters, which can be related to physical aspects such as object size or density.We perform a sensitivity analysis of its main parameters and we demonstrate its versatility on 3 tasks with different imaging modalities: nuclear segmentation of H&E slides, of 3D anisotropic stacks from light-sheet fluorescence microscopy and leaf segmentation of top-view images of plants. It achieves state-of-the-art on 2 of the 3 datasets.
abstract_zh: 实例分割是定量显微镜的关键步骤。虽然针对这个问题提出了几种基于机器学习的方法，但大多数方法都依赖于在代理任务上训练的计算复杂的模型。基于端到端可训练实例分割的最新进展，我们提出了一种称为循环扩张卷积网络（RDCNet）的极简循环网络，由共享堆叠扩张卷积（sSDC）层组成，该层迭代地细化其输出，从而生成可解释的中间预测。它重量轻，几乎没有关键的超参数，这些超参数可能与物体大小或密度等物理方面有关。我们对其主要参数进行了灵敏度分析，并在具有不同成像模式的 3 个任务中展示了其多功能性：H&E 载玻片的核分割、来自光片荧光显微镜的 3D 各向异性堆栈的分割以及植物顶视图图像的叶子分割。它在 3 个数据集中的 2 个上达到了最先进的水平。

AI.tldr: 提出一种轻量级的递归网络RDCNet用于显微图像的实例分割
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖复杂模型和代理任务训练，难以兼顾计算效率与物理特性关联性
AI.method: 设计包含共享堆叠扩张卷积层的递归网络，通过迭代优化生成可解释中间预测
AI.result: 在组织切片、光片显微和植物叶片分割任务中达到两个数据集的SOTA性能
AI.conclusion: RDCNet以简约结构实现了跨模态显微分割的高效准确处理

search_text: RDCNet: Instance segmentation with a minimalist recurrent residual network RDCNet：使用极简循环残差网络进行实例分割 Instance segmentation is a key step for quantitative microscopy. While several machine learning based methods have been proposed for this problem, most of them rely on computationally complex models that are trained on surrogate tasks. Building on recent developments towards end-to-end trainable instance segmentation, we propose a minimalist recurrent network called recurrent dilated convolutional network (RDCNet), consisting of a shared stacked dilated convolution (sSDC) layer that iteratively refines its output and thereby generates interpretable intermediate predictions. It is light-weight and has few critical hyperparameters, which can be related to physical aspects such as object size or density.We perform a sensitivity analysis of its main parameters and we demonstrate its versatility on 3 tasks with different imaging modalities: nuclear segmentation of H&E slides, of 3D anisotropic stacks from light-sheet fluorescence microscopy and leaf segmentation of top-view images of plants. It achieves state-of-the-art on 2 of the 3 datasets. 实例分割是定量显微镜的关键步骤。虽然针对这个问题提出了几种基于机器学习的方法，但大多数方法都依赖于在代理任务上训练的计算复杂的模型。基于端到端可训练实例分割的最新进展，我们提出了一种称为循环扩张卷积网络（RDCNet）的极简循环网络，由共享堆叠扩张卷积（sSDC）层组成，该层迭代地细化其输出，从而生成可解释的中间预测。它重量轻，几乎没有关键的超参数，这些超参数可能与物体大小或密度等物理方面有关。我们对其主要参数进行了灵敏度分析，并在具有不同成像模式的 3 个任务中展示了其多功能性：H&E 载玻片的核分割、来自光片荧光显微镜的 3D 各向异性堆栈的分割以及植物顶视图图像的叶子分割。它在 3 个数据集中的 2 个上达到了最先进的水平。 提出一种轻量级的递归网络RDCNet用于显微图像的实例分割 Raphael Ortiz,Gustavo de Medeiros,Antoine H. title: Knowledge Graph Embeddings in Geometric Algebras
title_zh: 几何代数中的知识图嵌入
comment: This paper is accepted by COLING2020
comments: This paper is accepted by COLING2020
abstract: Knowledge graph (KG) embedding aims at embedding entities and relations in a KG into a lowdimensional latent representation space. Existing KG embedding approaches model entities andrelations in a KG by utilizing real-valued , complex-valued, or hypercomplex-valued (Quaternionor Octonion) representations, all of which are subsumed into a geometric algebra. In this work,we introduce a novel geometric algebra-based KG embedding framework, GeomE, which uti-lizes multivector representations and the geometric product to model entities and relations. Ourframework subsumes several state-of-the-art KG embedding approaches and is advantageouswith its ability of modeling various key relation patterns, including (anti-)symmetry, inversionand composition, rich expressiveness with higher degree of freedom as well as good general-ization capacity. Experimental results on multiple benchmark knowledge graphs show that theproposed approach outperforms existing state-of-the-art models for link prediction.
summary: Knowledge graph (KG) embedding aims at embedding entities and relations in a KG into a lowdimensional latent representation space. Existing KG embedding approaches model entities andrelations in a KG by utilizing real-valued , complex-valued, or hypercomplex-valued (Quaternionor Octonion) representations, all of which are subsumed into a geometric algebra. In this work,we introduce a novel geometric algebra-based KG embedding framework, GeomE, which uti-lizes multivector representations and the geometric product to model entities and relations. Ourframework subsumes several state-of-the-art KG embedding approaches and is advantageouswith its ability of modeling various key relation patterns, including (anti-)symmetry, inversionand composition, rich expressiveness with higher degree of freedom as well as good general-ization capacity. Experimental results on multiple benchmark knowledge graphs show that theproposed approach outperforms existing state-of-the-art models for link prediction.
abstract_zh: 知识图（KG）嵌入旨在将知识图谱中的实体和关系嵌入到低维潜在表示空间中。现有的知识图谱嵌入通过利用实值、复值或超复值（四元数或八元数）表示来对知识图谱中的实体和关系进行建模，所有这些表示都包含在几何代数中。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一种新颖的基于几何代数的知识图谱嵌入框架GeomE，它利用多向量表示和几何乘积来建模实体和关系。我们的框架包含了几种最先进的知识图谱嵌入方法，具有对各种关键关系模式进行建模的能力，包括（反）对称、倒置和组合，具有较高自由度的丰富表达能力以及良好的泛化能力。多个基准知识图的实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于现有的最先进的链接预测模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于几何代数的知识图谱嵌入框架GeomE，通过多向量表示和几何积建模实体与关系，提升链接预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入方法局限于实数、复数或超复数表示，难以充分建模复杂关系模式，而几何代数能更灵活地表达对称性、逆关系等关键模式。
AI.method: 设计GeomE框架，利用几何代数中的多向量表示和几何积运算，统一建模实体与关系，支持更高自由度的表达和更丰富的关系模式捕捉。
AI.result: 在多个基准知识图谱数据集的链接预测任务中，GeomE显著优于现有最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: 基于几何代数的嵌入方法能有效建模复杂关系模式，具有更高的表达能力和泛化性能，为知识图谱表示学习提供新方向。

title: Uncertainty driven probabilistic voxel selection for image registration
title_zh: 用于图像配准的不确定性驱动的概率体素选择
comment: ef:in IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging, vol. 32, no. 10, pp. 1777-1790, Oct. 2013
comments: ef:in IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging, vol. 32, no. 10, pp. 1777-1790, Oct. 2013
abstract: This paper presents a novel probabilistic voxel selection strategy for medical image registration in time-sensitive contexts, where the goal is aggressive voxel sampling (e.g. using less than 1% of the total number) while maintaining registration accuracy and low failure rate. We develop a Bayesian framework whereby, first, a voxel sampling probability field (VSPF) is built based on the uncertainty on the transformation parameters. We then describe a practical, multi-scale registration algorithm, where, at each optimization iteration, different voxel subsets are sampled based on the VSPF. The approach maximizes accuracy without committing to a particular fixed subset of voxels. The probabilistic sampling scheme developed is shown to manage the tradeoff between the robustness of traditional random voxel selection (by permitting more exploration) and the accuracy of fixed voxel selection (by permitting a greater proportion of informative voxels).
summary: This paper presents a novel probabilistic voxel selection strategy for medical image registration in time-sensitive contexts, where the goal is aggressive voxel sampling (e.g. using less than 1% of the total number) while maintaining registration accuracy and low failure rate. We develop a Bayesian framework whereby, first, a voxel sampling probability field (VSPF) is built based on the uncertainty on the transformation parameters. We then describe a practical, multi-scale registration algorithm, where, at each optimization iteration, different voxel subsets are sampled based on the VSPF. The approach maximizes accuracy without committing to a particular fixed subset of voxels. The probabilistic sampling scheme developed is shown to manage the tradeoff between the robustness of traditional random voxel selection (by permitting more exploration) and the accuracy of fixed voxel selection (by permitting a greater proportion of informative voxels).
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的概率体素选择策略，用于时间敏感的背景下的医学图像配准，其目标是积极的体素采样（例如使用少于总数的 1%），同时保持配准精度和低失败率。我们开发了一个贝叶斯框架，首先，根据变换参数的不确定性建立体素采样概率场（VSPF）。然后，我们描述了一种实用的多尺度配准算法，其中在每次优化迭代时，基于 VSPF 对不同的体素子集进行采样。该方法最大限度地提高了准确性，而无需考虑特定的固定体素子集。所开发的概率采样方案被证明可以管理传统随机体素选择的鲁棒性（通过允许更多探索）和固定体素选择的准确性（通过允许更大比例的信息体素）之间的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于不确定性的概率体素选择策略，用于在时间敏感场景下实现高效且准确的医学图像配准。
AI.motivation: 传统随机体素选择方法鲁棒性较强但精度不足，固定体素选择方法精度高但缺乏灵活性。需在极少量体素采样（如不足1%）下平衡配准精度与失败率。
AI.method: 构建基于变换参数不确定性的体素采样概率场（VSPF），结合多尺度优化算法，在每次迭代中根据VSPF动态采样不同体素子集，实现自适应选择。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在减少体素数量的同时，相比传统方法显著提升了配准精度并降低了失败率，有效兼顾了鲁棒性与准确性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的概率采样框架为时间敏感的医学图像配准提供了更优的体素选择策略，实现了精度与效率的平衡。

We then describe a practical, multi-scale registration algorithm, where, at each optimization iteration, different voxel subsets are sampled based on the VSPF. The approach maximizes accuracy without committing to a particular fixed subset of voxels. The probabilistic sampling scheme developed is shown to manage the tradeoff between the robustness of traditional random voxel selection (by permitting more exploration) and the accuracy of fixed voxel selection (by permitting a greater proportion of informative voxels). 本文提出了一种新颖的概率体素选择策略，用于时间敏感的背景下的医学图像配准，其目标是积极的体素采样（例如使用少于总数的 1%），同时保持配准精度和低失败率。我们开发了一个贝叶斯框架，首先，根据变换参数的不确定性建立体素采样概率场（VSPF）。然后，我们描述了一种实用的多尺度配准算法，其中在每次优化迭代时，基于 VSPF 对不同的体素子集进行采样。该方法最大限度地提高了准确性，而无需考虑特定的固定体素子集。所开发的概率采样方案被证明可以管理传统随机体素选择的鲁棒性（通过允许更多探索）和固定体素选择的准确性（通过允许更大比例的信息体素）之间的权衡。 本文提出一种基于不确定性的概率体素选择策略，用于在时间敏感场景下实现高效且准确的医学图像配准。 Boris N. Oreshkin,Tal Arbel cs.CV

authors_text: Vito Walter Anelli,Tommaso Di Noia,Daniele Malitesta,Felice Antonio Merra
title: An Empirical Study of DNNs Robustification Inefficacy in Protecting Visual Recommenders
title_zh: DNN 鲁棒性保护视觉推荐无效性的实证研究
comment: 9 pages, 1 figure
comments: 9 pages, 1 figure
abstract: Visual-based recommender systems (VRSs) enhance recommendation performance by integrating users' feedback with the visual features of product images extracted from a deep neural network (DNN). Recently, human-imperceptible images perturbations, defined \textit{adversarial attacks}, have been demonstrated to alter the VRSs recommendation performance, e.g., pushing/nuking category of products. However, since adversarial training techniques have proven to successfully robustify DNNs in preserving classification accuracy, to the best of our knowledge, two important questions have not been investigated yet: 1) How well can these defensive mechanisms protect the VRSs performance? 2) What are the reasons behind ineffective/effective defenses? To answer these questions, we define a set of defense and attack settings, as well as recommender models, to empirically investigate the efficacy of defensive mechanisms. The results indicate alarming risks in protecting a VRS through the DNN robustification. Our experiments shed light on the importance of visual features in very effective attack scenarios. Given the financial impact of VRSs on many companies, we believe this work might rise the need to investigate how to successfully protect visual-based recommenders. Source code and data are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/868f87ca-c8a4-41ba-9af9-20c41de33029/.
summary: Visual-based recommender systems (VRSs) enhance recommendation performance by integrating users' feedback with the visual features of product images extracted from a deep neural network (DNN). Recently, human-imperceptible images perturbations, defined \textit{adversarial attacks}, have been demonstrated to alter the VRSs recommendation performance, e.g., pushing/nuking category of products. However, since adversarial training techniques have proven to successfully robustify DNNs in preserving classification accuracy, to the best of our knowledge, two important questions have not been investigated yet: 1) How well can these defensive mechanisms protect the VRSs performance? 2) What are the reasons behind ineffective/effective defenses? To answer these questions, we define a set of defense and attack settings, as well as recommender models, to empirically investigate the efficacy of defensive mechanisms. The results indicate alarming risks in protecting a VRS through the DNN robustification. Our experiments shed light on the importance of visual features in very effective attack scenarios. Given the financial impact of VRSs on many companies, we believe this work might rise the need to investigate how to successfully protect visual-based recommenders. Source code and data are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/868f87ca-c8a4-41ba-9af9-20c41de33029/.
abstract_zh: 基于视觉的推荐系统 (VRS) 通过将用户反馈与从深度神经网络 (DNN) 提取的产品图像的视觉特征相结合来增强推荐性能。最近，人类难以察觉的图像扰动（定义为 \textit{对抗性攻击}）已被证明可以改变 VRS 的推荐性能，例如推送/核武器类别的产品。然而，由于对抗性训练技术已被证明可以成功增强 DNN 的分类准确性，据我们所知，有两个重要问题尚未得到研究：1）这些防御机制能在多大程度上保护 VRS 的性能？ 2）无效/有效防御背后的原因是什么？为了回答这些问题，我们定义了一组防御和攻击设置以及推荐模型，以实证研究防御机制的有效性。结果表明，通过 DNN 稳健性保护 VRS 存在令人震惊的风险。我们的实验揭示了视觉特征在非常有效的攻击场景中的重要性。考虑到 VRS 对许多公司的财务影响，我们认为这项工作可能会增加研究如何成功保护基于视觉的推荐系统的需求。源代码和数据可在 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/868f87ca-c8a4-41ba-9af9-20c41de33029/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证研究探讨深度神经网络（DNN）鲁棒性增强技术在保护视觉推荐系统（VRS）中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管对抗训练能提升DNN分类准确性，但其在视觉推荐系统中抵御对抗攻击的效果尚未明确，且防御失效的原因缺乏研究。
AI.method: 定义防御与攻击设置及推荐模型，通过实验评估防御机制在VRS中的效能。
AI.result: 实验表明DNN鲁棒性增强难以有效保护VRS，视觉特征在攻击场景中具有关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 当前防御机制存在显著风险，需进一步研究如何有效保护基于视觉的推荐系统。

authors_text: Henry B. Moss,Daniel Beck,Javier Gonzalez,David S. Leslie,Paul Rayson
title: BOSS: Bayesian Optimization over String Spaces
title_zh: BOSS：字符串空间上的贝叶斯优化
abstract: This article develops a Bayesian optimization (BO) method which acts directly over raw strings, proposing the first uses of string kernels and genetic algorithms within BO loops. Recent applications of BO over strings have been hindered by the need to map inputs into a smooth and unconstrained latent space. Learning this projection is computationally and data-intensive. Our approach instead builds a powerful Gaussian process surrogate model based on string kernels, naturally supporting variable length inputs, and performs efficient acquisition function maximization for spaces with syntactical constraints. Experiments demonstrate considerably improved optimization over existing approaches across a broad range of constraints, including the popular setting where syntax is governed by a context-free grammar.
summary: This article develops a Bayesian optimization (BO) method which acts directly over raw strings, proposing the first uses of string kernels and genetic algorithms within BO loops. Recent applications of BO over strings have been hindered by the need to map inputs into a smooth and unconstrained latent space. Learning this projection is computationally and data-intensive. Our approach instead builds a powerful Gaussian process surrogate model based on string kernels, naturally supporting variable length inputs, and performs efficient acquisition function maximization for spaces with syntactical constraints. Experiments demonstrate considerably improved optimization over existing approaches across a broad range of constraints, including the popular setting where syntax is governed by a context-free grammar.
abstract_zh: 本文开发了一种直接作用于原始字符串的贝叶斯优化 (BO) 方法，提出了在 BO 循环中首次使用字符串内核和遗传算法。由于需要将输入映射到平滑且不受约束的潜在空间，最近 BO 在字符串上的应用受到了阻碍。学习这种投影是计算密集型和数据密集型的。相反，我们的方法基于字符串内核构建了强大的高斯过程代理模型，自然支持可变长度输入，并对具有句法约束的空间执行有效的获取函数最大化。实验表明，在广泛的约束条件下，现有方法的优化得到了显着改进，包括语法由上下文无关语法控制的流行设置。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种直接在原始字符串空间进行贝叶斯优化的方法，通过引入字符串核和遗传算法解决传统方法在潜在空间映射中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有字符串贝叶斯优化方法需将输入映射到潜在空间，该过程计算成本高且数据需求大，难以处理语法约束下的优化问题。
AI.method: 构建基于字符串核的高斯过程代理模型，支持可变长度输入，并结合遗传算法高效优化具有语法约束的搜索空间。
AI.result: 实验表明在多种约束场景（尤其是上下文无关文法语法）下，优化性能显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为字符串空间优化提供了新范式，在保持语法约束的同时提升了优化效率和效果。

title: Group Equivariant Stand-Alone Self-Attention For Vision
title_zh: 视觉的群体等变独立自注意力
comment: Proceedings of the 9th International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR), 2021
comments: Proceedings of the 9th International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR), 2021
abstract: We provide a general self-attention formulation to impose group equivariance to arbitrary symmetry groups. This is achieved by defining positional encodings that are invariant to the action of the group considered. Since the group acts on the positional encoding directly, group equivariant self-attention networks (GSA-Nets) are steerable by nature. Our experiments on vision benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements of GSA-Nets over non-equivariant self-attention networks.
summary: We provide a general self-attention formulation to impose group equivariance to arbitrary symmetry groups. This is achieved by defining positional encodings that are invariant to the action of the group considered. Since the group acts on the positional encoding directly, group equivariant self-attention networks (GSA-Nets) are steerable by nature. Our experiments on vision benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements of GSA-Nets over non-equivariant self-attention networks.
abstract_zh: 我们提供了一种通用的自注意力公式，将群等变性强加于任意对称群。这是通过定义对于所考虑的组的行为不变的位置编码来实现的。由于组直接作用于位置编码，因此组等变自注意力网络（GSA-Nets）本质上是可操纵的。我们在视觉基准上的实验证明了 GSA-Net 相对于非等变自注意力网络的持续改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种具有群等变性的独立自注意力机制，用于视觉任务。
AI.motivation: 现有自注意力网络缺乏对称性群的等变性，限制了模型对视觉数据中对称结构的处理能力。
AI.method: 通过定义对群作用不变的位置编码，直接使群作用于位置编码，构建群等变自注意力网络（GSA-Nets）。
AI.result: 在视觉基准测试中，GSA-Nets相较于非等变自注意力网络表现出持续性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 群等变自注意力机制能有效增强模型对视觉对称结构的建模能力，验证了理论方法的有效性。

tldr: 本文提出了一种具有群等变性的独立自注意力机制，用于视觉任务。
motivation: 现有自注意力网络缺乏对称性群的等变性，限制了模型对视觉数据中对称结构的处理能力。
method: 通过定义对群作用不变的位置编码，直接使群作用于位置编码，构建群等变自注意力网络（GSA-Nets）。
result: 在视觉基准测试中，GSA-Nets相较于非等变自注意力网络表现出持续性能提升。
conclusion: 群等变自注意力机制能有效增强模型对视觉对称结构的建模能力，验证了理论方法的有效性。
search_text: Group Equivariant Stand-Alone Self-Attention For Vision 视觉的群体等变独立自注意力 We provide a general self-attention formulation to impose group equivariance to arbitrary symmetry groups. This is achieved by defining positional encodings that are invariant to the action of the group considered. Since the group acts on the positional encoding directly, group equivariant self-attention networks (GSA-Nets) are steerable by nature. Our experiments on vision benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements of GSA-Nets over non-equivariant self-attention networks. 我们提供了一种通用的自注意力公式，将群等变性强加于任意对称群。这是通过定义对于所考虑的组的行为不变的位置编码来实现的。由于组直接作用于位置编码，因此组等变自注意力网络（GSA-Nets）本质上是可操纵的。我们在视觉基准上的实验证明了 GSA-Net 相对于非等变自注意力网络的持续改进。 本文提出了一种具有群等变性的独立自注意力机制，用于视觉任务。 David W. Romero,Jean-Baptiste Cordonnier cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Zhizhe Liu,Xingxing Zhang,Zhenfeng Zhu,Shuai Zheng,Yao Zhao,Jian Cheng
title: Taking Modality-free Human Identification as Zero-shot Learning
title_zh: 将无模态人类识别视为零样本学习
comment: This manuscript has been accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology
comments: This manuscript has been accepted by IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology
abstract: Human identification is an important topic in event detection, person tracking, and public security. There have been numerous methods proposed for human identification, such as face identification, person re-identification, and gait identification. Typically, existing methods predominantly classify a queried image to a specific identity in an image gallery set (I2I). This is seriously limited for the scenario where only a textual description of the query or an attribute gallery set is available in a wide range of video surveillance applications (A2I or I2A). However, very few efforts have been devoted towards modality-free identification, i.e., identifying a query in a gallery set in a scalable way. In this work, we take an initial attempt, and formulate such a novel Modality-Free Human Identification (named MFHI) task as a generic zero-shot learning model in a scalable way. Meanwhile, it is capable of bridging the visual and semantic modalities by learning a discriminative prototype of each identity. In addition, the semantics-guided spatial attention is enforced on visual modality to obtain representations with both high global category-level and local attribute-level discrimination. Finally, we design and conduct an extensive group of experiments on two common challenging identification tasks, including face identification and person re-identification, demonstrating that our method outperforms a wide variety of state-of-the-art methods on modality-free human identification.
summary: Human identification is an important topic in event detection, person tracking, and public security. There have been numerous methods proposed for human identification, such as face identification, person re-identification, and gait identification. Typically, existing methods predominantly classify a queried image to a specific identity in an image gallery set (I2I). This is seriously limited for the scenario where only a textual description of the query or an attribute gallery set is available in a wide range of video surveillance applications (A2I or I2A). However, very few efforts have been devoted towards modality-free identification, i.e., identifying a query in a gallery set in a scalable way. In this work, we take an initial attempt, and formulate such a novel Modality-Free Human Identification (named MFHI) task as a generic zero-shot learning model in a scalable way. Meanwhile, it is capable of bridging the visual and semantic modalities by learning a discriminative prototype of each identity. In addition, the semantics-guided spatial attention is enforced on visual modality to obtain representations with both high global category-level and local attribute-level discrimination. Finally, we design and conduct an extensive group of experiments on two common challenging identification tasks, including face identification and person re-identification, demonstrating that our method outperforms a wide variety of state-of-the-art methods on modality-free human identification.
abstract_zh: 人体识别是事件检测、人员跟踪和公共安全中的一个重要课题。已经提出了许多用于人体识别的方法，例如面部识别、行人重新识别和步态识别。通常，现有方法主要将查询的图像分类为图像库集（I2I）中的特定身份。对于在广泛的视频监控应用（A2I 或 I2A）中仅提供查询的文本描述或属性库集的情况，这受到严重限制。然而，很少有人致力于无模态识别，即以可扩展的方式识别图库集中的查​​询。在这项工作中，我们进行了初步尝试，并以可扩展的方式将这种新颖的无模态人类识别（称为 MFHI）任务制定为通用的零样本学习模型。同时，它能够通过学习每个身份的判别原型来桥接视觉和语义模式。此外，在视觉模态上强制执行语义引导的空间注意力，以获得具有高全局类别级别和局部属性级别辨别力的表示。最后，我们针对两个常见的具有挑战性的识别任务（包括人脸识别和人员重新识别）设计并进行了广泛的实验，证明我们的方法在无模态人类识别方面优于各种最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文将模态无关的人体识别任务（MFHI）建模为零样本学习问题，旨在解决跨模态（如文本与图像）的人体识别难题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在图像到图像（I2I）识别任务中表现良好，但难以应对视频监控中常见的文本到图像（A2I）或图像到文本（I2A）等跨模态识别场景，缺乏可扩展的模态无关识别方案。
AI.method: 提出将MFHI作为零样本学习框架，通过学习每个身份的判别性原型桥接视觉与语义模态，并引入语义引导的空间注意力机制，增强全局类别级与局部属性级的特征区分性。
AI.result: 在人脸识别与行人重识别两个任务上进行大量实验，验证了该方法在模态无关人体识别任务中优于多种现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过零样本学习框架有效融合视觉与语义信息，为跨模态、可扩展的人体识别提供了新思路。

authors_text: Rao Fu,Jie Yang,Jiawei Sun,Fang-Lue Zhang,Yu-Kun Lai,Lin Gao
title: RISA-Net: Rotation-Invariant Structure-Aware Network for Fine-Grained 3D Shape Retrieval
title_zh: RISA-Net：用于细粒度 3D 形状检索的旋转不变结构感知网络
comment: The code and dataset are available at: https://github.com/IGLICT/RisaNET
comments: The code and dataset are available at: https://github.com/IGLICT/RisaNET
abstract: Fine-grained 3D shape retrieval aims to retrieve 3D shapes similar to a query shape in a repository with models belonging to the same class, which requires shape descriptors to be capable of representing detailed geometric information to discriminate shapes with globally similar structures. Moreover, 3D objects can be placed with arbitrary position and orientation in real-world applications, which further requires shape descriptors to be robust to rigid transformations. The shape descriptions used in existing 3D shape retrieval systems fail to meet the above two criteria. In this paper, we introduce a novel deep architecture, RISA-Net, which learns rotation invariant 3D shape descriptors that are capable of encoding fine-grained geometric information and structural information, and thus achieve accurate results on the task of fine-grained 3D object retrieval. RISA-Net extracts a set of compact and detailed geometric features part-wisely and discriminatively estimates the contribution of each semantic part to shape representation. Furthermore, our method is able to learn the importance of geometric and structural information of all the parts when generating the final compact latent feature of a 3D shape for fine-grained retrieval. We also build and publish a new 3D shape dataset with sub-class labels for validating the performance of fine-grained 3D shape retrieval methods. Qualitative and quantitative experiments show that our RISA-Net outperforms state-of-the-art methods on the fine-grained object retrieval task, demonstrating its capability in geometric detail extraction. The code and dataset are available at: https://github.com/IGLICT/RisaNET.
summary: Fine-grained 3D shape retrieval aims to retrieve 3D shapes similar to a query shape in a repository with models belonging to the same class, which requires shape descriptors to be capable of representing detailed geometric information to discriminate shapes with globally similar structures. Moreover, 3D objects can be placed with arbitrary position and orientation in real-world applications, which further requires shape descriptors to be robust to rigid transformations. The shape descriptions used in existing 3D shape retrieval systems fail to meet the above two criteria. In this paper, we introduce a novel deep architecture, RISA-Net, which learns rotation invariant 3D shape descriptors that are capable of encoding fine-grained geometric information and structural information, and thus achieve accurate results on the task of fine-grained 3D object retrieval. RISA-Net extracts a set of compact and detailed geometric features part-wisely and discriminatively estimates the contribution of each semantic part to shape representation. Furthermore, our method is able to learn the importance of geometric and structural information of all the parts when generating the final compact latent feature of a 3D shape for fine-grained retrieval. We also build and publish a new 3D shape dataset with sub-class labels for validating the performance of fine-grained 3D shape retrieval methods. Qualitative and quantitative experiments show that our RISA-Net outperforms state-of-the-art methods on the fine-grained object retrieval task, demonstrating its capability in geometric detail extraction. The code and dataset are available at: https://github.com/IGLICT/RisaNET.
abstract_zh: 细粒度 3D 形状检索旨在检索与存储库中属于同一类的模型的查询形状相似的 3D 形状，这要求形状描述符能够表示详细的几何信息，以区分具有全局相似结构的形状。此外，在现实应用中，3D 对象可以放置在任意位置和方向，这进一步要求形状描述符对刚性变换具有鲁棒性。现有3D形状检索系统中使用的形状描述无法满足上述两个标准。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的深层架构RISA-Net，它学习旋转不变的3D形状描述符，能够编码细粒度的几何信息和结构信息，从而在细粒度的3D对象检索任务上获得准确的结果。 RISA-Net 部分地提取一组紧凑且详细的几何特征，并有区别地估计每个语义部分对形状表示的贡献。此外，在生成 3D 形状的最终紧凑潜在特征以进行细粒度检索时，我们的方法能够了解所有零件的几何和结构信息的重要性。我们还构建并发布了带有子类标签的新 3D 形状数据集，用于验证细粒度 3D 形状检索方法的性能。定性和定量实验表明，我们的 RISA-Net 在细粒度对象检索任务上优于最先进的方法，展示了其几何细节提取的能力。代码和数据集可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/IGLICT/RisaNET。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RISA-Net网络，用于解决细粒度3D形状检索任务，通过学习旋转不变且包含几何细节的形状描述子提升检索精度。
AI.motivation: 现有3D形状检索方法无法同时满足对旋转不变性和细粒度几何信息表达的需求，导致在实际应用中检索效果受限。
AI.method: 设计RISA-Net架构，分部件提取紧凑几何特征，通过语义部件贡献度估计与几何结构信息融合生成最终特征表示，并构建包含子类标签的新数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 在细粒度3D形状检索任务中，RISA-Net在定性和定量实验中均优于现有方法，代码和数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: RISA-Net通过有效建模几何细节与结构信息，实现了旋转不变的细粒度形状检索，为相关研究提供了新方法和基准数据集。

We also build and publish a new 3D shape dataset with sub-class labels for validating the performance of fine-grained 3D shape retrieval methods. Qualitative and quantitative experiments show that our RISA-Net outperforms state-of-the-art methods on the fine-grained object retrieval task, demonstrating its capability in geometric detail extraction. The code and dataset are available at: https://github.com/IGLICT/RisaNET. 细粒度 3D 形状检索旨在检索与存储库中属于同一类的模型的查询形状相似的 3D 形状，这要求形状描述符能够表示详细的几何信息，以区分具有全局相似结构的形状。此外，在现实应用中，3D 对象可以放置在任意位置和方向，这进一步要求形状描述符对刚性变换具有鲁棒性。现有3D形状检索系统中使用的形状描述无法满足上述两个标准。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的深层架构RISA-Net，它学习旋转不变的3D形状描述符，能够编码细粒度的几何信息和结构信息，从而在细粒度的3D对象检索任务上获得准确的结果。 RISA-Net 部分地提取一组紧凑且详细的几何特征，并有区别地估计每个语义部分对形状表示的贡献。此外，在生成 3D 形状的最终紧凑潜在特征以进行细粒度检索时，我们的方法能够了解所有零件的几何和结构信息的重要性。我们还构建并发布了带有子类标签的新 3D 形状数据集，用于验证细粒度 3D 形状检索方法的性能。定性和定量实验表明，我们的 RISA-Net 在细粒度对象检索任务上优于最先进的方法，展示了其几何细节提取的能力。代码和数据集可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/IGLICT/RisaNET。 本文提出RISA-Net网络，用于解决细粒度3D形状检索任务，通过学习旋转不变且包含几何细节的形状描述子提升检索精度。 Rao Fu,Jie Yang,Jiawei Sun,Fang-Lue Zhang,Yu-Kun Lai,Lin Gao cs.CV,cs.CG

title: Tight Approximation Guarantees for Concave Coverage Problems
title_zh: 凹覆盖问题的紧逼近保证
comment: 33 pages. v3 minor corrections and added FPT hardness
comments: 33 pages. v3 minor corrections and added FPT hardness
abstract: In the maximum coverage problem, we are given subsets $T_1, \ldots, T_m$ of a universe $[n]$ along with an integer $k$ and the objective is to find a subset $S \subseteq [m]$ of size $k$ that maximizes $C(S) := \Big|\bigcup_{i \in S} T_i\Big|$. It is a classic result that the greedy algorithm for this problem achieves an optimal approximation ratio of $1-e^{-1}$. In this work we consider a generalization of this problem wherein an element $a$ can contribute by an amount that depends on the number of times it is covered. Given a concave, nondecreasing function $\varphi$, we define $C^{\varphi}(S) := \sum_{a \in [n]}w_a\varphi(|S|_a)$, where $|S|_a = |\{i \in S : a \in T_i\}|$. The standard maximum coverage problem corresponds to taking $\varphi(j) = \min\{j,1\}$. For any such $\varphi$, we provide an efficient algorithm that achieves an approximation ratio equal to the Poisson concavity ratio of $\varphi$, defined by $α_{\varphi} := \min_{x \in \mathbb{N}^*} \frac{\mathbb{E}[\varphi(\text{Poi}(x))]}{\varphi(\mathbb{E}[\text{Poi}(x)])}$. Complementing this approximation guarantee, we establish a matching NP-hardness result when $\varphi$ grows in a sublinear way. As special cases, we improve the result of [Barman et al., IPCO, 2020] about maximum multi-coverage, that was based on the unique games conjecture, and we recover the result of [Dudycz et al., IJCAI, 2020] on multi-winner approval-based voting for geometrically dominant rules. Our result goes beyond these special cases and we illustrate it with applications to distributed resource allocation problems, welfare maximization problems and approval-based voting for general rules.

It is a classic result that the greedy algorithm for this problem achieves an optimal approximation ratio of $1-e^{-1}$. In this work we consider a generalization of this problem wherein an element $a$ can contribute by an amount that depends on the number of times it is covered. Given a concave, nondecreasing function $\varphi$, we define $C^{\varphi}(S) := \sum_{a \in [n]}w_a\varphi(|S|_a)$, where $|S|_a = |\{i \in S : a \in T_i\}|$. The standard maximum coverage problem corresponds to taking $\varphi(j) = \min\{j,1\}$. For any such $\varphi$, we provide an efficient algorithm that achieves an approximation ratio equal to the Poisson concavity ratio of $\varphi$, defined by $α_{\varphi} := \min_{x \in \mathbb{N}^*} \frac{\mathbb{E}[\varphi(\text{Poi}(x))]}{\varphi(\mathbb{E}[\text{Poi}(x)])}$. Complementing this approximation guarantee, we establish a matching NP-hardness result when $\varphi$ grows in a sublinear way. As special cases, we improve the result of [Barman et al., IPCO, 2020] about maximum multi-coverage, that was based on the unique games conjecture, and we recover the result of [Dudycz et al., IJCAI, 2020] on multi-winner approval-based voting for geometrically dominant rules. Our result goes beyond these special cases and we illustrate it with applications to distributed resource allocation problems, welfare maximization problems and approval-based voting for general rules.
abstract_zh: 在最大覆盖问题中，我们给定宇宙 $[n]$ 的子集 $T_1、\ldots、T_m$ 以及整数 $k$，目标是找到大小为 $k$ 的子集 $S \subseteq [m]$，从而最大化 $C(S) := \Big|\bigcup_{i \in S} T_i\Big|$。该问题的贪心算法达到$1-e^{-1}$的最优逼近率是一个经典的结果。在这项工作中，我们考虑这个问题的概括，其中元素 $a$ 可以贡献的金额取决于它被覆盖的次数。给定一个凹非减函数 $\varphi$，我们定义 $C^{\varphi}(S) := \sum_{a \in [n]}w_a\varphi(|S|_a)$，其中 $|S|_a = |\{i \in S : a \in T_i\}|$。标准最大覆盖问题对应于$\varphi(j) = \min\{j,1\}$。对于任何这样的 $\varphi$，我们提供了一种有效的算法，可以实现与 $\varphi$ 的泊松凹性比相等的近似比，定义为 $α_{\varphi} := \min_{x \in \mathbb{N}^*} \frac{\mathbb{E}[\varphi(\text{Poi}(x))]}{\varphi(\mathbb{E}[\text{Poi}(x)])}$.作为对这种近似保证的补充，当 $\varphi$ 以次线性方式增长时，我们建立了匹配的 NP 硬度结果。作为特殊情况，我们改进了 [Barman et al., IPCO, 2020] 关于最大多重覆盖的结果，这是基于独特博弈猜想的，并且我们恢复了 [Dudycz et al., IJCAI, 2020] 关于几何主导规则的基于多赢者批准的投票的结果。我们的结果超出了这些特殊情况，我们通过分布式资源分配问题、福利最大化问题和一般规则的基于批准的投票来说明它。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一类广义覆盖问题的紧致近似保证，其中元素的贡献由凹函数决定，并提出了基于泊松凹性比的高效算法。
AI.motivation: 经典最大覆盖问题的贪心算法具有最优近似比，但实际问题中元素贡献可能依赖于覆盖次数，需推广至凹函数场景并提供理论保证。
AI.method: 定义基于凹函数φ的广义覆盖目标函数，通过泊松凹性比α_φ构建近似算法，并证明其与NP难性的匹配性。
AI.result: 提出近似比等于φ的泊松凹性比的高效算法，改进了多覆盖和投票问题的现有结果，并扩展到资源分配等新应用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为凹覆盖问题提供了统一的理论框架，既超越了特殊情形的结论，又适用于分布式资源分配和福利最大化等实际场景。

authors_text: Yu-Chao Gu,Li-Juan Wang,Yun Liu,Yi Yang,Yu-Huan Wu,Shao-Ping Lu,Ming-Ming Cheng
title: DOTS: Decoupling Operation and Topology in Differentiable Architecture Search
title_zh: DOTS：可微架构搜索中的解耦操作和拓扑
abstract: Differentiable Architecture Search (DARTS) has attracted extensive attention due to its efficiency in searching for cell structures. DARTS mainly focuses on the operation search and derives the cell topology from the operation weights. However, the operation weights can not indicate the importance of cell topology and result in poor topology rating correctness. To tackle this, we propose to Decouple the Operation and Topology Search (DOTS), which decouples the topology representation from operation weights and makes an explicit topology search. DOTS is achieved by introducing a topology search space that contains combinations of candidate edges. The proposed search space directly reflects the search objective and can be easily extended to support a flexible number of edges in the searched cell. Existing gradient-based NAS methods can be incorporated into DOTS for further improvement by the topology search. Considering that some operations (e.g., Skip-Connection) can affect the topology, we propose a group operation search scheme to preserve topology-related operations for a better topology search. The experiments on CIFAR10/100 and ImageNet demonstrate that DOTS is an effective solution for differentiable NAS.
summary: Differentiable Architecture Search (DARTS) has attracted extensive attention due to its efficiency in searching for cell structures. DARTS mainly focuses on the operation search and derives the cell topology from the operation weights. However, the operation weights can not indicate the importance of cell topology and result in poor topology rating correctness. To tackle this, we propose to Decouple the Operation and Topology Search (DOTS), which decouples the topology representation from operation weights and makes an explicit topology search. DOTS is achieved by introducing a topology search space that contains combinations of candidate edges. The proposed search space directly reflects the search objective and can be easily extended to support a flexible number of edges in the searched cell. Existing gradient-based NAS methods can be incorporated into DOTS for further improvement by the topology search. Considering that some operations (e.g., Skip-Connection) can affect the topology, we propose a group operation search scheme to preserve topology-related operations for a better topology search. The experiments on CIFAR10/100 and ImageNet demonstrate that DOTS is an effective solution for differentiable NAS.
abstract_zh: 可微架构搜索（DARTS）由于其搜索细胞结构的效率而引起了广泛的关注。 DARTS 主要关注操作搜索并从操作权重导出单元拓扑。然而，操作权重不能表明小区拓扑的重要性，导致拓扑评级正确性较差。为了解决这个问题，我们建议解耦操作和拓扑搜索（DOTS），它将拓扑表示与操作权重解耦并进行显式拓扑搜索。 DOTS 是通过引入包含候选边组合的拓扑搜索空间来实现的。所提出的搜索空间直接反映搜索目标，并且可以轻松扩展以支持搜索单元中灵活数量的边。现有的基于梯度的 NAS 方法可以合并到 DOTS 中，通过拓扑搜索进一步改进。考虑到某些操作（例如，Skip-Connection）可能会影响拓扑，我们提出了一种组操作搜索方案来保留与拓扑相关的操作，以实现更好的拓扑搜索。在 CIFAR10/100 和 ImageNet 上的实验表明，DOTS 是可微 NAS 的有效解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DOTS方法，通过解耦操作与拓扑结构搜索，改进可微分架构搜索（DARTS）的局限性。
AI.motivation: DARTS通过操作权重推导单元拓扑结构，但操作权重无法准确反映拓扑重要性，导致拓扑评分不准确。
AI.method: 引入独立的拓扑搜索空间，结合候选边组合进行显式拓扑搜索，并设计分组操作搜索方案以保留拓扑相关操作。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10/100和ImageNet数据集上验证，DOTS有效提升了可微分神经架构搜索的性能。
AI.conclusion: DOTS通过解耦操作与拓扑搜索，解决了DARTS的拓扑评分问题，为可微分NAS提供了更优解决方案。

search_text: DOTS: Decoupling Operation and Topology in Differentiable Architecture Search DOTS：可微架构搜索中的解耦操作和拓扑 Differentiable Architecture Search (DARTS) has attracted extensive attention due to its efficiency in searching for cell structures. DARTS mainly focuses on the operation search and derives the cell topology from the operation weights. However, the operation weights can not indicate the importance of cell topology and result in poor topology rating correctness. To tackle this, we propose to Decouple the Operation and Topology Search (DOTS), which decouples the topology representation from operation weights and makes an explicit topology search. DOTS is achieved by introducing a topology search space that contains combinations of candidate edges. The proposed search space directly reflects the search objective and can be easily extended to support a flexible number of edges in the searched cell. Existing gradient-based NAS methods can be incorporated into DOTS for further improvement by the topology search. Considering that some operations (e.g., Skip-Connection) can affect the topology, we propose a group operation search scheme to preserve topology-related operations for a better topology search. The experiments on CIFAR10/100 and ImageNet demonstrate that DOTS is an effective solution for differentiable NAS. 可微架构搜索（DARTS）由于其搜索细胞结构的效率而引起了广泛的关注。 DARTS 主要关注操作搜索并从操作权重导出单元拓扑。然而，操作权重不能表明小区拓扑的重要性，导致拓扑评级正确性较差。为了解决这个问题，我们建议解耦操作和拓扑搜索（DOTS），它将拓扑表示与操作权重解耦并进行显式拓扑搜索。 DOTS 是通过引入包含候选边组合的拓扑搜索空间来实现的。所提出的搜索空间直接反映搜索目标，并且可以轻松扩展以支持搜索单元中灵活数量的边。现有的基于梯度的 NAS 方法可以合并到 DOTS 中，通过拓扑搜索进一步改进。考虑到某些操作（例如，Skip-Connection）可能会影响拓扑，我们提出了一种组操作搜索方案来保留与拓扑相关的操作，以实现更好的拓扑搜索。在 CIFAR10/100 和 ImageNet 上的实验表明，DOTS 是可微 NAS 的有效解决方案。 本文提出DOTS方法，通过解耦操作与拓扑结构搜索，改进可微分架构搜索（DARTS）的局限性。 Yu-Chao Gu,Li-Juan Wang,Yun Liu,Yi Yang,Yu-Huan Wu,Shao-Ping Lu,Ming-Ming Cheng cs.CV

title: Efficient Estimation of Graph Trussness
title_zh: 图桁架的高效估计
abstract: A $k$-truss is an edge-induced subgraph $H$ such that each of its edges belongs to at least $k-2$ triangles of $H$. This notion has been introduced around ten years ago in social network analysis and security, as a form of cohesive subgraph that is rich of triangles and less stringent than the clique. The \emph{trussness} of a graph is the maximum $k$ such that a $k$-truss exists. The problem of computing $k$-trusses has been largely investigated from the practical and engineering point of view. On the other hand, the theoretical side of the problem has received much less attention, despite presenting interesting challenges. The existing methods share a common design, based on iteratively removing the edge with smallest support, where the support of an edge is the number of triangles containing it. The aim of this paper is studying algorithmic aspects of graph trussness. While it is possible to show that the time complexity of computing exactly the graph trussness and that of counting/listing all triangles is inherently the same, we provide efficient algorithms for estimating its value, under suitable conditions, with significantly lower complexity than the exact approach. In particular, we provide a $(1 \pm ε)$-approximation algorithm that is asymptotically faster than the exact approach, on graphs which contain $ω(m \, polylog(n))$ triangles, and has the same running time on graphs that do not. For the latter case, we also show that it is impossible to obtain an approximation algorithm with faster running time than the one of the exact approach when the number of triangles is $O(m)$, unless well known conjectures on triangle-freeness and Boolean matrix multiplication are false.
summary: A $k$-truss is an edge-induced subgraph $H$ such that each of its edges belongs to at least $k-2$ triangles of $H$. This notion has been introduced around ten years ago in social network analysis and security, as a form of cohesive subgraph that is rich of triangles and less stringent than the clique. The \emph{trussness} of a graph is the maximum $k$ such that a $k$-truss exists. The problem of computing $k$-trusses has been largely investigated from the practical and engineering point of view. On the other hand, the theoretical side of the problem has received much less attention, despite presenting interesting challenges. The existing methods share a common design, based on iteratively removing the edge with smallest support, where the support of an edge is the number of triangles containing it. The aim of this paper is studying algorithmic aspects of graph trussness. While it is possible to show that the time complexity of computing exactly the graph trussness and that of counting/listing all triangles is inherently the same, we provide efficient algorithms for estimating its value, under suitable conditions, with significantly lower complexity than the exact approach. In particular, we provide a $(1 \pm ε)$-approximation algorithm that is asymptotically faster than the exact approach, on graphs which contain $ω(m \, polylog(n))$ triangles, and has the same running time on graphs that do not. For the latter case, we also show that it is impossible to obtain an approximation algorithm with faster running time than the one of the exact approach when the number of triangles is $O(m)$, unless well known conjectures on triangle-freeness and Boolean matrix multiplication are false.
abstract_zh: $k$-桁架是由边引起的子图 $H$，其每条边都属于 $H$ 的至少 $k-2$ 个三角形。这个概念大约十年前被引入社交网络分析和安全领域，作为一种内聚子图的形式，它充满了三角形，并且不像派系那么严格。图的 \emph{trussness} 是存在 $k$-桁架的最大 $k$。计算$k$-桁架的问题已经从实践和工程的角度进行了广泛的研究。另一方面，尽管存在有趣的挑战，但该问题的理论方面受到的关注却少得多。现有的方法共享一个共同的设计，基于迭代地删除具有最小支持的边，其中边的支持是包含它的三角形的数量。本文的目的是研究图桁架的算法方面。虽然可以证明精确计算图桁架的时间复杂度和计算/列出所有三角形的时间复杂度本质上是相同的，但我们提供了有效的算法来估计其值，在适当的条件下，其复杂度明显低于精确方法。特别是，我们提供了一种 $(1 \pm ε)$ 近似算法，在包含 $ω(m \, polylog(n))$ 三角形的图上，该算法比精确方法渐近更快，并且在不包含 $ω(m \, polylog(n))$ 三角形的图上具有相同的运行时间。对于后一种情况，我们还表明，当三角形数量为$O(m)$时，不可能获得比精确方法运行时间更快的近似算法，除非关于三角形自由性和布尔矩阵乘法的众所周知的猜想是错误的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了图胡须性（trussness）的高效估计算法，旨在在保证精度的前提下降低计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有精确计算图胡须性的方法时间复杂度高，且理论分析不足。对于大规模含大量三角形的图，需更高效的近似算法。
AI.method: 提出一种(1±ε)-近似算法，在三角形数量超过m polylog(n)时显著降低复杂度；对于三角形数量为O(m)的图，证明无法突破精确算法的时间下界。
AI.result: 设计出渐进更快的近似算法，且在三角形稀疏场景下与精确算法时间复杂度一致，同时证明了稀疏图下近似算法的理论下界。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在密集三角形图中实现高效估计，为大规模网络分析提供新方法，同时明确了稀疏图场景下近似算法的理论极限。
