title: Deep Learning Based Computer-Aided Systems for Breast Cancer Imaging : A Critical Review
title_zh: 基于深度学习的乳腺癌成像计算机辅助系统：批判性评论
comment: 6 Figures, 4 tables
comments: 6 Figures, 4 tables
abstract: This paper provides a critical review of the literature on deep learning applications in breast tumor diagnosis using ultrasound and mammography images. It also summarizes recent advances in computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) systems, which make use of new deep learning methods to automatically recognize images and improve the accuracy of diagnosis made by radiologists. This review is based upon published literature in the past decade (January 2010 January 2020). The main findings in the classification process reveal that new DL-CAD methods are useful and effective screening tools for breast cancer, thus reducing the need for manual feature extraction. The breast tumor research community can utilize this survey as a basis for their current and future studies.
summary: This paper provides a critical review of the literature on deep learning applications in breast tumor diagnosis using ultrasound and mammography images. It also summarizes recent advances in computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) systems, which make use of new deep learning methods to automatically recognize images and improve the accuracy of diagnosis made by radiologists. This review is based upon published literature in the past decade (January 2010 January 2020). The main findings in the classification process reveal that new DL-CAD methods are useful and effective screening tools for breast cancer, thus reducing the need for manual feature extraction. The breast tumor research community can utilize this survey as a basis for their current and future studies.
abstract_zh: 本文对使用超声和乳房 X 线摄影图像诊断乳腺肿瘤的深度学习应用文献进行了批判性回顾。它还总结了计算机辅助诊断（CAD）系统的最新进展，该系统利用新的深度学习方法自动识别图像并提高放射科医生诊断的准确性。本综述基于过去十年（2010 年 1 月-2020 年 1 月）发表的文献。分类过程中的主要发现表明，新的 DL-CAD 方法是有用且有效的乳腺癌筛查工具，从而减少了手动特征提取的需要。乳腺肿瘤研究界可以利用这项调查作为他们当前和未来研究的基础。

AI.tldr: 综述深度学习在乳腺癌影像诊断中的应用及CAD系统进展
AI.motivation: 评估深度学习在乳腺癌筛查中减少人工特征提取需求、提升诊断准确性的有效性
AI.method: 基于2010-2020年文献回顾，分析深度学习在超声/钼靶影像中的CAD系统分类方法与性能
AI.result: 新DL-CAD方法在乳腺癌筛查中展现有效性，显著提升诊断准确率并降低人工干预
AI.conclusion: 深度学习驱动的CAD系统为乳腺癌诊断提供可靠工具，未来需优化模型泛化能力与临床整合

title: Coupled Oscillatory Recurrent Neural Network (coRNN): An accurate and (gradient) stable architecture for learning long time dependencies
title_zh: 耦合振荡递归神经网络 (coRNN)：一种用于学习长时间依赖性的准确且（梯度）稳定的架构
abstract: Circuits of biological neurons, such as in the functional parts of the brain can be modeled as networks of coupled oscillators. Inspired by the ability of these systems to express a rich set of outputs while keeping (gradients of) state variables bounded, we propose a novel architecture for recurrent neural networks. Our proposed RNN is based on a time-discretization of a system of second-order ordinary differential equations, modeling networks of controlled nonlinear oscillators. We prove precise bounds on the gradients of the hidden states, leading to the mitigation of the exploding and vanishing gradient problem for this RNN. Experiments show that the proposed RNN is comparable in performance to the state of the art on a variety of benchmarks, demonstrating the potential of this architecture to provide stable and accurate RNNs for processing complex sequential data.
summary: Circuits of biological neurons, such as in the functional parts of the brain can be modeled as networks of coupled oscillators. Inspired by the ability of these systems to express a rich set of outputs while keeping (gradients of) state variables bounded, we propose a novel architecture for recurrent neural networks. Our proposed RNN is based on a time-discretization of a system of second-order ordinary differential equations, modeling networks of controlled nonlinear oscillators. We prove precise bounds on the gradients of the hidden states, leading to the mitigation of the exploding and vanishing gradient problem for this RNN. Experiments show that the proposed RNN is comparable in performance to the state of the art on a variety of benchmarks, demonstrating the potential of this architecture to provide stable and accurate RNNs for processing complex sequential data.
abstract_zh: 生物神经元的电路，例如大脑功能部分的电路，可以建模为耦合振荡器的网络。受到这些系统表达丰富输出集同时保持状态变量（梯度）有界的能力的启发，我们提出了一种用于循环神经网络的新颖架构。我们提出的 RNN 基于二阶常微分方程组的时间离散化，对受控非线性振荡器的网络进行建模。我们证明了隐藏状态梯度的精确界限，从而缓解了该 RNN 的梯度爆炸和消失问题。实验表明，所提出的 RNN 在各种基准上的性能与最先进的技术相当，证明了该架构为处理复杂序列数据提供稳定且准确的 RNN 的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为coRNN的新型循环神经网络架构，旨在解决长期依赖问题并保持梯度稳定性。
AI.motivation: 受生物神经元网络中耦合振荡器模型的启发，该模型能够生成丰富输出同时保持状态变量梯度有界，从而克服传统RNN的梯度问题。
AI.method: 基于二阶常微分方程的时间离散化方法，构建受控非线性振荡器网络，并通过数学证明对隐藏状态梯度进行精确限制。
AI.result: 实验表明该RNN在多个基准测试中表现与现有技术相当，验证了其处理复杂序列数据的稳定性和准确性。
AI.conclusion: coRNN架构通过耦合振荡器机制有效缓解梯度问题，为复杂序列建模提供了新的稳定且精确的解决方案。

search_text: Coupled Oscillatory Recurrent Neural Network (coRNN): An accurate and (gradient) stable architecture for learning long time dependencies 耦合振荡递归神经网络 (coRNN)：一种用于学习长时间依赖性的准确且（梯度）稳定的架构 Circuits of biological neurons, such as in the functional parts of the brain can be modeled as networks of coupled oscillators. Inspired by the ability of these systems to express a rich set of outputs while keeping (gradients of) state variables bounded, we propose a novel architecture for recurrent neural networks. Our proposed RNN is based on a time-discretization of a system of second-order ordinary differential equations, modeling networks of controlled nonlinear oscillators. We prove precise bounds on the gradients of the hidden states, leading to the mitigation of the exploding and vanishing gradient problem for this RNN. Experiments show that the proposed RNN is comparable in performance to the state of the art on a variety of benchmarks, demonstrating the potential of this architecture to provide stable and accurate RNNs for processing complex sequential data. 生物神经元的电路，例如大脑功能部分的电路，可以建模为耦合振荡器的网络。受到这些系统表达丰富输出集同时保持状态变量（梯度）有界的能力的启发，我们提出了一种用于循环神经网络的新颖架构。我们提出的 RNN 基于二阶常微分方程组的时间离散化，对受控非线性振荡器的网络进行建模。我们证明了隐藏状态梯度的精确界限，从而缓解了该 RNN 的梯度爆炸和消失问题。实验表明，所提出的 RNN 在各种基准上的性能与最先进的技术相当，证明了该架构为处理复杂序列数据提供稳定且准确的 RNN 的潜力。 本文提出了一种名为coRNN的新型循环神经网络架构，旨在解决长期依赖问题并保持梯度稳定性。 T. Konstantin Rusch,Siddhartha Mishra cs.LG,cs.NE,stat.ML

authors_text: Shengyu Zhang,Donghui Wang,Zhou Zhao,Siliang Tang,Di Xie,Fei Wu
title: MGD-GAN: Text-to-Pedestrian generation through Multi-Grained Discrimination
title_zh: MGD-GAN：通过多粒度歧视生成文本到行人
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures
abstract: In this paper, we investigate the problem of text-to-pedestrian synthesis, which has many potential applications in art, design, and video surveillance. Existing methods for text-to-bird/flower synthesis are still far from solving this fine-grained image generation problem, due to the complex structure and heterogeneous appearance that the pedestrians naturally take on. To this end, we propose the Multi-Grained Discrimination enhanced Generative Adversarial Network, that capitalizes a human-part-based Discriminator (HPD) and a self-cross-attended (SCA) global Discriminator in order to capture the coherence of the complex body structure. A fined-grained word-level attention mechanism is employed in the HPD module to enforce diversified appearance and vivid details. In addition, two pedestrian generation metrics, named Pose Score and Pose Variance, are devised to evaluate the generation quality and diversity, respectively. We conduct extensive experiments and ablation studies on the caption-annotated pedestrian dataset, CUHK Person Description Dataset. The substantial improvement over the various metrics demonstrates the efficacy of MGD-GAN on the text-to-pedestrian synthesis scenario.
summary: In this paper, we investigate the problem of text-to-pedestrian synthesis, which has many potential applications in art, design, and video surveillance. Existing methods for text-to-bird/flower synthesis are still far from solving this fine-grained image generation problem, due to the complex structure and heterogeneous appearance that the pedestrians naturally take on. To this end, we propose the Multi-Grained Discrimination enhanced Generative Adversarial Network, that capitalizes a human-part-based Discriminator (HPD) and a self-cross-attended (SCA) global Discriminator in order to capture the coherence of the complex body structure. A fined-grained word-level attention mechanism is employed in the HPD module to enforce diversified appearance and vivid details. In addition, two pedestrian generation metrics, named Pose Score and Pose Variance, are devised to evaluate the generation quality and diversity, respectively. We conduct extensive experiments and ablation studies on the caption-annotated pedestrian dataset, CUHK Person Description Dataset. The substantial improvement over the various metrics demonstrates the efficacy of MGD-GAN on the text-to-pedestrian synthesis scenario.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了文本到行人的合成问题，该问题在艺术、设计和视频监控中有许多潜在的应用。由于行人自然呈现的复杂结构和异质外观，现有的文本到鸟/花的合成方法还远远不能解决这种细粒度图像生成问题。为此，我们提出了多粒度判别增强的生成对抗网络，该网络利用基于人体部分的判别器（HPD）和自交叉参与（SCA）全局判别器来捕获复杂身体结构的一致性。 HPD模块采用细粒度的词级注意力机制来增强多样化的外观和生动的细节。此外，还设计了两个行人生成指标，即姿势得分和姿势方差，分别用于评估生成质量和多样性。我们对带标题注释的行人数据集（香港中文大学人物描述数据集）进行了广泛的实验和消融研究。各种指标的实质性改进证明了 MGD-GAN 在文本到行人合成场景中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究文本到行人图像的生成方法，以解决现有技术在复杂结构和异质外观生成中的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成方法在处理行人这种复杂结构和多样外观时效果不佳，需更精细的生成机制。
AI.method: 提出MGD-GAN模型，结合基于人体部位的判别器（HPD）和自交叉注意力全局判别器（SCA），并引入细粒度词级注意力机制以增强细节和多样性。
AI.result: 在CUHK数据集上的实验表明，MGD-GAN在生成质量与多样性指标（姿态分数、姿态方差）上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MGD-GAN通过多粒度判别机制有效提升了文本到行人图像生成的质量与多样性，验证了方法的有效性。

title: Virtual Smartphone: High Fidelity Interaction with Proxy Objects in Virtual Reality
title_zh: 虚拟智能手机：与虚拟现实中的代理对象进行高保真交互
abstract: This workshop paper presents two proxy objects for high fidelity interaction in virtual reality (VR): a paper map and a smartphone. We showcase how our virtual paper map can increase interactivity and orientation, while our virtual smartphone extends the use of a proxy object, as it allows for actual touch input on a real phone leading to an almost infinite set of possible (inter-)actions (e.g. snapping pictures in the virtual world). Observations showed that participants were very precise in holding and interacting with both the paper map and the smartphone even though they did not see their hands in VR. The interaction in general was very intuitive which was mostly attributed to the realistic size of the virtual objects. Using our findings we discuss the trade off between adaptivity and high fidelity of proxy objects in VR.
summary: This workshop paper presents two proxy objects for high fidelity interaction in virtual reality (VR): a paper map and a smartphone. We showcase how our virtual paper map can increase interactivity and orientation, while our virtual smartphone extends the use of a proxy object, as it allows for actual touch input on a real phone leading to an almost infinite set of possible (inter-)actions (e.g. snapping pictures in the virtual world). Observations showed that participants were very precise in holding and interacting with both the paper map and the smartphone even though they did not see their hands in VR. The interaction in general was very intuitive which was mostly attributed to the realistic size of the virtual objects. Using our findings we discuss the trade off between adaptivity and high fidelity of proxy objects in VR.
abstract_zh: 本研讨会论文介绍了虚拟现实 (VR) 中高保真交互的两个代理对象：纸质地图和智能手机。我们展示了虚拟纸质地图如何提高交互性和方向性，而虚拟智能手机则扩展了代理对象的使用，因为它允许在真实手机上进行实际触摸输入，从而导致几乎无限的可能（交互）动作（例如在虚拟世界中拍照）。观察显示，即使参与者在 VR 中看不到自己的手，他们也能非常精确地握住纸质地图和智能手机并与之互动。总体而言，交互非常直观，这主要归因于虚拟对象的真实尺寸。利用我们的发现，我们讨论了 VR 中代理对象的自适应性和高保真度之间的权衡。

AI.tldr: 提出两种代理对象（纸质地图和智能手机）以提高虚拟现实中的高保真交互
AI.motivation: 现有VR交互方式缺乏真实感，需通过物理代理对象提升沉浸感和操作性
AI.method: 设计并实现纸质地图和智能手机作为代理对象，利用真实设备输入增强交互真实感
AI.result: 用户能精准操作代理对象，交互直观，归功于虚拟物体的真实尺寸
AI.conclusion: 高保真代理对象需平衡适应性与真实感，以优化VR交互体验

authors_text: Jacob Evald,Viktor Fredslund-Hansen,Maximilian Probst Gutenberg,Christian Wulff-Nilsen
title: Decremental APSP in Directed Graphs Versus an Adaptive Adversary
title_zh: 有向图中的递减 APSP 与自适应对手
abstract: Given a directed graph $G = (V,E)$, undergoing an online sequence of edge deletions with $m$ edges in the initial version of $G$ and $n = |V|$, we consider the problem of maintaining all-pairs shortest paths (APSP) in $G$. Whilst this problem has been studied in a long line of research [ACM'81, FOCS'99, FOCS'01, STOC'02, STOC'03, SWAT'04, STOC'13] and the problem of $(1+ε)$-approximate, weighted APSP was solved to near-optimal update time $\tilde{O}(mn)$ by Bernstein [STOC'13], the problem has mainly been studied in the context of oblivious adversaries, which assumes that the adversary fixes the update sequence before the algorithm is started. In this paper, we make significant progress on the problem in the setting where the adversary is adaptive, i.e. can base the update sequence on the output of the data structure queries. We present three new data structures that fit different settings: We first present a deterministic data structure that maintains exact distances with total update time $\tilde{O}(n^3)$. We also present a deterministic data structure that maintains $(1+ε)$-approximate distance estimates with total update time $\tilde O(\sqrt{m} n^2/ε)$ which for sparse graphs is $\tilde O(n^{2+1/2}/ε)$. Finally, we present a randomized $(1+ε)$-approximate data structure which works against an adaptive adversary; its total update time is $\tilde O(m^{2/3}n^{5/3} + n^{8/3}/(m^{1/3}ε^2))$ which for sparse graphs is $\tilde O(n^{2+1/3})$. Our exact data structure matches the total update time of the best randomized data structure by Baswana et al. [STOC'02] and maintains the distance matrix in near-optimal time. Our approximate data structures improve upon the best data structures against an adaptive adversary which have $\tilde{O}(mn^2)$ total update time [JACM'81, STOC'03].
summary: Given a directed graph $G = (V,E)$, undergoing an online sequence of edge deletions with $m$ edges in the initial version of $G$ and $n = |V|$, we consider the problem of maintaining all-pairs shortest paths (APSP) in $G$. Whilst this problem has been studied in a long line of research [ACM'81, FOCS'99, FOCS'01, STOC'02, STOC'03, SWAT'04, STOC'13] and the problem of $(1+ε)$-approximate, weighted APSP was solved to near-optimal update time $\tilde{O}(mn)$ by Bernstein [STOC'13], the problem has mainly been studied in the context of oblivious adversaries, which assumes that the adversary fixes the update sequence before the algorithm is started. In this paper, we make significant progress on the problem in the setting where the adversary is adaptive, i.e. can base the update sequence on the output of the data structure queries. We present three new data structures that fit different settings: We first present a deterministic data structure that maintains exact distances with total update time $\tilde{O}(n^3)$. We also present a deterministic data structure that maintains $(1+ε)$-approximate distance estimates with total update time $\tilde O(\sqrt{m} n^2/ε)$ which for sparse graphs is $\tilde O(n^{2+1/2}/ε)$. Finally, we present a randomized $(1+ε)$-approximate data structure which works against an adaptive adversary; its total update time is $\tilde O(m^{2/3}n^{5/3} + n^{8/3}/(m^{1/3}ε^2))$ which for sparse graphs is $\tilde O(n^{2+1/3})$. Our exact data structure matches the total update time of the best randomized data structure by Baswana et al. [STOC'02] and maintains the distance matrix in near-optimal time. Our approximate data structures improve upon the best data structures against an adaptive adversary which have $\tilde{O}(mn^2)$ total update time [JACM'81, STOC'03].
abstract_zh: 给定一个有向图 $G = (V,E)$，在 $G$ 的初始版本和 $n = |V|$ 中经历 $m$ 个边的在线删除序列，我们考虑在 $G$ 中维护所有对最短路径 (APSP) 的问题。虽然这个问题已经被长期研究 [ACM'81, FOCS'99, FOCS'01, STOC'02, STOC'03, SWAT'04, STOC'13] 并且 $(1+ε)$ 近似问题，加权 APSP 被 Bernstein 解决为接近最佳更新时间 $\tilde{O}(mn)$ [STOC'13]，但该问题主要是在不经意的对手的背景下进行研究，假设对手在算法启动之前修复了更新顺序。在本文中，我们在对手具有适应性的情况下在该问题上取得了重大进展，即可以将更新序列基于数据结构查询的输出。我们提出了三种适合不同设置的新数据结构：我们首先提出了一种确定性数据结构，该结构在总更新时间 $\tilde{O}(n^3)$ 中保持精确距离。我们还提出了一种确定性数据结构，它维持$(1+ε)$近似距离估计，总更新时间为$\tilde O(\sqrt{m} n^2/ε)$，对于稀疏图来说是$\tilde O(n^{2+1/2}/ε)$。最后，我们提出了一种随机的 $(1+ε)$ 近似数据结构，可对抗自适应对手；其总更新时间为$\tilde O(m^{2/3}n^{5/3} + n^{8/3}/(m^{1/3}ε^2))$，对于稀疏图来说是$\tilde O(n^{2+1/3})$。我们的精确数据结构与 Baswana 等人的最佳随机数据结构的总更新时间相匹配。 [STOC'02] 并在接近最佳的时间内维护距离矩阵。我们的近似数据结构改进了针对自适应对手的最佳数据结构，其总更新时间为 $\tilde{O}(mn^2)$ [JACM'81, STOC'03]。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在有向图中面对自适应对手时，动态维护所有点对最短路径（APSP）的问题，提出了三种不同的数据结构以应对边删除操作。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要针对非自适应对手（其更新序列在算法启动前固定），而自适应对手可根据数据结构的查询结果动态调整更新序列，更具挑战性。本文旨在填补这一研究空白，提供更高效的维护方法。
AI.method: 设计三种数据结构：1) 确定性精确维护数据结构，总更新时间为~O(n³)；2) 确定性近似维护数据结构，总更新时间~O(√m n²/ε)；3) 随机化近似数据结构，总更新时间~O(m²/³n⁵/³ + n⁸/³/(m¹/³ε²))，均针对稀疏图优化。
AI.result: 精确数据结构匹配最佳随机化方法的更新时间；近似数据结构将对抗自适应对手的总更新时间从~O(mn²)改进至~O(n²⁺¹/³)，在稀疏图中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 本文在自适应对手场景下取得显著进展，提出的三种数据结构在不同条件下均优于现有方法，为动态图维护提供了新的理论支持与实践方案。

title: Splay trees on trees
title_zh: 在树上张开树
abstract: Search trees on trees (STTs) are a far-reaching generalization of binary search trees (BSTs), allowing the efficient exploration of tree-structured domains. (BSTs are the special case in which the underlying domain is a path.) Trees on trees have been extensively studied under various guises in computer science and discrete mathematics. Recently Bose, Cardinal, Iacono, Koumoutsos, and Langerman (SODA 2020) considered adaptive STTs and observed that, apart from notable exceptions, the machinery developed for BSTs in the past decades does not readily transfer to STTs. In particular, they asked whether the optimal STT can be efficiently computed or approximated (by analogy to Knuth's algorithm for optimal BSTs), and whether natural self-adjusting BSTs such as Splay trees (Sleator, Tarjan, 1983) can be extended to this more general setting. We answer both questions affirmatively. First, we show that a $(1 + \frac{1}{t})$-approximation of an optimal size-$n$ STT for a given search distribution can be computed in time $O(n^{2t + 1})$ for all integers $t \geq 1$. Second, we identify a broad family of STTs with linear rotation-distance, allowing the generalization of Splay trees to the STT setting. We show that our generalized Splay satisfies a static optimality theorem, asymptotically matching the cost of the optimal STT in an online fashion, i.e. without knowledge of the search distribution. Our results suggest an extension of the dynamic optimality conjecture for Splay trees to the broader setting of trees on trees.
summary: Search trees on trees (STTs) are a far-reaching generalization of binary search trees (BSTs), allowing the efficient exploration of tree-structured domains. (BSTs are the special case in which the underlying domain is a path.) Trees on trees have been extensively studied under various guises in computer science and discrete mathematics. Recently Bose, Cardinal, Iacono, Koumoutsos, and Langerman (SODA 2020) considered adaptive STTs and observed that, apart from notable exceptions, the machinery developed for BSTs in the past decades does not readily transfer to STTs. In particular, they asked whether the optimal STT can be efficiently computed or approximated (by analogy to Knuth's algorithm for optimal BSTs), and whether natural self-adjusting BSTs such as Splay trees (Sleator, Tarjan, 1983) can be extended to this more general setting. We answer both questions affirmatively. First, we show that a $(1 + \frac{1}{t})$-approximation of an optimal size-$n$ STT for a given search distribution can be computed in time $O(n^{2t + 1})$ for all integers $t \geq 1$. Second, we identify a broad family of STTs with linear rotation-distance, allowing the generalization of Splay trees to the STT setting. We show that our generalized Splay satisfies a static optimality theorem, asymptotically matching the cost of the optimal STT in an online fashion, i.e. without knowledge of the search distribution. Our results suggest an extension of the dynamic optimality conjecture for Splay trees to the broader setting of trees on trees.
abstract_zh: 树上搜索树 (STT) 是二叉搜索树 (BST) 的深远推广，允许有效探索树结构域。 （BST 是一种特殊情况，其中底层域是一条路径。）树上的树在计算机科学和离散数学中以各种形式得到了广泛的研究。最近，Bose、Cardinal、Iacono、Koumoutsos 和 Langerman (SODA 2020) 考虑了自适应 STT，并观察到，除了明显的例外之外，过去几十年为 BST 开发的机制并不容易转移到 STT。特别是，他们询问是否可以有效地计算或近似最优 STT（类似于 Knuth 的最优 BST 算法），以及诸如 Splay 树（Sleator，Tarjan，1983）之类的自然自我调整 BST 是否可以扩展到这种更通用的设置。我们对这两个问题的回答都是肯定的。首先，我们证明对于给定的搜索分布，对于所有整数 $t \geq 1$，可以在 $O(n^{2t + 1})$ 时间内计算出最佳大小 $n$ STT 的 $(1 + \frac{1}{t})$ 近似值。其次，我们确定了一系列具有线性旋转距离的 STT，从而可以将 Splay 树推广到 STT 设置。我们证明了我们的广义 Splay 满足静态最优定理，以在线方式渐近匹配最优 STT 的成本，即不知道搜索分布。我们的结果表明将张开树的动态最优性猜想扩展到更广泛的树上树的设置。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了将Splay树扩展到树结构域（STTs）的可行性，并提出了计算近似最优STT的算法。
AI.motivation: 传统二叉搜索树（BST）的优化方法难以直接应用于树结构域（STTs），需探索适应STTs的自调整树结构。
AI.method: 设计了基于旋转距离的STT近似算法，并通过线性旋转距离家族推广Splay树机制。
AI.result: 提出时间复杂度为O(n^{2t+1})的(1+1/t)-近似算法，且推广的Splay树满足静态最优性定理。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明Splay树的动态最优性猜想可扩展至更广泛的树结构域场景。

Second, we identify a broad family of STTs with linear rotation-distance, allowing the generalization of Splay trees to the STT setting. Our results suggest an extension of the dynamic optimality conjecture for Splay trees to the broader setting of trees on trees. 树上搜索树 (STT) 是二叉搜索树 (BST) 的深远推广，允许有效探索树结构域。 （BST 是一种特殊情况，其中底层域是一条路径。）树上的树在计算机科学和离散数学中以各种形式得到了广泛的研究。最近，Bose、Cardinal、Iacono、Koumoutsos 和 Langerman (SODA 2020) 考虑了自适应 STT，并观察到，除了明显的例外之外，过去几十年为 BST 开发的机制并不容易转移到 STT。特别是，他们询问是否可以有效地计算或近似最优 STT（类似于 Knuth 的最优 BST 算法），以及诸如 Splay 树（Sleator，Tarjan，1983）之类的自然自我调整 BST 是否可以扩展到这种更通用的设置。我们对这两个问题的回答都是肯定的。首先，我们证明对于给定的搜索分布，对于所有整数 $t \geq 1$，可以在 $O(n^{2t + 1})$ 时间内计算出最佳大小 $n$ STT 的 $(1 + \frac{1}{t})$ 近似值。其次，我们确定了一系列具有线性旋转距离的 STT，从而可以将 Splay 树推广到 STT 设置。我们证明了我们的广义 Splay 满足静态最优定理，以在线方式渐近匹配最优 STT 的成本，即不知道搜索分布。我们的结果表明将张开树的动态最优性猜想扩展到更广泛的树上树的设置。 本文研究了将Splay树扩展到树结构域（STTs）的可行性，并提出了计算近似最优STT的算法。 Benjamin Aram Berendsohn,László Kozma cs.DS,math.CO

authors_text: Huynh Van Luong,Boris Joukovsky,Yonina C. Eldar,Nikos Deligiannis
title: A Deep-Unfolded Reference-Based RPCA Network For Video Foreground-Background Separation
title_zh: 一种用于视频前景-背景分离的基于深度展开参考的 RPCA 网络
comment: 5 pages, accepted for publication
comments: 5 pages, accepted for publication
abstract: Deep unfolded neural networks are designed by unrolling the iterations of optimization algorithms. They can be shown to achieve faster convergence and higher accuracy than their optimization counterparts. This paper proposes a new deep-unfolding-based network design for the problem of Robust Principal Component Analysis (RPCA) with application to video foreground-background separation. Unlike existing designs, our approach focuses on modeling the temporal correlation between the sparse representations of consecutive video frames. To this end, we perform the unfolding of an iterative algorithm for solving reweighted $\ell_1$-$\ell_1$ minimization; this unfolding leads to a different proximal operator (a.k.a. different activation function) adaptively learned per neuron. Experimentation using the moving MNIST dataset shows that the proposed network outperforms a recently proposed state-of-the-art RPCA network in the task of video foreground-background separation.
summary: Deep unfolded neural networks are designed by unrolling the iterations of optimization algorithms. They can be shown to achieve faster convergence and higher accuracy than their optimization counterparts. This paper proposes a new deep-unfolding-based network design for the problem of Robust Principal Component Analysis (RPCA) with application to video foreground-background separation. Unlike existing designs, our approach focuses on modeling the temporal correlation between the sparse representations of consecutive video frames. To this end, we perform the unfolding of an iterative algorithm for solving reweighted $\ell_1$-$\ell_1$ minimization; this unfolding leads to a different proximal operator (a.k.a. different activation function) adaptively learned per neuron. Experimentation using the moving MNIST dataset shows that the proposed network outperforms a recently proposed state-of-the-art RPCA network in the task of video foreground-background separation.
abstract_zh: 深度展开神经网络是通过展开优化算法的迭代来设计的。与优化对应物相比，它们可以实现更快的收敛和更高的精度。本文针对鲁棒主成分分析（RPCA）问题提出了一种新的基于深度展开的网络设计，并将其应用于视频前景-背景分离。与现有设计不同，我们的方法侧重于对连续视频帧的稀疏表示之间的时间相关性进行建模。为此，我们展开迭代算法来求解重新加权的 $\ell_1$-$\ell_1$ 最小化；这种展开导致每个神经元自适应地学习不同的近端算子（也称为不同的激活函数）。使用移动 MNIST 数据集的实验表明，所提出的网络在视频前景-背景分离任务中优于最近提出的最先进的 RPCA 网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度展开的参考RPCA网络，用于视频前景-背景分离任务。
AI.motivation: 现有RPCA方法在视频分离中未能有效建模连续帧间的时序相关性，导致分离效果受限。
AI.method: 通过展开重加权ℓ1-ℓ1优化算法迭代过程，设计深度神经网络，采用自适应学习的近端算子建模帧间时序相关性。
AI.result: 在moving MNIST数据集实验中，所提网络在视频分离任务上优于最新RPCA网络。
AI.conclusion: 深度展开框架有效捕捉视频时序特征，提升了RPCA在视频分离中的准确率与收敛速度。

title: Image-based underwater 3D reconstruction for Cultural Heritage: from image collection to 3D. Critical steps and considerations
title_zh: 基于图像的文化遗产水下 3D 重建：从图像采集到 3D。关键步骤和注意事项
comment: Pre-submission version of the manuscript
comments: Pre-submission version of the manuscript
abstract: Underwater Cultural Heritage (CH) sites are widely spread; from ruins in coastlines up to shipwrecks in deep. The documentation and preservation of this heritage is an obligation of the mankind, dictated also by the international treaties like the Convention on the Protection of the Underwater Cultural Her-itage which fosters the use of "non-destructive techniques and survey meth-ods in preference over the recovery of objects". However, submerged CH lacks in protection and monitoring in regards to the land CH and nowadays recording and documenting, for digital preservation as well as dissemination through VR to wide public, is of most importance. At the same time, it is most difficult to document it, due to inherent restrictions posed by the environ-ment. In order to create high detailed textured 3D models, optical sensors and photogrammetric techniques seems to be the best solution. This chapter dis-cusses critical aspects of all phases of image based underwater 3D reconstruc-tion process, from data acquisition and data preparation using colour restora-tion and colour enhancement algorithms to Structure from Motion (SfM) and Multi-View Stereo (MVS) techniques to produce an accurate, precise and complete 3D model for a number of applications.

abstract_zh: 水下文化遗产（CH）遗址分布广泛；从海岸线上的废墟到深处的沉船。记录和保护这些遗产是人类的一项义务，《保护水下文化遗产公约》等国际条约也规定了这一义务，该公约鼓励使用“优先于恢复物体的非破坏性技术和调查方法”。然而，与陆地 CH 相比，水下 CH 缺乏保护和监控，如今，记录和记录、数字保存以及通过 VR 向广大公众传播是最重要的。同时，由于环境的固有限制，记录它是最困难的。为了创建高细节纹理 3D 模型，光学传感器和摄影测量技术似乎是最佳解决方案。本章讨论基于图像的水下 3D 重建过程所有阶段的关键方面，从使用颜色恢复和颜色增强算法的数据采集和数据准备，到运动结构 (SfM) 和多视图立体 (MVS) 技术，为多种应用生成准确、精确和完整的 3D 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文讨论了从图像采集到3D重建的水下文化遗产图像化关键步骤与技术考量。
AI.motivation: 水下文化遗产需通过非破坏性技术进行记录与保护，但受环境限制，其数字化存档与公众传播面临挑战。
AI.method: 采用光学传感器与摄影测量技术，结合色彩修复算法、结构从运动（SfM）及多视角立体视觉（MVS）方法实现高精度3D建模。
AI.result: 提出了一套完整的水下3D重建流程，生成可用于保护、研究及虚拟现实展示的精确3D模型。
AI.conclusion: 光学摄影测量技术是水下文化遗产数字化的有效方案，但需重点关注数据采集、色彩校正及环境干扰等关键环节。

title: Multi-Resolution 3D Convolutional Neural Networks for Automatic Coronary Centerline Extraction in Cardiac CT Angiography Scans
title_zh: 用于心脏 CT 血管造影扫描中自动冠状动脉中心线提取的多分辨率 3D 卷积神经网络
comment: ef:2021 IEEE 18th International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI), Nice, France, 2021, pp. 91-95
comments: ef:2021 IEEE 18th International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI), Nice, France, 2021, pp. 91-95
abstract: We propose a deep learning-based automatic coronary artery tree centerline tracker (AuCoTrack) extending the vessel tracker by Wolterink (arXiv:1810.03143). A dual pathway Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) operating on multi-scale 3D inputs predicts the direction of the coronary arteries as well as the presence of a bifurcation. A similar multi-scale dual pathway 3D CNN is trained to identify coronary artery endpoints for terminating the tracking process. Two or more continuation directions are derived based on the bifurcation detection. The iterative tracker detects the entire left and right coronary artery trees based on only two ostium landmarks derived from a model-based segmentation of the heart. The 3D CNNs were trained on a proprietary dataset consisting of 43 CCTA scans. An average sensitivity of 87.1% and clinically relevant overlap of 89.1% was obtained relative to a refined manual segmentation. In addition, the MICCAI 2008 Coronary Artery Tracking Challenge (CAT08) training and test datasets were used to benchmark the algorithm and to assess its generalization. An average overlap of 93.6% and a clinically relevant overlap of 96.4% were obtained. The proposed method achieved better overlap scores than the current state-of-the-art automatic centerline extraction techniques on the CAT08 dataset with a vessel detection rate of 95%.
summary: We propose a deep learning-based automatic coronary artery tree centerline tracker (AuCoTrack) extending the vessel tracker by Wolterink (arXiv:1810.03143). A dual pathway Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) operating on multi-scale 3D inputs predicts the direction of the coronary arteries as well as the presence of a bifurcation. A similar multi-scale dual pathway 3D CNN is trained to identify coronary artery endpoints for terminating the tracking process. Two or more continuation directions are derived based on the bifurcation detection. The iterative tracker detects the entire left and right coronary artery trees based on only two ostium landmarks derived from a model-based segmentation of the heart. The 3D CNNs were trained on a proprietary dataset consisting of 43 CCTA scans. An average sensitivity of 87.1% and clinically relevant overlap of 89.1% was obtained relative to a refined manual segmentation. In addition, the MICCAI 2008 Coronary Artery Tracking Challenge (CAT08) training and test datasets were used to benchmark the algorithm and to assess its generalization. An average overlap of 93.6% and a clinically relevant overlap of 96.4% were obtained. The proposed method achieved better overlap scores than the current state-of-the-art automatic centerline extraction techniques on the CAT08 dataset with a vessel detection rate of 95%.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于深度学习的自动冠状动脉树中心线跟踪器（AuCoTrack），扩展了 Wolterink 的血管跟踪器（arXiv：1810.03143）。在多尺度 3D 输入上运行的双通道卷积神经网络 (CNN) 可预测冠状动脉的方向以及分叉的存在。训练类似的多尺度双通道 3D CNN 来识别冠状动脉端点以终止跟踪过程。基于分叉检测导出两个或多个连续方向。迭代跟踪器仅根据基于模型的心脏分割得出的两个口标志来检测整个左冠状动脉和右冠状动脉树。 3D CNN 在由 43 个 CCTA 扫描组成的专有数据集上进行训练。相对于精细的手动分割，获得了 87.1% 的平均灵敏度和 89.1% 的临床相关重叠。此外，还使用 ​​MICCAI 2008 冠状动脉跟踪挑战赛 (CAT08) 训练和测试数据集对算法进行基准测试并评估其泛化性。平均重叠率为 93.6%，临床相关重叠率为 96.4%。该方法在 CAT08 数据集上比当前最先进的自动中心线提取技术获得了更好的重叠分数，血管检测率为 95%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的自动冠状动脉中心线追踪方法AuCoTrack，用于心脏CT血管造影扫描中的冠状动脉树中心线提取。
AI.motivation: 冠状动脉中心线的自动提取在心脏CT血管造影中具有重要意义，但现有方法在准确性和鲁棒性方面仍存在不足，因此需要一种更高效、准确的自动追踪方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种多分辨率3D卷积神经网络方法，包括双路径CNN用于预测冠状动脉方向和分叉点，以及另一个多尺度双路径3D CNN用于识别冠状动脉终点。追踪过程基于两个起始点（从心脏模型分割中获得）进行迭代。
AI.result: 在43个CCTA扫描数据集上，该方法实现了87.1%的平均灵敏度和89.1%的临床相关重叠率。在CAT08数据集上，平均重叠率为93.6%，临床相关重叠率为96.4%，优于现有最先进的中心线提取技术。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在冠状动脉中心线自动提取方面表现出色，具有较高的准确性和鲁棒性，为心脏CT血管造影的临床应用提供了有力支持。

search_text: Multi-Resolution 3D Convolutional Neural Networks for Automatic Coronary Centerline Extraction in Cardiac CT Angiography Scans 用于心脏 CT 血管造影扫描中自动冠状动脉中心线提取的多分辨率 3D 卷积神经网络 We propose a deep learning-based automatic coronary artery tree centerline tracker (AuCoTrack) extending the vessel tracker by Wolterink (arXiv:1810.03143). A dual pathway Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) operating on multi-scale 3D inputs predicts the direction of the coronary arteries as well as the presence of a bifurcation. A similar multi-scale dual pathway 3D CNN is trained to identify coronary artery endpoints for terminating the tracking process. Two or more continuation directions are derived based on the bifurcation detection. The iterative tracker detects the entire left and right coronary artery trees based on only two ostium landmarks derived from a model-based segmentation of the heart. The 3D CNNs were trained on a proprietary dataset consisting of 43 CCTA scans. An average sensitivity of 87.1% and clinically relevant overlap of 89.1% was obtained relative to a refined manual segmentation. In addition, the MICCAI 2008 Coronary Artery Tracking Challenge (CAT08) training and test datasets were used to benchmark the algorithm and to assess its generalization. An average overlap of 93.6% and a clinically relevant overlap of 96.4% were obtained. The proposed method achieved better overlap scores than the current state-of-the-art automatic centerline extraction techniques on the CAT08 dataset with a vessel detection rate of 95%. 我们提出了一种基于深度学习的自动冠状动脉树中心线跟踪器（AuCoTrack），扩展了 Wolterink 的血管跟踪器（arXiv：1810.03143）。在多尺度 3D 输入上运行的双通道卷积神经网络 (CNN) 可预测冠状动脉的方向以及分叉的存在。训练类似的多尺度双通道 3D CNN 来识别冠状动脉端点以终止跟踪过程。基于分叉检测导出两个或多个连续方向。迭代跟踪器仅根据基于模型的心脏分割得出的两个口标志来检测整个左冠状动脉和右冠状动脉树。 3D CNN 在由 43 个 CCTA 扫描组成的专有数据集上进行训练。相对于精细的手动分割，获得了 87.1% 的平均灵敏度和 89.1% 的临床相关重叠。此外，还使用 ​​MICCAI 2008 冠状动脉跟踪挑战赛 (CAT08) 训练和测试数据集对算法进行基准测试并评估其泛化性。平均重叠率为 93.6%，临床相关重叠率为 96.4%。该方法在 CAT08 数据集上比当前最先进的自动中心线提取技术获得了更好的重叠分数，血管检测率为 95%。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的自动冠状动脉中心线追踪方法AuCoTrack，用于心脏CT血管造影扫描中的冠状动脉树中心线提取。 Zohaib Salahuddin,Matthias Lenga,Hannes Nickisch eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Multiple Infrared Small Targets Detection based on Hierarchical Maximal Entropy Random Walk
title_zh: 基于分层最大熵随机游走的多红外小目标检测
abstract: The technique of detecting multiple dim and small targets with low signal-to-clutter ratios (SCR) is very important for infrared search and tracking systems. In this paper, we establish a detection method derived from maximal entropy random walk (MERW) to robustly detect multiple small targets. Initially, we introduce the primal MERW and analyze the feasibility of applying it to small target detection. However, the original weight matrix of the MERW is sensitive to interferences. Therefore, a specific weight matrix is designed for the MERW in principle of enhancing characteristics of small targets and suppressing strong clutters. Moreover, the primal MERW has a critical limitation of strong bias to the most salient small target. To achieve multiple small targets detection, we develop a hierarchical version of the MERW method. Based on the hierarchical MERW (HMERW), we propose a small target detection method as follows. First, filtering technique is used to smooth the infrared image. Second, an output map is obtained by importing the filtered image into the HMERW. Then, a coefficient map is constructed to fuse the stationary dirtribution map of the HMERW. Finally, an adaptive threshold is used to segment multiple small targets from the fusion map. Extensive experiments on practical data sets demonstrate that the proposed method is superior to the state-of-the-art methods in terms of target enhancement, background suppression and multiple small targets detection.
summary: The technique of detecting multiple dim and small targets with low signal-to-clutter ratios (SCR) is very important for infrared search and tracking systems. In this paper, we establish a detection method derived from maximal entropy random walk (MERW) to robustly detect multiple small targets. Initially, we introduce the primal MERW and analyze the feasibility of applying it to small target detection. However, the original weight matrix of the MERW is sensitive to interferences. Therefore, a specific weight matrix is designed for the MERW in principle of enhancing characteristics of small targets and suppressing strong clutters. Moreover, the primal MERW has a critical limitation of strong bias to the most salient small target. To achieve multiple small targets detection, we develop a hierarchical version of the MERW method. Based on the hierarchical MERW (HMERW), we propose a small target detection method as follows. First, filtering technique is used to smooth the infrared image. Second, an output map is obtained by importing the filtered image into the HMERW. Then, a coefficient map is constructed to fuse the stationary dirtribution map of the HMERW. Finally, an adaptive threshold is used to segment multiple small targets from the fusion map. Extensive experiments on practical data sets demonstrate that the proposed method is superior to the state-of-the-art methods in terms of target enhancement, background suppression and multiple small targets detection.
abstract_zh: 低信杂比（SCR）检测多个昏暗小目标的技术对于红外搜索和跟踪系统非常重要。在本文中，我们建立了一种源自最大熵随机游走（MERW）的检测方法来稳健地检测多个小目标。首先，我们介绍了原始MERW并分析了将其应用于小目标检测的可行性。然而，MERW的原始权重矩阵对干扰很敏感。因此，本着增强小目标特性、抑制强杂波的原则，为MERW设计了特定的权重矩阵。此外，原始 MERW 存在一个严重的局限性，即对最显着的小目标存在强烈偏差。为了实现多个小目标检测，我们开发了 MERW 方法的分层版本。基于分层MERW（HMERW），我们提出了一种小目标检测方法如下。首先，采用滤波技术对红外图像进行平滑处理。其次，通过将滤波后的图像导入 HMERW 来获得输出图。然后，构建系数图来融合HMERW的平稳分布图。最后，使用自适应阈值从融合图中分割出多个小目标。对实际数据集的大量实验表明，该方法在目标增强、背景抑制和多个小目标检测方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于分层最大熵随机游走（HMERW）的多红外小目标检测方法，以解决低信杂比环境下微弱目标检测难题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在低信杂比（SCR）场景下难以有效检测多个微弱小目标，且存在对强杂波敏感、易偏向最显著目标等缺陷。
AI.method: 设计增强小目标特征的权重矩阵，构建分层MERW模型，结合滤波处理、分布图融合与自适应阈值分割实现多目标检测。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在目标增强、背景抑制及多小目标检测精度上优于现有先进算法。
AI.conclusion: HMERW方法有效提升了复杂背景下多微弱目标检测的鲁棒性，适用于实际红外搜索跟踪系统。

search_text: Multiple Infrared Small Targets Detection based on Hierarchical Maximal Entropy Random Walk 基于分层最大熵随机游走的多红外小目标检测 The technique of detecting multiple dim and small targets with low signal-to-clutter ratios (SCR) is very important for infrared search and tracking systems. In this paper, we establish a detection method derived from maximal entropy random walk (MERW) to robustly detect multiple small targets. Initially, we introduce the primal MERW and analyze the feasibility of applying it to small target detection. However, the original weight matrix of the MERW is sensitive to interferences. Therefore, a specific weight matrix is designed for the MERW in principle of enhancing characteristics of small targets and suppressing strong clutters. Moreover, the primal MERW has a critical limitation of strong bias to the most salient small target. To achieve multiple small targets detection, we develop a hierarchical version of the MERW method. Based on the hierarchical MERW (HMERW), we propose a small target detection method as follows. First, filtering technique is used to smooth the infrared image. Second, an output map is obtained by importing the filtered image into the HMERW. Then, a coefficient map is constructed to fuse the stationary dirtribution map of the HMERW. Finally, an adaptive threshold is used to segment multiple small targets from the fusion map. Extensive experiments on practical data sets demonstrate that the proposed method is superior to the state-of-the-art methods in terms of target enhancement, background suppression and multiple small targets detection. 低信杂比（SCR）检测多个昏暗小目标的技术对于红外搜索和跟踪系统非常重要。在本文中，我们建立了一种源自最大熵随机游走（MERW）的检测方法来稳健地检测多个小目标。首先，我们介绍了原始MERW并分析了将其应用于小目标检测的可行性。然而，MERW的原始权重矩阵对干扰很敏感。因此，本着增强小目标特性、抑制强杂波的原则，为MERW设计了特定的权重矩阵。此外，原始 MERW 存在一个严重的局限性，即对最显着的小目标存在强烈偏差。为了实现多个小目标检测，我们开发了 MERW 方法的分层版本。基于分层MERW（HMERW），我们提出了一种小目标检测方法如下。首先，采用滤波技术对红外图像进行平滑处理。其次，通过将滤波后的图像导入 HMERW 来获得输出图。然后，构建系数图来融合HMERW的平稳分布图。最后，使用自适应阈值从融合图中分割出多个小目标。对实际数据集的大量实验表明，该方法在目标增强、背景抑制和多个小目标检测方面优于最先进的方法。 本文提出基于分层最大熵随机游走（HMERW）的多红外小目标检测方法，以解决低信杂比环境下微弱目标检测难题。 Chaoqun Xia,Xiaorun Li,Liaoying Zhao,Shuhan Chen cs.CV

title: Are Artificial Dendrites useful in NeuroEvolution?
title_zh: 人工树突在神经进化中有用吗？
abstract: The significant role of dendritic processing within neuronal networks has become increasingly clear. This letter explores the effects of including a simple dendrite-inspired mechanism into neuroevolution. The phenomenon of separate dendrite activation thresholds on connections is allowed to emerge under an evolutionary process. It is shown how such processing can be positively selected for, particularly for connections between the hidden and output layer, and increases performance.
summary: The significant role of dendritic processing within neuronal networks has become increasingly clear. This letter explores the effects of including a simple dendrite-inspired mechanism into neuroevolution. The phenomenon of separate dendrite activation thresholds on connections is allowed to emerge under an evolutionary process. It is shown how such processing can be positively selected for, particularly for connections between the hidden and output layer, and increases performance.
abstract_zh: 树突状处理在神经元网络中的重要作用已经变得越来越清晰。这封信探讨了将简单的树突启发机制纳入神经进化的影响。连接上单独的树突激活阈值的现象是在进化过程中出现的。它展示了如何积极地选择这种处理，特别是对于隐藏层和输出层之间的连接，并提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在神经进化中引入人工树突机制的效果。
AI.motivation: 树突在神经网络中的作用越来越明显，本文旨在研究引入树突机制是否能提升神经进化的效果。
AI.method: 通过允许在进化过程中出现独立的树突激活阈值，研究这种机制对神经网络性能的影响。
AI.result: 结果显示，这种树突机制特别有助于隐藏层与输出层之间的连接，并提升了整体性能。
AI.conclusion: 人工树突机制在神经进化中具有积极影响，可提升神经网络的性能。

search_text: Are Artificial Dendrites useful in NeuroEvolution? 人工树突在神经进化中有用吗？ The significant role of dendritic processing within neuronal networks has become increasingly clear. This letter explores the effects of including a simple dendrite-inspired mechanism into neuroevolution. The phenomenon of separate dendrite activation thresholds on connections is allowed to emerge under an evolutionary process. It is shown how such processing can be positively selected for, particularly for connections between the hidden and output layer, and increases performance. 树突状处理在神经元网络中的重要作用已经变得越来越清晰。这封信探讨了将简单的树突启发机制纳入神经进化的影响。连接上单独的树突激活阈值的现象是在进化过程中出现的。它展示了如何积极地选择这种处理，特别是对于隐藏层和输出层之间的连接，并提高性能。 本文探讨了在神经进化中引入人工树突机制的效果。 Larry Bull cs.NE

title: The Sparse Vector Technique, Revisited
title_zh: 重新审视稀疏矢量技术
abstract: We revisit one of the most basic and widely applicable techniques in the literature of differential privacy - the sparse vector technique [Dwork et al., STOC 2009]. This simple algorithm privately tests whether the value of a given query on a database is close to what we expect it to be. It allows to ask an unbounded number of queries as long as the answer is close to what we expect, and halts following the first query for which this is not the case. We suggest an alternative, equally simple, algorithm that can continue testing queries as long as any single individual does not contribute to the answer of too many queries whose answer deviates substantially form what we expect. Our analysis is subtle and some of its ingredients may be more widely applicable. In some cases our new algorithm allows to privately extract much more information from the database than the original. We demonstrate this by applying our algorithm to the shifting heavy-hitters problem: On every time step, each of $n$ users gets a new input, and the task is to privately identify all the current heavy-hitters. That is, on time step $i$, the goal is to identify all data elements $x$ such that many of the users have $x$ as their current input. We present an algorithm for this problem with improved error guarantees over what can be obtained using existing techniques. Specifically, the error of our algorithm depends on the maximal number of times that a single user holds a heavy-hitter as input, rather than the total number of times in which a heavy-hitter exists.
summary: We revisit one of the most basic and widely applicable techniques in the literature of differential privacy - the sparse vector technique [Dwork et al., STOC 2009]. This simple algorithm privately tests whether the value of a given query on a database is close to what we expect it to be. It allows to ask an unbounded number of queries as long as the answer is close to what we expect, and halts following the first query for which this is not the case. We suggest an alternative, equally simple, algorithm that can continue testing queries as long as any single individual does not contribute to the answer of too many queries whose answer deviates substantially form what we expect. Our analysis is subtle and some of its ingredients may be more widely applicable. In some cases our new algorithm allows to privately extract much more information from the database than the original. We demonstrate this by applying our algorithm to the shifting heavy-hitters problem: On every time step, each of $n$ users gets a new input, and the task is to privately identify all the current heavy-hitters. That is, on time step $i$, the goal is to identify all data elements $x$ such that many of the users have $x$ as their current input. We present an algorithm for this problem with improved error guarantees over what can be obtained using existing techniques. Specifically, the error of our algorithm depends on the maximal number of times that a single user holds a heavy-hitter as input, rather than the total number of times in which a heavy-hitter exists.
abstract_zh: 我们重新审视差分隐私文献中最基本、最广泛应用的技术之一——稀疏向量技术 [Dwork et al., STOC 2009]。这个简单的算法私下测试数据库上给定查询的值是否接近我们期望的值。只要答案接近我们的预期，它就允许提出无限数量的查询，并在第一个查询之后停止，但情况并非如此。我们建议使用一种同样简单的替代算法，只要任何一个人不会对太多查询的答案作出贡献，而这些查询的答案与我们的预期有很大偏差，该算法就可以继续测试查询。我们的分析很微妙，其中的一些成分可能更广泛适用。在某些情况下，我们的新算法允许私下从数据库中提取比原始信息更多的信息。我们通过将我们的算法应用于移动的重击者问题来证明这一点：在每个时间步，每个 $n$ 用户都会获得一个新的输入，并且任务是私下识别所有当前的重击者。也就是说，在时间步 $i$ 上，目标是识别所有数据元素 $x$，以便许多用户将 $x$ 作为其当前输入。我们针对这个问题提出了一种算法，与使用现有技术可以获得的结果相比，该算法具有改进的错误保证。具体来说，我们算法的错误取决于单个用户将重击者作为输入的最大次数，而不是重击者存在的总次数。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视差分隐私中的稀疏向量技术，提出一种改进算法以提升隐私数据查询效率。
AI.motivation: 传统稀疏向量技术在检测数据库查询偏差时可能过早终止，限制了信息提取能力，需更灵活的隐私保护方法。
AI.method: 设计一种替代算法，允许在单个用户对多个查询产生显著偏差时仍继续测试，通过精细分析实现更优隐私保证。
AI.result: 新算法在动态重 hitters 问题中实现更低错误率，其性能依赖于单个用户持有重 hitters 的频率而非总次数。
AI.conclusion: 改进的稀疏向量技术能更高效提取隐私数据信息，尤其适用于动态数据场景，可能推动差分隐私应用的扩展。

title: Self-Play Reinforcement Learning for Fast Image Retargeting
title_zh: 用于快速图像重定向的自对弈强化学习
comment: Accepted to ACM Multimedia 2020
comments: Accepted to ACM Multimedia 2020
abstract: In this study, we address image retargeting, which is a task that adjusts input images to arbitrary sizes. In one of the best-performing methods called MULTIOP, multiple retargeting operators were combined and retargeted images at each stage were generated to find the optimal sequence of operators that minimized the distance between original and retargeted images. The limitation of this method is in its tremendous processing time, which severely prohibits its practical use. Therefore, the purpose of this study is to find the optimal combination of operators within a reasonable processing time; we propose a method of predicting the optimal operator for each step using a reinforcement learning agent. The technical contributions of this study are as follows. Firstly, we propose a reward based on self-play, which will be insensitive to the large variance in the content-dependent distance measured in MULTIOP. Secondly, we propose to dynamically change the loss weight for each action to prevent the algorithm from falling into a local optimum and from choosing only the most frequently used operator in its training. Our experiments showed that we achieved multi-operator image retargeting with less processing time by three orders of magnitude and the same quality as the original multi-operator-based method, which was the best-performing algorithm in retargeting tasks.
summary: In this study, we address image retargeting, which is a task that adjusts input images to arbitrary sizes. In one of the best-performing methods called MULTIOP, multiple retargeting operators were combined and retargeted images at each stage were generated to find the optimal sequence of operators that minimized the distance between original and retargeted images. The limitation of this method is in its tremendous processing time, which severely prohibits its practical use. Therefore, the purpose of this study is to find the optimal combination of operators within a reasonable processing time; we propose a method of predicting the optimal operator for each step using a reinforcement learning agent. The technical contributions of this study are as follows. Firstly, we propose a reward based on self-play, which will be insensitive to the large variance in the content-dependent distance measured in MULTIOP. Secondly, we propose to dynamically change the loss weight for each action to prevent the algorithm from falling into a local optimum and from choosing only the most frequently used operator in its training. Our experiments showed that we achieved multi-operator image retargeting with less processing time by three orders of magnitude and the same quality as the original multi-operator-based method, which was the best-performing algorithm in retargeting tasks.
abstract_zh: 在本研究中，我们解决图像重定向问题，这是一项将输入图像调整为任意大小的任务。在称为 MULTIOP 的性能最佳方法之一中，组合了多个重定位算子，并生成每个阶段的重定位图像，以找到最小化原始图像和重定位图像之间距离的最佳算子序列。该方法的局限性在于其巨大的处理时间，这严重阻碍了其实际使用。因此，本研究的目的是在合理的处理时间内找到最优的算子组合；我们提出了一种使用强化学习代理预测每个步骤的最佳算子的方法。本研究的技术贡献如下。首先，我们提出了基于自我游戏的奖励，该奖励对 MULTIOP 中测量的内容相关距离的大方差不敏感。其次，我们建议动态改变每个动作的损失权重，以防止算法陷入局部最优并在训练中仅选择最常用的算子。我们的实验表明，我们实现了多算子图像重定向，处理时间减少了三个数量级，并且质量与原始基于多算子的方法相同，这是重定向任务中性能最好的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自博弈强化学习的图像重定向方法，以在合理时间内找到最优操作符组合。
AI.motivation: 现有最佳方法MULTIOP因处理时间过长而难以实际应用，需在保证质量的前提下提升运算效率。
AI.method: 设计基于自博弈的奖励机制以降低内容依赖距离的方差，并动态调整每个动作的损失权重避免陷入局部最优。
AI.result: 实现比原方法快三个数量级的多操作符图像重定向，且保持相同质量水平。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过强化学习有效平衡了运算速度与输出质量，为图像重定向任务提供了实用解决方案。

authors_text: Ilyas Sirazitdinov,Heinrich Schulz,Axel Saalbach,Steffen Renisch,Dmitry V. Dylov
title: Tubular Shape Aware Data Generation for Semantic Segmentation in Medical Imaging
title_zh: 用于医学成像语义分割的管状形状感知数据生成
comment: ef:International Journal of Computer Assisted Radiology and Surgery, V. 17, pp.1091-1099, 2022
comments: ef:International Journal of Computer Assisted Radiology and Surgery, V. 17, pp.1091-1099, 2022
abstract: Chest X-ray is one of the most widespread examinations of the human body. In interventional radiology, its use is frequently associated with the need to visualize various tube-like objects, such as puncture needles, guiding sheaths, wires, and catheters. Detection and precise localization of these tube-like objects in the X-ray images is, therefore, of utmost value, catalyzing the development of accurate target-specific segmentation algorithms. Similar to the other medical imaging tasks, the manual pixel-wise annotation of the tubes is a resource-consuming process. In this work, we aim to alleviate the lack of the annotated images by using artificial data. Specifically, we present an approach for synthetic data generation of the tube-shaped objects, with a generative adversarial network being regularized with a prior-shape constraint. Our method eliminates the need for paired image--mask data and requires only a weakly-labeled dataset (10--20 images) to reach the accuracy of the fully-supervised models. We report the applicability of the approach for the task of segmenting tubes and catheters in the X-ray images, whereas the results should also hold for the other imaging modalities.
summary: Chest X-ray is one of the most widespread examinations of the human body. In interventional radiology, its use is frequently associated with the need to visualize various tube-like objects, such as puncture needles, guiding sheaths, wires, and catheters. Detection and precise localization of these tube-like objects in the X-ray images is, therefore, of utmost value, catalyzing the development of accurate target-specific segmentation algorithms. Similar to the other medical imaging tasks, the manual pixel-wise annotation of the tubes is a resource-consuming process. In this work, we aim to alleviate the lack of the annotated images by using artificial data. Specifically, we present an approach for synthetic data generation of the tube-shaped objects, with a generative adversarial network being regularized with a prior-shape constraint. Our method eliminates the need for paired image--mask data and requires only a weakly-labeled dataset (10--20 images) to reach the accuracy of the fully-supervised models. We report the applicability of the approach for the task of segmenting tubes and catheters in the X-ray images, whereas the results should also hold for the other imaging modalities.
abstract_zh: 胸部X光检查是最广泛的人体检查之一。在介入放射学中，它的使用经常与可视化各种管状物体的需要相关，例如穿刺针、引导鞘、电线和导管。因此，在 X 射线图像中检测和精确定位这些管状物体具有极大的价值，可以促进精确的目标特定分割算法的发展。与其他医学成像任务类似，手动逐像素注释管是一个消耗资源的过程。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过使用人工数据来缓解注释图像的缺失。具体来说，我们提出了一种用于管状物体的合成数据生成的方法，其中生成对抗网络通过先验形状约束进行正则化。我们的方法消除了对成对图像-掩模数据的需要，并且只需要弱标记数据集（10--20 个图像）即可达到完全监督模型的准确性。我们报告了该方法对于 X 射线图像中管子和导管分割任务的适用性，而结果也适用于其他成像方式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络的管状结构合成数据生成方法，用于解决医疗影像语义分割中标注数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 医疗影像中管状物体（如导管、针头）的精确分割需要大量标注数据，但人工标注耗时且成本高，现有数据难以满足需求。
AI.method: 采用生成对抗网络（GAN）结合先验形状约束，无需配对图像-掩码数据，仅使用少量弱标注数据（10-20张图像）生成高质量合成数据。
AI.result: 方法在X光图像导管分割任务中达到全监督模型精度，且结果可推广至其他影像模态。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解医疗影像分割数据不足问题，为弱标注场景下的模型训练提供可行方案。

title: Weight Encode Reconstruction Network for Computed Tomography in a Semi-Case-Wise and Learning-Based Way
title_zh: 以半案例方式和基于学习的方式进行计算机断层扫描的权重编码重建网络
abstract: Classic algebraic reconstruction technology (ART) for computed tomography requires pre-determined weights of the voxels for projecting pixel values. However, such weight cannot be accurately obtained due to the limitation of the physical understanding and computation resources. In this study, we propose a semi-case-wise learning-based method named Weight Encode Reconstruction Network (WERNet) to tackle the issues mentioned above. The model is trained in a self-supervised manner without the label of a voxel set. It contains two branches, including the voxel weight encoder and the voxel attention part. Using gradient normalization, we are able to co-train the encoder and voxel set numerically stably. With WERNet, the reconstructed result was obtained with a cosine similarity greater than 0.999 with the ground truth. Moreover, the model shows the extraordinary capability of denoising comparing to the classic ART method. In the generalization test of the model, the encoder is transferable from a voxel set with complex structure to the unseen cases without the deduction of the accuracy.
summary: Classic algebraic reconstruction technology (ART) for computed tomography requires pre-determined weights of the voxels for projecting pixel values. However, such weight cannot be accurately obtained due to the limitation of the physical understanding and computation resources. In this study, we propose a semi-case-wise learning-based method named Weight Encode Reconstruction Network (WERNet) to tackle the issues mentioned above. The model is trained in a self-supervised manner without the label of a voxel set. It contains two branches, including the voxel weight encoder and the voxel attention part. Using gradient normalization, we are able to co-train the encoder and voxel set numerically stably. With WERNet, the reconstructed result was obtained with a cosine similarity greater than 0.999 with the ground truth. Moreover, the model shows the extraordinary capability of denoising comparing to the classic ART method. In the generalization test of the model, the encoder is transferable from a voxel set with complex structure to the unseen cases without the deduction of the accuracy.
abstract_zh: 用于计算机断层扫描的经典代数重建技术 (ART) 需要预先确定体素的权重来投影像素值。然而，由于物理理解和计算资源的限制，无法准确获得这样的权重。在本研究中，我们提出了一种基于半案例学习的方法，称为权重编码重建网络（WERNet）来解决上述问题。该模型以自我监督的方式进行训练，没有体素集的标签。它包含两个分支，包括体素权重编码器和体素注意力部分。使用梯度归一化，我们能够稳定地共同训练编码器和体素集。利用WERNet，得到的重建结果与groundtruth的余弦相似度大于0.999。此外，与经典的ART方法相比，该模型显示出非凡的去噪能力。在模型的泛化测试中，编码器可以从结构复杂的体素集转移到未见过的情况，而不会降低准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于半案例学习的权重编码重建网络（WERNet），用于改进计算机断层扫描（CT）的图像重建方法。
AI.motivation: 传统代数重建技术（ART）依赖预设的体素权重，但受物理理解限制和计算资源不足影响，难以准确获取权重，导致重建效果受限。
AI.method: WERNet采用自监督训练方式，包含体素权重编码器和体素注意力分支，通过梯度归一化实现编码器与体素集的稳定联合训练。
AI.result: 重建结果与真实值的余弦相似度超过0.999，且在降噪能力上优于传统ART方法，编码器可跨复杂结构体素集迁移至未知案例而无需精度损失。
AI.conclusion: WERNet有效解决了CT重建中权重确定难题，在重建精度、降噪能力及模型泛化性方面均优于传统方法。

authors_text: Javad Amirian,Bingqing Zhang,Francisco Valente Castro,Juan Jose Baldelomar,Jean-Bernard Hayet,Julien Pettre
title: OpenTraj: Assessing Prediction Complexity in Human Trajectories Datasets
title_zh: OpenTraj：评估人体轨迹数据集中的预测复杂性
comment: ACCV2020
comments: ACCV2020
abstract: Human Trajectory Prediction (HTP) has gained much momentum in the last years and many solutions have been proposed to solve it. Proper benchmarking being a key issue for comparing methods, this paper addresses the question of evaluating how complex is a given dataset with respect to the prediction problem. For assessing a dataset complexity, we define a series of indicators around three concepts: Trajectory predictability; Trajectory regularity; Context complexity. We compare the most common datasets used in HTP in the light of these indicators and discuss what this may imply on benchmarking of HTP algorithms. Our source code is released on Github.
summary: Human Trajectory Prediction (HTP) has gained much momentum in the last years and many solutions have been proposed to solve it. Proper benchmarking being a key issue for comparing methods, this paper addresses the question of evaluating how complex is a given dataset with respect to the prediction problem. For assessing a dataset complexity, we define a series of indicators around three concepts: Trajectory predictability; Trajectory regularity; Context complexity. We compare the most common datasets used in HTP in the light of these indicators and discuss what this may imply on benchmarking of HTP algorithms. Our source code is released on Github.
abstract_zh: 人体轨迹预测（HTP）在过去几年中取得了巨大的发展势头，并且已经提出了许多解决方案来解决它。适当的基准测试是比较方法的关键问题，本文解决了评估给定数据集相对于预测问题的复杂程度的问题。为了评估数据集的复杂性，我们围绕三个概念定义了一系列指标：轨迹可预测性；轨迹规律性；上下文复杂性。我们根据这些指标比较 HTP 中最常用的数据集，并讨论这对 HTP 算法基准测试可能意味着什么。我们的源代码发布在 Github 上。

AI.tldr: 提出OpenTraj框架，通过三个指标评估人类轨迹预测数据集的复杂性，以促进HTP算法的基准测试。
AI.motivation: 现有HTP算法比较缺乏对数据集复杂性的系统评估，导致基准测试结果可能受数据特性影响，需建立量化指标指导算法评估。
AI.method: 定义轨迹可预测性、轨迹规律性、上下文复杂性三个维度指标，通过统计分析与可视化方法量化数据集复杂性，并对比主流HTP数据集的指标差异。
AI.result: 发现不同数据集在复杂性指标上存在显著差异，揭示了当前基准测试可能存在的偏差及算法性能评估的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的复杂性评估体系为HTP算法的客观比较提供了依据，强调数据集特性对模型性能的影响，推动未来研究关注数据质量与任务匹配性。

result: 发现不同数据集在复杂性指标上存在显著差异，揭示了当前基准测试可能存在的偏差及算法性能评估的局限性。
conclusion: 提出的复杂性评估体系为HTP算法的客观比较提供了依据，强调数据集特性对模型性能的影响，推动未来研究关注数据质量与任务匹配性。
search_text: OpenTraj: Assessing Prediction Complexity in Human Trajectories Datasets OpenTraj：评估人体轨迹数据集中的预测复杂性 Human Trajectory Prediction (HTP) has gained much momentum in the last years and many solutions have been proposed to solve it. Proper benchmarking being a key issue for comparing methods, this paper addresses the question of evaluating how complex is a given dataset with respect to the prediction problem. For assessing a dataset complexity, we define a series of indicators around three concepts: Trajectory predictability; Trajectory regularity; Context complexity. We compare the most common datasets used in HTP in the light of these indicators and discuss what this may imply on benchmarking of HTP algorithms. Our source code is released on Github. 人体轨迹预测（HTP）在过去几年中取得了巨大的发展势头，并且已经提出了许多解决方案来解决它。适当的基准测试是比较方法的关键问题，本文解决了评估给定数据集相对于预测问题的复杂程度的问题。为了评估数据集的复杂性，我们围绕三个概念定义了一系列指标：轨迹可预测性；轨迹规律性；上下文复杂性。我们根据这些指标比较 HTP 中最常用的数据集，并讨论这对 HTP 算法基准测试可能意味着什么。我们的源代码发布在 Github 上。 提出OpenTraj框架，通过三个指标评估人类轨迹预测数据集的复杂性，以促进HTP算法的基准测试。 Javad Amirian,Bingqing Zhang,Francisco Valente Castro,Juan Jose Baldelomar,Jean-Bernard Hayet,Julien Pettre cs.CV

authors_text: An Nguyen,Srijeet Chatterjee,Sven Weinzierl,Leo Schwinn,Martin Matzner,Bjoern Eskofier
title: Time Matters: Time-Aware LSTMs for Predictive Business Process Monitoring
title_zh: 时间很重要：用于预测业务流程监控的时间感知 LSTM
comment: 12 pages, 4 figures, to be published in post-workshop proceedings volume in the series Lecture Notes in Business Information Processing (LNBIP) - 1st International Workshop on Leveraging Machine Learning in Process Mining (ML4PM) @ ICPM 2020
comments: 12 pages, 4 figures, to be published in post-workshop proceedings volume in the series Lecture Notes in Business Information Processing (LNBIP) - 1st International Workshop on Leveraging Machine Learning in Process Mining (ML4PM) @ ICPM 2020
abstract: Predictive business process monitoring (PBPM) aims to predict future process behavior during ongoing process executions based on event log data. Especially, techniques for the next activity and timestamp prediction can help to improve the performance of operational business processes. Recently, many PBPM solutions based on deep learning were proposed by researchers. Due to the sequential nature of event log data, a common choice is to apply recurrent neural networks with long short-term memory (LSTM) cells. We argue, that the elapsed time between events is informative. However, current PBPM techniques mainly use 'vanilla' LSTM cells and hand-crafted time-related control flow features. To better model the time dependencies between events, we propose a new PBPM technique based on time-aware LSTM (T-LSTM) cells. T-LSTM cells incorporate the elapsed time between consecutive events inherently to adjust the cell memory. Furthermore, we introduce cost-sensitive learning to account for the common class imbalance in event logs. Our experiments on publicly available benchmark event logs indicate the effectiveness of the introduced techniques.
summary: Predictive business process monitoring (PBPM) aims to predict future process behavior during ongoing process executions based on event log data. Especially, techniques for the next activity and timestamp prediction can help to improve the performance of operational business processes. Recently, many PBPM solutions based on deep learning were proposed by researchers. Due to the sequential nature of event log data, a common choice is to apply recurrent neural networks with long short-term memory (LSTM) cells. We argue, that the elapsed time between events is informative. However, current PBPM techniques mainly use 'vanilla' LSTM cells and hand-crafted time-related control flow features. To better model the time dependencies between events, we propose a new PBPM technique based on time-aware LSTM (T-LSTM) cells. T-LSTM cells incorporate the elapsed time between consecutive events inherently to adjust the cell memory. Furthermore, we introduce cost-sensitive learning to account for the common class imbalance in event logs. Our experiments on publicly available benchmark event logs indicate the effectiveness of the introduced techniques.
abstract_zh: 预测性业务流程监控 (PBPM) 旨在根据事件日志数据预测持续流程执行期间的未来流程行为。特别是，下一个活动和时间戳预测技术可以帮助提高运营业务流程的性能。最近，研究人员提出了许多基于深度学习的PBPM解决方案。由于事件日志数据的顺序性质，常见的选择是应用具有长短期记忆 (LSTM) 单元的循环神经网络。我们认为，事件之间经过的时间是有信息性的。然而，当前的 PBPM 技术主要使用“普通”LSTM 单元和手工制作的时间相关控制流特征。为了更好地对事件之间的时间依赖性进行建模，我们提出了一种基于时间感知 LSTM (T-LSTM) 单元的新 PBPM 技术。 T-LSTM 细胞本质上结合了连续事件之间经过的时间来调整细胞记忆。此外，我们引入了成本敏感学习来解决事件日志中常见的类不平衡问题。我们对公开可用的基准事件日志的实验表明了所引入技术的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时间感知长短期记忆网络（T-LSTM）的预测性业务流程监控方法，用于根据事件日志数据预测正在进行的业务流程的未来行为。
AI.motivation: 现有预测性业务流程监控技术主要依赖传统LSTM和人工设计的时间特征，未能充分利用事件间时间间隔的信息，导致时间依赖性建模不足。
AI.method: 设计时间感知LSTM单元（T-LSTM），将事件间时间间隔直接嵌入单元状态更新机制，并结合代价敏感学习解决事件日志中的类别不平衡问题。
AI.result: 在公开基准数据集上的实验表明，T-LSTM在下一个活动预测和时间戳预测任务中均优于现有深度学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 时间感知机制与代价敏感学习的结合有效提升了业务流程预测性能，为处理时序事件数据提供了更精确的建模方式。

authors_text: Chao Tao,Ji Qi,Weipeng Lu,Hao Wang,Haifeng Li
title: Remote Sensing Image Scene Classification with Self-Supervised Paradigm under Limited Labeled Samples
title_zh: 有限标记样本下自监督范式的遥感图像场景分类
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures
comments: 6 pages, 4 figures
abstract: With the development of deep learning, supervised learning methods perform well in remote sensing images (RSIs) scene classification. However, supervised learning requires a huge number of annotated data for training. When labeled samples are not sufficient, the most common solution is to fine-tune the pre-training models using a large natural image dataset (e.g. ImageNet). However, this learning paradigm is not a panacea, especially when the target remote sensing images (e.g. multispectral and hyperspectral data) have different imaging mechanisms from RGB natural images. To solve this problem, we introduce new self-supervised learning (SSL) mechanism to obtain the high-performance pre-training model for RSIs scene classification from large unlabeled data. Experiments on three commonly used RSIs scene classification datasets demonstrated that this new learning paradigm outperforms the traditional dominant ImageNet pre-trained model. Moreover, we analyze the impacts of several factors in SSL on RSIs scene classification tasks, including the choice of self-supervised signals, the domain difference between the source and target dataset, and the amount of pre-training data. The insights distilled from our studies can help to foster the development of SSL in the remote sensing community. Since SSL could learn from unlabeled massive RSIs which are extremely easy to obtain, it will be a potentially promising way to alleviate dependence on labeled samples and thus efficiently solve many problems, such as global mapping.
summary: With the development of deep learning, supervised learning methods perform well in remote sensing images (RSIs) scene classification. However, supervised learning requires a huge number of annotated data for training. When labeled samples are not sufficient, the most common solution is to fine-tune the pre-training models using a large natural image dataset (e.g. ImageNet). However, this learning paradigm is not a panacea, especially when the target remote sensing images (e.g. multispectral and hyperspectral data) have different imaging mechanisms from RGB natural images. To solve this problem, we introduce new self-supervised learning (SSL) mechanism to obtain the high-performance pre-training model for RSIs scene classification from large unlabeled data. Experiments on three commonly used RSIs scene classification datasets demonstrated that this new learning paradigm outperforms the traditional dominant ImageNet pre-trained model. Moreover, we analyze the impacts of several factors in SSL on RSIs scene classification tasks, including the choice of self-supervised signals, the domain difference between the source and target dataset, and the amount of pre-training data. The insights distilled from our studies can help to foster the development of SSL in the remote sensing community. Since SSL could learn from unlabeled massive RSIs which are extremely easy to obtain, it will be a potentially promising way to alleviate dependence on labeled samples and thus efficiently solve many problems, such as global mapping.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习的发展，监督学习方法在遥感图像（RSI）场景分类中表现良好。然而，监督学习需要大量带注释的数据进行训练。当标记样本不足时，最常见的解决方案是使用大型自然图像数据集（例如 ImageNet）对预训练模型进行微调。然而，这种学习范式并不是万能的，特别是当目标遥感图像（例如多光谱和高光谱数据）具有与RGB自然图像不同的成像机制时。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了新的自监督学习（SSL）机制，从大量未标记数据中获得用于 RSI 场景分类的高性能预训练模型。对三个常用 RSI 场景分类数据集的实验表明，这种新的学习范式优于传统的占主导地位的 ImageNet 预训练模型。此外，我们分析了 SSL 中几个因素对 RSI 场景分类任务的影响，包括自监督信号的选择、源数据集和目标数据集之间的域差异以及预训练数据量。从我们的研究中提取的见解有助于促进 SSL 在遥感界的发展。由于 SSL 可以从非常容易获得的未标记的大量 RSI 中进行学习，因此这将是减轻对标记样本的依赖的一种潜在有前途的方法，从而有效地解决许多问题，例如全局映射。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督学习的遥感图像场景分类方法，以解决标注样本有限的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习依赖大量标注数据，而遥感图像因标注成本高且成像机制与自然图像不同，导致预训练模型效果受限。
AI.method: 设计自监督学习框架，利用大规模未标注遥感图像进行预训练，分析SSL信号选择、领域差异及预训练数据量对分类性能的影响。
AI.result: 在三个常用数据集上，新方法优于ImageNet预训练模型，验证了自监督学习在遥感场景分类中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习可减少对标注样本的依赖，为遥感图像全局映射等任务提供高效解决方案，推动SSL在遥感领域的应用发展。

title: Rotated Ring, Radial and Depth Wise Separable Radial Convolutions
title_zh: 旋转环、径向和深度可分离径向卷积
abstract: Simple image rotations significantly reduce the accuracy of deep neural networks. Moreover, training with all possible rotations increases the data set, which also increases the training duration. In this work, we address trainable rotation invariant convolutions as well as the construction of nets, since fully connected layers can only be rotation invariant with a one-dimensional input. On the one hand, we show that our approach is rotationally invariant for different models and on different public data sets. We also discuss the influence of purely rotational invariant features on accuracy. The rotationally adaptive convolution models presented in this work are more computationally intensive than normal convolution models. Therefore, we also present a depth wise separable approach with radial convolution. Link to CUDA code https://atreus.informatik.uni-tuebingen.de/seafile/d/8e2ab8c3fdd444e1a135/
summary: Simple image rotations significantly reduce the accuracy of deep neural networks. Moreover, training with all possible rotations increases the data set, which also increases the training duration. In this work, we address trainable rotation invariant convolutions as well as the construction of nets, since fully connected layers can only be rotation invariant with a one-dimensional input. On the one hand, we show that our approach is rotationally invariant for different models and on different public data sets. We also discuss the influence of purely rotational invariant features on accuracy. The rotationally adaptive convolution models presented in this work are more computationally intensive than normal convolution models. Therefore, we also present a depth wise separable approach with radial convolution. Link to CUDA code https://atreus.informatik.uni-tuebingen.de/seafile/d/8e2ab8c3fdd444e1a135/
abstract_zh: 简单的图像旋转会显着降低深度神经网络的准确性。此外，使用所有可能的旋转进行训练会增加数据集，这也会增加训练持续时间。在这项工作中，我们解决了可训练的旋转不变卷积以及网络的构造，因为完全连接的层只能在一维输入下保持旋转不变。一方面，我们表明我们的方法对于不同的模型和不同的公共数据集是旋转不变的。我们还讨论了纯旋转不变特征对精度的影响。这项工作中提出的旋转自适应卷积模型比普通卷积模型计算量更大。因此，我们还提出了一种具有径向卷积的深度可分离方法。 CUDA 代码链接 https://atreus.informatik.uni-tuebingen.de/seafile/d/8e2ab8c3fdd444e1a135/

AI.tldr: 本文提出可训练的旋转不变卷积方法及网络结构，以解决图像旋转导致深度神经网络精度下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 图像简单旋转会显著降低模型精度，而使用所有可能旋转角度的数据集会增加训练时间和数据量，因此需要更高效的旋转不变性解决方案。
AI.method: 设计旋转自适应卷积模型，并引入深度可分离的径向卷积方法，通过CUDA代码实现计算优化。
AI.result: 所提方法在多种模型和公开数据集上验证了旋转不变性，但计算复杂度较高；深度可分离径向卷积有效降低了计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 旋转自适应卷积能提升模型鲁棒性，但需通过深度可分离结构平衡精度与效率，为旋转不变性研究提供新方向。

title: Weight and Gradient Centralization in Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 深度神经网络中的权重和梯度集中
abstract: Batch normalization is currently the most widely used variant of internal normalization for deep neural networks. Additional work has shown that the normalization of weights and additional conditioning as well as the normalization of gradients further improve the generalization. In this work, we combine several of these methods and thereby increase the generalization of the networks. The advantage of the newer methods compared to the batch normalization is not only increased generalization, but also that these methods only have to be applied during training and, therefore, do not influence the running time during use. Link to CUDA code https://atreus.informatik.uni-tuebingen.de/seafile/d/8e2ab8c3fdd444e1a135/
summary: Batch normalization is currently the most widely used variant of internal normalization for deep neural networks. Additional work has shown that the normalization of weights and additional conditioning as well as the normalization of gradients further improve the generalization. In this work, we combine several of these methods and thereby increase the generalization of the networks. The advantage of the newer methods compared to the batch normalization is not only increased generalization, but also that these methods only have to be applied during training and, therefore, do not influence the running time during use. Link to CUDA code https://atreus.informatik.uni-tuebingen.de/seafile/d/8e2ab8c3fdd444e1a135/
abstract_zh: 批量归一化是目前深度神经网络内部归一化最广泛使用的变体。其他工作表明，权重归一化和附加条件以及梯度归一化进一步提高了泛化能力。在这项工作中，我们结合了其中几种方法，从而提高了网络的泛化能力。与批量归一化相比，新方法的优点不仅在于增加了泛化性，而且这些方法只需在训练期间应用，因此不会影响使用期间的运行时间。 CUDA 代码链接 https://atreus.informatik.uni-tuebingen.de/seafile/d/8e2ab8c3fdd444e1a135/

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合权重和梯度归一化方法，提升深度神经网络的泛化能力，且不影响推理速度。
AI.motivation: 批处理归一化虽广泛使用，但权重/梯度归一化能进一步提升泛化，且仅在训练阶段应用，不影响运行效率。
AI.method: 整合权重归一化、梯度归一化及额外条件调整方法，仅在训练阶段应用。
AI.result: 实验表明网络泛化能力提升，且推理阶段运行时间不受影响。
AI.conclusion: 新方法相比批处理归一化在泛化与效率上更具优势，值得推广使用。

title: Building Large Lexicalized Ontologies from Text: a Use Case in Automatic Indexing of Biotechnology Patents
title_zh: 从文本构建大型词汇化本体：生物技术专利自动索引的用例
comment: ef:International Conference on Knowledge Engineering and Knowledge Management. EKAW 2010. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 6317. (pp. 514-523) Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg
comments: ef:International Conference on Knowledge Engineering and Knowledge Management. EKAW 2010. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 6317. (pp. 514-523) Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg
abstract: This paper presents a tool, TyDI, and methods experimented in the building of a termino-ontology, i.e. a lexicalized ontology aimed at fine-grained indexation for semantic search applications. TyDI provides facilities for knowledge engineers and domain experts to efficiently collaborate to validate, organize and conceptualize corpus extracted terms. A use case on biotechnology patent search demonstrates TyDI's potential.
summary: This paper presents a tool, TyDI, and methods experimented in the building of a termino-ontology, i.e. a lexicalized ontology aimed at fine-grained indexation for semantic search applications. TyDI provides facilities for knowledge engineers and domain experts to efficiently collaborate to validate, organize and conceptualize corpus extracted terms. A use case on biotechnology patent search demonstrates TyDI's potential.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种工具 TyDI 以及在术语本体构建中进行实验的方法，即旨在为语义搜索应用程序进行细粒度索引的词汇化本体。 TyDI 为知识工程师和领域专家提供了高效协作的设施，以验证、组织和概念化语料库提取的术语。生物技术专利检索的用例展示了 TyDI 的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TyDI的工具和方法，用于构建词化本体以实现生物技术专利的自动索引。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理复杂术语和协作效率方面存在不足，需更高效的工具支持领域专家与知识工程师协作构建精准索引。
AI.method: 开发TyDI工具，支持领域专家与知识工程师协作验证、组织和概念化从文本中提取的术语，构建术语本体。
AI.result: 通过生物技术专利案例验证，展示了TyDI在自动索引任务中的有效性与潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提升了术语本体构建效率，为语义搜索应用提供了可扩展的解决方案。

title: SST-BERT at SemEval-2020 Task 1: Semantic Shift Tracing by Clustering in BERT-based Embedding Spaces
title_zh: SemEval-2020 任务 1 上的 SST-BERT：通过基于 BERT 的嵌入空间中的聚类进行语义转移跟踪
abstract: Lexical semantic change detection (also known as semantic shift tracing) is a task of identifying words that have changed their meaning over time. Unsupervised semantic shift tracing, focal point of SemEval2020, is particularly challenging. Given the unsupervised setup, in this work, we propose to identify clusters among different occurrences of each target word, considering these as representatives of different word meanings. As such, disagreements in obtained clusters naturally allow to quantify the level of semantic shift per each target word in four target languages. To leverage this idea, clustering is performed on contextualized (BERT-based) embeddings of word occurrences. The obtained results show that our approach performs well both measured separately (per language) and overall, where we surpass all provided SemEval baselines.
summary: Lexical semantic change detection (also known as semantic shift tracing) is a task of identifying words that have changed their meaning over time. Unsupervised semantic shift tracing, focal point of SemEval2020, is particularly challenging. Given the unsupervised setup, in this work, we propose to identify clusters among different occurrences of each target word, considering these as representatives of different word meanings. As such, disagreements in obtained clusters naturally allow to quantify the level of semantic shift per each target word in four target languages. To leverage this idea, clustering is performed on contextualized (BERT-based) embeddings of word occurrences. The obtained results show that our approach performs well both measured separately (per language) and overall, where we surpass all provided SemEval baselines.
abstract_zh: 词汇语义变化检测（也称为语义转移追踪）是一项识别随着时间的推移而改变其含义的单词的任务。无监督语义转移追踪是 SemEval2020 的焦点，尤其具有挑战性。考虑到无监督的设置，在这项工作中，我们建议识别每个目标单词的不同出现之间的聚类，将它们视为不同单词含义的代表。因此，获得的聚类中的分歧自然允许量化四种目标语言中每个目标单词的语义转移水平。为了利用这个想法，对单词出现的上下文化（基于 BERT）嵌入进行聚类。获得的结果表明，我们的方法无论是单独测量（每种语言）还是整体测量都表现良好，超过了所有提供的 SemEval 基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于BERT嵌入空间聚类的方法，用于无监督语义变化追踪任务。
AI.motivation: 无监督语义变化检测面临如何量化词义分歧的挑战，需探索有效表征词义演变的方法。
AI.method: 对目标词的不同语境嵌入进行聚类，通过聚类分歧程度衡量语义变化，使用BERT生成上下文嵌入。
AI.result: 在四个语言中均超越SemEval基线，整体表现优异且各语言单独评估也具竞争力。
AI.conclusion: BERT聚类方法有效捕捉语义变化，为多语言无监督语义分析提供可行方案。

search_text: SST-BERT at SemEval-2020 Task 1: Semantic Shift Tracing by Clustering in BERT-based Embedding Spaces SemEval-2020 任务 1 上的 SST-BERT：通过基于 BERT 的嵌入空间中的聚类进行语义转移跟踪 Lexical semantic change detection (also known as semantic shift tracing) is a task of identifying words that have changed their meaning over time. Unsupervised semantic shift tracing, focal point of SemEval2020, is particularly challenging. Given the unsupervised setup, in this work, we propose to identify clusters among different occurrences of each target word, considering these as representatives of different word meanings. As such, disagreements in obtained clusters naturally allow to quantify the level of semantic shift per each target word in four target languages. To leverage this idea, clustering is performed on contextualized (BERT-based) embeddings of word occurrences. The obtained results show that our approach performs well both measured separately (per language) and overall, where we surpass all provided SemEval baselines. 词汇语义变化检测（也称为语义转移追踪）是一项识别随着时间的推移而改变其含义的单词的任务。无监督语义转移追踪是 SemEval2020 的焦点，尤其具有挑战性。考虑到无监督的设置，在这项工作中，我们建议识别每个目标单词的不同出现之间的聚类，将它们视为不同单词含义的代表。因此，获得的聚类中的分歧自然允许量化四种目标语言中每个目标单词的语义转移水平。为了利用这个想法，对单词出现的上下文化（基于 BERT）嵌入进行聚类。获得的结果表明，我们的方法无论是单独测量（每种语言）还是整体测量都表现良好，超过了所有提供的 SemEval 基线。 本文提出基于BERT嵌入空间聚类的方法，用于无监督语义变化追踪任务。 K Vani,Sandra Mitrovic,Alessandro Antonucci,Fabio Rinaldi cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Morphological segmentation of hyperspectral images
title_zh: 高光谱图像的形态分割
comment: ef:Image Analysis and Stereology, International Society for Stereology, 2007, 26 (3), pp.101-109
comments: ef:Image Analysis and Stereology, International Society for Stereology, 2007, 26 (3), pp.101-109
abstract: The present paper develops a general methodology for the morphological segmentation of hyperspectral images, i.e., with an important number of channels. This approach, based on watershed, is composed of a spectral classification to obtain the markers and a vectorial gradient which gives the spatial information. Several alternative gradients are adapted to the different hyperspectral functions. Data reduction is performed either by Factor Analysis or by model fitting. Image segmentation is done on different spaces: factor space, parameters space, etc. On all these spaces the spatial/spectral segmentation approach is applied, leading to relevant results on the image.
summary: The present paper develops a general methodology for the morphological segmentation of hyperspectral images, i.e., with an important number of channels. This approach, based on watershed, is composed of a spectral classification to obtain the markers and a vectorial gradient which gives the spatial information. Several alternative gradients are adapted to the different hyperspectral functions. Data reduction is performed either by Factor Analysis or by model fitting. Image segmentation is done on different spaces: factor space, parameters space, etc. On all these spaces the spatial/spectral segmentation approach is applied, leading to relevant results on the image.
abstract_zh: 本文开发了一种用于高光谱图像形态分割的通用方法，即具有重要数量的通道。这种基于分水岭的方法由获取标记的光谱分类和给出空间信息的矢量梯度组成。几种替代梯度适用于不同的高光谱函数。数据缩减通过因子分析或模型拟合来执行。图像分割是在不同的空间上完成的：因子空间、参数空间等。在所有这些空间上应用空间/光谱分割方法，从而在图像上产生相关结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分水岭算法的高光谱图像形态分割方法，结合光谱分类与向量梯度实现多空间分割。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像具有多通道特性，传统分割方法难以同时有效处理其光谱与空间信息，需开发通用分割框架。
AI.method: 采用分水岭算法，通过光谱分类生成标记，结合多种向量梯度计算空间信息，并利用因子分析或模型拟合进行数据降维，在因子空间、参数空间等多维度空间实施分割。
AI.result: 在不同特征空间中应用该方法后，实现了高光谱图像的有效分割，验证了方法的可行性与适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合光谱-空间信息，为高光谱图像分割提供了通用解决方案，适用于多种应用场景。
