authors_text: Leonardo Anjoletto Ferreira,Douglas De Rizzo Meneghetti,Paulo Eduardo Santos
title: CAPTION: Correction by Analyses, POS-Tagging and Interpretation of Objects using only Nouns
title_zh: 说明：仅使用名词对对象进行分析、词性标记和解释进行修正
comment: Published at the First Annual International Workshop on Interpretability: Methodologies and algorithms (IMA 2019)
comments: Published at the First Annual International Workshop on Interpretability: Methodologies and algorithms (IMA 2019)
abstract: Recently, Deep Learning (DL) methods have shown an excellent performance in image captioning and visual question answering. However, despite their performance, DL methods do not learn the semantics of the words that are being used to describe a scene, making it difficult to spot incorrect words used in captions or to interchange words that have similar meanings. This work proposes a combination of DL methods for object detection and natural language processing to validate image's captions. We test our method in the FOIL-COCO data set, since it provides correct and incorrect captions for various images using only objects represented in the MS-COCO image data set. Results show that our method has a good overall performance, in some cases similar to the human performance.
summary: Recently, Deep Learning (DL) methods have shown an excellent performance in image captioning and visual question answering. However, despite their performance, DL methods do not learn the semantics of the words that are being used to describe a scene, making it difficult to spot incorrect words used in captions or to interchange words that have similar meanings. This work proposes a combination of DL methods for object detection and natural language processing to validate image's captions. We test our method in the FOIL-COCO data set, since it provides correct and incorrect captions for various images using only objects represented in the MS-COCO image data set. Results show that our method has a good overall performance, in some cases similar to the human performance.
abstract_zh: 最近，深度学习（DL）方法在图像字幕和视觉问答方面表现出了出色的性能。然而，尽管深度学习方法性能出色，但它无法学习用于描述场景的单词的语义，因此很难发现字幕中使用的不正确单词或互换具有相似含义的单词。这项工作提出了结合深度学习方法进行对象检测和自然语言处理来验证图像的标题。我们在 FOIL-COCO 数据集中测试我们的方法，因为它仅使用 MS-COCO 图像数据集中表示的对象为各种图像提供正确和不正确的标题。结果表明，我们的方法具有良好的整体性能，在某些情况下与人类性能相似。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合深度学习与自然语言处理技术，通过分析名词和语法标签来验证图像标题的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在图像描述任务中无法准确捕捉词语语义，导致难以检测标题中的错误或近义词替换。
AI.method: 融合目标检测模型与自然语言处理技术，利用FOIL-COCO数据集验证标题正确性。
AI.result: 在FOIL-COCO数据集上取得良好效果，部分场景表现接近人类水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效验证图像标题的语义准确性，为自动标题修正提供可行方案。

title: Continuous close-range 3D object pose estimation
title_zh: 连续近距离 3D 物体姿态估计
comment: ef:2019 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: ef:2019 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: In the context of future manufacturing lines, removing fixtures will be a fundamental step to increase the flexibility of autonomous systems in assembly and logistic operations. Vision-based 3D pose estimation is a necessity to accurately handle objects that might not be placed at fixed positions during the robot task execution. Industrial tasks bring multiple challenges for the robust pose estimation of objects such as difficult object properties, tight cycle times and constraints on camera views. In particular, when interacting with objects, we have to work with close-range partial views of objects that pose a new challenge for typical view-based pose estimation methods. In this paper, we present a 3D pose estimation method based on a gradient-ascend particle filter that integrates new observations on-the-fly to improve the pose estimate. Thereby, we can apply this method online during task execution to save valuable cycle time. In contrast to other view-based pose estimation methods, we model potential views in full 6- dimensional space that allows us to cope with close-range partial objects views. We demonstrate the approach on a real assembly task, in which the algorithm usually converges to the correct pose within 10-15 iterations with an average accuracy of less than 8mm.
summary: In the context of future manufacturing lines, removing fixtures will be a fundamental step to increase the flexibility of autonomous systems in assembly and logistic operations. Vision-based 3D pose estimation is a necessity to accurately handle objects that might not be placed at fixed positions during the robot task execution. Industrial tasks bring multiple challenges for the robust pose estimation of objects such as difficult object properties, tight cycle times and constraints on camera views. In particular, when interacting with objects, we have to work with close-range partial views of objects that pose a new challenge for typical view-based pose estimation methods. In this paper, we present a 3D pose estimation method based on a gradient-ascend particle filter that integrates new observations on-the-fly to improve the pose estimate. Thereby, we can apply this method online during task execution to save valuable cycle time. In contrast to other view-based pose estimation methods, we model potential views in full 6- dimensional space that allows us to cope with close-range partial objects views. We demonstrate the approach on a real assembly task, in which the algorithm usually converges to the correct pose within 10-15 iterations with an average accuracy of less than 8mm.
abstract_zh: 在未来的生产线中，拆除固定装置将是提高自主系统在装配和物流操作中灵活性的基本步骤。基于视觉的 3D 位姿估计是准确处理机器人任务执行期间可能未放置在固定位置的物体所必需的。工业任务给物体的稳健姿态估计带来了多重挑战，例如困难的物体属性、紧张的循环时间和相机视图的限制。特别是，在与物体交互时，我们必须处理物体的近距离部分视图，这对典型的基于视图的姿态估计方法提出了新的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于梯度上升粒子滤波器的 3D 位姿估计方法，该方法集成了动态新观测值以改进位姿估计。因此，我们可以在任务执行过程中在线应用此方法，以节省宝贵的周期时间。与其他基于视图的姿态估计方法相比，我们在完整的 6 维空间中对潜在视图进行建模，这使我们能够处理近距离的部分对象视图。我们在真实的装配任务中演示了该方法，其中算法通常在 10-15 次迭代内收敛到正确的姿势，平均精度小于 8 毫米。

AI.motivation: 未来制造系统需要提高自主系统的灵活性，传统固定位置的物体处理方式无法满足需求，而现有基于视图的位姿估计方法难以应对近距离部分视图的挑战。
AI.method: 采用梯度上升粒子滤波器，实时整合新观测数据，并在完整的6维空间中建模潜在视图以应对部分视图问题。
AI.result: 在实际装配任务中，算法通常在10-15次迭代内收敛至正确位姿，平均精度低于8毫米。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了近距离部分视图下的位姿估计问题，为工业自动化中的灵活操作提供了可行方案。

search_text: Continuous close-range 3D object pose estimation 连续近距离 3D 物体姿态估计 In the context of future manufacturing lines, removing fixtures will be a fundamental step to increase the flexibility of autonomous systems in assembly and logistic operations. Vision-based 3D pose estimation is a necessity to accurately handle objects that might not be placed at fixed positions during the robot task execution. Industrial tasks bring multiple challenges for the robust pose estimation of objects such as difficult object properties, tight cycle times and constraints on camera views. In particular, when interacting with objects, we have to work with close-range partial views of objects that pose a new challenge for typical view-based pose estimation methods. In this paper, we present a 3D pose estimation method based on a gradient-ascend particle filter that integrates new observations on-the-fly to improve the pose estimate. Thereby, we can apply this method online during task execution to save valuable cycle time. In contrast to other view-based pose estimation methods, we model potential views in full 6- dimensional space that allows us to cope with close-range partial objects views. We demonstrate the approach on a real assembly task, in which the algorithm usually converges to the correct pose within 10-15 iterations with an average accuracy of less than 8mm. 在未来的生产线中，拆除固定装置将是提高自主系统在装配和物流操作中灵活性的基本步骤。基于视觉的 3D 位姿估计是准确处理机器人任务执行期间可能未放置在固定位置的物体所必需的。工业任务给物体的稳健姿态估计带来了多重挑战，例如困难的物体属性、紧张的循环时间和相机视图的限制。特别是，在与物体交互时，我们必须处理物体的近距离部分视图，这对典型的基于视图的姿态估计方法提出了新的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于梯度上升粒子滤波器的 3D 位姿估计方法，该方法集成了动态新观测值以改进位姿估计。因此，我们可以在任务执行过程中在线应用此方法，以节省宝贵的周期时间。与其他基于视图的姿态估计方法相比，我们在完整的 6 维空间中对潜在视图进行建模，这使我们能够处理近距离的部分对象视图。我们在真实的装配任务中演示了该方法，其中算法通常在 10-15 次迭代内收敛到正确的姿势，平均精度小于 8 毫米。 本文提出了一种基于梯度上升粒子滤波器的3D物体位姿估计方法，用于解决近距离部分视图下的工业场景中的位姿估计问题。 Bjarne Grossmann,Francesco Rovida,Volker Krueger cs.RO,cs.CV

title: Maximal benefits and possible detrimental effects of binary decision aids
title_zh: 二元决策辅助的最大好处和可能的不利影响
comment: Proceedings, 2nd IEEE International Conference on Human-Machine Systems (2021)
comments: Proceedings, 2nd IEEE International Conference on Human-Machine Systems (2021)
abstract: Binary decision aids, such as alerts, are a simple and widely used form of automation. The formal analysis of a user's task performance with an aid sees the process as the combination of information from two detectors who both receive input about an event and evaluate it. The user's decisions are based on the output of the aid and on the information, the user obtains independently. We present a simple method for computing the maximal benefits a user can derive from a binary aid as a function of the user's and the aid's sensitivities. Combining the user and the aid often adds little to the performance the better detector could achieve alone. Also, if users assign non-optimal weights to the aid, performance may drop dramatically. Thus, the introduction of a valid aid can actually lower detection performance, compared to a more sensitive user working alone. Similarly, adding a user to a system with high sensitivity may lower its performance. System designers need to consider the potential adverse effects of introducing users or aids into systems.
summary: Binary decision aids, such as alerts, are a simple and widely used form of automation. The formal analysis of a user's task performance with an aid sees the process as the combination of information from two detectors who both receive input about an event and evaluate it. The user's decisions are based on the output of the aid and on the information, the user obtains independently. We present a simple method for computing the maximal benefits a user can derive from a binary aid as a function of the user's and the aid's sensitivities. Combining the user and the aid often adds little to the performance the better detector could achieve alone. Also, if users assign non-optimal weights to the aid, performance may drop dramatically. Thus, the introduction of a valid aid can actually lower detection performance, compared to a more sensitive user working alone. Similarly, adding a user to a system with high sensitivity may lower its performance. System designers need to consider the potential adverse effects of introducing users or aids into systems.
abstract_zh: 二元决策辅助（例如警报）是一种简单且广泛使用的自动化形式。在辅助下对用户任务表现的正式分析将过程视为来自两个检测器的信息的组合，这两个检测器都接收有关事件的输入并对其进行评估。用户的决定基于辅助的输出和用户独立获得的信息。我们提出了一种简单的方法，用于计算用户可以从二进制援助中获得的最大收益，作为用户和援助的敏感性的函数。将用户和辅助设备结合起来通常对更好的探测器单独实现的性能几乎没有什么帮助。此外，如果用户为辅助分配非最佳权重，性能可能会急剧下降。因此，与更敏感的用户单独工作相比，引入有效的辅助实际上会降低检测性能。同样，向敏感度较高的系统添加用户可能会降低其性能。系统设计者需要考虑将用户或辅助设备引入系统的潜在不利影响。

AI.tldr: 本文分析二元决策辅助工具的最大效益及其潜在负面影响，探讨用户与辅助工具组合对任务性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未充分考虑用户与二元决策辅助工具交互时的潜在风险，需明确辅助工具在何种情况下可能降低系统性能。
AI.method: 通过数学模型计算用户与辅助工具灵敏度组合下的最大效益，分析非最优权重分配对性能的影响。
AI.result: 用户与辅助工具组合通常无法超越单一更优检测器的性能；非最优权重可能导致性能显著下降，甚至低于用户独立工作时的表现。
AI.conclusion: 系统设计需谨慎评估引入用户或辅助工具的潜在负面影响，避免因交互不当导致性能恶化。

title: Incorporating Machine Learning to Evaluate Solutions to the University Course Timetabling Problem
title_zh: 结合机器学习来评估大学课程时间表问题的解决方案
comment: ef:Covenant Journal of Informatics & Communication Technology (2019) 7(1) 18-35
comments: ef:Covenant Journal of Informatics & Communication Technology (2019) 7(1) 18-35
abstract: Evaluating solutions to optimization problems is arguably the most important step for heuristic algorithms, as it is used to guide the algorithms towards the optimal solution in the solution search space. Research has shown evaluation functions to some optimization problems to be impractical to compute and have thus found surrogate less expensive evaluation functions to those problems. This study investigates the extent to which supervised learning algorithms can be used to find approximations to evaluation functions for the university course timetabling problem. Up to 97 percent of the time, the traditional evaluation function agreed with the supervised learning regression model on the result of comparison of the quality of pair of solutions to the university course timetabling problem, suggesting that supervised learning regression models can be suitable alternatives for optimization problems' evaluation functions.
summary: Evaluating solutions to optimization problems is arguably the most important step for heuristic algorithms, as it is used to guide the algorithms towards the optimal solution in the solution search space. Research has shown evaluation functions to some optimization problems to be impractical to compute and have thus found surrogate less expensive evaluation functions to those problems. This study investigates the extent to which supervised learning algorithms can be used to find approximations to evaluation functions for the university course timetabling problem. Up to 97 percent of the time, the traditional evaluation function agreed with the supervised learning regression model on the result of comparison of the quality of pair of solutions to the university course timetabling problem, suggesting that supervised learning regression models can be suitable alternatives for optimization problems' evaluation functions.
abstract_zh: 评估优化问题的解决方案可以说是启发式算法最重要的步骤，因为它用于引导算法在解决方案搜索空间中找到最佳解决方案。研究表明，一些优化问题的评估函数计算起来不切实际，因此找到了这些问题的替代更便宜的评估函数。本研究调查了监督学习算法在多大程度上可用于寻找大学课程时间表问题的评估函数的近似值。在大学课程时间表问题的一对解的质量比较结果上，传统评估函数与监督学习回归模型的结果一致，高达 97%，这表明监督学习回归模型可以作为优化问题评估函数的合适替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究如何利用监督学习算法近似评估大学课程时间表问题的解决方案，以替代传统评估函数
AI.motivation: 传统评估函数在某些优化问题中计算成本高，需寻找更高效的替代方法
AI.method: 采用监督学习回归模型来近似传统评估函数，用于比较解决方案的质量
AI.result: 监督学习模型在97%的情况下与传统评估函数结果一致，表明其有效性
AI.conclusion: 监督学习回归模型可有效替代传统评估函数，适用于优化问题

Research has shown evaluation functions to some optimization problems to be impractical to compute and have thus found surrogate less expensive evaluation functions to those problems. This study investigates the extent to which supervised learning algorithms can be used to find approximations to evaluation functions for the university course timetabling problem. Up to 97 percent of the time, the traditional evaluation function agreed with the supervised learning regression model on the result of comparison of the quality of pair of solutions to the university course timetabling problem, suggesting that supervised learning regression models can be suitable alternatives for optimization problems' evaluation functions. 评估优化问题的解决方案可以说是启发式算法最重要的步骤，因为它用于引导算法在解决方案搜索空间中找到最佳解决方案。研究表明，一些优化问题的评估函数计算起来不切实际，因此找到了这些问题的替代更便宜的评估函数。本研究调查了监督学习算法在多大程度上可用于寻找大学课程时间表问题的评估函数的近似值。在大学课程时间表问题的一对解的质量比较结果上，传统评估函数与监督学习回归模型的结果一致，高达 97%，这表明监督学习回归模型可以作为优化问题评估函数的合适替代方案。 本论文研究如何利用监督学习算法近似评估大学课程时间表问题的解决方案，以替代传统评估函数 Patrick Kenekayoro cs.NE

authors_text: Lirui Wang,Yu Xiang,Wei Yang,Arsalan Mousavian,Dieter Fox
title: Goal-Auxiliary Actor-Critic for 6D Robotic Grasping with Point Clouds
title_zh: 用于点云 6D 机器人抓取的目标辅助 Actor-Critic
comment: ef:The Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL 2021)
comments: ef:The Conference on Robot Learning (CoRL 2021)
abstract: 6D robotic grasping beyond top-down bin-picking scenarios is a challenging task. Previous solutions based on 6D grasp synthesis with robot motion planning usually operate in an open-loop setting, which are sensitive to grasp synthesis errors. In this work, we propose a new method for learning closed-loop control policies for 6D grasping. Our policy takes a segmented point cloud of an object from an egocentric camera as input, and outputs continuous 6D control actions of the robot gripper for grasping the object. We combine imitation learning and reinforcement learning and introduce a goal-auxiliary actor-critic algorithm for policy learning. We demonstrate that our learned policy can be integrated into a tabletop 6D grasping system and a human-robot handover system to improve the grasping performance of unseen objects. Our videos and code can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/gaddpg .
summary: 6D robotic grasping beyond top-down bin-picking scenarios is a challenging task. Previous solutions based on 6D grasp synthesis with robot motion planning usually operate in an open-loop setting, which are sensitive to grasp synthesis errors. In this work, we propose a new method for learning closed-loop control policies for 6D grasping. Our policy takes a segmented point cloud of an object from an egocentric camera as input, and outputs continuous 6D control actions of the robot gripper for grasping the object. We combine imitation learning and reinforcement learning and introduce a goal-auxiliary actor-critic algorithm for policy learning. We demonstrate that our learned policy can be integrated into a tabletop 6D grasping system and a human-robot handover system to improve the grasping performance of unseen objects. Our videos and code can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/gaddpg .
abstract_zh: 超越自上而下的垃圾箱拣选场景的 6D 机器人抓取是一项具有挑战性的任务。以前基于 6D 抓取合成和机器人运动规划的解决方案通常在开环设置中运行，这对抓取合成错误很敏感。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种学习 6D 抓取闭环控制策略的新方法。我们的策略采用来自以自我为中心的相机的物体的分段点云作为输入，并输出用于抓取物体的机器人抓手的连续 6D 控制动作。我们将模仿学习和强化学习结合起来，并引入了用于策略学习的目标辅助演员批评算法。我们证明了我们学习到的策略可以集成到桌面 6D 抓取系统和人机切换系统中，以提高对不可见物体的抓取性能。我们的视频和代码可以在 https://sites.google.com/view/gaddpg 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于点云数据的闭环控制策略，用于解决复杂场景下的6D机器人抓取问题。
AI.motivation: 现有6D抓取方法多为开环控制，对抓取合成误差敏感，难以适应未知物体和复杂环境。
AI.method: 结合模仿学习与强化学习，设计目标辅助的Actor-Critic算法，输入分割后的点云数据，输出连续6D控制动作。
AI.result: 所学策略成功集成至桌面抓取系统和人机交接系统，显著提升未知物体的抓取成功率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过闭环控制与多模态学习有效提升抓取鲁棒性，为复杂场景下的机器人操作提供新思路。

authors_text: Sunghyeon Kim,Hyeyoon Lee,Sunjong Park,Jinho Lee,Keunwoo Choi
title: Deep Composer Classification Using Symbolic Representation
title_zh: 使用符号表示进行深度 Composer 分类
abstract: In this study, we train deep neural networks to classify composer on a symbolic domain. The model takes a two-channel two-dimensional input, i.e., onset and note activations of time-pitch representation, which is converted from MIDI recordings and performs a single-label classification. On the experiments conducted on MAESTRO dataset, we report an F1 value of 0.8333 for the classification of 13~classical composers.
summary: In this study, we train deep neural networks to classify composer on a symbolic domain. The model takes a two-channel two-dimensional input, i.e., onset and note activations of time-pitch representation, which is converted from MIDI recordings and performs a single-label classification. On the experiments conducted on MAESTRO dataset, we report an F1 value of 0.8333 for the classification of 13~classical composers.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们训练深度神经网络在符号域上对作曲家进行分类。该模型采用两通道二维输入，即时间音高表示的开始和音符激活，它是从 MIDI 录音转换而来并执行单标签分类。在 MAESTRO 数据集上进行的实验中，我们报告了 13~古典作曲家分类的 F1 值为 0.8333。

AI.tldr: 本研究使用深度神经网络在符号域对古典作曲家进行分类，输入为MIDI转换的二维时间-音高表示。
AI.motivation: 传统作曲家分类方法可能未能充分利用音乐符号表示的结构信息，需探索更有效的深度学习方法。
AI.method: 采用双通道二维输入（起始时间和音符激活），将MIDI数据转换为时间-音高表示，并使用深度神经网络进行单标签分类。
AI.result: 在MAESTRO数据集上对13位古典作曲家分类的F1值达到0.8333。
AI.conclusion: 符号表示结合深度学习能有效提升作曲家分类性能，未来可扩展至更多作曲家或数据集。

authors_text: Wolfgang Fuhl,Yao Rong,Thomas Motz,Michael Scheidt,Andreas Hartel,Andreas Koch,Enkelejda Kasneci
title: Explainable Online Validation of Machine Learning Models for Practical Applications
title_zh: 实际应用中机器学习模型的可解释在线验证
abstract: We present a reformulation of the regression and classification, which aims to validate the result of a machine learning algorithm. Our reformulation simplifies the original problem and validates the result of the machine learning algorithm using the training data. Since the validation of machine learning algorithms must always be explainable, we perform our experiments with the kNN algorithm as well as with an algorithm based on conditional probabilities, which is proposed in this work. For the evaluation of our approach, three publicly available data sets were used and three classification and two regression problems were evaluated. The presented algorithm based on conditional probabilities is also online capable and requires only a fraction of memory compared to the kNN algorithm.
summary: We present a reformulation of the regression and classification, which aims to validate the result of a machine learning algorithm. Our reformulation simplifies the original problem and validates the result of the machine learning algorithm using the training data. Since the validation of machine learning algorithms must always be explainable, we perform our experiments with the kNN algorithm as well as with an algorithm based on conditional probabilities, which is proposed in this work. For the evaluation of our approach, three publicly available data sets were used and three classification and two regression problems were evaluated. The presented algorithm based on conditional probabilities is also online capable and requires only a fraction of memory compared to the kNN algorithm.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了回归和分类的重新表述，旨在验证机器学习算法的结果。我们的重新表述简化了原始问题，并使用训练数据验证了机器学习算法的结果。由于机器学习算法的验证必须始终是可解释的，因此我们使用 kNN 算法以及本工作中提出的基于条件概率的算法进行实验。为了评估我们的方法，使用了三个公开可用的数据集，并评估了三个分类问题和两个回归问题。所提出的基于条件概率的算法也具有在线能力，并且与 kNN 算法相比仅需要一小部分内存。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于训练数据的机器学习模型验证方法，通过重新定义回归和分类问题，结合kNN算法和条件概率算法进行可解释性验证。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型验证方法缺乏可解释性且效率低下，实际应用中需兼顾验证准确性与计算资源消耗。
AI.method: 通过训练数据重构验证流程，设计基于条件概率的在线算法，并与kNN算法对比实验，使用公开数据集评估分类与回归任务。
AI.result: 条件概率算法在三个数据集上验证有效，具备在线处理能力且内存占用仅为kNN算法的分数之一。
AI.conclusion: 提出的验证框架在保持可解释性的同时提升了计算效率，为实际场景下的模型验证提供了轻量化解决方案。

title: Discriminative and Generative Models for Anatomical Shape Analysison Point Clouds with Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用深度神经网络对点云进行解剖形状分析的判别模型和生成模型

comments: Accepted for publication in the Medical Image Analysis journal
abstract: We introduce deep neural networks for the analysis of anatomical shapes that learn a low-dimensional shape representation from the given task, instead of relying on hand-engineered representations. Our framework is modular and consists of several computing blocks that perform fundamental shape processing tasks. The networks operate on unordered point clouds and provide invariance to similarity transformations, avoiding the need to identify point correspondences between shapes. Based on the framework, we assemble a discriminative model for disease classification and age regression, as well as a generative model for the accruate reconstruction of shapes. In particular, we propose a conditional generative model, where the condition vector provides a mechanism to control the generative process. instance, it enables to assess shape variations specific to a particular diagnosis, when passing it as side information. Next to working on single shapes, we introduce an extension for the joint analysis of multiple anatomical structures, where the simultaneous modeling of multiple structures can lead to a more compact encoding and a better understanding of disorders. We demonstrate the advantages of our framework in comprehensive experiments on real and synthetic data. The key insights are that (i) learning a shape representation specific to the given task yields higher performance than alternative shape descriptors, (ii) multi-structure analysis is both more efficient and more accurate than single-structure analysis, and (iii) point clouds generated by our model capture morphological differences associated to Alzheimers disease, to the point that they can be used to train a discriminative model for disease classification. Our framework naturally scales to the analysis of large datasets, giving it the potential to learn characteristic variations in large populations.

In particular, we propose a conditional generative model, where the condition vector provides a mechanism to control the generative process. instance, it enables to assess shape variations specific to a particular diagnosis, when passing it as side information. Next to working on single shapes, we introduce an extension for the joint analysis of multiple anatomical structures, where the simultaneous modeling of multiple structures can lead to a more compact encoding and a better understanding of disorders. We demonstrate the advantages of our framework in comprehensive experiments on real and synthetic data. The key insights are that (i) learning a shape representation specific to the given task yields higher performance than alternative shape descriptors, (ii) multi-structure analysis is both more efficient and more accurate than single-structure analysis, and (iii) point clouds generated by our model capture morphological differences associated to Alzheimers disease, to the point that they can be used to train a discriminative model for disease classification. Our framework naturally scales to the analysis of large datasets, giving it the potential to learn characteristic variations in large populations.
abstract_zh: 我们引入深度神经网络来分析解剖形状，从给定的任务中学习低维形状表示，而不是依赖于手工设计的表示。我们的框架是模块化的，由多个执行基本形状处理任务的计算块组成。该网络在无序点云上运行，并提供相似变换的不变性，避免了识别形状之间的点对应关系的需要。基于该框架，我们组装了用于疾病分类和年龄回归的判别模型，以及用于精确重建形状的生成模型。特别是，我们提出了一种条件生成模型，其中条件向量提供了控制生成过程的机制。例如，当将其作为辅助信息传递时，它可以评估特定于特定诊断的形状变化。除了处理单一形状之外，我们还引入了对多个解剖结构的联合分析的扩展，其中多个结构的同时建模可以导致更紧凑的编码和更好地理解疾病。我们在真实数据和合成数据的综合实验中展示了我们的框架的优势。关键的见解是：（i）学习特定于给定任务的形状表示比替代形状描述符产生更高的性能，（ii）多结构分析比单结构分析更高效、更准确，（iii）我们的模型生成的点云捕获与阿尔茨海默病相关的形态差异，以至于它们可用于训练疾病分类的判别模型。我们的框架自然地扩展到大型数据集的分析，使其有可能学习大量人群的特征变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度神经网络的框架，用于从点云中学习解剖形状的低维表示，实现疾病分类和形状重建，无需手动设计特征。
AI.motivation: 传统解剖形状分析依赖手工设计的特征，难以处理无序点云且缺乏对相似变换的不变性，同时多结构联合分析可提升效率与准确性。
AI.method: 构建模块化神经网络框架，处理无序点云并保持相似变换不变性；设计判别模型用于疾病分类与年龄回归，生成模型通过条件向量控制生成过程，并扩展至多结构联合分析。
AI.result: 实验表明，任务特定形状表示优于传统描述子；多结构分析更高效准确；生成的点云能捕捉阿尔茨海默病形态差异，可训练判别模型。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可扩展至大规模数据集，学习人群特征变异，具有分析复杂解剖结构与疾病模式的潜力。

title: An Analysis of Control Parameters of MOEA/D Under Two Different Optimization Scenarios
title_zh: 两种不同优化场景下MOEA/D控制参数分析
comment: This is an accepted version of a paper published in Applied Soft Computing
comments: This is an accepted version of a paper published in Applied Soft Computing
abstract: An unbounded external archive (UEA), which stores all nondominated solutions found during the search process, is frequently used to evaluate the performance of multi-objective evolutionary algorithms (MOEAs) in recent studies. A recent benchmarking study also shows that decomposition-based MOEA (MOEA/D) is competitive with state-of-the-art MOEAs when the UEA is incorporated into MOEA/D. However, a parameter study of MOEA/D using the UEA has not yet been performed. Thus, it is unclear how control parameter settings influence the performance of MOEA/D with the UEA. In this paper, we present an analysis of control parameters of MOEA/D under two performance evaluation scenarios. One is a final population scenario where the performance assessment of MOEAs is performed based on all nondominated solutions in the final population, and the other is a reduced UEA scenario where it is based on a pre-specified number of selected nondominated solutions from the UEA. Control parameters of MOEA/D investigated in this paper include the population size, scalarizing functions, and the penalty parameter of the penalty-based boundary intersection (PBI) function. Experimental results indicate that suitable settings of the three control parameters significantly depend on the choice of an optimization scenario. We also analyze the reason why the best parameter setting is totally different for each scenario.
summary: An unbounded external archive (UEA), which stores all nondominated solutions found during the search process, is frequently used to evaluate the performance of multi-objective evolutionary algorithms (MOEAs) in recent studies. A recent benchmarking study also shows that decomposition-based MOEA (MOEA/D) is competitive with state-of-the-art MOEAs when the UEA is incorporated into MOEA/D. However, a parameter study of MOEA/D using the UEA has not yet been performed. Thus, it is unclear how control parameter settings influence the performance of MOEA/D with the UEA. In this paper, we present an analysis of control parameters of MOEA/D under two performance evaluation scenarios. One is a final population scenario where the performance assessment of MOEAs is performed based on all nondominated solutions in the final population, and the other is a reduced UEA scenario where it is based on a pre-specified number of selected nondominated solutions from the UEA. Control parameters of MOEA/D investigated in this paper include the population size, scalarizing functions, and the penalty parameter of the penalty-based boundary intersection (PBI) function. Experimental results indicate that suitable settings of the three control parameters significantly depend on the choice of an optimization scenario. We also analyze the reason why the best parameter setting is totally different for each scenario.
abstract_zh: 无界外部档案（UEA）存储了搜索过程中找到的所有非支配解，在最近的研究中经常被用来评估多目标进化算法（MOEA）的性能。最近的一项基准测试研究还表明，当 UEA 合并到 MOEA/D 中时，基于分解的 MOEA (MOEA/D) 与最先进的 MOEA 相比具有竞争力。然而，尚未使用 UEA 对 MOEA/D 进行参数研究。因此，目前尚不清楚控制参数设置如何影响带有 UEA 的 MOEA/D 的性能。在本文中，我们对两种性能评估场景下的 MOEA/D 控制参数进行了分析。一种是最终群体场景，其中 MOEA 的性能评估是基于最终群体中的所有非支配解来执行的，另一种是缩减 UEA 场景，其中它基于从 UEA 中选择的预先指定数量的非支配解。本文研究的 MOEA/D 控制参数包括种群规模、标量化函数和基于惩罚的边界相交 (PBI) 函数的惩罚参数。实验结果表明，三个控制参数的合适设置很大程度上取决于优化场景的选择。我们还分析了每种场景下最佳参数设置完全不同的原因。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了MOEA/D算法在两种不同优化场景下的控制参数影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未明确MOEA/D结合无界外部存档（UEA）时控制参数对性能的影响，需探索参数设置与优化场景的关系。
AI.method: 通过实验对比两种评估场景（最终种群场景与缩减UEA场景），分析种群规模、标量化函数及PBI惩罚参数的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，三种控制参数的最优设置高度依赖于优化场景的选择，并解释了不同场景下参数差异的原因。
AI.conclusion: MOEA/D的参数配置需根据具体优化场景调整，以实现性能最优化。

title: Public Announcement Logic in HOL
title_zh: HOL 中的公告逻辑
comment: 3rd DaLí Workshop, Dynamic Logic: New Trends and Applications, Online, 9-10 October 2020
comments: 3rd DaLí Workshop, Dynamic Logic: New Trends and Applications, Online, 9-10 October 2020
abstract: A shallow semantical embedding for public announcement logic with relativized common knowledge is presented. This embedding enables the first-time automation of this logic with off-the-shelf theorem provers for classical higher-order logic. It is demonstrated (i) how meta-theoretical studies can be automated this way, and (ii) how non-trivial reasoning in the target logic (public announcement logic), required e.g. to obtain a convincing encoding and automation of the wise men puzzle, can be realized. Key to the presented semantical embedding -- in contrast, e.g., to related work on the semantical embedding of normal modal logics -- is that evaluation domains are modeled explicitly and treated as additional parameter in the encodings of the constituents of the embedded target logic, while they were previously implicitly shared between meta logic and target logic.
summary: A shallow semantical embedding for public announcement logic with relativized common knowledge is presented. This embedding enables the first-time automation of this logic with off-the-shelf theorem provers for classical higher-order logic. It is demonstrated (i) how meta-theoretical studies can be automated this way, and (ii) how non-trivial reasoning in the target logic (public announcement logic), required e.g. to obtain a convincing encoding and automation of the wise men puzzle, can be realized. Key to the presented semantical embedding -- in contrast, e.g., to related work on the semantical embedding of normal modal logics -- is that evaluation domains are modeled explicitly and treated as additional parameter in the encodings of the constituents of the embedded target logic, while they were previously implicitly shared between meta logic and target logic.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种具有相对化常识的公告逻辑的浅层语义嵌入。这种嵌入使得该逻辑首次能够通过经典高阶逻辑的现成定理证明器实现自动化。它证明了（i）元理论研究如何能够以这种方式自动化，以及（ii）目标逻辑（公告逻辑）中如何需要非平凡的推理，例如获得令人信服的编码并自动化智者之谜，是可以实现的。所提出的语义嵌入的关键——例如，与普通模态逻辑的语义嵌入相关工作相比——是评估域被显式建模并被视为嵌入目标逻辑的组成部分的编码中的附加参数，而它们之前在元逻辑和目标逻辑之间隐式共享。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在高阶逻辑（HOL）中自动化公共公告逻辑的浅层语义嵌入方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理公共公告逻辑的相对化共同知识，需通过显式建模实现自动化推理。
AI.method: 通过显式建模评估域并作为参数，利用HOL定理证明器实现逻辑嵌入与自动化。
AI.result: 首次实现公共公告逻辑的自动化，成功应用于智者谜题等复杂推理场景。
AI.conclusion: 显式处理评估域的嵌入方法为公共公告逻辑自动化提供了有效新路径。

search_text: Public Announcement Logic in HOL HOL 中的公告逻辑 A shallow semantical embedding for public announcement logic with relativized common knowledge is presented. This embedding enables the first-time automation of this logic with off-the-shelf theorem provers for classical higher-order logic. It is demonstrated (i) how meta-theoretical studies can be automated this way, and (ii) how non-trivial reasoning in the target logic (public announcement logic), required e.g. to obtain a convincing encoding and automation of the wise men puzzle, can be realized. authors_text: Phat Thai,Sameer Alam,Nimrod Lilith,Phu N. Tran,Binh Nguyen Thanh
title: Deep4Air: A Novel Deep Learning Framework for Airport Airside Surveillance
title_zh: Deep4Air：用于机场空侧监控的新型深度学习框架
abstract: An airport runway and taxiway (airside) area is a highly dynamic and complex environment featuring interactions between different types of vehicles (speed and dimension), under varying visibility and traffic conditions. Airport ground movements are deemed safety-critical activities, and safe-separation procedures must be maintained by Air Traffic Controllers (ATCs). Large airports with complicated runway-taxiway systems use advanced ground surveillance systems. However, these systems have inherent limitations and a lack of real-time analytics. In this paper, we propose a novel computer-vision based framework, namely "Deep4Air", which can not only augment the ground surveillance systems via the automated visual monitoring of runways and taxiways for aircraft location, but also provide real-time speed and distance analytics for aircraft on runways and taxiways. The proposed framework includes an adaptive deep neural network for efficiently detecting and tracking aircraft. The experimental results show an average precision of detection and tracking of up to 99.8% on simulated data with validations on surveillance videos from the digital tower at George Bush Intercontinental Airport. The results also demonstrate that "Deep4Air" can locate aircraft positions relative to the airport runway and taxiway infrastructure with high accuracy. Furthermore, aircraft speed and separation distance are monitored in real-time, providing enhanced safety management.

Airport ground movements are deemed safety-critical activities, and safe-separation procedures must be maintained by Air Traffic Controllers (ATCs). Large airports with complicated runway-taxiway systems use advanced ground surveillance systems. However, these systems have inherent limitations and a lack of real-time analytics. In this paper, we propose a novel computer-vision based framework, namely "Deep4Air", which can not only augment the ground surveillance systems via the automated visual monitoring of runways and taxiways for aircraft location, but also provide real-time speed and distance analytics for aircraft on runways and taxiways. The proposed framework includes an adaptive deep neural network for efficiently detecting and tracking aircraft. The experimental results show an average precision of detection and tracking of up to 99.8% on simulated data with validations on surveillance videos from the digital tower at George Bush Intercontinental Airport. The results also demonstrate that "Deep4Air" can locate aircraft positions relative to the airport runway and taxiway infrastructure with high accuracy. Furthermore, aircraft speed and separation distance are monitored in real-time, providing enhanced safety management.
abstract_zh: 机场跑道和滑行道（空侧）区域是一个高度动态和复杂的环境，在不同的能见度和交通条件下，不同类型的车辆（速度和尺寸）之间相互作用。机场地面活动被视为安全关键活动，空中交通管制员 (ATC) 必须维持安全分离程序。拥有复杂跑道滑行道系统的大型机场使用先进的地面监视系统。然而，这些系统具有固有的局限性并且缺乏实时分析。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于计算机视觉的框架，即“Deep4Air”，它不仅可以通过对跑道和滑行道的飞机位置进行自动视觉监控来增强地面监视系统，还可以为跑道和滑行道上的飞机提供实时速度和距离分析。所提出的框架包括用于有效检测和跟踪飞机的自适应深度神经网络。实验结果显示，模拟数据的检测和跟踪平均精度高达 99.8%，并对乔治布什洲际机场数字塔的监控视频进行了验证。结果还表明，“Deep4Air”可以高精度定位飞机相对于机场跑道和滑行道基础设施的位置。此外，实时监控飞机速度和间隔距离，增强安全管理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的机场地面监控框架Deep4Air，用于实时监测跑道和滑行道上的飞机位置、速度及间距，提升机场安全管理水平。
AI.motivation: 现有机场地面监控系统存在实时分析能力不足的问题，需通过自动化视觉监控提升飞机安全间隔管理效率。
AI.method: 设计自适应深度神经网络，实现飞机的高效检测与跟踪，并结合实时数据分析技术计算飞机速度与间距。
AI.result: 在模拟数据和乔治·布什洲际机场实际监控视频中，检测与跟踪精度达99.8%，可准确定位飞机位置并实时监控关键参数。
AI.conclusion: Deep4Air验证了深度学习在机场地面监控中的有效性，为提升航空安全提供了可行的技术方案。

title: PrognoseNet: A Generative Probabilistic Framework for Multimodal Position Prediction given Context Information
title_zh: PrognoseNet：给定上下文信息的多模态位置预测的生成概率框架
comment: 8 pages, 9 figures
comments: 8 pages, 9 figures
abstract: The ability to predict multiple possible future positions of the ego-vehicle given the surrounding context while also estimating their probabilities is key to safe autonomous driving. Most of the current state-of-the-art Deep Learning approaches are trained on trajectory data to achieve this task. However trajectory data captured by sensor systems is highly imbalanced, since by far most of the trajectories follow straight lines with an approximately constant velocity. This poses a huge challenge for the task of predicting future positions, which is inherently a regression problem. Current state-of-the-art approaches alleviate this problem only by major preprocessing of the training data, e.g. resampling, clustering into anchors etc. In this paper we propose an approach which reformulates the prediction problem as a classification task, allowing for powerful tools, e.g. focal loss, to combat the imbalance. To this end we design a generative probabilistic model consisting of a deep neural network with a Mixture of Gaussian head. A smart choice of the latent variable allows for the reformulation of the log-likelihood function as a combination of a classification problem and a much simplified regression problem. The output of our model is an estimate of the probability density function of future positions, hence allowing for prediction of multiple possible positions while also estimating their probabilities. The proposed approach can easily incorporate context information and does not require any preprocessing of the data.
summary: The ability to predict multiple possible future positions of the ego-vehicle given the surrounding context while also estimating their probabilities is key to safe autonomous driving. Most of the current state-of-the-art Deep Learning approaches are trained on trajectory data to achieve this task. However trajectory data captured by sensor systems is highly imbalanced, since by far most of the trajectories follow straight lines with an approximately constant velocity. This poses a huge challenge for the task of predicting future positions, which is inherently a regression problem. Current state-of-the-art approaches alleviate this problem only by major preprocessing of the training data, e.g. resampling, clustering into anchors etc. In this paper we propose an approach which reformulates the prediction problem as a classification task, allowing for powerful tools, e.g. focal loss, to combat the imbalance. To this end we design a generative probabilistic model consisting of a deep neural network with a Mixture of Gaussian head. A smart choice of the latent variable allows for the reformulation of the log-likelihood function as a combination of a classification problem and a much simplified regression problem. The output of our model is an estimate of the probability density function of future positions, hence allowing for prediction of multiple possible positions while also estimating their probabilities. The proposed approach can easily incorporate context information and does not require any preprocessing of the data.
abstract_zh: 在给定周围环境的情况下预测自我车辆未来多个可能位置的能力，同时估计它们的概率是安全自动驾驶的关键。当前大多数最先进的深度学习方法都是根据轨迹数据进行训练来完成此任务。然而，传感器系统捕获的轨迹数据高度不平衡，因为到目前为止，大多数轨迹都以近似恒定的速度遵循直线。这对预测未来位置的任务提出了巨大的挑战，这本质上是一个回归问题。当前最先进的方法只能通过对训练数据进行主要预处理来缓解这个问题，例如在本文中，我们提出了一种将预测问题重新表述为分类任务的方法，允许使用强大的工具，例如焦点损失，以对抗不平衡。为此，我们设计了一个生成概率模型，由具有混合高斯头的深度神经网络组成。潜在变量的明智选择允许将对数似然函数重新表述为分类问题和简化得多的回归问题的组合。我们模型的输出是对未来位置的概率密度函数的估计，因此允许预测多个可能的位置，同时也估计它们的概率。所提出的方法可以轻松地合并上下文信息，并且不需要对数据进行任何预处理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PrognoseNet，一种生成概率框架，用于在给定上下文信息的情况下预测自车的多模态未来位置及其概率。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法因轨迹数据高度不平衡（多数为直线匀速轨迹）导致预测困难，且依赖预处理缓解问题，但效果有限。
AI.method: 将预测问题重构为分类任务，设计包含高斯混合头的生成概率模型，通过智能选择潜在变量将对数似然函数分解为分类与简化回归问题。
AI.result: 模型输出未来位置的概率密度函数，无需数据预处理即可预测多位置及其概率，并有效整合上下文信息。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分类框架解决数据不平衡问题，简化回归任务，实现了更鲁棒的多模态位置预测。

tldr: 本文提出PrognoseNet，一种生成概率框架，用于在给定上下文信息的情况下预测自车的多模态未来位置及其概率。
motivation: 现有深度学习方法因轨迹数据高度不平衡（多数为直线匀速轨迹）导致预测困难，且依赖预处理缓解问题，但效果有限。
method: 将预测问题重构为分类任务，设计包含高斯混合头的生成概率模型，通过智能选择潜在变量将对数似然函数分解为分类与简化回归问题。
result: 模型输出未来位置的概率密度函数，无需数据预处理即可预测多位置及其概率，并有效整合上下文信息。
conclusion: 该方法通过分类框架解决数据不平衡问题，简化回归任务，实现了更鲁棒的多模态位置预测。
search_text: PrognoseNet: A Generative Probabilistic Framework for Multimodal Position Prediction given Context Information PrognoseNet：给定上下文信息的多模态位置预测的生成概率框架 The ability to predict multiple possible future positions of the ego-vehicle given the surrounding context while also estimating their probabilities is key to safe autonomous driving. Most of the current state-of-the-art Deep Learning approaches are trained on trajectory data to achieve this task. However trajectory data captured by sensor systems is highly imbalanced, since by far most of the trajectories follow straight lines with an approximately constant velocity. This poses a huge challenge for the task of predicting future positions, which is inherently a regression problem. Current state-of-the-art approaches alleviate this problem only by major preprocessing of the training data, e.g. resampling, clustering into anchors etc. In this paper we propose an approach which reformulates the prediction problem as a classification task, allowing for powerful tools, e.g. focal loss, to combat the imbalance. To this end we design a generative probabilistic model consisting of a deep neural network with a Mixture of Gaussian head. A smart choice of the latent variable allows for the reformulation of the log-likelihood function as a combination of a classification problem and a much simplified regression problem. The output of our model is an estimate of the probability density function of future positions, hence allowing for prediction of multiple possible positions while also estimating their probabilities. The proposed approach can easily incorporate context information and does not require any preprocessing of the data. 在给定周围环境的情况下预测自我车辆未来多个可能位置的能力，同时估计它们的概率是安全自动驾驶的关键。当前大多数最先进的深度学习方法都是根据轨迹数据进行训练来完成此任务。然而，传感器系统捕获的轨迹数据高度不平衡，因为到目前为止，大多数轨迹都以近似恒定的速度遵循直线。这对预测未来位置的任务提出了巨大的挑战，这本质上是一个回归问题。当前最先进的方法只能通过对训练数据进行主要预处理来缓解这个问题，例如在本文中，我们提出了一种将预测问题重新表述为分类任务的方法，允许使用强大的工具，例如焦点损失，以对抗不平衡。为此，我们设计了一个生成概率模型，由具有混合高斯头的深度神经网络组成。潜在变量的明智选择允许将对数似然函数重新表述为分类问题和简化得多的回归问题的组合。我们模型的输出是对未来位置的概率密度函数的估计，因此允许预测多个可能的位置，同时也估计它们的概率。所提出的方法可以轻松地合并上下文信息，并且不需要对数据进行任何预处理。 本文提出PrognoseNet，一种生成概率框架，用于在给定上下文信息的情况下预测自车的多模态未来位置及其概率。 Thomas Kurbiel,Akash Sachdeva,Kun Zhao,Markus Buehren cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.MA

title: Block-wise Image Transformation with Secret Key for Adversarially Robust Defense
title_zh: 使用密钥进行分块图像转换，实现对抗性鲁棒防御
comment: Under review
comments: Under review
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel defensive transformation that enables us to maintain a high classification accuracy under the use of both clean images and adversarial examples for adversarially robust defense. The proposed transformation is a block-wise preprocessing technique with a secret key to input images. We developed three algorithms to realize the proposed transformation: Pixel Shuffling, Bit Flipping, and FFX Encryption. Experiments were carried out on the CIFAR-10 and ImageNet datasets by using both black-box and white-box attacks with various metrics including adaptive ones. The results show that the proposed defense achieves high accuracy close to that of using clean images even under adaptive attacks for the first time. In the best-case scenario, a model trained by using images transformed by FFX Encryption (block size of 4) yielded an accuracy of 92.30% on clean images and 91.48% under PGD attack with a noise distance of 8/255, which is close to the non-robust accuracy (95.45%) for the CIFAR-10 dataset, and it yielded an accuracy of 72.18% on clean images and 71.43% under the same attack, which is also close to the standard accuracy (73.70%) for the ImageNet dataset. Overall, all three proposed algorithms are demonstrated to outperform state-of-the-art defenses including adversarial training whether or not a model is under attack.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel defensive transformation that enables us to maintain a high classification accuracy under the use of both clean images and adversarial examples for adversarially robust defense. The proposed transformation is a block-wise preprocessing technique with a secret key to input images. We developed three algorithms to realize the proposed transformation: Pixel Shuffling, Bit Flipping, and FFX Encryption. Experiments were carried out on the CIFAR-10 and ImageNet datasets by using both black-box and white-box attacks with various metrics including adaptive ones. The results show that the proposed defense achieves high accuracy close to that of using clean images even under adaptive attacks for the first time. In the best-case scenario, a model trained by using images transformed by FFX Encryption (block size of 4) yielded an accuracy of 92.30% on clean images and 91.48% under PGD attack with a noise distance of 8/255, which is close to the non-robust accuracy (95.45%) for the CIFAR-10 dataset, and it yielded an accuracy of 72.18% on clean images and 71.43% under the same attack, which is also close to the standard accuracy (73.70%) for the ImageNet dataset. Overall, all three proposed algorithms are demonstrated to outperform state-of-the-art defenses including adversarial training whether or not a model is under attack.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的防御变换，使我们能够在使用干净图像和对抗性示例的情况下保持较高的分类精度，以实现对抗性鲁棒防御。所提出的变换是一种分块预处理技术，具有输入图像的密钥。我们开发了三种算法来实现所提出的转换：像素洗牌、位翻转和 FFX 加密。通过使用具有各种指标（包括自适应指标）的黑盒和白盒攻击，在 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 数据集上进行了实验。结果表明，即使在第一次自适应攻击下，所提出的防御方法也能达到接近使用干净图像的高精度。在最佳情况下，使用 FFX 加密（块大小为 4）转换的图像训练的模型在干净图像上的准确率达到 92.30%，在噪声距离为 8/255 的 PGD 攻击下的准确率达到 91.48%，接近 CIFAR-10 数据集的非鲁棒准确率（95.45%），在干净图像和在相同攻击下，准确率达到 71.43%，也接近 ImageNet 数据集的标准准确率（73.70%）。总体而言，所有三种提出的算法都被证明优于最先进的防御措施，包括对抗性训练，无论模型是否受到攻击。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于块级图像变换和密钥的新型防御方法，通过预处理输入图像以提高对抗攻击下的分类准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有防御方法在对抗样本下准确率下降明显，需设计一种既能处理干净图像又能抵御对抗攻击的鲁棒防御机制。
AI.method: 开发了三种算法：像素洗牌、位翻转和FFX加密，通过块级预处理结合密钥对输入图像进行变换。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet数据集上，FFX加密（块大小4）在干净图像上准确率达92.30%，在PGD攻击下保持91.48%，接近非鲁棒准确率；ImageNet数据集下准确率分别为72.18%和71.43%，优于现有防御方法。
AI.conclusion: 三种算法均显著优于现有防御技术，在有无攻击情况下均能保持高分类准确率，为对抗鲁棒性提供新思路。

authors_text: Zheng Li,Ying Huang,Defang Chen,Tianren Luo,Ning Cai,Zhigeng Pan
title: Online Knowledge Distillation via Multi-branch Diversity Enhancement
title_zh: 通过多分支多样性增强在线知识蒸馏
comment: ACCV 2020
comments: ACCV 2020
abstract: Knowledge distillation is an effective method to transfer the knowledge from the cumbersome teacher model to the lightweight student model. Online knowledge distillation uses the ensembled prediction results of multiple student models as soft targets to train each student model. However, the homogenization problem will lead to difficulty in further improving model performance. In this work, we propose a new distillation method to enhance the diversity among multiple student models. We introduce Feature Fusion Module (FFM), which improves the performance of the attention mechanism in the network by integrating rich semantic information contained in the last block of multiple student models. Furthermore, we use the Classifier Diversification(CD) loss function to strengthen the differences between the student models and deliver a better ensemble result. Extensive experiments proved that our method significantly enhances the diversity among student models and brings better distillation performance. We evaluate our method on three image classification datasets: CIFAR-10/100 and CINIC-10. The results show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on these datasets.
summary: Knowledge distillation is an effective method to transfer the knowledge from the cumbersome teacher model to the lightweight student model. Online knowledge distillation uses the ensembled prediction results of multiple student models as soft targets to train each student model. However, the homogenization problem will lead to difficulty in further improving model performance. In this work, we propose a new distillation method to enhance the diversity among multiple student models. We introduce Feature Fusion Module (FFM), which improves the performance of the attention mechanism in the network by integrating rich semantic information contained in the last block of multiple student models. Furthermore, we use the Classifier Diversification(CD) loss function to strengthen the differences between the student models and deliver a better ensemble result. Extensive experiments proved that our method significantly enhances the diversity among student models and brings better distillation performance. We evaluate our method on three image classification datasets: CIFAR-10/100 and CINIC-10. The results show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on these datasets.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏是将知识从繁琐的教师模型转移到轻量级的学生模型的有效方法。在线知识蒸馏使用多个学生模型的集成预测结果作为软目标来训练每个学生模型。然而，同质化问题将导致模型性能难以进一步提升。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的蒸馏方法来增强多个学生模型之间的多样性。我们引入了特征融合模块（FFM），它通过集成多个学生模型最后一个块中包含的丰富语义信息来提高网络中注意力机制的性能。此外，我们使用分类器多样化（CD）损失函数来加强学生模型之间的差异并提供更好的集成结果。大量的实验证明，我们的方法显着增强了学生模型之间的多样性，并带来了更好的蒸馏性能。我们在三个图像分类数据集上评估我们的方法：CIFAR-10/100 和 CINIC-10。结果表明，我们的方法在这些数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过多分支多样性增强的在线知识蒸馏方法，解决学生模型同质化问题以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有在线知识蒸馏方法因学生模型预测结果趋同，难以进一步提升模型性能，需增强模型多样性。
AI.method: 引入特征融合模块（FFM）整合多学生模型语义信息，并设计分类器多样化（CD）损失函数强化模型差异。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100和CINIC-10数据集上实现最先进的分类性能，显著提升学生模型多样性与蒸馏效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过增强多分支学生模型的多样性，所提方法有效提升了在线知识蒸馏的性能表现。

Extensive experiments proved that our method significantly enhances the diversity among student models and brings better distillation performance. We evaluate our method on three image classification datasets: CIFAR-10/100 and CINIC-10. The results show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on these datasets. 知识蒸馏是将知识从繁琐的教师模型转移到轻量级的学生模型的有效方法。在线知识蒸馏使用多个学生模型的集成预测结果作为软目标来训练每个学生模型。然而，同质化问题将导致模型性能难以进一步提升。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的蒸馏方法来增强多个学生模型之间的多样性。我们引入了特征融合模块（FFM），它通过集成多个学生模型最后一个块中包含的丰富语义信息来提高网络中注意力机制的性能。此外，我们使用分类器多样化（CD）损失函数来加强学生模型之间的差异并提供更好的集成结果。大量的实验证明，我们的方法显着增强了学生模型之间的多样性，并带来了更好的蒸馏性能。我们在三个图像分类数据集上评估我们的方法：CIFAR-10/100 和 CINIC-10。结果表明，我们的方法在这些数据集上实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出一种通过多分支多样性增强的在线知识蒸馏方法，解决学生模型同质化问题以提升性能。 Zheng Li,Ying Huang,Defang Chen,Tianren Luo,Ning Cai,Zhigeng Pan cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Chongyi Li,Runmin Cong,Chunle Guo,Hua Li,Chunjie Zhang,Feng Zheng,Yao Zhao
title: A Parallel Down-Up Fusion Network for Salient Object Detection in Optical Remote Sensing Images
title_zh: 光学遥感图像中显着目标检测的并行下上融合网络
comment: Neurocomputing, 415, pp. 411-420, 2020
comments: Neurocomputing, 415, pp. 411-420, 2020
abstract: The diverse spatial resolutions, various object types, scales and orientations, and cluttered backgrounds in optical remote sensing images (RSIs) challenge the current salient object detection (SOD) approaches. It is commonly unsatisfactory to directly employ the SOD approaches designed for nature scene images (NSIs) to RSIs. In this paper, we propose a novel Parallel Down-up Fusion network (PDF-Net) for SOD in optical RSIs, which takes full advantage of the in-path low- and high-level features and cross-path multi-resolution features to distinguish diversely scaled salient objects and suppress the cluttered backgrounds. To be specific, keeping a key observation that the salient objects still are salient no matter the resolutions of images are in mind, the PDF-Net takes successive down-sampling to form five parallel paths and perceive scaled salient objects that are commonly existed in optical RSIs. Meanwhile, we adopt the dense connections to take advantage of both low- and high-level information in the same path and build up the relations of cross paths, which explicitly yield strong feature representations. At last, we fuse the multiple-resolution features in parallel paths to combine the benefits of the features with different resolutions, i.e., the high-resolution feature consisting of complete structure and clear details while the low-resolution features highlighting the scaled salient objects. Extensive experiments on the ORSSD dataset demonstrate that the proposed network is superior to the state-of-the-art approaches both qualitatively and quantitatively.

It is commonly unsatisfactory to directly employ the SOD approaches designed for nature scene images (NSIs) to RSIs. To be specific, keeping a key observation that the salient objects still are salient no matter the resolutions of images are in mind, the PDF-Net takes successive down-sampling to form five parallel paths and perceive scaled salient objects that are commonly existed in optical RSIs. Meanwhile, we adopt the dense connections to take advantage of both low- and high-level information in the same path and build up the relations of cross paths, which explicitly yield strong feature representations. At last, we fuse the multiple-resolution features in parallel paths to combine the benefits of the features with different resolutions, i.e., the high-resolution feature consisting of complete structure and clear details while the low-resolution features highlighting the scaled salient objects. Extensive experiments on the ORSSD dataset demonstrate that the proposed network is superior to the state-of-the-art approaches both qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 光学遥感图像（RSI）中不同的空间分辨率、不同的物体类型、尺度和方向以及杂乱的背景对当前的显着物体检测（SOD）方法提出了挑战。直接采用为自然场景图像（NSI）设计的 SOD 方法到 RSI 通常并不令人满意。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于光学 RSI 中 SOD 的新型并行下上融合网络（PDF-Net），它充分利用路径内低级和高级特征以及交叉路径多分辨率特征来区分不同尺度的显着物体并抑制杂乱的背景。具体来说，保持一个关键的观察结果，即无论图像的分辨率如何，显着对象仍然是显着的，PDF-Net 采取连续下采样以形成五个并行路径并感知光学 RSI 中常见的缩放显着对象。同时，我们采用密集连接来利用同一路径中的低层和高层信息，并建立交叉路径的关系，从而明确地产生强特征表示。最后，我们在并行路径中融合多分辨率特征，以结合不同分辨率特征的优点，即高分辨率特征包含完整的结构和清晰的细节，而低分辨率特征突出缩放后的显着对象。对 ORSSD 数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的网络在定性和定量上都优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种并行下采样-上采样融合网络（PDF-Net），用于光学遥感图像中的显著物体检测。
AI.motivation: 现有自然场景图像显著物体检测方法难以适应光学遥感图像（RSIs）的多尺度、复杂背景及分辨率差异等挑战。
AI.method: 设计五条并行路径进行多尺度特征提取，结合密集连接增强同路径内外特征关联，并融合多分辨率特征以保留结构细节与显著目标信息。
AI.result: 在ORSSD数据集上，PDF-Net在定性与定量指标上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过多路径特征融合与跨尺度信息整合，PDF-Net有效解决了光学遥感图像显著目标检测中的关键难题。

It is commonly unsatisfactory to directly employ the SOD approaches designed for nature scene images (NSIs) to RSIs. In this paper, we propose a novel Parallel Down-up Fusion network (PDF-Net) for SOD in optical RSIs, which takes full advantage of the in-path low- and high-level features and cross-path multi-resolution features to distinguish diversely scaled salient objects and suppress the cluttered backgrounds. To be specific, keeping a key observation that the salient objects still are salient no matter the resolutions of images are in mind, the PDF-Net takes successive down-sampling to form five parallel paths and perceive scaled salient objects that are commonly existed in optical RSIs. Meanwhile, we adopt the dense connections to take advantage of both low- and high-level information in the same path and build up the relations of cross paths, which explicitly yield strong feature representations. At last, we fuse the multiple-resolution features in parallel paths to combine the benefits of the features with different resolutions, i.e., the high-resolution feature consisting of complete structure and clear details while the low-resolution features highlighting the scaled salient objects. Extensive experiments on the ORSSD dataset demonstrate that the proposed network is superior to the state-of-the-art approaches both qualitatively and quantitatively. 光学遥感图像（RSI）中不同的空间分辨率、不同的物体类型、尺度和方向以及杂乱的背景对当前的显着物体检测（SOD）方法提出了挑战。直接采用为自然场景图像（NSI）设计的 SOD 方法到 RSI 通常并不令人满意。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于光学 RSI 中 SOD 的新型并行下上融合网络（PDF-Net），它充分利用路径内低级和高级特征以及交叉路径多分辨率特征来区分不同尺度的显着物体并抑制杂乱的背景。具体来说，保持一个关键的观察结果，即无论图像的分辨率如何，显着对象仍然是显着的，PDF-Net 采取连续下采样以形成五个并行路径并感知光学 RSI 中常见的缩放显着对象。同时，我们采用密集连接来利用同一路径中的低层和高层信息，并建立交叉路径的关系，从而明确地产生强特征表示。最后，我们在并行路径中融合多分辨率特征，以结合不同分辨率特征的优点，即高分辨率特征包含完整的结构和清晰的细节，而低分辨率特征突出缩放后的显着对象。对 ORSSD 数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的网络在定性和定量上都优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种并行下采样-上采样融合网络（PDF-Net），用于光学遥感图像中的显著物体检测。 Chongyi Li,Runmin Cong,Chunle Guo,Hua Li,Chunjie Zhang,Feng Zheng,Yao Zhao cs.CV

title: Effective Regularization Through Loss-Function Metalearning
title_zh: 通过损失函数元学习进行有效正则化
comment: A shorter version of this paper appeared in CEC 2025; this paper includes appendices, expanded references, and corrections
comments: A shorter version of this paper appeared in CEC 2025; this paper includes appendices, expanded references, and corrections
abstract: Evolutionary computation can be used to optimize several different aspects of neural network architectures. For instance, the TaylorGLO method discovers novel, customized loss functions, resulting in improved performance, faster training, and improved data utilization. A likely reason is that such functions discourage overfitting, leading to effective regularization. This paper demonstrates theoretically that this is indeed the case for TaylorGLO. Learning rule decomposition reveals that evolved loss functions balance two factors: the pull toward zero error, and a push away from it to avoid overfitting. This is a general principle that may be used to understand other regularization techniques as well (as demonstrated in this paper for label smoothing). The theoretical analysis leads to a constraint that can be utilized to find more effective loss functions in practice; the mechanism also results in networks that are more robust (as demonstrated in this paper with adversarial inputs). The analysis in this paper thus constitutes a first step towards understanding regularization, and demonstrates the power of evolutionary neural architecture search in general.
summary: Evolutionary computation can be used to optimize several different aspects of neural network architectures. For instance, the TaylorGLO method discovers novel, customized loss functions, resulting in improved performance, faster training, and improved data utilization. A likely reason is that such functions discourage overfitting, leading to effective regularization. This paper demonstrates theoretically that this is indeed the case for TaylorGLO. Learning rule decomposition reveals that evolved loss functions balance two factors: the pull toward zero error, and a push away from it to avoid overfitting. This is a general principle that may be used to understand other regularization techniques as well (as demonstrated in this paper for label smoothing). The theoretical analysis leads to a constraint that can be utilized to find more effective loss functions in practice; the mechanism also results in networks that are more robust (as demonstrated in this paper with adversarial inputs). The analysis in this paper thus constitutes a first step towards understanding regularization, and demonstrates the power of evolutionary neural architecture search in general.
abstract_zh: 进化计算可用于优化神经网络架构的几个不同方面。例如，TaylorGLO 方法发现了新颖的定制损失函数，从而提高了性能、加快了训练速度并提高了数据利用率。一个可能的原因是此类函数可以防止过度拟合，从而实现有效的正则化。本文从理论上证明了 TaylorGLO 确实如此。学习规则分解揭示了进化的损失函数平衡了两个因素：向零误差的拉动，以及远离零误差的推动以避免过度拟合。这是一个通用原则，也可用于理解其他正则化技术（如本文中针对标签平滑所演示的）。理论分析产生了一个约束，可以用来在实践中找到更有效的损失函数；该机制还可以使网络更加强大（如本文中使用对抗性输入所证明的）。因此，本文的分析构成了理解正则化的第一步，并展示了进化神经架构搜索的总体力量。

AI.tldr: 本文通过理论分析和实验验证，证明通过进化计算优化的损失函数（如TaylorGLO方法）能够有效实现正则化，提升神经网络性能并增强鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统正则化方法（如L2正则化）可能存在不足，而通过进化计算优化的损失函数可能更高效地平衡误差最小化与防止过拟合，但其理论依据尚不明确。
AI.method: 基于学习规则分解和理论分析，研究进化计算生成的损失函数如何平衡误差趋零与避免过拟合的机制，并通过对抗样本测试验证其鲁棒性。
AI.result: 理论证明了TaylorGLO方法通过动态平衡误差拉力与过拟合推力实现正则化；实验显示其提升模型性能、加速训练并增强对抗鲁棒性，且该机制可推广至标签平滑等其他技术。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了损失函数正则化的通用原理，为设计更有效的正则化方法提供理论指导，并展示了进化神经架构搜索在优化模型训练中的潜力。
